search_text: Hybrid Learning- and Model-Based Planning and Control of In-Hand Manipulation 基于混合学习和模型的手动操作规划和控制 This paper presents a hierarchical framework for planning and control of in-hand manipulation of a rigid object involving grasp changes using fully-actuated multifingered robotic hands. While the framework can be applied to the general dexterous manipulation, we focus on a more complex definition of in-hand manipulation, where at the goal pose the hand has to reach a grasp suitable for using the object as a tool. The high level planner determines the object trajectory as well as the grasp changes, i.e. adding, removing, or sliding fingers, to be executed by the low-level controller. While the grasp sequence is planned online by a learning-based policy to adapt to variations, the trajectory planner and the low-level controller for object tracking and contact force control are exclusively model-based to robustly realize the plan. By infusing the knowledge about the physics of the problem and the low-level controller into the grasp planner, it learns to successfully generate grasps similar to those generated by model-based optimization approaches, obviating the high computation cost of online running of such methods to account for variations. By performing experiments in physics simulation for realistic tool use scenarios, we show the success of our method on different tool-use tasks and dexterous hand models. Additionally, we show that this hybrid method offers more robustness to trajectory and task variations compared to a model-based method. 本文提出了一个分层框架，用于规划和控制刚性物体的手动操作，涉及使用全驱动多指机器人手进行抓握变化。虽然该框架可以应用于一般的灵巧操作，但我们专注于手动操作的更复杂的定义，其中在目标姿势时，手必须达到适合使用物体作为工具的抓握力。高层规划器确定对象轨迹以及抓取变化，即添加、移除或滑动手指，由低层控制器执行。虽然抓取序列是通过基于学习的策略在线规划以适应变化，但用于对象跟踪和接触力控制的轨迹规划器和低级控制器完全基于模型，以稳健地实现该计划。通过将有关问题物理和低级控制器的知识注入抓取规划器中，它学会了成功生成类似于基于模型的优化方法生成的抓取，从而避免了在线运行此类方法来解释变化的高计算成本。通过对真实工具使用场景进行物理模拟实验，我们展示了我们的方法在不同工具使用任务和灵巧手模型上的成功。此外，我们还表明，与基于模型的方法相比，这种混合方法对轨迹和任务变化具有更强的鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种结合学习与模型的混合方法，用于多指机械手在手操作中抓取变化的规划与控制。 Rana Soltani Zarrin,Katsu Yamane,Rianna Jitosho cs.RO

authors_text: Daniel T. Larsson,Arash Asgharivaskasi,Jaein Lim,Nikolay Atanasov,Panagiotis Tsiotras
title: Information-theoretic Abstraction of Semantic Octree Models for Integrated Perception and Planning
title_zh: 用于综合感知和规划的语义八叉树模型的信息论抽象
abstract: In this paper, we develop an approach that enables autonomous robots to build and compress semantic environment representations from point-cloud data. Our approach builds a three-dimensional, semantic tree representation of the environment from sensor data which is then compressed by a novel information-theoretic tree-pruning approach. The proposed approach is probabilistic and incorporates the uncertainty in semantic classification inherent in real-world environments. Moreover, our approach allows robots to prioritize individual semantic classes when generating the compressed trees, so as to design multi-resolution representations that retain the relevant semantic information while simultaneously discarding unwanted semantic categories. We demonstrate the approach by compressing semantic octree models of a large outdoor, semantically rich, real-world environment. In addition, we show how the octree abstractions can be used to create semantically-informed graphs for motion planning, and provide a comparison of our approach with uninformed graph construction methods such as Halton sequences.
summary: In this paper, we develop an approach that enables autonomous robots to build and compress semantic environment representations from point-cloud data. Our approach builds a three-dimensional, semantic tree representation of the environment from sensor data which is then compressed by a novel information-theoretic tree-pruning approach. The proposed approach is probabilistic and incorporates the uncertainty in semantic classification inherent in real-world environments. Moreover, our approach allows robots to prioritize individual semantic classes when generating the compressed trees, so as to design multi-resolution representations that retain the relevant semantic information while simultaneously discarding unwanted semantic categories. We demonstrate the approach by compressing semantic octree models of a large outdoor, semantically rich, real-world environment. In addition, we show how the octree abstractions can be used to create semantically-informed graphs for motion planning, and provide a comparison of our approach with uninformed graph construction methods such as Halton sequences.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们开发了一种方法，使自主机器人能够从点云数据构建和压缩语义环境表示。我们的方法根据传感器数据构建环境的三维语义树表示，然后通过新颖的信息论树修剪方法对其进行压缩。所提出的方法是概率性的，并结合了现实世界环境中固有的语义分类的不确定性。此外，我们的方法允许机器人在生成压缩树时优先考虑各个语义类别，以便设计保留相关语义信息的多分辨率表示，同时丢弃不需要的语义类别。我们通过压缩大型户外、语义丰富的现实世界环境的语义八叉树模型来演示该方法。此外，我们还展示了如何使用八叉树抽象来创建用于运动规划的语义信息图，并将我们的方法与非信息图构造方法（例如 Halton 序列）进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于信息论的语义八叉树模型抽象方法，用于自主机器人在点云数据中构建和压缩语义环境表示，以实现感知与规划的集成。
AI.motivation: 现实环境中存在语义分类的不确定性，且大规模复杂场景的语义表示需要高效压缩与多分辨率表示，传统方法难以兼顾语义信息保留与计算效率。
AI.method: 通过传感器数据构建三维语义树结构，采用信息论树剪枝方法进行压缩，并允许机器人按语义类别优先级生成多分辨率表示，结合语义信息生成运动规划图。
AI.result: 在大型户外真实场景中验证了方法有效性，展示了语义八叉树抽象在运动规划中的优势，并优于无语义信息的Halton序列等方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过概率建模和语义优先压缩，在保留关键语义信息的同时降低计算复杂度，为感知与规划的集成提供了有效框架。

authors_text: Shaoshuai Shi,Li Jiang,Dengxin Dai,Bernt Schiele
title: MTR-A: 1st Place Solution for 2022 Waymo Open Dataset Challenge -- Motion Prediction
title_zh: MTR-A：2022 年 Waymo 开放数据集挑战赛第一名解决方案——运动预测
comment: The 1st place solution report for Waymo Motion Prediction Challenge of Workshop on Autonomous Driving of CVPR 2022
comments: The 1st place solution report for Waymo Motion Prediction Challenge of Workshop on Autonomous Driving of CVPR 2022
abstract: In this report, we present the 1st place solution for motion prediction track in 2022 Waymo Open Dataset Challenges. We propose a novel Motion Transformer framework for multimodal motion prediction, which introduces a small set of novel motion query pairs for generating better multimodal future trajectories by jointly performing the intention localization and iterative motion refinement. A simple model ensemble strategy with non-maximum-suppression is adopted to further boost the final performance. Our approach achieves the 1st place on the motion prediction leaderboard of 2022 Waymo Open Dataset Challenges, outperforming other methods with remarkable margins. Code will be available at https://github.com/sshaoshuai/MTR.
summary: In this report, we present the 1st place solution for motion prediction track in 2022 Waymo Open Dataset Challenges. We propose a novel Motion Transformer framework for multimodal motion prediction, which introduces a small set of novel motion query pairs for generating better multimodal future trajectories by jointly performing the intention localization and iterative motion refinement. A simple model ensemble strategy with non-maximum-suppression is adopted to further boost the final performance. Our approach achieves the 1st place on the motion prediction leaderboard of 2022 Waymo Open Dataset Challenges, outperforming other methods with remarkable margins. Code will be available at https://github.com/sshaoshuai/MTR.
abstract_zh: 在本报告中，我们展示了 2022 年 Waymo 开放数据集挑战赛中运动预测轨迹第一名的解决方案。我们提出了一种用于多模态运动预测的新颖的运动变换器框架，该框架引入了一小组新颖的运动查询对，通过联合执行意图定位和迭代运动细化来生成更好的多模态未来轨迹。采用非极大值抑制的简单模型集成策略来进一步提高最终性能。我们的方法在 2022 年 Waymo 开放数据集挑战赛的运动预测排行榜上获得了第一名，以显着的优势超越了其他方法。代码可在 https://github.com/sshaoshuai/MTR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MTR-A框架，在2022 Waymo开放数据集挑战赛运动预测赛道中获得第一名。
AI.motivation: 为了解决多模态运动预测中意图定位与轨迹优化的耦合问题，提升未来轨迹预测的准确性和多样性。
AI.method: 设计Motion Transformer框架，引入新型运动查询对，联合执行意图定位与迭代运动优化，并采用非极大值抑制的模型集成策略。
AI.result: 在挑战赛运动预测榜单中排名第一，显著优于其他方法，代码已开源至GitHub。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了意图定位与迭代优化结合的有效性，为多模态运动预测任务设立了新基准。

motivation: 为了解决多模态运动预测中意图定位与轨迹优化的耦合问题，提升未来轨迹预测的准确性和多样性。
method: 设计Motion Transformer框架，引入新型运动查询对，联合执行意图定位与迭代运动优化，并采用非极大值抑制的模型集成策略。
result: 在挑战赛运动预测榜单中排名第一，显著优于其他方法，代码已开源至GitHub。
conclusion: 该方法验证了意图定位与迭代优化结合的有效性，为多模态运动预测任务设立了新基准。
search_text: MTR-A: 1st Place Solution for 2022 Waymo Open Dataset Challenge -- Motion Prediction MTR-A：2022 年 Waymo 开放数据集挑战赛第一名解决方案——运动预测 In this report, we present the 1st place solution for motion prediction track in 2022 Waymo Open Dataset Challenges. We propose a novel Motion Transformer framework for multimodal motion prediction, which introduces a small set of novel motion query pairs for generating better multimodal future trajectories by jointly performing the intention localization and iterative motion refinement. A simple model ensemble strategy with non-maximum-suppression is adopted to further boost the final performance. Our approach achieves the 1st place on the motion prediction leaderboard of 2022 Waymo Open Dataset Challenges, outperforming other methods with remarkable margins. Code will be available at https://github.com/sshaoshuai/MTR. 在本报告中，我们展示了 2022 年 Waymo 开放数据集挑战赛中运动预测轨迹第一名的解决方案。我们提出了一种用于多模态运动预测的新颖的运动变换器框架，该框架引入了一小组新颖的运动查询对，通过联合执行意图定位和迭代运动细化来生成更好的多模态未来轨迹。采用非极大值抑制的简单模型集成策略来进一步提高最终性能。我们的方法在 2022 年 Waymo 开放数据集挑战赛的运动预测排行榜上获得了第一名，以显着的优势超越了其他方法。代码可在 https://github.com/sshaoshuai/MTR 获取。 本文提出了MTR-A框架，在2022 Waymo开放数据集挑战赛运动预测赛道中获得第一名。 Shaoshuai Shi,Li Jiang,Dengxin Dai,Bernt Schiele cs.CV

authors_text: AmirHossein Zamani,Amir G. Aghdam,Kamran Ghaffari T
title: Fast-Image2Point: Towards Real-Time Point Cloud Reconstruction of a Single Image using 3D Supervision
title_zh: Fast-Image2Point：利用 3D 监督实现单幅图像的实时点云重建
comment: 1- The paper has 8 pages 2- The paper has already been accepted in IEEE International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications (ICMLA) 2022 and it will appear in IEEE ICMLA 2022 proceedings
comments: 1- The paper has 8 pages 2- The paper has already been accepted in IEEE International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications (ICMLA) 2022 and it will appear in IEEE ICMLA 2022 proceedings
abstract: A key question in the problem of 3D reconstruction is how to train a machine or a robot to model 3D objects. Many tasks like navigation in real-time systems such as autonomous vehicles directly depend on this problem. These systems usually have limited computational power. Despite considerable progress in 3D reconstruction systems in recent years, applying them to real-time systems such as navigation systems in autonomous vehicles is still challenging due to the high complexity and computational demand of the existing methods. This study addresses current problems in reconstructing objects displayed in a single-view image in a faster (real-time) fashion. To this end, a simple yet powerful deep neural framework is developed. The proposed framework consists of two components: the feature extractor module and the 3D generator module. We use point cloud representation for the output of our reconstruction module. The ShapeNet dataset is utilized to compare the method with the existing results in terms of computation time and accuracy. Simulations demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed method. Index Terms-Real-time 3D reconstruction, single-view reconstruction, supervised learning, deep neural network

To this end, a simple yet powerful deep neural framework is developed. The proposed framework consists of two components: the feature extractor module and the 3D generator module. The ShapeNet dataset is utilized to compare the method with the existing results in terms of computation time and accuracy. Simulations demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed method. Index Terms-Real-time 3D reconstruction, single-view reconstruction, supervised learning, deep neural network
abstract_zh: 3D 重建问题的一个关键问题是如何训练机器或机器人来建模 3D 对象。许多任务（例如自动驾驶汽车等实时系统中的导航）直接依赖于这个问题。这些系统通常具有有限的计算能力。尽管近年来 3D 重建系统取得了相当大的进展，但由于现有方法的高复杂性和计算需求，将其应用于自动驾驶汽车导航系统等实时系统仍然具有挑战性。这项研究解决了当前以更快（实时）方式重建单视图图像中显示的对象的问题。为此，开发了一个简单但功能强大的深度神经框架。所提出的框架由两个组件组成：特征提取器模块和 3D 生成器模块。我们使用点云表示作为重建模块的输出。利用 ShapeNet 数据集将该方法与现有结果在计算时间和精度方面进行比较。仿真证明了所提出方法的优越性能。关键词-实时3D重建、单视图重建、监督学习、深度神经网络

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时单图像点云重建方法，利用3D监督训练深度神经网络框架。
AI.motivation: 现有3D重建方法计算复杂度高，难以满足自动驾驶等实时系统的低延迟需求。
AI.method: 设计包含特征提取模块和3D生成模块的双组件框架，输出点云表示并基于ShapeNet数据集验证。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明该方法在计算时间和重建精度上优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架为实时单视角3D重建提供了高效解决方案，适用于资源受限场景。

authors_text: Hyungyu Lee,Sheng Cheng,Zhuohuan Wu,Jaeyoung Lim,Roland Siegwart,Naira Hovakimyan
title: Geometric Tracking Control of Omnidirectional Multirotors for Aggressive Maneuvers
title_zh: 用于激进机动的全向多旋翼几何跟踪控制
abstract: An omnidirectional multirotor has the maneuverability of decoupled translational and rotational motions, superseding the traditional multirotors' motion capability. Such maneuverability is achieved due to the ability of the omnidirectional multirotor to frequently alter the thrust amplitude and direction. In doing so, the rotors' settling time, which is induced by inherent rotor dynamics, significantly affects the omnidirectional multirotor's tracking performance, especially in aggressive flights. To resolve this issue, we propose a novel tracking controller that takes the rotor dynamics into account and does not require additional rotor state measurement. This is achieved by integrating a linear rotor dynamics model into the vehicle's equations of motion and designing a PD controller to compensate for the effects introduced by rotor dynamics. We prove that the proposed controller yields almost global exponential stability. The proposed controller is validated in experiments, where we demonstrate significantly improved tracking performance in multiple aggressive maneuvers compared with a baseline geometric PD controller.
summary: An omnidirectional multirotor has the maneuverability of decoupled translational and rotational motions, superseding the traditional multirotors' motion capability. Such maneuverability is achieved due to the ability of the omnidirectional multirotor to frequently alter the thrust amplitude and direction. In doing so, the rotors' settling time, which is induced by inherent rotor dynamics, significantly affects the omnidirectional multirotor's tracking performance, especially in aggressive flights. To resolve this issue, we propose a novel tracking controller that takes the rotor dynamics into account and does not require additional rotor state measurement. This is achieved by integrating a linear rotor dynamics model into the vehicle's equations of motion and designing a PD controller to compensate for the effects introduced by rotor dynamics. We prove that the proposed controller yields almost global exponential stability. The proposed controller is validated in experiments, where we demonstrate significantly improved tracking performance in multiple aggressive maneuvers compared with a baseline geometric PD controller.
abstract_zh: 全向多旋翼飞行器具有解耦的平移和旋转运动的机动性，取代了传统多旋翼飞行器的运动能力。这种机动性是由于全向多旋翼飞行器能够频繁改变推力幅度和方向的能力而实现的。在此过程中，由固有转子动力学引起的转子稳定时间显着影响全向多旋翼飞行器的跟踪性能，尤其是在激进的飞行中。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的跟踪控制器，该控制器考虑了转子动力学，并且不需要额外的转子状态测量。这是通过将线性转子动力学模型集成到车辆运动方程中并设计 PD 控制器来补偿转子动力学引入的影响来实现的。我们证明所提出的控制器几乎具有全局指数稳定性。所提出的控制器在实验中得到了验证，与基线几何 PD 控制器相比，我们证明了在多种攻击性机动中的跟踪性能显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型跟踪控制器，用于提升全向多旋翼飞行器在激进飞行中的轨迹跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 传统多旋翼飞行器在激进机动时因旋翼动态特性导致跟踪性能不足，而全向多旋翼虽具备解耦运动能力，但旋翼动态响应延迟问题仍需解决。
AI.method: 将线性旋翼动力学模型集成至运动方程，并设计PD控制器补偿旋翼动态影响，无需额外状态测量即可实现几乎全局指数稳定性证明。
AI.result: 实验验证显示，相比基准几何PD控制器，在多种激进机动任务中跟踪性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提控制器通过融合旋翼动力学模型有效提升了全向多旋翼的跟踪精度，且无需增加传感器测量。

authors_text: Sheng Cheng,Minkyung Kim,Lin Song,Chengyu Yang,Yiquan Jin,Shenlong Wang,Naira Hovakimyan
title: DiffTune: Auto-Tuning through Auto-Differentiation
title_zh: DiffTune：通过自动微分进行自动调整
comment: Minkyung Kim and Lin Song contributed equally to this work. Accepted for publication by IEEE Transactions on Robotics in July 2024
comments: Minkyung Kim and Lin Song contributed equally to this work. Accepted for publication by IEEE Transactions on Robotics in July 2024
abstract: The performance of robots in high-level tasks depends on the quality of their lower-level controller, which requires fine-tuning. However, the intrinsically nonlinear dynamics and controllers make tuning a challenging task when it is done by hand. In this paper, we present DiffTune, a novel, gradient-based automatic tuning framework. We formulate the controller tuning as a parameter optimization problem. Our method unrolls the dynamical system and controller as a computational graph and updates the controller parameters through gradient-based optimization. The gradient is obtained using sensitivity propagation, which is the only method for gradient computation when tuning for a physical system instead of its simulated counterpart. Furthermore, we use $\mathcal{L}_1$ adaptive control to compensate for the uncertainties (that unavoidably exist in a physical system) such that the gradient is not biased by the unmodelled uncertainties. We validate the DiffTune on a Dubin's car and a quadrotor in challenging simulation environments. In comparison with state-of-the-art auto-tuning methods, DiffTune achieves the best performance in a more efficient manner owing to its effective usage of the first-order information of the system. Experiments on tuning a nonlinear controller for quadrotor show promising results, where DiffTune achieves 3.5x tracking error reduction on an aggressive trajectory in only 10 trials over a 12-dimensional controller parameter space.
summary: The performance of robots in high-level tasks depends on the quality of their lower-level controller, which requires fine-tuning. However, the intrinsically nonlinear dynamics and controllers make tuning a challenging task when it is done by hand. In this paper, we present DiffTune, a novel, gradient-based automatic tuning framework. We formulate the controller tuning as a parameter optimization problem. Our method unrolls the dynamical system and controller as a computational graph and updates the controller parameters through gradient-based optimization. The gradient is obtained using sensitivity propagation, which is the only method for gradient computation when tuning for a physical system instead of its simulated counterpart. Furthermore, we use $\mathcal{L}_1$ adaptive control to compensate for the uncertainties (that unavoidably exist in a physical system) such that the gradient is not biased by the unmodelled uncertainties. We validate the DiffTune on a Dubin's car and a quadrotor in challenging simulation environments. In comparison with state-of-the-art auto-tuning methods, DiffTune achieves the best performance in a more efficient manner owing to its effective usage of the first-order information of the system. Experiments on tuning a nonlinear controller for quadrotor show promising results, where DiffTune achieves 3.5x tracking error reduction on an aggressive trajectory in only 10 trials over a 12-dimensional controller parameter space.
abstract_zh: 机器人在高级任务中的性能取决于其较低级别控制器的质量，这需要微调。然而，本质上的非线性动力学和控制器使得手动调整成为一项具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了 DiffTune，一种新颖的基于梯度的自动调整框架。我们将控制器整定表述为参数优化问题。我们的方法将动力系统和控制器展开为计算图，并通过基于梯度的优化来更新控制器参数。梯度是使用灵敏度传播获得的，这是在调整物理系统而不是模拟系统时计算梯度的唯一方法。此外，我们使用 $\mathcal{L}_1$ 自适应控制来补偿不确定性（物理系统中不可避免地存在），使得梯度不会因未建模的不确定性而产生偏差。我们在具有挑战性的模拟环境中在 Dubin 的汽车和四旋翼飞行器上验证了 DiffTune。与最先进的自动调整方法相比，DiffTune 由于有效利用了系统的一阶信息，以更有效的方式实现了最佳性能。调整四旋翼飞行器非线性控制器的实验显示出有希望的结果，其中 DiffTune 在 12 维控制器参数空间上仅进行 10 次试验，就在激进的轨迹上实现了 3.5 倍的跟踪误差减少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffTune框架，通过自动微分实现机器人低级控制器的自动调参。
AI.motivation: 机器人高层任务性能依赖低级控制器质量，但手动调参面临非线性动态和控制器的复杂性挑战，且物理系统存在不可建模的不确定性。
AI.method: 将控制器调参建模为参数优化问题，通过展开动力学系统和控制器为计算图，利用敏感度传播计算梯度，并采用L1自适应控制补偿不确定性。
AI.result: 在Dubin车辆和四旋翼无人机仿真中，DiffTune相比现有方法效率更高，四旋翼控制器调参在10次试验中实现3.5倍跟踪误差降低。
AI.conclusion: DiffTune通过有效利用系统一阶信息并处理不确定性，在物理系统自动调参中表现出显著优势。

search_text: DiffTune: Auto-Tuning through Auto-Differentiation DiffTune：通过自动微分进行自动调整 The performance of robots in high-level tasks depends on the quality of their lower-level controller, which requires fine-tuning. However, the intrinsically nonlinear dynamics and controllers make tuning a challenging task when it is done by hand. In this paper, we present DiffTune, a novel, gradient-based automatic tuning framework. We formulate the controller tuning as a parameter optimization problem. Our method unrolls the dynamical system and controller as a computational graph and updates the controller parameters through gradient-based optimization. The gradient is obtained using sensitivity propagation, which is the only method for gradient computation when tuning for a physical system instead of its simulated counterpart. Furthermore, we use $\mathcal{L}_1$ adaptive control to compensate for the uncertainties (that unavoidably exist in a physical system) such that the gradient is not biased by the unmodelled uncertainties. We validate the DiffTune on a Dubin's car and a quadrotor in challenging simulation environments. In comparison with state-of-the-art auto-tuning methods, DiffTune achieves the best performance in a more efficient manner owing to its effective usage of the first-order information of the system. Experiments on tuning a nonlinear controller for quadrotor show promising results, where DiffTune achieves 3.5x tracking error reduction on an aggressive trajectory in only 10 trials over a 12-dimensional controller parameter space. 机器人在高级任务中的性能取决于其较低级别控制器的质量，这需要微调。然而，本质上的非线性动力学和控制器使得手动调整成为一项具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了 DiffTune，一种新颖的基于梯度的自动调整框架。我们将控制器整定表述为参数优化问题。我们的方法将动力系统和控制器展开为计算图，并通过基于梯度的优化来更新控制器参数。梯度是使用灵敏度传播获得的，这是在调整物理系统而不是模拟系统时计算梯度的唯一方法。此外，我们使用 $\mathcal{L}_1$ 自适应控制来补偿不确定性（物理系统中不可避免地存在），使得梯度不会因未建模的不确定性而产生偏差。我们在具有挑战性的模拟环境中在 Dubin 的汽车和四旋翼飞行器上验证了 DiffTune。与最先进的自动调整方法相比，DiffTune 由于有效利用了系统的一阶信息，以更有效的方式实现了最佳性能。调整四旋翼飞行器非线性控制器的实验显示出有希望的结果，其中 DiffTune 在 12 维控制器参数空间上仅进行 10 次试验，就在激进的轨迹上实现了 3.5 倍的跟踪误差减少。 本文提出DiffTune框架，通过自动微分实现机器人低级控制器的自动调参。 Sheng Cheng,Minkyung Kim,Lin Song,Chengyu Yang,Yiquan Jin,Shenlong Wang,Naira Hovakimyan cs.RO

authors_text: Ling Luo,Yulia Gryaditskaya,Yongxin Yang,Tao Xiang,Yi-Zhe Song
title: Towards 3D VR-Sketch to 3D Shape Retrieval
title_zh: 迈向 3D VR - 草图到 3D 形状检索
comment: ef:2020 International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV), pp. 81-90. IEEE, 2020
comments: ef:2020 International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV), pp. 81-90. IEEE, 2020
abstract: Growing free online 3D shapes collections dictated research on 3D retrieval. Active debate has however been had on (i) what the best input modality is to trigger retrieval, and (ii) the ultimate usage scenario for such retrieval. In this paper, we offer a different perspective towards answering these questions -- we study the use of 3D sketches as an input modality and advocate a VR-scenario where retrieval is conducted. Thus, the ultimate vision is that users can freely retrieve a 3D model by air-doodling in a VR environment. As a first stab at this new 3D VR-sketch to 3D shape retrieval problem, we make four contributions. First, we code a VR utility to collect 3D VR-sketches and conduct retrieval. Second, we collect the first set of $167$ 3D VR-sketches on two shape categories from ModelNet. Third, we propose a novel approach to generate a synthetic dataset of human-like 3D sketches of different abstract levels to train deep networks. At last, we compare the common multi-view and volumetric approaches: We show that, in contrast to 3D shape to 3D shape retrieval, volumetric point-based approaches exhibit superior performance on 3D sketch to 3D shape retrieval due to the sparse and abstract nature of 3D VR-sketches. We believe these contributions will collectively serve as enablers for future attempts at this problem. The VR interface, code and datasets are available at https://tinyurl.com/3DSketch3DV.

Active debate has however been had on (i) what the best input modality is to trigger retrieval, and (ii) the ultimate usage scenario for such retrieval. In this paper, we offer a different perspective towards answering these questions -- we study the use of 3D sketches as an input modality and advocate a VR-scenario where retrieval is conducted. Thus, the ultimate vision is that users can freely retrieve a 3D model by air-doodling in a VR environment. As a first stab at this new 3D VR-sketch to 3D shape retrieval problem, we make four contributions. First, we code a VR utility to collect 3D VR-sketches and conduct retrieval. Second, we collect the first set of $167$ 3D VR-sketches on two shape categories from ModelNet. Third, we propose a novel approach to generate a synthetic dataset of human-like 3D sketches of different abstract levels to train deep networks. At last, we compare the common multi-view and volumetric approaches: We show that, in contrast to 3D shape to 3D shape retrieval, volumetric point-based approaches exhibit superior performance on 3D sketch to 3D shape retrieval due to the sparse and abstract nature of 3D VR-sketches. We believe these contributions will collectively serve as enablers for future attempts at this problem. The VR interface, code and datasets are available at https://tinyurl.com/3DSketch3DV.
abstract_zh: 不断增长的免费在线 3D 形状集合推动了 3D 检索的研究。然而，关于（i）触发检索的最佳输入方式是什么，以及（ii）此类检索的最终使用场景，人们一直在积极争论。在本文中，我们提供了回答这些问题的不同视角——我们研究使用 3D 草图作为输入方式，并提倡使用 VR 场景进行检索。因此，最终的愿景是用户可以在VR环境中通过空中涂鸦自由检索3D模型。作为对这个新的 3D VR 草图到 3D 形状检索问题的首次尝试，我们做出了四项贡献。首先，我们编写一个 VR 实用程序来收集 3D VR 草图并进行检索。其次，我们从 ModelNet 收集了第一组价值 167 美元的关于两个形状类别的 3D VR 草图。第三，我们提出了一种新方法来生成不同抽象级别的类人 3D 草图的合成数据集，以训练深度网络。最后，我们比较了常见的多视图和体积方法：我们表明，与 3D 形状到 3D 形状检索相比，基于体积点的方法由于 3D VR 草图的稀疏和抽象性质，在 3D 草图到 3D 形状检索上表现出优越的性能。我们相信，这些贡献将共同成为未来解决这一问题的推动力。 VR 界面、代码和数据集可在 https://tinyurl.com/3DSketch3DV 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于VR手绘草图的3D形状检索方法，旨在通过虚拟现实环境中的自由绘制实现3D模型检索。
AI.motivation: 现有3D检索研究缺乏对VR交互场景下草图输入模态的探索，需解决如何通过抽象稀疏的VR草图有效检索3D模型的问题。
AI.method: 开发VR草图采集工具，构建包含167个样本的VR草图数据集，提出生成人类风格抽象草图的合成数据方法，并对比多视角与体素点云方法的性能差异。
AI.result: 实验表明，体素点云方法在处理稀疏抽象的VR草图时，较传统多视角方法具有更优的检索性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文为VR草图到3D模型检索提供了数据、工具和方法基础，推动了该方向的进一步研究。

authors_text: Ignacio J. Tripodi
title: Setting the rhythm scene: deep learning-based drum loop generation from arbitrary language cues
title_zh: 设置节奏场景：根据任意语言提示生成基于深度学习的鼓循环
abstract: Generative artificial intelligence models can be a valuable aid to music composition and live performance, both to aid the professional musician and to help democratize the music creation process for hobbyists. Here we present a novel method that, given an English word or phrase, generates 2 compasses of a 4-piece drum pattern that embodies the "mood" of the given language cue, or that could be used for an audiovisual scene described by the language cue. We envision this tool as composition aid for electronic music and audiovisual soundtrack production, or an improvisation tool for live performance. In order to produce the training samples for this model, besides manual annotation of the "scene" or "mood" terms, we have designed a novel method to extract the consensus drum track of any song. This consists of a 2-bar, 4-piece drum pattern that represents the main percussive motif of a song, which could be imported into any music loop device or live looping software. These two key components (drum pattern generation from a generalizable input, and consensus percussion extraction) present a novel approach to computer-aided composition and provide a stepping stone for more comprehensive rhythm generation.
summary: Generative artificial intelligence models can be a valuable aid to music composition and live performance, both to aid the professional musician and to help democratize the music creation process for hobbyists. Here we present a novel method that, given an English word or phrase, generates 2 compasses of a 4-piece drum pattern that embodies the "mood" of the given language cue, or that could be used for an audiovisual scene described by the language cue. We envision this tool as composition aid for electronic music and audiovisual soundtrack production, or an improvisation tool for live performance. In order to produce the training samples for this model, besides manual annotation of the "scene" or "mood" terms, we have designed a novel method to extract the consensus drum track of any song. This consists of a 2-bar, 4-piece drum pattern that represents the main percussive motif of a song, which could be imported into any music loop device or live looping software. These two key components (drum pattern generation from a generalizable input, and consensus percussion extraction) present a novel approach to computer-aided composition and provide a stepping stone for more comprehensive rhythm generation.
abstract_zh: 生成式人工智能模型可以为音乐创作和现场表演提供宝贵的帮助，既可以帮助专业音乐家，也可以帮助业余爱好者实现音乐创作过程的民主化。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，给定一个英语单词或短语，生成 4 件鼓模式的 2 个圆规，体现给定语言提示的“情绪”，或者可用于由语言提示描述的视听场景。我们设想该工具作为电子音乐和视听配乐制作的作曲辅助工具，或现场表演的即兴创作工具。为了生成该模型的训练样本，除了手动注释“场景”或“情绪”术语之外，我们还设计了一种新颖的方法来提取任何歌曲的共识鼓音轨。它由 2 小节、4 部分的鼓模式组成，代表歌曲的主要打击乐主题，可以导入到任何音乐循环设备或现场循环软件中。这两个关键组件（从可概括的输入生成鼓模式，以及一致的打击乐提取）提出了一种新颖的计算机辅助作曲方法，并为更全面的节奏生成提供了垫脚石。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的方法，根据任意英文词汇或短语生成体现其情绪或场景的4件套鼓点循环。
AI.motivation: 通过AI辅助音乐创作与表演，降低专业音乐制作门槛，为电子音乐及视听配乐提供创作工具。
AI.method: 结合人工标注的情绪/场景标签与新型歌曲共识鼓点提取算法，训练模型实现从语言提示到两小节鼓点模式的生成。
AI.result: 成功构建出可导入音乐循环设备的标准化鼓点模式，并验证了语言提示到节奏生成的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为计算机辅助作曲提供了新范式，为更全面的节奏生成系统奠定了基础。

search_text: Setting the rhythm scene: deep learning-based drum loop generation from arbitrary language cues 设置节奏场景：根据任意语言提示生成基于深度学习的鼓循环 Generative artificial intelligence models can be a valuable aid to music composition and live performance, both to aid the professional musician and to help democratize the music creation process for hobbyists. Here we present a novel method that, given an English word or phrase, generates 2 compasses of a 4-piece drum pattern that embodies the "mood" of the given language cue, or that could be used for an audiovisual scene described by the language cue. We envision this tool as composition aid for electronic music and audiovisual soundtrack production, or an improvisation tool for live performance. In order to produce the training samples for this model, besides manual annotation of the "scene" or "mood" terms, we have designed a novel method to extract the consensus drum track of any song. This consists of a 2-bar, 4-piece drum pattern that represents the main percussive motif of a song, which could be imported into any music loop device or live looping software. These two key components (drum pattern generation from a generalizable input, and consensus percussion extraction) present a novel approach to computer-aided composition and provide a stepping stone for more comprehensive rhythm generation. 生成式人工智能模型可以为音乐创作和现场表演提供宝贵的帮助，既可以帮助专业音乐家，也可以帮助业余爱好者实现音乐创作过程的民主化。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，给定一个英语单词或短语，生成 4 件鼓模式的 2 个圆规，体现给定语言提示的“情绪”，或者可用于由语言提示描述的视听场景。我们设想该工具作为电子音乐和视听配乐制作的作曲辅助工具，或现场表演的即兴创作工具。为了生成该模型的训练样本，除了手动注释“场景”或“情绪”术语之外，我们还设计了一种新颖的方法来提取任何歌曲的共识鼓音轨。它由 2 小节、4 部分的鼓模式组成，代表歌曲的主要打击乐主题，可以导入到任何音乐循环设备或现场循环软件中。这两个关键组件（从可概括的输入生成鼓模式，以及一致的打击乐提取）提出了一种新颖的计算机辅助作曲方法，并为更全面的节奏生成提供了垫脚石。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的方法，根据任意英文词汇或短语生成体现其情绪或场景的4件套鼓点循环。 Ignacio J. authors_text: Shoaib Ahmed Siddiqui,Nitarshan Rajkumar,Tegan Maharaj,David Krueger,Sara Hooker
title: Metadata Archaeology: Unearthing Data Subsets by Leveraging Training Dynamics
title_zh: 元数据考古学：利用训练动态挖掘数据子集
abstract: Modern machine learning research relies on relatively few carefully curated datasets. Even in these datasets, and typically in `untidy' or raw data, practitioners are faced with significant issues of data quality and diversity which can be prohibitively labor intensive to address. Existing methods for dealing with these challenges tend to make strong assumptions about the particular issues at play, and often require a priori knowledge or metadata such as domain labels. Our work is orthogonal to these methods: we instead focus on providing a unified and efficient framework for Metadata Archaeology -- uncovering and inferring metadata of examples in a dataset. We curate different subsets of data that might exist in a dataset (e.g. mislabeled, atypical, or out-of-distribution examples) using simple transformations, and leverage differences in learning dynamics between these probe suites to infer metadata of interest. Our method is on par with far more sophisticated mitigation methods across different tasks: identifying and correcting mislabeled examples, classifying minority-group samples, prioritizing points relevant for training and enabling scalable human auditing of relevant examples.
summary: Modern machine learning research relies on relatively few carefully curated datasets. Even in these datasets, and typically in `untidy' or raw data, practitioners are faced with significant issues of data quality and diversity which can be prohibitively labor intensive to address. Existing methods for dealing with these challenges tend to make strong assumptions about the particular issues at play, and often require a priori knowledge or metadata such as domain labels. Our work is orthogonal to these methods: we instead focus on providing a unified and efficient framework for Metadata Archaeology -- uncovering and inferring metadata of examples in a dataset. We curate different subsets of data that might exist in a dataset (e.g. mislabeled, atypical, or out-of-distribution examples) using simple transformations, and leverage differences in learning dynamics between these probe suites to infer metadata of interest. Our method is on par with far more sophisticated mitigation methods across different tasks: identifying and correcting mislabeled examples, classifying minority-group samples, prioritizing points relevant for training and enabling scalable human auditing of relevant examples.
abstract_zh: 现代机器学习研究依赖相对较少的精心策划的数据集。即使在这些数据集中，通常是“杂乱”或原始数据，从业者也面临着数据质量和多样性的重大问题，解决这些问题可能需要大量的劳动力。处理这些挑战的现有方法往往会对正在发生的特定问题做出强有力的假设，并且通常需要先验知识或元数据，例如域标签。我们的工作与这些方法正交：我们专注于为元数据考古学提供一个统一且高效的框架——发现和推断数据集中示例的元数据。我们使用简单的转换来管理数据集中可能存在的不同数据子集（例如，标签错误、非典型或分布外的示例），并利用这些探针套件之间的学习动态差异来推断感兴趣的元数据。我们的方法与跨不同任务的更复杂的缓解方法相当：识别和纠正错误标记的示例、对少数群体样本进行分类、对与训练相关的点进行优先级排序以及对相关示例进行可扩展的人工审核。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为元数据考古的框架，通过利用训练动态差异来挖掘数据集中的隐藏子集（如误标记或分布外样本）。
AI.motivation: 现代机器学习依赖于精心构建的数据集，但数据质量和多样性问题普遍存在，现有方法通常需要先验知识或领域标签，限制了其适用性。
AI.method: 通过简单变换生成数据子集，并利用不同子集在训练过程中的动态差异推断元数据，无需先验标签或复杂假设。
AI.result: 该方法在识别误标记样本、分类少数群体样本及训练点优先级排序等任务上表现与复杂方法相当，且支持可扩展的人类审计。
AI.conclusion: 元数据考古提供了一种高效、通用的框架，能够无需先验知识即可挖掘数据集中的关键元数据，提升数据质量分析效率。

authors_text: Ling Luo,Yulia Gryaditskaya,Yongxin Yang,Tao Xiang,Yi-Zhe Song
title: Fine-Grained VR Sketching: Dataset and Insights
title_zh: 细粒度 VR 草图：数据集和见解
comment: ef:2021 International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV), pp. 1003-1013. IEEE, 2021
comments: ef:2021 International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV), pp. 1003-1013. IEEE, 2021
abstract: We present the first fine-grained dataset of 1,497 3D VR sketch and 3D shape pairs of a chair category with large shapes diversity. Our dataset supports the recent trend in the sketch community on fine-grained data analysis, and extends it to an actively developing 3D domain. We argue for the most convenient sketching scenario where the sketch consists of sparse lines and does not require any sketching skills, prior training or time-consuming accurate drawing. We then, for the first time, study the scenario of fine-grained 3D VR sketch to 3D shape retrieval, as a novel VR sketching application and a proving ground to drive out generic insights to inform future research. By experimenting with carefully selected combinations of design factors on this new problem, we draw important conclusions to help follow-on work. We hope our dataset will enable other novel applications, especially those that require a fine-grained angle such as fine-grained 3D shape reconstruction. The dataset is available at tinyurl.com/VRSketch3DV21.
summary: We present the first fine-grained dataset of 1,497 3D VR sketch and 3D shape pairs of a chair category with large shapes diversity. Our dataset supports the recent trend in the sketch community on fine-grained data analysis, and extends it to an actively developing 3D domain. We argue for the most convenient sketching scenario where the sketch consists of sparse lines and does not require any sketching skills, prior training or time-consuming accurate drawing. We then, for the first time, study the scenario of fine-grained 3D VR sketch to 3D shape retrieval, as a novel VR sketching application and a proving ground to drive out generic insights to inform future research. By experimenting with carefully selected combinations of design factors on this new problem, we draw important conclusions to help follow-on work. We hope our dataset will enable other novel applications, especially those that require a fine-grained angle such as fine-grained 3D shape reconstruction. The dataset is available at tinyurl.com/VRSketch3DV21.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了第一个细粒度数据集，其中包含 1,497 个 3D VR 草图和具有大量形状多样性的椅子类别的 3D 形状对。我们的数据集支持草图社区中细粒度数据分析的最新趋势，并将其扩展到积极开发的 3D 领域。我们主张最方便的素描场景，其中素描由稀疏的线条组成，不需要任何素描技巧、事先培训或耗时的精确绘图。然后，我们首次研究细粒度 3D VR 草图到 3D 形状检索的场景，作为一种新颖的 VR 草图应用程序和一个试验场，以得出通用见解，为未来的研究提供信息。通过对这个新问题仔细选择的设计因素组合进行试验，我们得出了重要的结论来帮助后续工作。我们希望我们的数据集能够支持其他新颖的应用程序，特别是那些需要细粒度角度的应用程序，例如细粒度 3D 形状重建。该数据集可从tinyurl.com/VRsketch3DV21获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个包含1,497组3D VR草图与椅子形状配对的细粒度数据集，用于支持VR草图的细粒度分析。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏无需专业技能的稀疏线条VR草图，且未覆盖3D领域。本文旨在填补这一空白，推动细粒度3D VR草图研究。
AI.method: 通过构建包含多样形状的椅子类别数据集，研究细粒度3D VR草图到形状的检索场景，并实验分析设计因素对性能的影响。
AI.result: 发布了细粒度VR草图数据集，揭示了设计因素对检索任务的关键影响，为后续研究提供基础。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为细粒度3D形状重建等应用提供了支持，推动了VR草图领域的研究进展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了首个包含1,497组3D VR草图与椅子形状配对的细粒度数据集，用于支持VR草图的细粒度分析。

tldr: 本文提出了首个包含1,497组3D VR草图与椅子形状配对的细粒度数据集，用于支持VR草图的细粒度分析。
motivation: 现有数据集缺乏无需专业技能的稀疏线条VR草图，且未覆盖3D领域。本文旨在填补这一空白，推动细粒度3D VR草图研究。
method: 通过构建包含多样形状的椅子类别数据集，研究细粒度3D VR草图到形状的检索场景，并实验分析设计因素对性能的影响。
result: 发布了细粒度VR草图数据集，揭示了设计因素对检索任务的关键影响，为后续研究提供基础。
conclusion: 该数据集为细粒度3D形状重建等应用提供了支持，推动了VR草图领域的研究进展。
search_text: Fine-Grained VR Sketching: Dataset and Insights 细粒度 VR 草图：数据集和见解 We present the first fine-grained dataset of 1,497 3D VR sketch and 3D shape pairs of a chair category with large shapes diversity. Our dataset supports the recent trend in the sketch community on fine-grained data analysis, and extends it to an actively developing 3D domain. We argue for the most convenient sketching scenario where the sketch consists of sparse lines and does not require any sketching skills, prior training or time-consuming accurate drawing. We then, for the first time, study the scenario of fine-grained 3D VR sketch to 3D shape retrieval, as a novel VR sketching application and a proving ground to drive out generic insights to inform future research. By experimenting with carefully selected combinations of design factors on this new problem, we draw important conclusions to help follow-on work. We hope our dataset will enable other novel applications, especially those that require a fine-grained angle such as fine-grained 3D shape reconstruction. The dataset is available at tinyurl.com/VRSketch3DV21. 我们提出了第一个细粒度数据集，其中包含 1,497 个 3D VR 草图和具有大量形状多样性的椅子类别的 3D 形状对。我们的数据集支持草图社区中细粒度数据分析的最新趋势，并将其扩展到积极开发的 3D 领域。我们主张最方便的素描场景，其中素描由稀疏的线条组成，不需要任何素描技巧、事先培训或耗时的精确绘图。然后，我们首次研究细粒度 3D VR 草图到 3D 形状检索的场景，作为一种新颖的 VR 草图应用程序和一个试验场，以得出通用见解，为未来的研究提供信息。通过对这个新问题仔细选择的设计因素组合进行试验，我们得出了重要的结论来帮助后续工作。我们希望我们的数据集能够支持其他新颖的应用程序，特别是那些需要细粒度角度的应用程序，例如细粒度 3D 形状重建。该数据集可从tinyurl.com/VRsketch3DV21获取。 本文提出了首个包含1,497组3D VR草图与椅子形状配对的细粒度数据集，用于支持VR草图的细粒度分析。 Ling Luo,Yulia Gryaditskaya,Yongxin Yang,Tao Xiang,Yi-Zhe Song cs.CV

authors_text: Andrea Tagliabue,Yi-Hsuan Hsiao,Urban Fasel,J. Nathan Kutz,Steven L. Brunton,YuFeng Chen,Jonathan P. How
title: Robust, High-Rate Trajectory Tracking on Insect-Scale Soft-Actuated Aerial Robots with Deep-Learned Tube MPC
title_zh: 具有深度学习管 MPC 的昆虫级软驱动空中机器人的稳健、高速轨迹跟踪
comment: Submitted to ICRA 2023. Andrea Tagliabue and Yi-Hsuan Hsiao equally contributed. Video: https://youtu.be/Seupy1bSkY4
comments: Submitted to ICRA 2023. Andrea Tagliabue and Yi-Hsuan Hsiao equally contributed. Video: https://youtu.be/Seupy1bSkY4
abstract: Accurate and agile trajectory tracking in sub-gram Micro Aerial Vehicles (MAVs) is challenging, as the small scale of the robot induces large model uncertainties, demanding robust feedback controllers, while the fast dynamics and computational constraints prevent the deployment of computationally expensive strategies. In this work, we present an approach for agile and computationally efficient trajectory tracking on the MIT SoftFly, a sub-gram MAV (0.7 grams). Our strategy employs a cascaded control scheme, where an adaptive attitude controller is combined with a neural network policy trained to imitate a trajectory tracking robust tube model predictive controller (RTMPC). The neural network policy is obtained using our recent work, which enables the policy to preserve the robustness of RTMPC, but at a fraction of its computational cost. We experimentally evaluate our approach, achieving position Root Mean Square Errors lower than 1.8 cm even in the more challenging maneuvers, obtaining a 60% reduction in maximum position error compared to our previous work, and demonstrating robustness to large external disturbances
summary: Accurate and agile trajectory tracking in sub-gram Micro Aerial Vehicles (MAVs) is challenging, as the small scale of the robot induces large model uncertainties, demanding robust feedback controllers, while the fast dynamics and computational constraints prevent the deployment of computationally expensive strategies. In this work, we present an approach for agile and computationally efficient trajectory tracking on the MIT SoftFly, a sub-gram MAV (0.7 grams). Our strategy employs a cascaded control scheme, where an adaptive attitude controller is combined with a neural network policy trained to imitate a trajectory tracking robust tube model predictive controller (RTMPC). The neural network policy is obtained using our recent work, which enables the policy to preserve the robustness of RTMPC, but at a fraction of its computational cost. We experimentally evaluate our approach, achieving position Root Mean Square Errors lower than 1.8 cm even in the more challenging maneuvers, obtaining a 60% reduction in maximum position error compared to our previous work, and demonstrating robustness to large external disturbances
abstract_zh: 亚克级微型飞行器 (MAV) 中准确、敏捷的轨迹跟踪具有挑战性，因为机器人的小尺寸会导致较大的模型不确定性，需要鲁棒的反馈控制器，而快速动力学和计算约束则阻碍了计算成本高昂的策略的部署。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种在 MIT SoftFly（亚克 MAV（0.7 克））上进行敏捷且计算高效的轨迹跟踪的方法。我们的策略采用级联控制方案，其中自适应姿态控制器与经过训练以模仿轨迹跟踪鲁棒管模型预测控制器（RTMPC）的神经网络策略相结合。神经网络策略是使用我们最近的工作获得的，这使得该策略能够保持 RTMPC 的鲁棒性，但计算成本仅为其一小部分。我们通过实验评估了我们的方法，即使在更具挑战性的操作中，也能实现低于 1.8 厘米的位置均方根误差，与我们之前的工作相比，最大位置误差减少了 60%，并展示了对大型外部干扰的鲁棒性

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于亚克级微型飞行器（MAV）的鲁棒、高精度轨迹跟踪方法，结合自适应姿态控制器与深度学习策略。
AI.motivation: 亚克级MAV因尺度小导致模型不确定性高，且动态快速、计算资源有限，传统控制策略难以兼顾精度与效率。
AI.method: 采用级联控制架构，结合自适应姿态控制器与神经网络策略，后者通过模仿鲁棒管模型预测控制器（RTMPC）实现计算成本降低。
AI.result: 实验显示位置均方根误差低于1.8厘米，最大位置误差较之前工作减少60%，并展现对外部扰动的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持鲁棒性的同时显著提升计算效率，为昆虫级软体驱动飞行器的高精度轨迹跟踪提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Zaixi Shang,Joshua P. Ebenezer,Alan C. Bovik,Yongjun Wu,Hai Wei,Sriram Sethuraman
title: Subjective Assessment of High Dynamic Range Videos Under Different Ambient Conditions
title_zh: 不同环境条件下高动态范围视频的主观评估
abstract: High Dynamic Range (HDR) videos can represent a much greater range of brightness and color than Standard Dynamic Range (SDR) videos and are rapidly becoming an industry standard. HDR videos have more challenging capture, transmission, and display requirements than legacy SDR videos. With their greater bit depth, advanced electro-optical transfer functions, and wider color gamuts, comes the need for video quality algorithms that are specifically designed to predict the quality of HDR videos. Towards this end, we present the first publicly released large-scale subjective study of HDR videos. We study the effect of distortions such as compression and aliasing on the quality of HDR videos. We also study the effect of ambient illumination on perceptual quality of HDR videos by conducting the study in both a dark lab environment and a brighter living-room environment. A total of 66 subjects participated in the study and more than 20,000 opinion scores were collected, which makes this the largest in-lab study of HDR video quality ever. We anticipate that the dataset will be a valuable resource for researchers to develop better models of perceptual quality for HDR videos.
summary: High Dynamic Range (HDR) videos can represent a much greater range of brightness and color than Standard Dynamic Range (SDR) videos and are rapidly becoming an industry standard. HDR videos have more challenging capture, transmission, and display requirements than legacy SDR videos. With their greater bit depth, advanced electro-optical transfer functions, and wider color gamuts, comes the need for video quality algorithms that are specifically designed to predict the quality of HDR videos. Towards this end, we present the first publicly released large-scale subjective study of HDR videos. We study the effect of distortions such as compression and aliasing on the quality of HDR videos. We also study the effect of ambient illumination on perceptual quality of HDR videos by conducting the study in both a dark lab environment and a brighter living-room environment. A total of 66 subjects participated in the study and more than 20,000 opinion scores were collected, which makes this the largest in-lab study of HDR video quality ever. We anticipate that the dataset will be a valuable resource for researchers to develop better models of perceptual quality for HDR videos.
abstract_zh: 与标准动态范围 (SDR) 视频相比，高动态范围 (HDR) 视频可以呈现更大范围的亮度和颜色，并且正在迅速成为行业标准。与传统 SDR 视频相比，HDR 视频具有更具挑战性的捕获、传输和显示要求。凭借更大的位深度、先进的电光传输功能和更宽的色域，需要专门设计用于预测 HDR 视频质量的视频质量算法。为此，我们提出了第一个公开发布的大规模 HDR 视频主观研究。我们研究压缩和锯齿等失真对 HDR 视频质量的影响。我们还通过在黑暗的实验室环境和明亮的客厅环境中进行研究，研究环境照明对 HDR 视频感知质量的影响。共有 66 名受试者参与了这项研究，收集了超过 20,000 份意见评分，这使得这项研究成为有史以来规模最大的 HDR 视频质量实验室内研究。我们预计该数据集将成为研究人员开发更好的 HDR 视频感知质量模型的宝贵资源。

AI.tldr: 本文通过主观评估研究高动态范围（HDR）视频在不同环境光照条件下的感知质量。
AI.motivation: HDR视频因亮度和色彩范围更大而成为行业标准，但其质量评估算法尚未充分考虑环境光照影响，亟需大规模数据支持研究。
AI.method: 在暗室和明亮客厅两种环境条件下，对66名受试者进行视频质量主观评分，收集超过20,000个意见评分，分析压缩、锯齿等失真对HDR视频感知质量的影响。
AI.result: 获得目前最大规模的HDR视频质量主观评估数据集，揭示了不同环境光照和失真类型对视频感知质量的显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为开发更精准的HDR视频感知质量模型提供了重要资源，有助于推动HDR视频处理技术的发展。

We also study the effect of ambient illumination on perceptual quality of HDR videos by conducting the study in both a dark lab environment and a brighter living-room environment. A total of 66 subjects participated in the study and more than 20,000 opinion scores were collected, which makes this the largest in-lab study of HDR video quality ever. We anticipate that the dataset will be a valuable resource for researchers to develop better models of perceptual quality for HDR videos. 与标准动态范围 (SDR) 视频相比，高动态范围 (HDR) 视频可以呈现更大范围的亮度和颜色，并且正在迅速成为行业标准。与传统 SDR 视频相比，HDR 视频具有更具挑战性的捕获、传输和显示要求。凭借更大的位深度、先进的电光传输功能和更宽的色域，需要专门设计用于预测 HDR 视频质量的视频质量算法。为此，我们提出了第一个公开发布的大规模 HDR 视频主观研究。我们研究压缩和锯齿等失真对 HDR 视频质量的影响。我们还通过在黑暗的实验室环境和明亮的客厅环境中进行研究，研究环境照明对 HDR 视频感知质量的影响。共有 66 名受试者参与了这项研究，收集了超过 20,000 份意见评分，这使得这项研究成为有史以来规模最大的 HDR 视频质量实验室内研究。我们预计该数据集将成为研究人员开发更好的 HDR 视频感知质量模型的宝贵资源。 本文通过主观评估研究高动态范围（HDR）视频在不同环境光照条件下的感知质量。 Zaixi Shang,Joshua P. Ebenezer,Alan C. Bovik,Yongjun Wu,Hai Wei,Sriram Sethuraman eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Yuchen Xiao
title: Macro-Action-Based Multi-Agent/Robot Deep Reinforcement Learning under Partial Observability
title_zh: 部分可观测性下基于宏观动作的多智能体/机器人深度强化学习
comment: PhD thesis
comments: PhD thesis
abstract: The state-of-the-art multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) methods have provided promising solutions to a variety of complex problems. Yet, these methods all assume that agents perform synchronized primitive-action executions so that they are not genuinely scalable to long-horizon real-world multi-agent/robot tasks that inherently require agents/robots to asynchronously reason about high-level action selection at varying time durations. The Macro-Action Decentralized Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (MacDec-POMDP) is a general formalization for asynchronous decision-making under uncertainty in fully cooperative multi-agent tasks. In this thesis, we first propose a group of value-based RL approaches for MacDec-POMDPs, where agents are allowed to perform asynchronous learning and decision-making with macro-action-value functions in three paradigms: decentralized learning and control, centralized learning and control, and centralized training for decentralized execution (CTDE). Building on the above work, we formulate a set of macro-action-based policy gradient algorithms under the three training paradigms, where agents are allowed to directly optimize their parameterized policies in an asynchronous manner. We evaluate our methods both in simulation and on real robots over a variety of realistic domains. Empirical results demonstrate the superiority of our approaches in large multi-agent problems and validate the effectiveness of our algorithms for learning high-quality and asynchronous solutions with macro-actions.
summary: The state-of-the-art multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) methods have provided promising solutions to a variety of complex problems. Yet, these methods all assume that agents perform synchronized primitive-action executions so that they are not genuinely scalable to long-horizon real-world multi-agent/robot tasks that inherently require agents/robots to asynchronously reason about high-level action selection at varying time durations. The Macro-Action Decentralized Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (MacDec-POMDP) is a general formalization for asynchronous decision-making under uncertainty in fully cooperative multi-agent tasks. In this thesis, we first propose a group of value-based RL approaches for MacDec-POMDPs, where agents are allowed to perform asynchronous learning and decision-making with macro-action-value functions in three paradigms: decentralized learning and control, centralized learning and control, and centralized training for decentralized execution (CTDE). Building on the above work, we formulate a set of macro-action-based policy gradient algorithms under the three training paradigms, where agents are allowed to directly optimize their parameterized policies in an asynchronous manner. We evaluate our methods both in simulation and on real robots over a variety of realistic domains. Empirical results demonstrate the superiority of our approaches in large multi-agent problems and validate the effectiveness of our algorithms for learning high-quality and asynchronous solutions with macro-actions.
abstract_zh: 最先进的多智能体强化学习（MARL）方法为各种复杂问题提供了有希望的解决方案。然而，这些方法都假设代理执行同步的原始动作执行，因此它们不能真正扩展到长期现实世界的多代理/机器人任务，这些任务本质上需要代理/机器人在不同的持续时间内异步推理高级动作选择。宏观行动分散部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（MacDec-POMDP）是完全协作多智能体任务中不确定性下异步决策的通用形式化。在本文中，我们首先提出了一组基于价值的 MacDec-POMDP 强化学习方法，其中允许代理以三种范式利用宏观动作价值函数执行异步学习和决策：去中心化学习和控制、集中学习和控制以及去中心化执行的集中训练（CTDE）。在上述工作的基础上，我们在三种训练范式下制定了一套基于宏观动作的策略梯度算法，其中允许代理以异步方式直接优化其参数化策略。我们在各种现实领域的模拟和真实机器人上评估我们的方法。实证结果证明了我们的方法在大型多智能体问题中的优越性，并验证了我们的算法通过宏观动作学习高质量和异步解决方案的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于宏动作的多智能体/机器人深度强化学习方法，解决部分可观测环境下异步决策问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL方法依赖同步原始动作执行，难以应对需要异步高层决策的长期现实任务。
AI.method: 提出MacDec-POMDP框架，设计三种范式（分散/集中学习与控制、CTDE）的值函数和策略梯度算法，支持异步决策。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实机器人实验中验证方法有效性，证明其在大规模多智能体任务中可学习高质量异步策略。
AI.conclusion: 宏动作框架显著提升多智能体系统在部分可观测环境下的异步决策能力，为复杂任务提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Ran Tao,Pan Zhao,Jing Wu,Nicolas F. Martin,Matthew T. Harrison,Carla Ferreira,Zahra Kalantari,Naira Hovakimyan
title: Optimizing Crop Management with Reinforcement Learning and Imitation Learning
title_zh: 通过强化学习和模仿学习优化作物管理
abstract: Crop management, including nitrogen (N) fertilization and irrigation management, has a significant impact on the crop yield, economic profit, and the environment. Although management guidelines exist, it is challenging to find the optimal management practices given a specific planting environment and a crop. Previous work used reinforcement learning (RL) and crop simulators to solve the problem, but the trained policies either have limited performance or are not deployable in the real world. In this paper, we present an intelligent crop management system which optimizes the N fertilization and irrigation simultaneously via RL, imitation learning (IL), and crop simulations using the Decision Support System for Agrotechnology Transfer (DSSAT). We first use deep RL, in particular, deep Q-network, to train management policies that require all state information from the simulator as observations (denoted as full observation). We then invoke IL to train management policies that only need a limited amount of state information that can be readily obtained in the real world (denoted as partial observation) by mimicking the actions of the previously RL-trained policies under full observation. We conduct experiments on a case study using maize in Florida and compare trained policies with a maize management guideline in simulations. Our trained policies under both full and partial observations achieve better outcomes, resulting in a higher profit or a similar profit with a smaller environmental impact. Moreover, the partial-observation management policies are directly deployable in the real world as they use readily available information.
summary: Crop management, including nitrogen (N) fertilization and irrigation management, has a significant impact on the crop yield, economic profit, and the environment. Although management guidelines exist, it is challenging to find the optimal management practices given a specific planting environment and a crop. Previous work used reinforcement learning (RL) and crop simulators to solve the problem, but the trained policies either have limited performance or are not deployable in the real world. In this paper, we present an intelligent crop management system which optimizes the N fertilization and irrigation simultaneously via RL, imitation learning (IL), and crop simulations using the Decision Support System for Agrotechnology Transfer (DSSAT). We first use deep RL, in particular, deep Q-network, to train management policies that require all state information from the simulator as observations (denoted as full observation). We then invoke IL to train management policies that only need a limited amount of state information that can be readily obtained in the real world (denoted as partial observation) by mimicking the actions of the previously RL-trained policies under full observation. We conduct experiments on a case study using maize in Florida and compare trained policies with a maize management guideline in simulations. Our trained policies under both full and partial observations achieve better outcomes, resulting in a higher profit or a similar profit with a smaller environmental impact. Moreover, the partial-observation management policies are directly deployable in the real world as they use readily available information.
abstract_zh: 作物管理，包括氮（N）施肥和灌溉管理，对作物产量、经济效益和环境具有重大影响。尽管存在管理指南，但鉴于特定的种植环境和作物，找到最佳的管理实践具有挑战性。之前的工作使用强化学习（RL）和作物模拟器来解决该问题，但经过训练的策略要么性能有限，要么无法在现实世界中部署。在本文中，我们提出了一种智能作物管理系统，该系统通过强化学习、模仿学习（IL）和使用农业技术转让决策支持系统（DSSAT）的作物模拟同时优化氮肥和灌溉。我们首先使用深度 RL，特别是深度 Q 网络来训练需要来自模拟器的所有状态信息作为观察（表示为完整观察）的管理策略。然后，我们通过模仿先前在全面观察下 RL 训练的策略的行为，调用 IL 来训练只需要有限数量的状态信息的管理策略，这些状态信息可以在现实世界中轻松获得（表示为部分观察）。我们使用佛罗里达州的玉米进行案例研究实验，并将经过培训的政策与模拟中的玉米管理指南进行比较。我们训练有素的政策在全面和部分观察下取得了更好的结果，从而带来更高的利润或类似的利润但对环境的影响更小。此外，部分观察管理策略可以直接部署在现实世界中，因为它们使用现成的信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合强化学习（RL）和模仿学习（IL）的智能作物管理系统，优化氮肥和灌溉管理，利用DSSAT模拟器进行训练并部署。
AI.motivation: 现有作物管理指南难以适应特定环境，传统RL方法生成的策略或性能有限，或无法在真实世界部署，需更高效且可落地的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于DSSAT模拟器，首先用深度Q网络训练需全状态信息的RL策略，再通过模仿学习生成仅依赖部分可获取状态信息的策略，实现真实环境部署。
AI.result: 在佛罗里达玉米案例中，全观测和部分观测策略均优于管理指南，部分观测策略在利润相近时减少环境影响，并可直接应用于实际场景。
AI.conclusion: 结合RL与IL的方法能有效提升作物管理效益，部分观测策略兼顾经济性与环境友好性，为实际农业应用提供可行方案。

We conduct experiments on a case study using maize in Florida and compare trained policies with a maize management guideline in simulations. Our trained policies under both full and partial observations achieve better outcomes, resulting in a higher profit or a similar profit with a smaller environmental impact. Moreover, the partial-observation management policies are directly deployable in the real world as they use readily available information. 作物管理，包括氮（N）施肥和灌溉管理，对作物产量、经济效益和环境具有重大影响。尽管存在管理指南，但鉴于特定的种植环境和作物，找到最佳的管理实践具有挑战性。之前的工作使用强化学习（RL）和作物模拟器来解决该问题，但经过训练的策略要么性能有限，要么无法在现实世界中部署。在本文中，我们提出了一种智能作物管理系统，该系统通过强化学习、模仿学习（IL）和使用农业技术转让决策支持系统（DSSAT）的作物模拟同时优化氮肥和灌溉。我们首先使用深度 RL，特别是深度 Q 网络来训练需要来自模拟器的所有状态信息作为观察（表示为完整观察）的管理策略。然后，我们通过模仿先前在全面观察下 RL 训练的策略的行为，调用 IL 来训练只需要有限数量的状态信息的管理策略，这些状态信息可以在现实世界中轻松获得（表示为部分观察）。我们使用佛罗里达州的玉米进行案例研究实验，并将经过培训的政策与模拟中的玉米管理指南进行比较。我们训练有素的政策在全面和部分观察下取得了更好的结果，从而带来更高的利润或类似的利润但对环境的影响更小。此外，部分观察管理策略可以直接部署在现实世界中，因为它们使用现成的信息。 本文提出一种结合强化学习（RL）和模仿学习（IL）的智能作物管理系统，优化氮肥和灌溉管理，利用DSSAT模拟器进行训练并部署。 Ran Tao,Pan Zhao,Jing Wu,Nicolas F. Martin,Matthew T. Harrison,Carla Ferreira,Zahra Kalantari,Naira Hovakimyan cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Domenico D. Bloisi,Andrea Pennisi,Cristian Zampino,Flavio Biancospino,Francesco Laus,Gianluca Di Stefano,Michele Brienza,Rocchina Romano
title: MARIO: Modular and Extensible Architecture for Computing Visual Statistics in RoboCup SPL
title_zh: MARIO：用于在 RoboCup SPL 中计算视觉统计的模块化和可扩展架构
abstract: This technical report describes a modular and extensible architecture for computing visual statistics in RoboCup SPL (MARIO), presented during the SPL Open Research Challenge at RoboCup 2022, held in Bangkok (Thailand). MARIO is an open-source, ready-to-use software application whose final goal is to contribute to the growth of the RoboCup SPL community. MARIO comes with a GUI that integrates multiple machine learning and computer vision based functions, including automatic camera calibration, background subtraction, homography computation, player + ball tracking and localization, NAO robot pose estimation and fall detection. MARIO has been ranked no. 1 in the Open Research Challenge.
summary: This technical report describes a modular and extensible architecture for computing visual statistics in RoboCup SPL (MARIO), presented during the SPL Open Research Challenge at RoboCup 2022, held in Bangkok (Thailand). MARIO is an open-source, ready-to-use software application whose final goal is to contribute to the growth of the RoboCup SPL community. MARIO comes with a GUI that integrates multiple machine learning and computer vision based functions, including automatic camera calibration, background subtraction, homography computation, player + ball tracking and localization, NAO robot pose estimation and fall detection. MARIO has been ranked no. 1 in the Open Research Challenge.
abstract_zh: 该技术报告描述了用于在 RoboCup SPL (MARIO) 中计算视觉统计的模块化和可扩展架构，该架构是在曼谷（泰国）举行的 2022 年 RoboCup SPL 开放研究挑战赛期间提出的。 MARIO 是一款开源、即用型软件应用程序，其最终目标是为 RoboCup SPL 社区的发展做出贡献。 MARIO 配备了一个 GUI，集成了多种机器学习和计算机视觉功能，包括自动相机校准、背景减法、单应性计算、玩家 + 球跟踪和定位、NAO 机器人姿势估计和跌倒检测。马里奥（MARIO）排名第一。在开放研究挑战赛中排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种模块化且可扩展的架构MARIO，用于在RoboCup SPL中计算视觉统计数据。
AI.motivation: 为了推动RoboCup SPL社区的发展，需要一个开放、灵活且功能丰富的工具来处理视觉统计任务。
AI.method: 开发了一个集成机器学习和计算机视觉功能的GUI应用，包括自动相机校准、背景减除、同态计算、球员与球追踪、NAO机器人姿态估计及跌倒检测。
AI.result: MARIO在2022年RoboCup SPL开放研究挑战赛中排名第一。
AI.conclusion: MARIO作为开源工具，为RoboCup SPL社区提供了高效且可扩展的视觉统计解决方案。

authors_text: Roberto Rossi
title: jsdp: a Java Stochastic DP Library
title_zh: jsdp：Java 随机 DP 库
comment: 8 pages
comments: 8 pages
abstract: Stochastic Programming is a framework for modelling and solving problems of decision making under uncertainty. Stochastic Dynamic Programming is a branch of Stochastic Programming that takes a "functional equation" approach to the discovery of optimal policies. By leveraging constructs - lambda expressions, functional interfaces, collections and aggregate operators - implemented in Java to operationalise the MapReduce framework, jsdp provides a general purpose library for modelling and solving Stochastic Dynamic Programs.
summary: Stochastic Programming is a framework for modelling and solving problems of decision making under uncertainty. Stochastic Dynamic Programming is a branch of Stochastic Programming that takes a "functional equation" approach to the discovery of optimal policies. By leveraging constructs - lambda expressions, functional interfaces, collections and aggregate operators - implemented in Java to operationalise the MapReduce framework, jsdp provides a general purpose library for modelling and solving Stochastic Dynamic Programs.
abstract_zh: 随机规划是一种在不确定性下建模和解决决策问题的框架。随机动态规划是随机规划的一个分支，它采用“函数方程”方法来发现最优策略。通过利用 Java 中实现的构造（lambda 表达式、函数式接口、集合和聚合运算符）来操作 MapReduce 框架，jsdp 提供了一个用于建模和求解随机动态程序的通用库。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为jsdp的Java库，用于建模和求解随机动态规划问题。
AI.motivation: 随机动态规划是处理不确定性决策的重要工具，但缺乏高效的通用实现框架。Java的函数式编程特性可为该领域提供更灵活的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于Java的lambda表达式、函数式接口及集合操作符，构建支持MapReduce框架的通用库，实现随机动态规划的模型化与求解。
AI.result: 开发出jsdp库，为随机动态规划问题提供了一种可扩展、易用的编程接口和计算框架。
AI.conclusion: jsdp库有效结合了Java语言特性与随机动态规划理论，为相关领域研究和应用提供了实用工具支持。

authors_text: Huang Xie,Samuel Lipping,Tuomas Virtanen
title: Language-based Audio Retrieval Task in DCASE 2022 Challenge
title_zh: DCASE 2022 挑战赛中基于语言的音频检索任务
comment: Update for arXiv:2206.06108 mistakenly submitted as a new article
comments: Update for arXiv:2206.06108 mistakenly submitted as a new article
abstract: Language-based audio retrieval is a task, where natural language textual captions are used as queries to retrieve audio signals from a dataset. It has been first introduced into DCASE 2022 Challenge as Subtask 6B of task 6, which aims at developing computational systems to model relationships between audio signals and free-form textual descriptions. Compared with audio captioning (Subtask 6A), which is about generating audio captions for audio signals, language-based audio retrieval (Subtask 6B) focuses on ranking audio signals according to their relevance to natural language textual captions. In DCASE 2022 Challenge, the provided baseline system for Subtask 6B was significantly outperformed, with top performance being 0.276 in mAP@10. This paper presents the outcome of Subtask 6B in terms of submitted systems' performance and analysis.
summary: Language-based audio retrieval is a task, where natural language textual captions are used as queries to retrieve audio signals from a dataset. It has been first introduced into DCASE 2022 Challenge as Subtask 6B of task 6, which aims at developing computational systems to model relationships between audio signals and free-form textual descriptions. Compared with audio captioning (Subtask 6A), which is about generating audio captions for audio signals, language-based audio retrieval (Subtask 6B) focuses on ranking audio signals according to their relevance to natural language textual captions. In DCASE 2022 Challenge, the provided baseline system for Subtask 6B was significantly outperformed, with top performance being 0.276 in mAP@10. This paper presents the outcome of Subtask 6B in terms of submitted systems' performance and analysis.
abstract_zh: 基于语言的音频检索是一项任务，其中使用自然语言文本字幕作为查询来从数据集中检索音频信号。它首次作为任务 6 的子任务 6B 引入 DCASE 2022 挑战赛，旨在开发计算系统来建模音频信号和自由格式文本描述之间的关系。与为音频信号生成音频字幕的音频字幕（子任务 6A）相比，基于语言的音频检索（子任务 6B）侧重于根据音频信号与自然语言文本字幕的相关性对音频信号进行排名。在 DCASE 2022 挑战赛中，为子任务 6B 提供的基线系统明显优于 mAP@10，最高性能为 0.276。本文在提交的系统性能和分析方面介绍了子任务 6B 的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文主要介绍DCASE 2022挑战赛中基于语言的音频检索任务（Subtask 6B），该任务通过自然语言文本作为查询，从数据集中检索相关音频信号。
AI.motivation: 该任务旨在开发能够建模音频信号与自由形式文本描述之间关系的计算系统，与生成音频字幕的任务（Subtask 6A）形成对比，专注于根据文本相关性对音频进行排序。
AI.method: 论文分析了参赛系统的表现，指出提供的基线系统被显著超越，最终最佳系统在mAP@10指标上达到0.276。
AI.result: DCASE 2022挑战赛中，基于语言的音频检索任务的最佳系统在mAP@10指标上取得0.276的成绩，表明存在改进基线模型的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该任务验证了音频与文本关联建模的挑战性，未来需进一步优化跨模态表示学习以提升检索性能。

This paper presents the outcome of Subtask 6B in terms of submitted systems' performance and analysis. 基于语言的音频检索是一项任务，其中使用自然语言文本字幕作为查询来从数据集中检索音频信号。它首次作为任务 6 的子任务 6B 引入 DCASE 2022 挑战赛，旨在开发计算系统来建模音频信号和自由格式文本描述之间的关系。与为音频信号生成音频字幕的音频字幕（子任务 6A）相比，基于语言的音频检索（子任务 6B）侧重于根据音频信号与自然语言文本字幕的相关性对音频信号进行排名。在 DCASE 2022 挑战赛中，为子任务 6B 提供的基线系统明显优于 mAP@10，最高性能为 0.276。本文在提交的系统性能和分析方面介绍了子任务 6B 的结果。 本文主要介绍DCASE 2022挑战赛中基于语言的音频检索任务（Subtask 6B），该任务通过自然语言文本作为查询，从数据集中检索相关音频信号。 Huang Xie,Samuel Lipping,Tuomas Virtanen eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Junkai Wu,Jonah Casebeer,Nicholas J. Bryan,Paris Smaragdis
title: Meta-Learning for Adaptive Filters with Higher-Order Frequency Dependencies
title_zh: 具有高阶频率依赖性的自适应滤波器的元学习
comment: Source code and audio examples: https://jmcasebeer.github.io/metaaf/higher-order
comments: Source code and audio examples: https://jmcasebeer.github.io/metaaf/higher-order
abstract: Adaptive filters are applicable to many signal processing tasks including acoustic echo cancellation, beamforming, and more. Adaptive filters are typically controlled using algorithms such as least-mean squares(LMS), recursive least squares(RLS), or Kalman filter updates. Such models are often applied in the frequency domain, assume frequency independent processing, and do not exploit higher-order frequency dependencies, for simplicity. Recent work on meta-adaptive filters, however, has shown that we can control filter adaptation using neural networks without manual derivation, motivating new work to exploit such information. In this work, we present higher-order meta-adaptive filters, a key improvement to meta-adaptive filters that incorporates higher-order frequency dependencies. We demonstrate our approach on acoustic echo cancellation and develop a family of filters that yield multi-dB improvements over competitive baselines, and are at least an order-of-magnitude less complex. Moreover, we show our improvements hold with or without a downstream speech enhancer.
summary: Adaptive filters are applicable to many signal processing tasks including acoustic echo cancellation, beamforming, and more. Adaptive filters are typically controlled using algorithms such as least-mean squares(LMS), recursive least squares(RLS), or Kalman filter updates. Such models are often applied in the frequency domain, assume frequency independent processing, and do not exploit higher-order frequency dependencies, for simplicity. Recent work on meta-adaptive filters, however, has shown that we can control filter adaptation using neural networks without manual derivation, motivating new work to exploit such information. In this work, we present higher-order meta-adaptive filters, a key improvement to meta-adaptive filters that incorporates higher-order frequency dependencies. We demonstrate our approach on acoustic echo cancellation and develop a family of filters that yield multi-dB improvements over competitive baselines, and are at least an order-of-magnitude less complex. Moreover, we show our improvements hold with or without a downstream speech enhancer.
abstract_zh: 自适应滤波器适用于许多信号处理任务，包括声学回声消除、波束形成等。自适应滤波器通常使用最小均方 (LMS)、递归最小二乘 (RLS) 或卡尔曼滤波器更新等算法进行控制。为了简单起见，此类模型通常应用于频域，假设频率独立处理，并且不利用高阶频率依赖性。然而，最近关于元自适应滤波器的工作表明，我们可以使用神经网络来控制滤波器自适应，而无需手动推导，从而激发了新的工作来利用这些信息。在这项工作中，我们提出了高阶元自适应滤波器，这是对元自适应滤波器的一项关键改进，它结合了高阶频率依赖性。我们展示了我们的声学回声消除方法，并开发了一系列滤波器，与竞争对手的基线相比，这些滤波器的性能提高了多个分贝，并且复杂性至少降低了一个数量级。此外，我们展示了无论有没有下游语音增强器，我们的改进都是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种更高阶的元自适应滤波器，以利用更高阶的频率依赖性，改进自适应滤波器的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的自适应滤波器通常假设频率独立处理，不考虑更高阶的频率依赖性，而最近的研究表明，利用神经网络可以控制滤波器的自适应过程，从而激发了对更高阶频率依赖性的研究。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种更高阶的元自适应滤波器，通过神经网络控制滤波器的自适应过程，并利用更高阶的频率依赖性进行改进。
AI.result: 在回声消除任务中，所提出的滤波器比竞争基线提高了多分贝，并且复杂度至少低一个数量级。此外，改进效果在有无下游语音增强器的情况下均保持一致。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的更高阶元自适应滤波器在性能和复杂度上均优于现有方法，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Alphan Sahin
title: A Demonstration of Over-the-Air Computation for Federated Edge Learning
title_zh: 联合边缘学习的无线计算演示
comment: 9 Figures, 7 Pages. Accepted to GLOBECOM'2022 Workshops: Edge Learning over 5G Mobile Networks and Beyond
comments: 9 Figures, 7 Pages. Accepted to GLOBECOM'2022 Workshops: Edge Learning over 5G Mobile Networks and Beyond
abstract: In this study, we propose a general-purpose synchronization method that allows a set of software-defined radios (SDRs) to transmit or receive any in-phase/quadrature data with precise timings while maintaining the baseband processing in the corresponding companion computers. The proposed method relies on the detection of a synchronization waveform in both receive and transmit directions and controlling the direct memory access blocks jointly with the processing system. By implementing this synchronization method on a set of low-cost SDRs, we demonstrate the performance of frequency-shift keying (FSK)-based majority vote (MV), i.e., an over-the-air computation scheme for federated edge learning, and introduce the corresponding procedures. Our experiment shows that the test accuracy can reach more than 95% for homogeneous and heterogeneous data distributions without using channel state information at the edge devices.
summary: In this study, we propose a general-purpose synchronization method that allows a set of software-defined radios (SDRs) to transmit or receive any in-phase/quadrature data with precise timings while maintaining the baseband processing in the corresponding companion computers. The proposed method relies on the detection of a synchronization waveform in both receive and transmit directions and controlling the direct memory access blocks jointly with the processing system. By implementing this synchronization method on a set of low-cost SDRs, we demonstrate the performance of frequency-shift keying (FSK)-based majority vote (MV), i.e., an over-the-air computation scheme for federated edge learning, and introduce the corresponding procedures. Our experiment shows that the test accuracy can reach more than 95% for homogeneous and heterogeneous data distributions without using channel state information at the edge devices.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们提出了一种通用同步方法，允许一组软件定义无线电（SDR）以精确的时序传输或接收任何同相/正交数据，同时保持相应配套计算机中的基带处理。所提出的方法依赖于接收和发送方向上的同步波形的检测以及与处理系统联合控制直接存储器访问块。通过在一组低成本 SDR 上实现这种同步方法，我们展示了基于频移键控 (FSK) 的多数投票 (MV) 的性能，即用于联邦边缘学习的无线计算方案，并介绍了相应的过程。我们的实验表明，在不使用边缘设备的通道状态信息的情况下，对于同质和异构数据分布，测试精度可以达到95%以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用的同步方法，利用软件定义无线电（SDR）实现精确的时序传输/接收，并演示了基于频移键控（FSK）的多数投票（MV）方案在联邦边缘学习中的空中计算性能。
AI.motivation: 联邦边缘学习需要分布式设备在无通道状态信息（CSI）条件下实现高效同步与计算，传统方法存在时序误差和硬件依赖问题。
AI.method: 通过检测同步波形并联合控制直接内存访问（DMA）模块与处理系统，实现SDR的精确时序控制；基于低成本SDR平台演示FSK-MV空中计算方案。
AI.result: 实验显示，在同构和异构数据分布下，测试准确率均超过95%，且无需边缘设备的通道状态信息。
AI.conclusion: 所提同步方法有效支持联邦边缘学习的空中计算，为分布式AI部署提供了低成本、高精度的硬件实现方案。

authors_text: Hanao Li,Tian Han
title: Learning Sparse Latent Representations for Generator Model
title_zh: 学习生成器模型的稀疏潜在表示
abstract: Sparsity is a desirable attribute. It can lead to more efficient and more effective representations compared to the dense model. Meanwhile, learning sparse latent representations has been a challenging problem in the field of computer vision and machine learning due to its complexity. In this paper, we present a new unsupervised learning method to enforce sparsity on the latent space for the generator model with a gradually sparsified spike and slab distribution as our prior. Our model consists of only one top-down generator network that maps the latent variable to the observed data. Latent variables can be inferred following generator posterior direction using non-persistent gradient based method. Spike and Slab regularization in the inference step can push non-informative latent dimensions towards zero to induce sparsity. Extensive experiments show the model can preserve majority of the information from original images with sparse representations while demonstrating improved results compared to other existing methods. We observe that our model can learn disentangled semantics and increase explainability of the latent codes while boosting the robustness in the task of classification and denoising.
summary: Sparsity is a desirable attribute. It can lead to more efficient and more effective representations compared to the dense model. Meanwhile, learning sparse latent representations has been a challenging problem in the field of computer vision and machine learning due to its complexity. In this paper, we present a new unsupervised learning method to enforce sparsity on the latent space for the generator model with a gradually sparsified spike and slab distribution as our prior. Our model consists of only one top-down generator network that maps the latent variable to the observed data. Latent variables can be inferred following generator posterior direction using non-persistent gradient based method. Spike and Slab regularization in the inference step can push non-informative latent dimensions towards zero to induce sparsity. Extensive experiments show the model can preserve majority of the information from original images with sparse representations while demonstrating improved results compared to other existing methods. We observe that our model can learn disentangled semantics and increase explainability of the latent codes while boosting the robustness in the task of classification and denoising.
abstract_zh: 稀疏性是一个理想的属性。与密集模型相比，它可以带来更高效、更有效的表示。同时，由于其复杂性，学习稀疏潜在表示一直是计算机视觉和机器学习领域的一个具有挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的无监督学习方法，以逐渐稀疏的尖峰和平板分布作为先验，对生成器模型的潜在空间实施稀疏性。我们的模型仅由一个自上而下的生成器网络组成，该网络将潜在变量映射到观察到的数据。可以使用基于非持久梯度的方法按照生成器后向推断潜在变量。推理步骤中的 Spike 和 Slab 正则化可以将非信息性潜在维度推向零以引发稀疏性。大量的实验表明，该模型可以保留具有稀疏表示的原始图像的大部分信息，同时证明与其他现有方法相比得到了改进的结果。我们观察到，我们的模型可以学习解开的语义并提高潜在代码的可解释性，同时提高分类和去噪任务的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督学习方法，通过引入逐渐稀疏化的尖峰与板状分布先验，强制生成模型的潜在空间学习稀疏表示。
AI.motivation: 稀疏表示具有更高的效率和效果，但因复杂性导致学习稀疏潜在表示在计算机视觉与机器学习中仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 设计单层自上而下生成网络映射潜在变量至观测数据，采用非持久梯度方法推断潜在变量，并通过尖峰与板状正则化将非信息维度压缩至零以诱导稀疏性。
AI.result: 实验表明模型能在保留图像主要信息的同时优于现有方法，且能学习解耦语义、提升潜在代码可解释性及分类与去噪任务的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了生成模型的稀疏潜在表示学习，在信息保留、可解释性及任务性能上均取得显著提升。

search_text: Learning Sparse Latent Representations for Generator Model 学习生成器模型的稀疏潜在表示 Sparsity is a desirable attribute. It can lead to more efficient and more effective representations compared to the dense model. Meanwhile, learning sparse latent representations has been a challenging problem in the field of computer vision and machine learning due to its complexity. In this paper, we present a new unsupervised learning method to enforce sparsity on the latent space for the generator model with a gradually sparsified spike and slab distribution as our prior. Our model consists of only one top-down generator network that maps the latent variable to the observed data. Latent variables can be inferred following generator posterior direction using non-persistent gradient based method. Spike and Slab regularization in the inference step can push non-informative latent dimensions towards zero to induce sparsity. Extensive experiments show the model can preserve majority of the information from original images with sparse representations while demonstrating improved results compared to other existing methods. We observe that our model can learn disentangled semantics and increase explainability of the latent codes while boosting the robustness in the task of classification and denoising. 稀疏性是一个理想的属性。与密集模型相比，它可以带来更高效、更有效的表示。同时，由于其复杂性，学习稀疏潜在表示一直是计算机视觉和机器学习领域的一个具有挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的无监督学习方法，以逐渐稀疏的尖峰和平板分布作为先验，对生成器模型的潜在空间实施稀疏性。我们的模型仅由一个自上而下的生成器网络组成，该网络将潜在变量映射到观察到的数据。可以使用基于非持久梯度的方法按照生成器后向推断潜在变量。推理步骤中的 Spike 和 Slab 正则化可以将非信息性潜在维度推向零以引发稀疏性。大量的实验表明，该模型可以保留具有稀疏表示的原始图像的大部分信息，同时证明与其他现有方法相比得到了改进的结果。我们观察到，我们的模型可以学习解开的语义并提高潜在代码的可解释性，同时提高分类和去噪任务的鲁棒性。 本文提出一种无监督学习方法，通过引入逐渐稀疏化的尖峰与板状分布先验，强制生成模型的潜在空间学习稀疏表示。 Hanao Li,Tian Han cs.CV

authors_text: Victor Morel,Cristiana Santos,Yvonne Lintao,Soheil Human
title: Your Consent Is Worth 75 Euros A Year -- Measurement and Lawfulness of Cookie Paywalls
title_zh: 您的同意每年价值 75 欧元——Cookie 付费墙的衡量和合法性
abstract: Most websites offer their content for free, though this gratuity often comes with a counterpart: personal data is collected to finance these websites by resorting, mostly, to tracking and thus targeted advertising. Cookie walls and paywalls, used to retrieve consent, recently generated interest from EU DPAs and seemed to have grown in popularity. However, they have been overlooked by scholars. We present in this paper 1) the results of an exploratory study conducted on 2800 Central European websites to measure the presence and practices of cookie paywalls, and 2) a framing of their lawfulness amidst the variety of legal decisions and guidelines.
summary: Most websites offer their content for free, though this gratuity often comes with a counterpart: personal data is collected to finance these websites by resorting, mostly, to tracking and thus targeted advertising. Cookie walls and paywalls, used to retrieve consent, recently generated interest from EU DPAs and seemed to have grown in popularity. However, they have been overlooked by scholars. We present in this paper 1) the results of an exploratory study conducted on 2800 Central European websites to measure the presence and practices of cookie paywalls, and 2) a framing of their lawfulness amidst the variety of legal decisions and guidelines.
abstract_zh: 大多数网站免费提供内容，尽管这种小费通常会附带相应的费用：收集个人数据是为了为这些网站提供资金，主要是通过跟踪和有针对性的广告。用于获取同意的 Cookie 墙和付费墙最近引起了欧盟 DPA 的兴趣，并且似乎越来越受欢迎。然而，它们却被学者们所忽视。我们在本文中介绍了 1) 对 2800 个中欧网站进行的一项探索性研究的结果，该研究旨在衡量 cookie 付费墙的存在和做法，以及 2) 在各种法律决定和指导方针中确定其合法性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究与法律分析，探讨了Cookie付费墙在中欧地区网站中的使用情况及其合法性。
AI.motivation: 网页内容免费化常伴随用户数据收集，而Cookie墙和付费墙作为获取用户同意的手段，其法律合规性存在争议且缺乏学术研究。
AI.method: 对2800个中欧网站进行实证研究，分析Cookie付费墙的使用现状，并结合欧盟数据保护法规及判例进行合法性框架分析。
AI.result: 发现Cookie付费墙广泛存在，但其合法性因具体实施方式而异，现有法律解释存在分歧。
AI.conclusion: Cookie付费墙的法律边界尚不明确，需进一步明确欧盟法规中的合规标准以平衡商业利益与用户权益。
