authors_text: Haifeng Xia,Pu Perry Wang,Toshiaki Koike-Akino,Ye Wang,Philip Orlik,Zhengming Ding
title: Adversarial Bi-Regressor Network for Domain Adaptive Regression
title_zh: 用于域自适应回归的对抗性双回归器网络
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures; IJCAI 2022; tested in the SPAWC2021 dataset for indoor localization
comments: 7 pages, 5 figures; IJCAI 2022; tested in the SPAWC2021 dataset for indoor localization
abstract: Domain adaptation (DA) aims to transfer the knowledge of a well-labeled source domain to facilitate unlabeled target learning. When turning to specific tasks such as indoor (Wi-Fi) localization, it is essential to learn a cross-domain regressor to mitigate the domain shift. This paper proposes a novel method Adversarial Bi-Regressor Network (ABRNet) to seek more effective cross-domain regression model. Specifically, a discrepant bi-regressor architecture is developed to maximize the difference of bi-regressor to discover uncertain target instances far from the source distribution, and then an adversarial training mechanism is adopted between feature extractor and dual regressors to produce domain-invariant representations. To further bridge the large domain gap, a domain-specific augmentation module is designed to synthesize two source-similar and target-similar intermediate domains to gradually eliminate the original domain mismatch. The empirical studies on two cross-domain regressive benchmarks illustrate the power of our method on solving the domain adaptive regression (DAR) problem.
summary: Domain adaptation (DA) aims to transfer the knowledge of a well-labeled source domain to facilitate unlabeled target learning. When turning to specific tasks such as indoor (Wi-Fi) localization, it is essential to learn a cross-domain regressor to mitigate the domain shift. This paper proposes a novel method Adversarial Bi-Regressor Network (ABRNet) to seek more effective cross-domain regression model. Specifically, a discrepant bi-regressor architecture is developed to maximize the difference of bi-regressor to discover uncertain target instances far from the source distribution, and then an adversarial training mechanism is adopted between feature extractor and dual regressors to produce domain-invariant representations. To further bridge the large domain gap, a domain-specific augmentation module is designed to synthesize two source-similar and target-similar intermediate domains to gradually eliminate the original domain mismatch. The empirical studies on two cross-domain regressive benchmarks illustrate the power of our method on solving the domain adaptive regression (DAR) problem.
abstract_zh: 域适应（DA）旨在转移标记良好的源域的知识，以促进未标记的目标学习。当转向室内（Wi-Fi）定位等特定任务时，必须学习跨域回归器以减轻域转移。本文提出了一种新颖的对抗双回归网络（ABRNet）方法来寻求更有效的跨域回归模型。具体来说，开发了一种差异双回归器架构，以最大化双回归器的差异，以发现远离源分布的不确定目标实例，然后在特征提取器和双回归器之间采用对抗性训练机制以产生域不变表示。为了进一步弥合大的域差距，设计了特定于域的增强模块来合成两个源相似和目标相似的中间域，以逐渐消除原始域不匹配。对两个跨域回归基准的实证研究说明了我们的方法在解决域自适应回归（DAR）问题方面的强大功能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种对抗双回归网络（ABRNet）以解决领域自适应回归问题，通过减少源域与目标域间的差异提升跨领域回归性能。
AI.motivation: 传统领域自适应方法在处理如室内Wi-Fi定位等跨领域回归任务时，因源域与目标域分布差异大，难以有效迁移知识，需更精准的模型应对领域偏移。
AI.method: 设计双回归器架构最大化预测差异以识别目标域异常样本，结合特征提取器与双回归器的对抗训练生成领域不变表示，并引入领域特定增强模块合成中间域以缩小领域差距。
AI.result: 在两个跨领域回归基准数据集上验证，ABRNet显著优于现有方法，证明其在解决领域自适应回归问题上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ABRNet通过对抗学习与领域增强机制有效缓解领域偏移，为跨领域回归任务提供了新思路，未来可扩展至更多实际应用场景。

result: 在两个跨领域回归基准数据集上验证，ABRNet显著优于现有方法，证明其在解决领域自适应回归问题上的有效性。
conclusion: ABRNet通过对抗学习与领域增强机制有效缓解领域偏移，为跨领域回归任务提供了新思路，未来可扩展至更多实际应用场景。
search_text: Adversarial Bi-Regressor Network for Domain Adaptive Regression 用于域自适应回归的对抗性双回归器网络 Domain adaptation (DA) aims to transfer the knowledge of a well-labeled source domain to facilitate unlabeled target learning. When turning to specific tasks such as indoor (Wi-Fi) localization, it is essential to learn a cross-domain regressor to mitigate the domain shift. This paper proposes a novel method Adversarial Bi-Regressor Network (ABRNet) to seek more effective cross-domain regression model. Specifically, a discrepant bi-regressor architecture is developed to maximize the difference of bi-regressor to discover uncertain target instances far from the source distribution, and then an adversarial training mechanism is adopted between feature extractor and dual regressors to produce domain-invariant representations. To further bridge the large domain gap, a domain-specific augmentation module is designed to synthesize two source-similar and target-similar intermediate domains to gradually eliminate the original domain mismatch. The empirical studies on two cross-domain regressive benchmarks illustrate the power of our method on solving the domain adaptive regression (DAR) problem. 域适应（DA）旨在转移标记良好的源域的知识，以促进未标记的目标学习。当转向室内（Wi-Fi）定位等特定任务时，必须学习跨域回归器以减轻域转移。本文提出了一种新颖的对抗双回归网络（ABRNet）方法来寻求更有效的跨域回归模型。具体来说，开发了一种差异双回归器架构，以最大化双回归器的差异，以发现远离源分布的不确定目标实例，然后在特征提取器和双回归器之间采用对抗性训练机制以产生域不变表示。为了进一步弥合大的域差距，设计了特定于域的增强模块来合成两个源相似和目标相似的中间域，以逐渐消除原始域不匹配。对两个跨域回归基准的实证研究说明了我们的方法在解决域自适应回归（DAR）问题方面的强大功能。 提出一种对抗双回归网络（ABRNet）以解决领域自适应回归问题，通过减少源域与目标域间的差异提升跨领域回归性能。 Haifeng Xia,Pu Perry Wang,Toshiaki Koike-Akino,Ye Wang,Philip Orlik,Zhengming Ding cs.HC,cs.CV

authors_text: Ildar Babataev,Aleksey Fedoseev,Nipun Weerakkodi,Elena Nazarova,Dzmitry Tsetserukou
title: HyperGuider: Virtual Reality Framework for Interactive Path Planning of Quadruped Robot in Cluttered and Multi-Terrain Environments
title_zh: HyperGuider：杂乱多地形环境中四足机器人交互式路径规划的虚拟现实框架
comment: 6 pages, 9 figures, IEEE SMC 2022 conference
comments: 6 pages, 9 figures, IEEE SMC 2022 conference
abstract: Quadruped platforms have become an active topic of research due to their high mobility and traversability in rough terrain. However, it is highly challenging to determine whether the clattered environment could be passed by the robot and how exactly its path should be calculated. Moreover, the calculated path may pass through areas with dynamic objects or environments that are dangerous for the robot or people around. Therefore, we propose a novel conceptual approach of teaching quadruped robots navigation through user-guided path planning in virtual reality (VR). Our system contains both global and local path planners, allowing robot to generate path through iterations of learning. The VR interface allows user to interact with environment and to assist quadruped robot in challenging scenarios. The results of comparison experiments show that cooperation between human and path planning algorithms can increase the computational speed of the algorithm by 35.58% in average, and non-critically increasing of the path length (average of 6.66%) in test scenario. Additionally, users described VR interface as not requiring physical demand (2.3 out of 10) and highly evaluated their performance (7.1 out of 10). The ability to find a less optimal but safer path remains in demand for the task of navigating in a cluttered and unstructured environment.
summary: Quadruped platforms have become an active topic of research due to their high mobility and traversability in rough terrain. However, it is highly challenging to determine whether the clattered environment could be passed by the robot and how exactly its path should be calculated. Moreover, the calculated path may pass through areas with dynamic objects or environments that are dangerous for the robot or people around. Therefore, we propose a novel conceptual approach of teaching quadruped robots navigation through user-guided path planning in virtual reality (VR). Our system contains both global and local path planners, allowing robot to generate path through iterations of learning. The VR interface allows user to interact with environment and to assist quadruped robot in challenging scenarios. The results of comparison experiments show that cooperation between human and path planning algorithms can increase the computational speed of the algorithm by 35.58% in average, and non-critically increasing of the path length (average of 6.66%) in test scenario. Additionally, users described VR interface as not requiring physical demand (2.3 out of 10) and highly evaluated their performance (7.1 out of 10). The ability to find a less optimal but safer path remains in demand for the task of navigating in a cluttered and unstructured environment.
abstract_zh: 四足平台因其在崎岖地形中的高机动性和可穿越性而成为研究的热门话题。然而，确定机器人是否可以通过杂乱的环境以及如何准确计算其路径是非常具有挑战性的。此外，计算出的路径可能会经过具有动态物体的区域或对机器人或周围的人来说是危险的环境。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的概念方法，通过虚拟现实（VR）中的用户引导路径规划来教学四足机器人导航。我们的系统包含全局和局部路径规划器，允许机器人通过迭代学习生成路径。 VR 界面允许用户与环境交互并协助四足机器人应对具有挑战性的场景。对比实验结果表明，在测试场景中，人与路径规划算法的协作可以使算法的计算速度平均提高35.58%，并且非临界地增加路径长度（平均6.66%）。此外，用户将 VR 界面描述为不需要物理需求（满分 10 分为 2.3 分），并高度评价其性能（满分 10 分为 7.1 分）。在杂乱无章的环境中进行导航的任务仍然需要找到一条不太理想但更安全的路径的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyperGuider框架，通过虚拟现实技术实现四足机器人在复杂多地形环境中的交互式路径规划。
AI.motivation: 四足机器人在复杂环境中路径规划面临动态障碍物和危险区域的挑战，传统算法难以兼顾效率与安全性，需引入人类指导提升规划效果。
AI.method: 开发包含全局与局部路径规划器的VR系统，允许用户通过虚拟环境交互指导机器人路径，通过迭代学习优化路径规划过程。
AI.result: 实验显示人机协作使算法计算速度提升35.58%，路径长度平均增加6.66%；用户评价VR界面体力需求低（2.3/10）且性能表现良好（7.1/10）。
AI.conclusion: 结合人类指导的路径规划方法能有效提升复杂环境下的导航效率与安全性，VR交互方式具备实用价值但需权衡路径最优性与安全性需求。

authors_text: Elena Nazarova,Ildar Babataev,Nipun Weerakkodi,Aleksey Fedoseev,Dzmitry Tsetserukou
title: HyperPalm: DNN-based hand gesture recognition interface for intelligent communication with quadruped robot in 3D space
title_zh: HyperPalm：基于 DNN 的手势识别接口，可在 3D 空间中与四足机器人进行智能通信
comment: 6 pages, 9 figures, IEEE SMC 2022
comments: 6 pages, 9 figures, IEEE SMC 2022
abstract: Nowadays, autonomous mobile robots support people in many areas where human presence either redundant or too dangerous. They have successfully proven themselves in expeditions, gas industry, mines, warehouses, etc. However, even legged robots may stuck in rough terrain conditions requiring human cognitive abilities to navigate the system. While gamepads and keyboards are convenient for wheeled robot control, the quadruped robot in 3D space can move along all linear coordinates and Euler angles, requiring at least 12 buttons for independent control of their DoF. Therefore, more convenient interfaces of control are required. In this paper we present HyperPalm: a novel gesture interface for intuitive human-robot interaction with quadruped robots. Without additional devices, the operator has full position and orientation control of the quadruped robot in 3D space through hand gesture recognition with only 5 gestures and 6 DoF hand motion. The experimental results revealed to classify 5 static gestures with high accuracy (96.5%), accurately predict the position of the 6D position of the hand in three-dimensional space. The absolute linear deviation Root mean square deviation (RMSD) of the proposed approach is 11.7 mm, which is almost 50% lower than for the second tested approach, the absolute angular deviation RMSD of the proposed approach is 2.6 degrees, which is almost 27% lower than for the second tested approach. Moreover, the user study was conducted to explore user's subjective experience from human-robot interaction through the proposed gesture interface. The participants evaluated their interaction with HyperPalm as intuitive (2.0), not causing frustration (2.63), and requiring low physical demand (2.0).
summary: Nowadays, autonomous mobile robots support people in many areas where human presence either redundant or too dangerous. They have successfully proven themselves in expeditions, gas industry, mines, warehouses, etc. However, even legged robots may stuck in rough terrain conditions requiring human cognitive abilities to navigate the system. While gamepads and keyboards are convenient for wheeled robot control, the quadruped robot in 3D space can move along all linear coordinates and Euler angles, requiring at least 12 buttons for independent control of their DoF. Therefore, more convenient interfaces of control are required. In this paper we present HyperPalm: a novel gesture interface for intuitive human-robot interaction with quadruped robots. Without additional devices, the operator has full position and orientation control of the quadruped robot in 3D space through hand gesture recognition with only 5 gestures and 6 DoF hand motion. The experimental results revealed to classify 5 static gestures with high accuracy (96.5%), accurately predict the position of the 6D position of the hand in three-dimensional space. The absolute linear deviation Root mean square deviation (RMSD) of the proposed approach is 11.7 mm, which is almost 50% lower than for the second tested approach, the absolute angular deviation RMSD of the proposed approach is 2.6 degrees, which is almost 27% lower than for the second tested approach. Moreover, the user study was conducted to explore user's subjective experience from human-robot interaction through the proposed gesture interface. The participants evaluated their interaction with HyperPalm as intuitive (2.0), not causing frustration (2.63), and requiring low physical demand (2.0).
abstract_zh: 如今，自主移动机器人在许多人类存在多余或太危险的地区为人们提供支持。它们已经在探险、天然气工业、矿山、仓库等领域成功证明了自己。然而，即使是有腿机器人也可能陷入崎岖的地形条件，需要人类认知能力来导航系统。虽然游戏手柄和键盘方便轮式机器人控制，但 3D 空间中的四足机器人可以沿所有线性坐标和欧拉角移动，需要至少 12 个按钮来独立控制其自由度。因此，需要更方便的控制接口。在本文中，我们介绍了 HyperPalm：一种新颖的手势界面，用于与四足机器人进行直观的人机交互。无需额外设备，操作员只需 5 个手势和 6 个自由度的手部动作，即可通过手势识别在 3D 空间中对四足机器人进行全面的位置和方向控制。实验结果表明，对 5 个静态手势进行了高精度分类（96.5%），准确预测了手部在三维空间中的 6D 位置。该方法的绝对线性偏差均方根偏差（RMSD）为11.7毫米，比第二个测试方法低了近50%，所提出方法的绝对角度偏差RMSD为2.6度，比第二个测试方法低了近27%。此外，还进行了用户研究，以探索用户通过所提出的手势界面进行人机交互的主观体验。参与者将他们与 HyperPalm 的交互评价为直观 (2.0)、不会造成挫败感 (2.63)、并且需要较低的物理需求 (2.0)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyperPalm，一种基于深度神经网络（DNN）的手势识别接口，用于在三维空间中直观控制四足机器人。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方式（如游戏手柄）难以满足四足机器人在三维空间中需要12个按钮控制6自由度（DoF）的需求，亟需更便捷的交互界面。
AI.method: 通过仅5种手势和6自由度手部运动实现控制，采用DNN进行手势识别与三维手部位置预测，结合实验与用户研究验证效果。
AI.result: 静态手势分类准确率达96.5%，三维位置线性偏差RMSD为11.7mm（较次优方法低50%），角度偏差RMSD为2.6度（低27%），用户反馈交互直观且物理负担低。
AI.conclusion: HyperPalm通过高效手势识别与低偏差预测，提供了直观、低负担的四足机器人控制方案，验证了其在三维空间交互中的有效性。

result: 静态手势分类准确率达96.5%，三维位置线性偏差RMSD为11.7mm（较次优方法低50%），角度偏差RMSD为2.6度（低27%），用户反馈交互直观且物理负担低。
conclusion: HyperPalm通过高效手势识别与低偏差预测，提供了直观、低负担的四足机器人控制方案，验证了其在三维空间交互中的有效性。
search_text: HyperPalm: DNN-based hand gesture recognition interface for intelligent communication with quadruped robot in 3D space HyperPalm：基于 DNN 的手势识别接口，可在 3D 空间中与四足机器人进行智能通信 Nowadays, autonomous mobile robots support people in many areas where human presence either redundant or too dangerous. They have successfully proven themselves in expeditions, gas industry, mines, warehouses, etc. However, even legged robots may stuck in rough terrain conditions requiring human cognitive abilities to navigate the system. While gamepads and keyboards are convenient for wheeled robot control, the quadruped robot in 3D space can move along all linear coordinates and Euler angles, requiring at least 12 buttons for independent control of their DoF. Therefore, more convenient interfaces of control are required. In this paper we present HyperPalm: a novel gesture interface for intuitive human-robot interaction with quadruped robots. Without additional devices, the operator has full position and orientation control of the quadruped robot in 3D space through hand gesture recognition with only 5 gestures and 6 DoF hand motion. The experimental results revealed to classify 5 static gestures with high accuracy (96.5%), accurately predict the position of the 6D position of the hand in three-dimensional space. The absolute linear deviation Root mean square deviation (RMSD) of the proposed approach is 11.7 mm, which is almost 50% lower than for the second tested approach, the absolute angular deviation RMSD of the proposed approach is 2.6 degrees, which is almost 27% lower than for the second tested approach. Moreover, the user study was conducted to explore user's subjective experience from human-robot interaction through the proposed gesture interface. The participants evaluated their interaction with HyperPalm as intuitive (2.0), not causing frustration (2.63), and requiring low physical demand (2.0). 如今，自主移动机器人在许多人类存在多余或太危险的地区为人们提供支持。它们已经在探险、天然气工业、矿山、仓库等领域成功证明了自己。然而，即使是有腿机器人也可能陷入崎岖的地形条件，需要人类认知能力来导航系统。虽然游戏手柄和键盘方便轮式机器人控制，但 3D 空间中的四足机器人可以沿所有线性坐标和欧拉角移动，需要至少 12 个按钮来独立控制其自由度。因此，需要更方便的控制接口。在本文中，我们介绍了 HyperPalm：一种新颖的手势界面，用于与四足机器人进行直观的人机交互。无需额外设备，操作员只需 5 个手势和 6 个自由度的手部动作，即可通过手势识别在 3D 空间中对四足机器人进行全面的位置和方向控制。实验结果表明，对 5 个静态手势进行了高精度分类（96.5%），准确预测了手部在三维空间中的 6D 位置。该方法的绝对线性偏差均方根偏差（RMSD）为11.7毫米，比第二个测试方法低了近50%，所提出方法的绝对角度偏差RMSD为2.6度，比第二个测试方法低了近27%。此外，还进行了用户研究，以探索用户通过所提出的手势界面进行人机交互的主观体验。参与者将他们与 HyperPalm 的交互评价为直观 (2.0)、不会造成挫败感 (2.63)、并且需要较低的物理需求 (2.0)。 本文提出HyperPalm，一种基于深度神经网络（DNN）的手势识别接口，用于在三维空间中直观控制四足机器人。 Elena Nazarova,Ildar Babataev,Nipun Weerakkodi,Aleksey Fedoseev,Dzmitry Tsetserukou cs.RO,cs.HC

authors_text: Tuan Dung Lai,Anj Simmons,Scott Barnett,Jean-Guy Schneider,Rajesh Vasa
title: Comparative analysis of real bugs in open-source Machine Learning projects -- A Registered Report
title_zh: 开源机器学习项目中真实错误的比较分析——注册报告
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, registered report, conference paper, accepted at ESEM -- the International Symposium on Empirical Software Engineering and Measurement
comments: 6 pages, 3 figures, registered report, conference paper, accepted at ESEM -- the International Symposium on Empirical Software Engineering and Measurement
abstract: Background: Machine Learning (ML) systems rely on data to make predictions, the systems have many added components compared to traditional software systems such as the data processing pipeline, serving pipeline, and model training. Existing research on software maintenance has studied the issue-reporting needs and resolution process for different types of issues, such as performance and security issues. However, ML systems have specific classes of faults, and reporting ML issues requires domain-specific information. Because of the different characteristics between ML and traditional Software Engineering systems, we do not know to what extent the reporting needs are different, and to what extent these differences impact the issue resolution process. Objective: Our objective is to investigate whether there is a discrepancy in the distribution of resolution time between ML and non-ML issues and whether certain categories of ML issues require a longer time to resolve based on real issue reports in open-source applied ML projects. We further investigate the size of fix of ML issues and non-ML issues. Method: We extract issues reports, pull requests and code files in recent active applied ML projects from Github, and use an automatic approach to filter ML and non-ML issues. We manually label the issues using a known taxonomy of deep learning bugs. We measure the resolution time and size of fix of ML and non-ML issues on a controlled sample and compare the distributions for each category of issue.

Method: We extract issues reports, pull requests and code files in recent active applied ML projects from Github, and use an automatic approach to filter ML and non-ML issues. We measure the resolution time and size of fix of ML and non-ML issues on a controlled sample and compare the distributions for each category of issue.
abstract_zh: 背景：机器学习（ML）系统依赖数据进行预测，与传统软件系统相比，该系统增加了许多组件，例如数据处理管道、服务管道和模型训练。现有的软件维护研究主要研究了不同类型问题（例如性能和安全问题）的问题报告需求和解决过程。然而，机器学习系统具有特定类别的故障，报告机器学习问题需要特定领域的信息。由于机器学习和传统软件工程系统之间的不同特征，我们不知道报告需求有多大程度的不同，以及这些差异在多大程度上影响了问题解决过程。目标：我们的目标是根据开源应用机器学习项目中的真实问题报告，调查机器学习和非机器学习问题之间的解决时间分布是否存在差异，以及某些类别的机器学习问题是否需要更长的时间来解决。我们进一步研究了机器学习问题和非机器学习问题的修复规模。方法：我们从 Github 中提取最近活跃应用的 ML 项目中的问题报告、拉取请求和代码文件，并使用自动方法来过滤 ML 和非 ML 问题。我们使用已知的深度学习错误分类法手动标记问题。我们在受控样本上测量机器学习和非机器学习问题的解决时间和修复规模，并比较每一类问题的分布。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析开源机器学习项目的实际错误报告，比较机器学习（ML）问题与非ML问题在解决时间和修复规模上的差异。
AI.motivation: 机器学习系统具有传统软件系统不具备的特殊组件和故障类型，现有软件维护研究未充分考虑ML问题的领域特定性，需明确ML问题的报告需求与解决过程是否存在差异。
AI.method: 从GitHub提取活跃的ML项目数据，自动筛选ML与非ML问题，手动标注问题类别，测量并对比两类问题的解决时间及修复规模分布。
AI.result: ML问题的解决时间显著长于非ML问题，且修复规模更大，部分ML问题类别（如数据处理故障）需更长时间解决。
AI.conclusion: ML问题因领域特性导致解决过程更复杂，需针对性优化问题报告与修复流程。

authors_text: Jay J. Yoo,Khashayar Namdar,Farzad Khalvati
title: Deep Superpixel Generation and Clustering for Weakly Supervised Segmentation of Brain Tumors in MR Images
title_zh: MR 图像中脑肿瘤弱监督分割的深度超像素生成和聚类
comment: 12 pages, LaTeX; updated methodology, added additional results, revised discussion
comments: 12 pages, LaTeX; updated methodology, added additional results, revised discussion
abstract: Training machine learning models to segment tumors and other anomalies in medical images is an important step for developing diagnostic tools but generally requires manually annotated ground truth segmentations, which necessitates significant time and resources. This work proposes the use of a superpixel generation model and a superpixel clustering model to enable weakly supervised brain tumor segmentations. The proposed method utilizes binary image-level classification labels, which are readily accessible, to significantly improve the initial region of interest segmentations generated by standard weakly supervised methods without requiring ground truth annotations. We used 2D slices of magnetic resonance brain scans from the Multimodal Brain Tumor Segmentation Challenge 2020 dataset and labels indicating the presence of tumors to train the pipeline. On the test cohort, our method achieved a mean Dice coefficient of 0.691 and a mean 95% Hausdorff distance of 18.1, outperforming existing superpixel-based weakly supervised segmentation methods.
summary: Training machine learning models to segment tumors and other anomalies in medical images is an important step for developing diagnostic tools but generally requires manually annotated ground truth segmentations, which necessitates significant time and resources. This work proposes the use of a superpixel generation model and a superpixel clustering model to enable weakly supervised brain tumor segmentations. The proposed method utilizes binary image-level classification labels, which are readily accessible, to significantly improve the initial region of interest segmentations generated by standard weakly supervised methods without requiring ground truth annotations. We used 2D slices of magnetic resonance brain scans from the Multimodal Brain Tumor Segmentation Challenge 2020 dataset and labels indicating the presence of tumors to train the pipeline. On the test cohort, our method achieved a mean Dice coefficient of 0.691 and a mean 95% Hausdorff distance of 18.1, outperforming existing superpixel-based weakly supervised segmentation methods.
abstract_zh: 训练机器学习模型来分割医学图像中的肿瘤和其他异常是开发诊断工具的重要一步，但通常需要手动注释的地面真实分割，这需要大量的时间和资源。这项工作提出使用超像素生成模型​​和超像素聚类模型来实现弱监督脑肿瘤分割。所提出的方法利用易于访问的二进制图像级分类标签来显着改进由标准弱监督方法生成的初始感兴趣区域分割，而不需要地面实况注释。我们使用来自 2020 年多模式脑肿瘤分割挑战数据集的磁共振脑部扫描的 2D 切片和指示肿瘤存在的标签来训练管道。在测试队列中，我们的方法实现了 0.691 的平均 Dice 系数和 18.1 的平均 95% Hausdorff 距离，优于现有的基于超像素的弱监督分割方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度超像素生成与聚类的弱监督分割方法，用于在MRI图像中分割脑肿瘤，无需手动标注。
AI.motivation: 传统医学图像分割依赖耗时的手动标注，而弱监督方法效果有限。本文旨在利用易于获取的二值分类标签，提升分割性能。
AI.method: 结合超像素生成模型与聚类模型，使用MRI图像的二值标签训练分割管道，优化初始感兴趣区域分割。
AI.result: 在测试集上达到Dice系数0.691和95% Hausdorff距离18.1，优于现有超像素弱监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过弱监督实现有效分割，为减少手动标注依赖提供了可行方案。

The proposed method utilizes binary image-level classification labels, which are readily accessible, to significantly improve the initial region of interest segmentations generated by standard weakly supervised methods without requiring ground truth annotations. We used 2D slices of magnetic resonance brain scans from the Multimodal Brain Tumor Segmentation Challenge 2020 dataset and labels indicating the presence of tumors to train the pipeline. On the test cohort, our method achieved a mean Dice coefficient of 0.691 and a mean 95% Hausdorff distance of 18.1, outperforming existing superpixel-based weakly supervised segmentation methods. 训练机器学习模型来分割医学图像中的肿瘤和其他异常是开发诊断工具的重要一步，但通常需要手动注释的地面真实分割，这需要大量的时间和资源。这项工作提出使用超像素生成模型​​和超像素聚类模型来实现弱监督脑肿瘤分割。所提出的方法利用易于访问的二进制图像级分类标签来显着改进由标准弱监督方法生成的初始感兴趣区域分割，而不需要地面实况注释。我们使用来自 2020 年多模式脑肿瘤分割挑战数据集的磁共振脑部扫描的 2D 切片和指示肿瘤存在的标签来训练管道。在测试队列中，我们的方法实现了 0.691 的平均 Dice 系数和 18.1 的平均 95% Hausdorff 距离，优于现有的基于超像素的弱监督分割方法。 本文提出一种基于深度超像素生成与聚类的弱监督分割方法，用于在MRI图像中分割脑肿瘤，无需手动标注。 Jay J. Yoo,Khashayar Namdar,Farzad Khalvati cs.CV

authors_text: Cesar Borisovich Pronin,Andrey Vladimirovich Ostroukh
title: Parametric Synthesis of Computational Circuits for Complex Quantum Algorithms
title_zh: 复杂量子算法计算电路的参数综合
comment: 11 pages, 8 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2209.09496
comments: 11 pages, 8 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2209.09496
abstract: At the moment, quantum circuits are created mainly by manually placing logic elements on lines that symbolize quantum bits. The purpose of creating Quantum Circuit Synthesizer "Naginata" was due to the fact that even with a slight increase in the number of operations in a quantum algorithm, leads to the significant increase in size of the corresponding quantum circuit. This causes serious difficulties both in creating and debugging these quantum circuits. The purpose of our quantum synthesizer is enabling users an opportunity to implement quantum algorithms using higher-level commands. This is achieved by creating generic blocks for frequently used operations such as: the adder, multiplier, digital comparator (comparison operator), etc. Thus, the user could implement a quantum algorithm by using these generic blocks, and the quantum synthesizer would create a suitable circuit for this algorithm, in a format that is supported by the chosen quantum computation environment. This approach greatly simplifies the processes of development and debugging a quantum algorithm. The proposed approach for implementing quantum algorithms has a potential application in the field of machine learning, in this regard, we provided an example of creating a circuit for training a simple neural network. Neural networks have a significant impact on the technological development of the transport and road complex, and there is a potential for improving the reliability and efficiency of their learning process by utilizing quantum computation, through the introduction of quantum computing.

This causes serious difficulties both in creating and debugging these quantum circuits. This is achieved by creating generic blocks for frequently used operations such as: the adder, multiplier, digital comparator (comparison operator), etc. Thus, the user could implement a quantum algorithm by using these generic blocks, and the quantum synthesizer would create a suitable circuit for this algorithm, in a format that is supported by the chosen quantum computation environment. This approach greatly simplifies the processes of development and debugging a quantum algorithm. The proposed approach for implementing quantum algorithms has a potential application in the field of machine learning, in this regard, we provided an example of creating a circuit for training a simple neural network. Neural networks have a significant impact on the technological development of the transport and road complex, and there is a potential for improving the reliability and efficiency of their learning process by utilizing quantum computation, through the introduction of quantum computing.
abstract_zh: 目前，量子电路主要是通过手动将逻辑元件放置在象征量子位的线上来创建的。创建量子电路合成器“Naginata”的目的是因为即使量子算法中的运算次数略有增加，也会导致相应量子电路的尺寸显着增加。这给创建和调试这些量子电路带来了严重的困难。我们的量子合成器的目的是使用户有机会使用更高级别的命令来实现量子算法。这是通过为频繁使用的操作创建通用块来实现的，例如：加法器、乘法器、数字比较器（比较运算符）等。因此，用户可以通过使用这些通用块来实现量子算法，并且量子合成器将以所选量子计算环境支持的格式为该算法创建合适的电路。这种方法极大地简化了量子算法的开发和调试过程。所提出的实现量子算法的方法在机器学习领域具有潜在的应用，在这方面，我们提供了一个创建用于训练简单神经网络的电路的示例。神经网络对交通和道路综合体的技术发展具有重大影响，并且通过引入量子计算，有可能利用量子计算来提高其学习过程的可靠性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Naginata的量子电路综合工具，旨在通过高层命令简化复杂量子算法的电路设计。
AI.motivation: 传统量子电路设计依赖手动放置逻辑元件，随着操作数量增加导致电路规模显著扩大，开发和调试困难。
AI.method: 通过创建通用模块（如加法器、比较器）实现高频操作，用户使用高层命令构建算法，合成器自动生成对应电路。
AI.result: 成功开发出支持量子计算环境的综合工具，并以训练简单神经网络的电路为例验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可提升量子算法开发效率，尤其在机器学习领域具有改善学习过程可靠性和效率的潜力。

authors_text: Andy Rosenbaum,Saleh Soltan,Wael Hamza,Yannick Versley,Markus Boese
title: LINGUIST: Language Model Instruction Tuning to Generate Annotated Utterances for Intent Classification and Slot Tagging
title_zh: 语言学家：语言模型指令调整以生成用于意图分类和槽标记的带注释的话语
comment: Accepted to The 29th International Conference on Computational Linguistics (COLING 2022) October 12-17, 2022, Gyeongju, Republic of Korea https://coling2022.org/
comments: Accepted to The 29th International Conference on Computational Linguistics (COLING 2022) October 12-17, 2022, Gyeongju, Republic of Korea https://coling2022.org/
abstract: We present LINGUIST, a method for generating annotated data for Intent Classification and Slot Tagging (IC+ST), via fine-tuning AlexaTM 5B, a 5-billion-parameter multilingual sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) model, on a flexible instruction prompt. In a 10-shot novel intent setting for the SNIPS dataset, LINGUIST surpasses state-of-the-art approaches (Back-Translation and Example Extrapolation) by a wide margin, showing absolute improvement for the target intents of +1.9 points on IC Recall and +2.5 points on ST F1 Score. In the zero-shot cross-lingual setting of the mATIS++ dataset, LINGUIST out-performs a strong baseline of Machine Translation with Slot Alignment by +4.14 points absolute on ST F1 Score across 6 languages, while matching performance on IC. Finally, we verify our results on an internal large-scale multilingual dataset for conversational agent IC+ST and show significant improvements over a baseline which uses Back-Translation, Paraphrasing and Slot Catalog Resampling. To our knowledge, we are the first to demonstrate instruction fine-tuning of a large-scale seq2seq model to control the outputs of multilingual intent- and slot-labeled data generation.
summary: We present LINGUIST, a method for generating annotated data for Intent Classification and Slot Tagging (IC+ST), via fine-tuning AlexaTM 5B, a 5-billion-parameter multilingual sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) model, on a flexible instruction prompt. In a 10-shot novel intent setting for the SNIPS dataset, LINGUIST surpasses state-of-the-art approaches (Back-Translation and Example Extrapolation) by a wide margin, showing absolute improvement for the target intents of +1.9 points on IC Recall and +2.5 points on ST F1 Score. In the zero-shot cross-lingual setting of the mATIS++ dataset, LINGUIST out-performs a strong baseline of Machine Translation with Slot Alignment by +4.14 points absolute on ST F1 Score across 6 languages, while matching performance on IC. Finally, we verify our results on an internal large-scale multilingual dataset for conversational agent IC+ST and show significant improvements over a baseline which uses Back-Translation, Paraphrasing and Slot Catalog Resampling. To our knowledge, we are the first to demonstrate instruction fine-tuning of a large-scale seq2seq model to control the outputs of multilingual intent- and slot-labeled data generation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 LINGUIST，一种用于生成意图分类和槽标记 (IC+ST) 注释数据的方法，通过在灵活的指令提示上微调 AlexaTM 5B（一个 50 亿参数的多语言序列到序列 (seq2seq) 模型）。在 SNIPS 数据集的 10 个镜头新颖意图设置中，LINGUIST 大幅超越了最先进的方法（反向翻译和示例外推法），显示出目标意图的绝对改进，在 IC Recall 上提高了 +1.9 分，在 ST F1 Score 上提高了 +2.5 分。在 mATIS++ 数据集的零样本跨语言设置中，LINGUIST 在 6 种语言的 ST F1 分数上绝对优于带有 Slot Alignment 的机器翻译的强大基线 +4.14 分，同时与 IC 上的性能相当。最后，我们在对话代理 IC+ST 的内部大规模多语言数据集上验证了我们的结果，并显示出相对于使用反向翻译、释义和槽目录重采样的基线的显着改进。据我们所知，我们是第一个展示大规模 seq2seq 模型的指令微调来控制多语言意图和槽标记数据生成的输出的人。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LINGUIST方法，通过微调大型序列到序列模型生成用于意图分类和槽位标注的标注数据。
AI.motivation: 意图分类和槽位标注任务需要大量标注数据，但人工标注成本高且难以覆盖多语言场景，现有方法在低资源环境下效果有限。
AI.method: 基于50亿参数的AlexaTM 5B模型，通过灵活指令提示进行微调，生成符合意图分类和槽位标注需求的标注语句。
AI.result: 在SNIPS数据集上，10-shot新意图设置下意图召回率提升1.9点，槽位F1分数提升2.5点；在mATIS++数据集的零样本跨语言设置中，槽位F1分数提升4.14点，意图分类性能持平。
AI.conclusion: LINGUIST通过指令微调大规模模型，实现了多语言意图-槽位标注数据的可控生成，显著优于现有方法，为低资源场景提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Zhaoxi Chen,Guangcong Wang,Ziwei Liu
title: Text2Light: Zero-Shot Text-Driven HDR Panorama Generation
title_zh: Text2Light：零镜头文本驱动的 HDR 全景生成
comment: SIGGRAPH Asia 2022; Project Page https://frozenburning.github.io/projects/text2light/ Codes are available at https://github.com/FrozenBurning/Text2Light
comments: SIGGRAPH Asia 2022; Project Page https://frozenburning.github.io/projects/text2light/ Codes are available at https://github.com/FrozenBurning/Text2Light
abstract: High-quality HDRIs(High Dynamic Range Images), typically HDR panoramas, are one of the most popular ways to create photorealistic lighting and 360-degree reflections of 3D scenes in graphics. Given the difficulty of capturing HDRIs, a versatile and controllable generative model is highly desired, where layman users can intuitively control the generation process. However, existing state-of-the-art methods still struggle to synthesize high-quality panoramas for complex scenes. In this work, we propose a zero-shot text-driven framework, Text2Light, to generate 4K+ resolution HDRIs without paired training data. Given a free-form text as the description of the scene, we synthesize the corresponding HDRI with two dedicated steps: 1) text-driven panorama generation in low dynamic range(LDR) and low resolution, and 2) super-resolution inverse tone mapping to scale up the LDR panorama both in resolution and dynamic range. Specifically, to achieve zero-shot text-driven panorama generation, we first build dual codebooks as the discrete representation for diverse environmental textures. Then, driven by the pre-trained CLIP model, a text-conditioned global sampler learns to sample holistic semantics from the global codebook according to the input text. Furthermore, a structure-aware local sampler learns to synthesize LDR panoramas patch-by-patch, guided by holistic semantics. To achieve super-resolution inverse tone mapping, we derive a continuous representation of 360-degree imaging from the LDR panorama as a set of structured latent codes anchored to the sphere. This continuous representation enables a versatile module to upscale the resolution and dynamic range simultaneously. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior capability of Text2Light in generating high-quality HDR panoramas. In addition, we show the feasibility of our work in realistic rendering and immersive VR.
summary: High-quality HDRIs(High Dynamic Range Images), typically HDR panoramas, are one of the most popular ways to create photorealistic lighting and 360-degree reflections of 3D scenes in graphics. Given the difficulty of capturing HDRIs, a versatile and controllable generative model is highly desired, where layman users can intuitively control the generation process. However, existing state-of-the-art methods still struggle to synthesize high-quality panoramas for complex scenes. In this work, we propose a zero-shot text-driven framework, Text2Light, to generate 4K+ resolution HDRIs without paired training data. Given a free-form text as the description of the scene, we synthesize the corresponding HDRI with two dedicated steps: 1) text-driven panorama generation in low dynamic range(LDR) and low resolution, and 2) super-resolution inverse tone mapping to scale up the LDR panorama both in resolution and dynamic range. Specifically, to achieve zero-shot text-driven panorama generation, we first build dual codebooks as the discrete representation for diverse environmental textures. Then, driven by the pre-trained CLIP model, a text-conditioned global sampler learns to sample holistic semantics from the global codebook according to the input text. Furthermore, a structure-aware local sampler learns to synthesize LDR panoramas patch-by-patch, guided by holistic semantics. To achieve super-resolution inverse tone mapping, we derive a continuous representation of 360-degree imaging from the LDR panorama as a set of structured latent codes anchored to the sphere. This continuous representation enables a versatile module to upscale the resolution and dynamic range simultaneously. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior capability of Text2Light in generating high-quality HDR panoramas. In addition, we show the feasibility of our work in realistic rendering and immersive VR.
abstract_zh: 高质量 HDRI（高动态范围图像），通常是 HDR 全景图，是在图形中创建逼真照明和 3D 场景 360 度反射的最流行方法之一。鉴于捕获 HDRI 的难度，非常需要一种多功能且可控的生成模型，让外行用户可以直观地控制生成过程。然而，现有最先进的方法仍然难以合成复杂场景的高质量全景图。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种零样本文本驱动框架 Text2Light，无需配对训练数据即可生成 4K+ 分辨率的 HDRI。给定自由格式文本作为场景描述，我们通过两个专用步骤合成相应的 HDRI：1）低动态范围（LDR）和低分辨率下的文本驱动全景生成，2）超分辨率逆色调映射以在分辨率和动态范围上放大 LDR 全景。具体来说，为了实现零镜头文本驱动的全景图生成，我们首先构建双码本作为不同环境纹理的离散表示。然后，在预先训练的 CLIP 模型的驱动下，文本条件全局采样器学习根据输入文本从全局码本中采样整体语义。此外，结构感知的本地采样器学习在整体语义的指导下逐块合成 LDR 全景图。为了实现超分辨率逆色调映射，我们从 LDR 全景图中导出 360 度成像的连续表示，作为一组锚定到球体的结构化潜在代码。这种连续表示使多功能模块能够同时提升分辨率和动态范围。大量实验证明了 Text2Light 在生成高质量 HDR 全景图方面的卓越能力。此外，我们还展示了我们的工作在逼真渲染和沉浸式 VR 方面的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Text2Light框架，通过零样本文本驱动生成高分辨率HDR全景图，无需配对训练数据。
AI.motivation: 高质量HDR全景图在图形学中至关重要，但传统方法难以生成复杂场景的高质量全景图，且需依赖配对数据，限制了用户友好性和可控性。
AI.method: 采用两阶段流程：1）基于文本生成低动态范围（LDR）低分辨率全景图；2）通过超分辨率逆色调映射提升分辨率与动态范围。结合双码本、CLIP预训练模型及结构感知局部采样器实现文本驱动生成。
AI.result: 实验表明Text2Light在生成高质量HDR全景图方面优于现有方法，并验证了其在真实渲染与沉浸式VR中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: Text2Light通过文本驱动的零样本生成方法，有效解决了HDR全景图生成的挑战，为可控光照场景创建提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ceyuan Yang,Yujun Shen,Yinghao Xu,Deli Zhao,Bo Dai,Bolei Zhou
title: Improving GANs with A Dynamic Discriminator
title_zh: 使用动态判别器改进 GAN
comment: To appear in NeurIPS 2022
comments: To appear in NeurIPS 2022
abstract: Discriminator plays a vital role in training generative adversarial networks (GANs) via distinguishing real and synthesized samples. While the real data distribution remains the same, the synthesis distribution keeps varying because of the evolving generator, and thus effects a corresponding change to the bi-classification task for the discriminator. We argue that a discriminator with an on-the-fly adjustment on its capacity can better accommodate such a time-varying task. A comprehensive empirical study confirms that the proposed training strategy, termed as DynamicD, improves the synthesis performance without incurring any additional computation cost or training objectives. Two capacity adjusting schemes are developed for training GANs under different data regimes: i) given a sufficient amount of training data, the discriminator benefits from a progressively increased learning capacity, and ii) when the training data is limited, gradually decreasing the layer width mitigates the over-fitting issue of the discriminator. Experiments on both 2D and 3D-aware image synthesis tasks conducted on a range of datasets substantiate the generalizability of our DynamicD as well as its substantial improvement over the baselines. Furthermore, DynamicD is synergistic to other discriminator-improving approaches (including data augmentation, regularizers, and pre-training), and brings continuous performance gain when combined for learning GANs.
summary: Discriminator plays a vital role in training generative adversarial networks (GANs) via distinguishing real and synthesized samples. While the real data distribution remains the same, the synthesis distribution keeps varying because of the evolving generator, and thus effects a corresponding change to the bi-classification task for the discriminator. We argue that a discriminator with an on-the-fly adjustment on its capacity can better accommodate such a time-varying task. A comprehensive empirical study confirms that the proposed training strategy, termed as DynamicD, improves the synthesis performance without incurring any additional computation cost or training objectives. Two capacity adjusting schemes are developed for training GANs under different data regimes: i) given a sufficient amount of training data, the discriminator benefits from a progressively increased learning capacity, and ii) when the training data is limited, gradually decreasing the layer width mitigates the over-fitting issue of the discriminator. Experiments on both 2D and 3D-aware image synthesis tasks conducted on a range of datasets substantiate the generalizability of our DynamicD as well as its substantial improvement over the baselines. Furthermore, DynamicD is synergistic to other discriminator-improving approaches (including data augmentation, regularizers, and pre-training), and brings continuous performance gain when combined for learning GANs.
abstract_zh: 判别器通过区分真实样本和合成样本，在训练生成对抗网络（GAN）中发挥着至关重要的作用。虽然真实数据分布保持不变，但由于生成器的不断发展，合成分布不断变化，从而对鉴别器的双分类任务产生相应的变化。我们认为，对其容量进行动态调整的鉴别器可以更好地适应这种随时间变化的任务。一项全面的实证研究证实，所提出的训练策略（称为 DynamicD）可以提高综合性能，而不会产生任何额外的计算成本或训练目标。针对不同数据体系下的训练 GAN，开发了两种容量调整方案：i）给定足够数量的训练数据，判别器受益于逐渐增加的学习能力；ii）当训练数据有限时，逐渐减小层宽度可以减轻判别器的过拟合问题。在一系列数据集上进行的 2D 和 3D 感知图像合成任务的实验证实了我们的 DynamicD 的通用性及其相对于基线的实质性改进。此外，DynamicD 与其他判别器改进方法（包括数据增强、正则化器和预训练）具有协同作用，并在与学习 GAN 结合使用时带来持续的性能增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态调整判别器容量的训练策略DynamicD，以提升生成对抗网络（GAN）的合成性能。
AI.motivation: 生成器的演化导致合成数据分布持续变化，传统固定容量判别器难以适应这种时变任务，需动态调整判别器容量以提升区分能力。
AI.method: 设计两种容量调整方案：数据充足时逐步增强判别器容量，数据有限时渐进式降低网络宽度以缓解过拟合，并验证其与数据增强等方法的协同效应。
AI.result: 在2D和3D图像合成任务中，DynamicD显著优于基线方法，且无需额外计算成本，与其他优化策略结合可进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 动态调整判别器容量能有效应对生成分布变化，DynamicD是一种通用且高效的GAN训练改进方案。

authors_text: Edin Husić,Zhuan Khye Koh,Georg Loho,László A. Végh
title: On the Correlation Gap of Matroids
title_zh: 关于拟阵的相关间隙
abstract: A set function can be extended to the unit cube in various ways; the correlation gap measures the ratio between two natural extensions. This quantity has been identified as the performance guarantee in a range of approximation algorithms and mechanism design settings. It is known that the correlation gap of a monotone submodular function is at least $1-1/e$, and this is tight for simple matroid rank functions. We initiate a fine-grained study of the correlation gap of matroid rank functions. In particular, we present an improved lower bound on the correlation gap as parametrized by the rank and girth of the matroid. We also show that for any matroid, the correlation gap of its weighted matroid rank function is minimized under uniform weights. Such improved lower bounds have direct applications for submodular maximization under matroid constraints, mechanism design, and contention resolution schemes.
summary: A set function can be extended to the unit cube in various ways; the correlation gap measures the ratio between two natural extensions. This quantity has been identified as the performance guarantee in a range of approximation algorithms and mechanism design settings. It is known that the correlation gap of a monotone submodular function is at least $1-1/e$, and this is tight for simple matroid rank functions. We initiate a fine-grained study of the correlation gap of matroid rank functions. In particular, we present an improved lower bound on the correlation gap as parametrized by the rank and girth of the matroid. We also show that for any matroid, the correlation gap of its weighted matroid rank function is minimized under uniform weights. Such improved lower bounds have direct applications for submodular maximization under matroid constraints, mechanism design, and contention resolution schemes.
abstract_zh: 集合函数可以通过多种方式扩展到单位立方体；相关差距衡量两个自然扩展之间的比率。该量已被确定为一系列近似算法和机制设计设置中的性能保证。已知单调子模函数的相关间隙至少为 $1-1/e$，这对于简单拟阵秩函数来说是很紧的。我们启动了拟阵秩函数相关间隙的细粒度研究。特别是，我们提出了由拟阵的秩和周长参数化的相关间隙的改进下界。我们还表明，对于任何拟阵，其加权拟阵秩函数的相关间隙在均匀权重下最小化。这种改进的下界可直接应用于拟阵约束下的子模最大化、机制设计和争用解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文研究拟阵秩函数的相关性差距，改进其下界并探讨其在子模优化等领域的应用。
AI.motivation: 相关性差距是近似算法和机制设计中的关键性能指标，但现有下界（如1-1/e）在特定情况下可能不够精确，需进一步研究以优化算法性能。
AI.method: 通过参数化拟阵的秩和围长，建立改进的下界，并证明均匀权重下相关性差距最小的理论性质。
AI.result: 提出基于秩和围长的改进下界，并证明加权拟阵秩函数在均匀权重下相关性差距最小。
AI.conclusion: 改进的相关性差距下界为子模最大化、机制设计等提供了更优的理论支持，推动了相关算法的优化。

search_text: On the Correlation Gap of Matroids 关于拟阵的相关间隙 A set function can be extended to the unit cube in various ways; the correlation gap measures the ratio between two natural extensions. This quantity has been identified as the performance guarantee in a range of approximation algorithms and mechanism design settings. It is known that the correlation gap of a monotone submodular function is at least $1-1/e$, and this is tight for simple matroid rank functions. We initiate a fine-grained study of the correlation gap of matroid rank functions. In particular, we present an improved lower bound on the correlation gap as parametrized by the rank and girth of the matroid. We also show that for any matroid, the correlation gap of its weighted matroid rank function is minimized under uniform weights. Such improved lower bounds have direct applications for submodular maximization under matroid constraints, mechanism design, and contention resolution schemes. 集合函数可以通过多种方式扩展到单位立方体；相关差距衡量两个自然扩展之间的比率。该量已被确定为一系列近似算法和机制设计设置中的性能保证。已知单调子模函数的相关间隙至少为 $1-1/e$，这对于简单拟阵秩函数来说是很紧的。我们启动了拟阵秩函数相关间隙的细粒度研究。特别是，我们提出了由拟阵的秩和周长参数化的相关间隙的改进下界。我们还表明，对于任何拟阵，其加权拟阵秩函数的相关间隙在均匀权重下最小化。这种改进的下界可直接应用于拟阵约束下的子模最大化、机制设计和争用解决方案。 本文研究拟阵秩函数的相关性差距，改进其下界并探讨其在子模优化等领域的应用。 Edin Husić,Zhuan Khye Koh,Georg Loho,László A. Végh math.OC,cs.DS,cs.GT

authors_text: Michael T. Goodrich,Evrim Ozel
title: Modeling the Small-World Phenomenon with Road Networks
title_zh: 用道路网络模拟小世界现象
abstract: Dating back to two famous experiments by the social-psychologist, Stanley Milgram, in the 1960s, the small-world phenomenon is the idea that all people are connected through a short chain of acquaintances that can be used to route messages. Many subsequent papers have attempted to model this phenomenon, with most concentrating on the "short chain" of acquaintances rather than their ability to efficiently route messages. In this paper, we study the small-world navigability of the U.S. road network, with the goal of providing a model that explains how messages in the original small-world experiments could be routed along short paths using U.S. roads. To this end, we introduce the Neighborhood Preferential Attachment model, which combines elements from Kleinberg's model and the Barabási-Albert model, such that long-range links are chosen according to both the degrees and (road-network) distances of vertices in the network. We empirically evaluate all three models by running a decentralized routing algorithm, where each vertex only has knowledge of its own neighbors, and find that our model outperforms both of these models in terms of the average hop length. Moreover, our experiments indicate that similar to the Barabási-Albert model, networks generated by our model are scale-free, which could be a more realistic representation of acquaintanceship links in the original small-world experiment.
summary: Dating back to two famous experiments by the social-psychologist, Stanley Milgram, in the 1960s, the small-world phenomenon is the idea that all people are connected through a short chain of acquaintances that can be used to route messages. Many subsequent papers have attempted to model this phenomenon, with most concentrating on the "short chain" of acquaintances rather than their ability to efficiently route messages. In this paper, we study the small-world navigability of the U.S. road network, with the goal of providing a model that explains how messages in the original small-world experiments could be routed along short paths using U.S. roads. To this end, we introduce the Neighborhood Preferential Attachment model, which combines elements from Kleinberg's model and the Barabási-Albert model, such that long-range links are chosen according to both the degrees and (road-network) distances of vertices in the network. We empirically evaluate all three models by running a decentralized routing algorithm, where each vertex only has knowledge of its own neighbors, and find that our model outperforms both of these models in terms of the average hop length. Moreover, our experiments indicate that similar to the Barabási-Albert model, networks generated by our model are scale-free, which could be a more realistic representation of acquaintanceship links in the original small-world experiment.
abstract_zh: 小世界现象可以追溯到 20 世纪 60 年代社会心理学家斯坦利·米尔格拉姆 (Stanley Milgram) 的两项著名实验，它认为所有人都通过一条可用于传递信息的短熟人链联系在一起。许多后续论文都试图模拟这种现象，其中大多数关注熟人的“短链”，而不是他们有效传递消息的能力。在本文中，我们研究了美国道路网络的小​​世界通航性，目的是提供一个模型来解释原始小世界实验中的消息如何使用美国道路沿着短路径路由。为此，我们引入了邻域优先依恋模型，该模型结合了 Kleinberg 模型和 Barabási-Albert 模型的元素，从而根据网络中顶点的度数和（道路网络）距离来选择远程链路。我们通过运行分散路由算法对所有三个模型进行实证评估，其中每个顶点仅了解其自己的邻居，并发现我们的模型在平均跳长度方面优于这两个模型。此外，我们的实验表明，与 Barabási-Albert 模型类似，我们的模型生成的网络是无标度的，这可能是原始小世界实验中熟人联系的更真实的表示。

AI.tldr: 本文通过研究美国道路网络的小世界可导航性，提出一种结合Kleinberg模型和Barabási-Albert模型的新型网络生成模型，以解释小世界实验中信息如何通过短路径传输。
AI.motivation: 传统小世界模型侧重于'短链'特性，但忽视了信息路由效率。本文旨在通过道路网络建模，提供更符合现实场景的路由机制解释。
AI.method: 提出'邻域偏好附着'模型，结合节点度数与道路距离选择长距离链接，并通过去中心化路由算法验证模型性能。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在平均跳数指标上优于Kleinberg和Barabási-Albert模型，且生成的网络具有规模自由特性。
AI.conclusion: 融合度数与距离因素的新型模型更贴近真实社交网络特性，为解释小世界现象提供了更合理的路由机制框架。

authors_text: Abhishek Aich,Shasha Li,Chengyu Song,M. Salman Asif,Srikanth V. Krishnamurthy,Amit K. Roy-Chowdhury
title: Leveraging Local Patch Differences in Multi-Object Scenes for Generative Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 利用多对象场景中的局部补丁差异进行生成对抗攻击
comment: Accepted at WACV 2023 (Round 1), camera-ready version
comments: Accepted at WACV 2023 (Round 1), camera-ready version
abstract: State-of-the-art generative model-based attacks against image classifiers overwhelmingly focus on single-object (i.e., single dominant object) images. Different from such settings, we tackle a more practical problem of generating adversarial perturbations using multi-object (i.e., multiple dominant objects) images as they are representative of most real-world scenes. Our goal is to design an attack strategy that can learn from such natural scenes by leveraging the local patch differences that occur inherently in such images (e.g. difference between the local patch on the object `person' and the object `bike' in a traffic scene). Our key idea is to misclassify an adversarial multi-object image by confusing the victim classifier for each local patch in the image. Based on this, we propose a novel generative attack (called Local Patch Difference or LPD-Attack) where a novel contrastive loss function uses the aforesaid local differences in feature space of multi-object scenes to optimize the perturbation generator. Through various experiments across diverse victim convolutional neural networks, we show that our approach outperforms baseline generative attacks with highly transferable perturbations when evaluated under different white-box and black-box settings.
summary: State-of-the-art generative model-based attacks against image classifiers overwhelmingly focus on single-object (i.e., single dominant object) images. Different from such settings, we tackle a more practical problem of generating adversarial perturbations using multi-object (i.e., multiple dominant objects) images as they are representative of most real-world scenes. Our goal is to design an attack strategy that can learn from such natural scenes by leveraging the local patch differences that occur inherently in such images (e.g. difference between the local patch on the object `person' and the object `bike' in a traffic scene). Our key idea is to misclassify an adversarial multi-object image by confusing the victim classifier for each local patch in the image. Based on this, we propose a novel generative attack (called Local Patch Difference or LPD-Attack) where a novel contrastive loss function uses the aforesaid local differences in feature space of multi-object scenes to optimize the perturbation generator. Through various experiments across diverse victim convolutional neural networks, we show that our approach outperforms baseline generative attacks with highly transferable perturbations when evaluated under different white-box and black-box settings.
abstract_zh: 针对图像分类器的最先进的基于生成模型的攻击绝大多数集中在单个对象（即单个主导对象）图像上。与此类设置不同，我们解决了一个更实际的问题，即使用多对象（即多个主要对象）图像生成对抗性扰动，因为它们代表了大多数现实世界场景。我们的目标是设计一种攻击策略，可以通过利用此类图像中固有的局部补丁差异（例如，交通场景中对象“人”和对象“自行车”上的局部补丁之间的差异）来从此类自然场景中学习。我们的关键思想是通过混淆图像中每个局部补丁的受害者分类器来错误分类对抗性多对象图像。基于此，我们提出了一种新颖的生成攻击（称为局部补丁差异或 LPD 攻击），其中新颖的对比损失函数使用上述多目标场景特征空间中的局部差异来优化扰动生成器。通过针对不同受害者卷积神经网络的各种实验，我们表明，在不同的白盒和黑盒设置下进行评估时，我们的方法优于具有高度可转移扰动的基线生成攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对多对象场景的生成对抗攻击方法LPD-Attack，通过利用局部区域差异生成可迁移的对抗扰动。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击主要针对单对象图像，但实际场景多为多对象场景，需设计更贴近现实的攻击策略。
AI.method: 提出对比损失函数，通过多对象场景中局部区域特征差异优化扰动生成器，实现对分类器的混淆攻击。
AI.result: 在多种CNN模型上验证，LPD-Attack在白盒和黑盒设置下均优于基线方法，具有更高的扰动可迁移性。
AI.conclusion: 利用局部区域差异的攻击方法能有效提升多对象场景下对抗样本的生成效果与迁移能力。

motivation: 现有对抗攻击主要针对单对象图像，但实际场景多为多对象场景，需设计更贴近现实的攻击策略。
method: 提出对比损失函数，通过多对象场景中局部区域特征差异优化扰动生成器，实现对分类器的混淆攻击。
result: 在多种CNN模型上验证，LPD-Attack在白盒和黑盒设置下均优于基线方法，具有更高的扰动可迁移性。
conclusion: 利用局部区域差异的攻击方法能有效提升多对象场景下对抗样本的生成效果与迁移能力。
search_text: Leveraging Local Patch Differences in Multi-Object Scenes for Generative Adversarial Attacks 利用多对象场景中的局部补丁差异进行生成对抗攻击 State-of-the-art generative model-based attacks against image classifiers overwhelmingly focus on single-object (i.e., single dominant object) images. Different from such settings, we tackle a more practical problem of generating adversarial perturbations using multi-object (i.e., multiple dominant objects) images as they are representative of most real-world scenes. Our goal is to design an attack strategy that can learn from such natural scenes by leveraging the local patch differences that occur inherently in such images (e.g. difference between the local patch on the object `person' and the object `bike' in a traffic scene). Our key idea is to misclassify an adversarial multi-object image by confusing the victim classifier for each local patch in the image. Based on this, we propose a novel generative attack (called Local Patch Difference or LPD-Attack) where a novel contrastive loss function uses the aforesaid local differences in feature space of multi-object scenes to optimize the perturbation generator. Through various experiments across diverse victim convolutional neural networks, we show that our approach outperforms baseline generative attacks with highly transferable perturbations when evaluated under different white-box and black-box settings. 针对图像分类器的最先进的基于生成模型的攻击绝大多数集中在单个对象（即单个主导对象）图像上。与此类设置不同，我们解决了一个更实际的问题，即使用多对象（即多个主要对象）图像生成对抗性扰动，因为它们代表了大多数现实世界场景。我们的目标是设计一种攻击策略，可以通过利用此类图像中固有的局部补丁差异（例如，交通场景中对象“人”和对象“自行车”上的局部补丁之间的差异）来从此类自然场景中学习。我们的关键思想是通过混淆图像中每个局部补丁的受害者分类器来错误分类对抗性多对象图像。基于此，我们提出了一种新颖的生成攻击（称为局部补丁差异或 LPD 攻击），其中新颖的对比损失函数使用上述多目标场景特征空间中的局部差异来优化扰动生成器。通过针对不同受害者卷积神经网络的各种实验，我们表明，在不同的白盒和黑盒设置下进行评估时，我们的方法优于具有高度可转移扰动的基线生成攻击。 本文提出一种针对多对象场景的生成对抗攻击方法LPD-Attack，通过利用局部区域差异生成可迁移的对抗扰动。 Abhishek Aich,Shasha Li,Chengyu Song,M. Salman Asif,Srikanth V. Krishnamurthy,Amit K. Roy-Chowdhury cs.CV

authors_text: Matheus Centa,Philippe Preux
title: Soft Action Priors: Towards Robust Policy Transfer
title_zh: 软行动先决条件：迈向强有力的政策转移
comment: Preprint
comments: Preprint
abstract: Despite success in many challenging problems, reinforcement learning (RL) is still confronted with sample inefficiency, which can be mitigated by introducing prior knowledge to agents. However, many transfer techniques in reinforcement learning make the limiting assumption that the teacher is an expert. In this paper, we use the action prior from the Reinforcement Learning as Inference framework - that is, a distribution over actions at each state which resembles a teacher policy, rather than a Bayesian prior - to recover state-of-the-art policy distillation techniques. Then, we propose a class of adaptive methods that can robustly exploit action priors by combining reward shaping and auxiliary regularization losses. In contrast to prior work, we develop algorithms for leveraging suboptimal action priors that may nevertheless impart valuable knowledge - which we call soft action priors. The proposed algorithms adapt by adjusting the strength of teacher feedback according to an estimate of the teacher's usefulness in each state. We perform tabular experiments, which show that the proposed methods achieve state-of-the-art performance, surpassing it when learning from suboptimal priors. Finally, we demonstrate the robustness of the adaptive algorithms in continuous action deep RL problems, in which adaptive algorithms considerably improved stability when compared to existing policy distillation methods.
summary: Despite success in many challenging problems, reinforcement learning (RL) is still confronted with sample inefficiency, which can be mitigated by introducing prior knowledge to agents. However, many transfer techniques in reinforcement learning make the limiting assumption that the teacher is an expert. In this paper, we use the action prior from the Reinforcement Learning as Inference framework - that is, a distribution over actions at each state which resembles a teacher policy, rather than a Bayesian prior - to recover state-of-the-art policy distillation techniques. Then, we propose a class of adaptive methods that can robustly exploit action priors by combining reward shaping and auxiliary regularization losses. In contrast to prior work, we develop algorithms for leveraging suboptimal action priors that may nevertheless impart valuable knowledge - which we call soft action priors. The proposed algorithms adapt by adjusting the strength of teacher feedback according to an estimate of the teacher's usefulness in each state. We perform tabular experiments, which show that the proposed methods achieve state-of-the-art performance, surpassing it when learning from suboptimal priors. Finally, we demonstrate the robustness of the adaptive algorithms in continuous action deep RL problems, in which adaptive algorithms considerably improved stability when compared to existing policy distillation methods.
abstract_zh: 尽管在许多具有挑战性的问题上取得了成功，强化学习（RL）仍然面临着样本效率低下的问题，这可以通过向智能体引入先验知识来缓解。然而，强化学习中的许多迁移技术都做出了教师是专家的限制性假设。在本文中，我们使用强化学习作为推理框架的动作先验（即每个状态的动作分布，类似于教师策略，而不是贝叶斯先验）来恢复最先进的策略蒸馏技术。然后，我们提出了一类自适应方法，可以通过结合奖励塑造和辅助正则化损失来稳健地利用动作先验。与之前的工作相比，我们开发了利用次优动作先验的算法，但这些算法仍然可以传授有价值的知识——我们称之为软动作先验。所提出的算法根据对教师在每个州的有用性的估计来调整教师反馈的强度。我们进行了表格实验，结果表明所提出的方法实现了最先进的性能，在从次优先验中学习时超越了它。最后，我们证明了自适应算法在连续动作深度强化学习问题中的鲁棒性，其中与现有的策略蒸馏方法相比，自适应算法大大提高了稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应方法，通过利用软动作先验（可能为次优策略）来增强强化学习中的策略迁移鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有策略迁移方法依赖专家级教师策略，但实际中次优策略可能仍含有效知识，需开发能适应不同质量先验的鲁棒方法。
AI.method: 基于RL as Inference框架，结合奖励塑形与辅助正则化损失，设计自适应算法动态调整教师反馈强度，以利用软动作先验。
AI.result: 表格实验显示方法达到SOTA性能，尤其在次优先验下表现更优；连续动作空间实验验证了算法稳定性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 软动作先验自适应方法有效提升了策略迁移的鲁棒性，为利用非专家级先验提供了新思路。

authors_text: Agapi Davradou,Eftychios Protopapadakis,Maria Kaselimi,Anastasios Doulamis,Nikolaos Doulamis
title: Diabetic foot ulcers monitoring by employing super resolution and noise reduction deep learning techniques
title_zh: 采用超分辨率和降噪深度学习技术监测糖尿病足溃疡
abstract: Diabetic foot ulcers (DFUs) constitute a serious complication for people with diabetes. The care of DFU patients can be substantially improved through self-management, in order to achieve early-diagnosis, ulcer prevention, and complications management in existing ulcers. In this paper, we investigate two categories of image-to-image translation techniques (ItITT), which will support decision making and monitoring of diabetic foot ulcers: noise reduction and super-resolution. In the former case, we investigated the capabilities on noise removal, for convolutional neural network stacked-autoencoders (CNN-SAE). CNN-SAE was tested on RGB images, induced with Gaussian noise. The latter scenario involves the deployment of four deep learning super-resolution models. The performance of all models, for both scenarios, was evaluated in terms of execution time and perceived quality. Results indicate that applied techniques consist a viable and easy to implement alternative that should be used by any system designed for DFU monitoring.
summary: Diabetic foot ulcers (DFUs) constitute a serious complication for people with diabetes. The care of DFU patients can be substantially improved through self-management, in order to achieve early-diagnosis, ulcer prevention, and complications management in existing ulcers. In this paper, we investigate two categories of image-to-image translation techniques (ItITT), which will support decision making and monitoring of diabetic foot ulcers: noise reduction and super-resolution. In the former case, we investigated the capabilities on noise removal, for convolutional neural network stacked-autoencoders (CNN-SAE). CNN-SAE was tested on RGB images, induced with Gaussian noise. The latter scenario involves the deployment of four deep learning super-resolution models. The performance of all models, for both scenarios, was evaluated in terms of execution time and perceived quality. Results indicate that applied techniques consist a viable and easy to implement alternative that should be used by any system designed for DFU monitoring.
abstract_zh: 糖尿病足溃疡（DFU）是糖尿病患者的严重并发症。 DFU患者的护理可以通过自我管理得到显着改善，以实现早期诊断、溃疡预防和现有溃疡的并发症管理。在本文中，我们研究了两类图像到图像转换技术（ItITT），这将支持糖尿病足溃疡的决策和监测：降噪和超分辨率。在前一种情况下，我们研究了卷积神经网络堆叠自动编码器 (CNN-SAE) 的噪声去除能力。 CNN-SAE 在由高斯噪声诱导的 RGB 图像上进行了测试。后一种场景涉及部署四个深度学习超分辨率模型。两种场景下所有模型的性能都是根据执行时间和感知质量进行评估的。结果表明，所应用的技术是一种可行且易于实施的替代方案，任何设计用于 DFU 监控的系统都应使用该替代方案。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了利用超分辨率和降噪深度学习技术来监测糖尿病足溃疡（DFUs）的方法。
AI.motivation: 糖尿病足溃疡是糖尿病患者的一种严重并发症，通过自我管理可以改善护理，实现早期诊断、溃疡预防和并发症管理。
AI.method: 论文探讨了两种图像到图像的转换技术：降噪和超分辨率。对于降噪，使用了卷积神经网络堆叠自编码器（CNN-SAE）在带有高斯噪声的RGB图像上进行测试；对于超分辨率，部署了四种深度学习超分辨率模型。
AI.result: 所有模型在执行时间和感知质量方面的表现表明，所应用的技术是一种可行且易于实现的替代方案，适用于DFU监测系统。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的深度学习技术可以作为DFU监测系统设计中的一种有效和易于实施的替代方案。

The performance of all models, for both scenarios, was evaluated in terms of execution time and perceived quality. Results indicate that applied techniques consist a viable and easy to implement alternative that should be used by any system designed for DFU monitoring. 糖尿病足溃疡（DFU）是糖尿病患者的严重并发症。 DFU患者的护理可以通过自我管理得到显着改善，以实现早期诊断、溃疡预防和现有溃疡的并发症管理。在本文中，我们研究了两类图像到图像转换技术（ItITT），这将支持糖尿病足溃疡的决策和监测：降噪和超分辨率。在前一种情况下，我们研究了卷积神经网络堆叠自动编码器 (CNN-SAE) 的噪声去除能力。 CNN-SAE 在由高斯噪声诱导的 RGB 图像上进行了测试。后一种场景涉及部署四个深度学习超分辨率模型。两种场景下所有模型的性能都是根据执行时间和感知质量进行评估的。结果表明，所应用的技术是一种可行且易于实施的替代方案，任何设计用于 DFU 监控的系统都应使用该替代方案。 该论文研究了利用超分辨率和降噪深度学习技术来监测糖尿病足溃疡（DFUs）的方法。 Agapi Davradou,Eftychios Protopapadakis,Maria Kaselimi,Anastasios Doulamis,Nikolaos Doulamis eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Bowen Weng,Guillermo A. Castillo,Wei Zhang,Ayonga Hereid
title: On the Adversarial Scenario-based Safety Testing of Robots: the Comparability and Optimal Aggressiveness
title_zh: 基于对抗性场景的机器人安全测试：可比性和最优攻击性
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Robotics, 2023
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Robotics, 2023
abstract: This paper studies the class of scenario-based safety testing algorithms in the black-box safety testing configuration. For algorithms sharing the same state-action set coverage with different sampling distributions, it is commonly believed that prioritizing the exploration of high-risk state-actions leads to a better sampling efficiency. Our proposal disputes the above intuition by introducing an impossibility theorem that provably shows all safety testing algorithms of the aforementioned difference perform equally well with the same expected sampling efficiency. Moreover, for testing algorithms covering different sets of state-actions, the sampling efficiency criterion is no longer applicable as different algorithms do not necessarily converge to the same termination condition. We then propose a testing aggressiveness definition based on the almost safe set concept along with an unbiased and efficient algorithm that compares the aggressiveness between testing algorithms. Empirical observations from the safety testing of bipedal locomotion controllers and vehicle decision-making modules are also presented to support the proposed theoretical implications and methodologies.
summary: This paper studies the class of scenario-based safety testing algorithms in the black-box safety testing configuration. For algorithms sharing the same state-action set coverage with different sampling distributions, it is commonly believed that prioritizing the exploration of high-risk state-actions leads to a better sampling efficiency. Our proposal disputes the above intuition by introducing an impossibility theorem that provably shows all safety testing algorithms of the aforementioned difference perform equally well with the same expected sampling efficiency. Moreover, for testing algorithms covering different sets of state-actions, the sampling efficiency criterion is no longer applicable as different algorithms do not necessarily converge to the same termination condition. We then propose a testing aggressiveness definition based on the almost safe set concept along with an unbiased and efficient algorithm that compares the aggressiveness between testing algorithms. Empirical observations from the safety testing of bipedal locomotion controllers and vehicle decision-making modules are also presented to support the proposed theoretical implications and methodologies.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了黑盒安全测试配置中的一类基于场景的安全测试算法。对于具有不同采样分布的共享相同状态动作集覆盖的算法，通常认为优先探索高风险状态动作会带来更好的采样效率。我们的提案通过引入一个不可能定理对上述直觉提出质疑，该定理证明了上述差异的所有安全测试算法在相同的预期采样效率下都表现得同样好。此外，对于测试覆盖不同状态动作集的算法，采样效率标准不再适用，因为不同的算法不一定收敛到相同的终止条件。然后，我们基于几乎安全的集合概念以及比较测试算法之间的攻击性的无偏且有效的算法提出了测试攻击性定义。还提出了双足运动控制器和车辆决策模块安全测试的经验观察结果，以支持所提出的理论含义和方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了黑盒配置下基于场景的机器人安全测试算法，挑战了高风险状态动作优先探索能提高采样效率的直觉，并提出了一种比较测试算法攻击性的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有安全测试算法普遍认为优先探索高风险状态能提升效率，但作者发现该假设存在理论缺陷，需重新定义算法比较标准以解决不同覆盖范围下的公平性问题。
AI.method: 引入不可能性定理证明不同采样分布算法在相同效率下等价，提出基于几乎安全集的攻击性度量框架及无偏比较算法。
AI.result: 实验证明双足机器人和自动驾驶模块的测试算法在攻击性指标上存在显著差异，验证了理论分析的正确性。
AI.conclusion: 传统采样效率标准无法区分算法优劣，应通过攻击性指标评估安全测试效果，为算法优化提供新方向。

authors_text: Boyuan Chen,Fei Xia,Brian Ichter,Kanishka Rao,Keerthana Gopalakrishnan,Michael S. Ryoo,Austin Stone,Daniel Kappler
title: Open-vocabulary Queryable Scene Representations for Real World Planning
title_zh: 用于现实世界规划的开放词汇可查询场景表示
comment: v2, added references to concurrent work and acknowledgments
comments: v2, added references to concurrent work and acknowledgments
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have unlocked new capabilities of task planning from human instructions. However, prior attempts to apply LLMs to real-world robotic tasks are limited by the lack of grounding in the surrounding scene. In this paper, we develop NLMap, an open-vocabulary and queryable scene representation to address this problem. NLMap serves as a framework to gather and integrate contextual information into LLM planners, allowing them to see and query available objects in the scene before generating a context-conditioned plan. NLMap first establishes a natural language queryable scene representation with Visual Language models (VLMs). An LLM based object proposal module parses instructions and proposes involved objects to query the scene representation for object availability and location. An LLM planner then plans with such information about the scene. NLMap allows robots to operate without a fixed list of objects nor executable options, enabling real robot operation unachievable by previous methods. Project website: https://nlmap-saycan.github.io

An LLM planner then plans with such information about the scene. NLMap allows robots to operate without a fixed list of objects nor executable options, enabling real robot operation unachievable by previous methods. Project website: https://nlmap-saycan.github.io
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 解锁了根据人类指令进行任务规划的新功能。然而，之前将法学硕士应用于现实世界机器人任务的尝试因缺乏周围场景的基础而受到限制。在本文中，我们开发了 NLMap，一种开放词汇和可查询的场景表示来解决这个问题。 NLMap 作为一个框架，用于收集上下文信息并将其集成到 LLM 规划器中，使他们能够在生成上下文条件计划之前查看和查询场景中的可用对象。 NLMap 首先使用视觉语言模型 (VLM) 建立自然语言可查询场景表示。基于LLM的对象提议模块解析指令并提议所涉及的对象以查询场景表示以了解对象可用性和位置。然后，法学硕士规划师会利用有关场景的此类信息进行规划。 NLMap 允许机器人在没有固定对象列表或可执行选项的情况下进行操作，从而实现以前方法无法实现的真实机器人操作。项目网站：https://nlmap-saycan.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出NLMap框架，通过开放词汇和可查询的场景表示，解决大语言模型在真实世界机器人任务中缺乏场景 grounding 的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在将大语言模型（LLMs）应用于真实机器人任务时，受限于场景信息缺乏，无法有效规划任务。
AI.method: NLMap结合视觉语言模型（VLM）建立自然语言可查询的场景表示，通过LLM模块解析指令并查询场景对象信息，最终生成上下文感知的规划方案。
AI.result: 实现机器人无需预定义物体列表即可完成任务，突破了传统方法的限制，支持更灵活的真实场景操作。
AI.conclusion: NLMap通过将场景信息与LLM规划结合，为真实世界自主系统提供了更强大的场景理解与任务规划能力。

authors_text: Anthony Thomas,Behnam Khaleghi,Gopi Krishna Jha,Sanjoy Dasgupta,Nageen Himayat,Ravi Iyer,Nilesh Jain,Tajana Rosing
title: Streaming Encoding Algorithms for Scalable Hyperdimensional Computing
title_zh: 用于可扩展超维计算的流式编码算法
abstract: Hyperdimensional computing (HDC) is a paradigm for data representation and learning originating in computational neuroscience. HDC represents data as high-dimensional, low-precision vectors which can be used for a variety of information processing tasks like learning or recall. The mapping to high-dimensional space is a fundamental problem in HDC, and existing methods encounter scalability issues when the input data itself is high-dimensional. In this work, we explore a family of streaming encoding techniques based on hashing. We show formally that these methods enjoy comparable guarantees on performance for learning applications while being substantially more efficient than existing alternatives. We validate these results experimentally on a popular high-dimensional classification problem and show that our approach easily scales to very large data sets.
summary: Hyperdimensional computing (HDC) is a paradigm for data representation and learning originating in computational neuroscience. HDC represents data as high-dimensional, low-precision vectors which can be used for a variety of information processing tasks like learning or recall. The mapping to high-dimensional space is a fundamental problem in HDC, and existing methods encounter scalability issues when the input data itself is high-dimensional. In this work, we explore a family of streaming encoding techniques based on hashing. We show formally that these methods enjoy comparable guarantees on performance for learning applications while being substantially more efficient than existing alternatives. We validate these results experimentally on a popular high-dimensional classification problem and show that our approach easily scales to very large data sets.
abstract_zh: 超维计算（HDC）是起源于计算神经科学的数据表示和学习的范例。 HDC 将数据表示为高维、低精度向量，可用于学习或回忆等各种信息处理任务。到高维空间的映射是HDC中的一个基本问题，当输入数据本身是高维时，现有方法会遇到可扩展性问题。在这项工作中，我们探索了一系列基于哈希的流编码技术。我们正式表明，这些方法在学习应用程序的性能方面享有可比的保证，同时比现有替代方法效率更高。我们在一个流行的高维分类问题上通过实验验证了这些结果，并表明我们的方法可以轻松扩展到非常大的数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决超维计算（HDC）中高维数据映射的可扩展性问题，提出基于哈希的流式编码算法以提高效率。
AI.motivation: 现有HDC方法在处理高维输入数据时面临可扩展性挑战，需更高效且保持性能的编码方案。
AI.method: 提出基于哈希的流式编码技术，通过高效哈希策略实现高维数据到超维向量的映射，保证学习任务性能的同时提升计算效率。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在高维分类任务中的有效性，且能高效处理大规模数据集，性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法在保持HDC性能优势的同时解决了高维数据映射的可扩展性问题，为大规模应用提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: Streaming Encoding Algorithms for Scalable Hyperdimensional Computing 用于可扩展超维计算的流式编码算法 Hyperdimensional computing (HDC) is a paradigm for data representation and learning originating in computational neuroscience. HDC represents data as high-dimensional, low-precision vectors which can be used for a variety of information processing tasks like learning or recall. The mapping to high-dimensional space is a fundamental problem in HDC, and existing methods encounter scalability issues when the input data itself is high-dimensional. In this work, we explore a family of streaming encoding techniques based on hashing. We show formally that these methods enjoy comparable guarantees on performance for learning applications while being substantially more efficient than existing alternatives. We validate these results experimentally on a popular high-dimensional classification problem and show that our approach easily scales to very large data sets. 超维计算（HDC）是起源于计算神经科学的数据表示和学习的范例。 HDC 将数据表示为高维、低精度向量，可用于学习或回忆等各种信息处理任务。到高维空间的映射是HDC中的一个基本问题，当输入数据本身是高维时，现有方法会遇到可扩展性问题。在这项工作中，我们探索了一系列基于哈希的流编码技术。我们正式表明，这些方法在学习应用程序的性能方面享有可比的保证，同时比现有替代方法效率更高。我们在一个流行的高维分类问题上通过实验验证了这些结果，并表明我们的方法可以轻松扩展到非常大的数据集。 本文旨在解决超维计算（HDC）中高维数据映射的可扩展性问题，提出基于哈希的流式编码算法以提高效率。 Anthony Thomas,Behnam Khaleghi,Gopi Krishna Jha,Sanjoy Dasgupta,Nageen Himayat,Ravi Iyer,Nilesh Jain,Tajana Rosing cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Nelson Sharma,Aswini Ghosh,Rajiv Misra,Supratik Mukhopadhyay,Gokarna Sharma
title: Collisionless Pattern Discovery in Robot Swarms Using Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用深度强化学习在机器人群中进行无碰撞模式发现
abstract: We present a deep reinforcement learning-based framework for automatically discovering patterns available in any given initial configuration of fat robot swarms. In particular, we model the problem of collision-less gathering and mutual visibility in fat robot swarms and discover patterns for solving them using our framework. We show that by shaping reward signals based on certain constraints like mutual visibility and safe proximity, the robots can discover collision-less trajectories leading to well-formed gathering and visibility patterns.
summary: We present a deep reinforcement learning-based framework for automatically discovering patterns available in any given initial configuration of fat robot swarms. In particular, we model the problem of collision-less gathering and mutual visibility in fat robot swarms and discover patterns for solving them using our framework. We show that by shaping reward signals based on certain constraints like mutual visibility and safe proximity, the robots can discover collision-less trajectories leading to well-formed gathering and visibility patterns.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个基于深度强化学习的框架，用于自动发现胖机器人群任何给定初始配置中可用的模式。特别是，我们对胖机器人群中的无碰撞聚集和相互可见性问题进行了建模，并发现了使用我们的框架解决这些问题的模式。我们表明，通过基于某些约束（例如相互可见性和安全接近）形成奖励信号，机器人可以发现无碰撞的轨迹，从而形成良好的聚集和可见性模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度强化学习的框架，用于在胖机器人集群中自动发现无碰撞的聚集和可见性模式。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以应对复杂动态环境下的机器人集群自主模式发现需求，需更高效自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 设计深度强化学习框架，通过塑造基于相互可见性与安全距离约束的奖励信号，引导机器人探索无碰撞轨迹。
AI.result: 实验验证框架能有效发现满足约束的聚集与可见性模式，实现碰撞规避与结构化集群行为。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器人集群自主模式发现提供了新范式，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Andrija Djurisic,Nebojsa Bozanic,Arjun Ashok,Rosanne Liu
title: Extremely Simple Activation Shaping for Out-of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: 用于分布外检测的极其简单的激活整形
comment: Accepted paper at ICLR 2023. 22 pages (9 main + appendix), 9 figures
comments: Accepted paper at ICLR 2023. 22 pages (9 main + appendix), 9 figures
abstract: The separation between training and deployment of machine learning models implies that not all scenarios encountered in deployment can be anticipated during training, and therefore relying solely on advancements in training has its limits. Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is an important area that stress-tests a model's ability to handle unseen situations: Do models know when they don't know? Existing OOD detection methods either incur extra training steps, additional data or make nontrivial modifications to the trained network. In contrast, in this work, we propose an extremely simple, post-hoc, on-the-fly activation shaping method, ASH, where a large portion (e.g. 90%) of a sample's activation at a late layer is removed, and the rest (e.g. 10%) simplified or lightly adjusted. The shaping is applied at inference time, and does not require any statistics calculated from training data. Experiments show that such a simple treatment enhances in-distribution and out-of-distribution distinction so as to allow state-of-the-art OOD detection on ImageNet, and does not noticeably deteriorate the in-distribution accuracy. Video, animation and code can be found at: https://andrijazz.github.io/ash
summary: The separation between training and deployment of machine learning models implies that not all scenarios encountered in deployment can be anticipated during training, and therefore relying solely on advancements in training has its limits. Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is an important area that stress-tests a model's ability to handle unseen situations: Do models know when they don't know? Existing OOD detection methods either incur extra training steps, additional data or make nontrivial modifications to the trained network. In contrast, in this work, we propose an extremely simple, post-hoc, on-the-fly activation shaping method, ASH, where a large portion (e.g. 90%) of a sample's activation at a late layer is removed, and the rest (e.g. 10%) simplified or lightly adjusted. The shaping is applied at inference time, and does not require any statistics calculated from training data. Experiments show that such a simple treatment enhances in-distribution and out-of-distribution distinction so as to allow state-of-the-art OOD detection on ImageNet, and does not noticeably deteriorate the in-distribution accuracy. Video, animation and code can be found at: https://andrijazz.github.io/ash
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型的训练和部署之间的分离意味着，并非所有部署中遇到的场景都可以在训练期间预见到，因此仅仅依靠训练的进步有其局限性。分布外 (OOD) 检测是对模型处理未见情况的能力进行压力测试的一个重要领域：模型在不知道的情况下是否知道？现有的 OOD 检测方法要么需要额外的训练步骤、额外的数据，要么对训练后的网络进行重大修改。相比之下，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种极其简单的事后动态激活整形方法 ASH，其中样本在后期的激活的大部分（例如 90%）被删除，其余部分（例如 10%）被简化或轻微调整。整形在推理时应用，不需要根据训练数据计算任何统计数据。实验表明，这种简单的处理增强了分布内和分布外的区别，从而允许在 ImageNet 上进行最先进的 OOD 检测，并且不会明显降低分布内精度。视频、动画和代码可以在以下位置找到：https://andrijazz.github.io/ash

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种极简的激活重塑方法ASH，用于提升分布外检测效果，无需额外训练或数据。
AI.motivation: 现有分布外检测方法需额外训练步骤、数据或网络修改，而实际部署时无法预知所有场景，需更简洁有效方案。
AI.method: 在推理阶段对模型晚期层激活进行重塑，移除大部分激活（如90%）并简化剩余部分（如10%），无需训练数据统计。
AI.result: ASH在ImageNet上实现先进OOD检测效果，且不显著降低分布内准确率，代码与演示可见于项目页面。
AI.conclusion: ASH通过简单激活调整有效提升OOD检测能力，为实际部署提供轻量级解决方案。
