authors_text: Furkan Ulger,Seniha Esen Yuksel,Atila Yilmaz,Dincer Gokcen
title: Fine-grained Classification of Solder Joints with α-skew Jensen-Shannon Divergence
title_zh: 具有 α 倾斜 Jensen-Shannon 散度的焊点细粒度分类
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Components, Packaging and Manufacturing Technology
comments: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Components, Packaging and Manufacturing Technology
abstract: Solder joint inspection (SJI) is a critical process in the production of printed circuit boards (PCB). Detection of solder errors during SJI is quite challenging as the solder joints have very small sizes and can take various shapes. In this study, we first show that solders have low feature diversity, and that the SJI can be carried out as a fine-grained image classification task which focuses on hard-to-distinguish object classes. To improve the fine-grained classification accuracy, penalizing confident model predictions by maximizing entropy was found useful in the literature. Inline with this information, we propose using the α-skew Jensen-Shannon divergence (α-JS) for penalizing the confidence in model predictions. We compare the α-JS regularization with both existing entropyregularization based methods and the methods based on attention mechanism, segmentation techniques, transformer models, and specific loss functions for fine-grained image classification tasks. We show that the proposed approach achieves the highest F1-score and competitive accuracy for different models in the finegrained solder joint classification task. Finally, we visualize the activation maps and show that with entropy-regularization, more precise class-discriminative regions are localized, which are also more resilient to noise. Code will be made available here upon acceptance.
summary: Solder joint inspection (SJI) is a critical process in the production of printed circuit boards (PCB). Detection of solder errors during SJI is quite challenging as the solder joints have very small sizes and can take various shapes. In this study, we first show that solders have low feature diversity, and that the SJI can be carried out as a fine-grained image classification task which focuses on hard-to-distinguish object classes. To improve the fine-grained classification accuracy, penalizing confident model predictions by maximizing entropy was found useful in the literature. Inline with this information, we propose using the α-skew Jensen-Shannon divergence (α-JS) for penalizing the confidence in model predictions. We compare the α-JS regularization with both existing entropyregularization based methods and the methods based on attention mechanism, segmentation techniques, transformer models, and specific loss functions for fine-grained image classification tasks. We show that the proposed approach achieves the highest F1-score and competitive accuracy for different models in the finegrained solder joint classification task. Finally, we visualize the activation maps and show that with entropy-regularization, more precise class-discriminative regions are localized, which are also more resilient to noise. Code will be made available here upon acceptance.
abstract_zh: 焊点检测 (SJI) 是印刷电路板 (PCB) 生产中的关键工序。在 SJI 期间检测焊接错误非常具有挑战性，因为焊点尺寸非常小并且可以采用各种形状。在这项研究中，我们首先表明焊料的特征多样性较低，并且 SJI 可以作为细粒度图像分类任务来执行，该任务侧重于难以区分的对象类别。为了提高细粒度分类的准确性，文献中发现通过最大化熵来惩罚置信模型预测是有用的。根据这些信息，我们建议使用 α-skew Jensen-Shannon divergence (α-JS) 来惩罚模型预测的置信度。我们将 α-JS 正则化与现有的基于熵正则化的方法以及基于注意力机制、分割技术、变压器模型和细粒度图像分类任务的特定损失函数的方法进行了比较。我们表明，所提出的方法在细粒度焊点分类任务中针对不同模型实现了最高的 F1 分数和竞争精度。最后，我们将激活图可视化，并表明通过熵正则化，可以定位更精确的类判别区域，这些区域对噪声也更具弹性。代码将在接受后在此处提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用α-skew Jensen-Shannon散度（α-JS）进行焊点细粒度分类，以提高印刷电路板生产中焊点检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 焊点检测（SJI）因焊点尺寸小、形状多样而难以识别，现有方法在细粒度分类任务中存在分类准确性不足的问题。
AI.method: 通过引入α-JS散度对模型预测置信度进行惩罚，对比熵正则化、注意力机制、分割技术、Transformer模型及特定损失函数等方法，验证α-JS正则化的有效性。
AI.result: 所提方法在细粒度焊点分类任务中达到最高F1分数和竞争力较强的准确率，激活图可视化显示其能更精准定位类别判别区域并增强抗噪能力。
AI.conclusion: α-JS正则化有效提升了焊点分类的准确性和鲁棒性，为细粒度图像分类任务提供了新思路，代码将在论文接受后公开。

search_text: Fine-grained Classification of Solder Joints with α-skew Jensen-Shannon Divergence 具有 α 倾斜 Jensen-Shannon 散度的焊点细粒度分类 Solder joint inspection (SJI) is a critical process in the production of printed circuit boards (PCB). Detection of solder errors during SJI is quite challenging as the solder joints have very small sizes and can take various shapes. In this study, we first show that solders have low feature diversity, and that the SJI can be carried out as a fine-grained image classification task which focuses on hard-to-distinguish object classes. To improve the fine-grained classification accuracy, penalizing confident model predictions by maximizing entropy was found useful in the literature. Inline with this information, we propose using the α-skew Jensen-Shannon divergence (α-JS) for penalizing the confidence in model predictions. We compare the α-JS regularization with both existing entropyregularization based methods and the methods based on attention mechanism, segmentation techniques, transformer models, and specific loss functions for fine-grained image classification tasks. We show that the proposed approach achieves the highest F1-score and competitive accuracy for different models in the finegrained solder joint classification task. Finally, we visualize the activation maps and show that with entropy-regularization, more precise class-discriminative regions are localized, which are also more resilient to noise. Code will be made available here upon acceptance. 焊点检测 (SJI) 是印刷电路板 (PCB) 生产中的关键工序。在 SJI 期间检测焊接错误非常具有挑战性，因为焊点尺寸非常小并且可以采用各种形状。在这项研究中，我们首先表明焊料的特征多样性较低，并且 SJI 可以作为细粒度图像分类任务来执行，该任务侧重于难以区分的对象类别。为了提高细粒度分类的准确性，文献中发现通过最大化熵来惩罚置信模型预测是有用的。根据这些信息，我们建议使用 α-skew Jensen-Shannon divergence (α-JS) 来惩罚模型预测的置信度。我们将 α-JS 正则化与现有的基于熵正则化的方法以及基于注意力机制、分割技术、变压器模型和细粒度图像分类任务的特定损失函数的方法进行了比较。我们表明，所提出的方法在细粒度焊点分类任务中针对不同模型实现了最高的 F1 分数和竞争精度。最后，我们将激活图可视化，并表明通过熵正则化，可以定位更精确的类判别区域，这些区域对噪声也更具弹性。代码将在接受后在此处提供。 本文提出使用α-skew Jensen-Shannon散度（α-JS）进行焊点细粒度分类，以提高印刷电路板生产中焊点检测的准确性。 Furkan Ulger,Seniha Esen Yuksel,Atila Yilmaz,Dincer Gokcen cs.CV

authors_text: Mobarakol Islam,Ben Glocker
title: Frequency Dropout: Feature-Level Regularization via Randomized Filtering
title_zh: 频率丢失：通过随机过滤进行特征级正则化
comment: 15 pages
comments: 15 pages
abstract: Deep convolutional neural networks have shown remarkable performance on various computer vision tasks, and yet, they are susceptible to picking up spurious correlations from the training signal. So called `shortcuts' can occur during learning, for example, when there are specific frequencies present in the image data that correlate with the output predictions. Both high and low frequencies can be characteristic of the underlying noise distribution caused by the image acquisition rather than in relation to the task-relevant information about the image content. Models that learn features related to this characteristic noise will not generalize well to new data. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective training strategy, Frequency Dropout, to prevent convolutional neural networks from learning frequency-specific imaging features. We employ randomized filtering of feature maps during training which acts as a feature-level regularization. In this study, we consider common image processing filters such as Gaussian smoothing, Laplacian of Gaussian, and Gabor filtering. Our training strategy is model-agnostic and can be used for any computer vision task. We demonstrate the effectiveness of Frequency Dropout on a range of popular architectures and multiple tasks including image classification, domain adaptation, and semantic segmentation using both computer vision and medical imaging datasets. Our results suggest that the proposed approach does not only improve predictive accuracy but also improves robustness against domain shift.
summary: Deep convolutional neural networks have shown remarkable performance on various computer vision tasks, and yet, they are susceptible to picking up spurious correlations from the training signal. So called `shortcuts' can occur during learning, for example, when there are specific frequencies present in the image data that correlate with the output predictions. Both high and low frequencies can be characteristic of the underlying noise distribution caused by the image acquisition rather than in relation to the task-relevant information about the image content. Models that learn features related to this characteristic noise will not generalize well to new data. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective training strategy, Frequency Dropout, to prevent convolutional neural networks from learning frequency-specific imaging features. We employ randomized filtering of feature maps during training which acts as a feature-level regularization. In this study, we consider common image processing filters such as Gaussian smoothing, Laplacian of Gaussian, and Gabor filtering. Our training strategy is model-agnostic and can be used for any computer vision task. We demonstrate the effectiveness of Frequency Dropout on a range of popular architectures and multiple tasks including image classification, domain adaptation, and semantic segmentation using both computer vision and medical imaging datasets. Our results suggest that the proposed approach does not only improve predictive accuracy but also improves robustness against domain shift.
abstract_zh: 深度卷积神经网络在各种计算机视觉任务中表现出了卓越的性能，但它们很容易从训练信号中拾取虚假相关性。例如，当图像数据中存在与输出预测相关的特定频率时，所谓的“捷径”可能会在学习过程中出现。高频和低频都可以是由图像采集引起的潜在噪声分布的特征，而不是与图像内容的任务相关信息相关。学习与这种特征噪声相关的特征的模型不能很好地推广到新数据。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的训练策略——Frequency Dropout，以防止卷积神经网络学习特定频率的成像特征。我们在训练期间采用特征图的随机过滤，作为特征级正则化。在本研究中，我们考虑常见的图像处理滤波器，例如高斯平滑、高斯拉普拉斯和 Gabor 滤波。我们的训练策略与模型无关，可用于任何计算机视觉任务。我们使用计算机视觉和医学成像数据集证明了Frequency Dropout在一系列流行架构和多项任务上的有效性，包括图像分类、域适应和语义分割。我们的结果表明，所提出的方法不仅提高了预测准确性，而且还提高了针对域转移的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Frequency Dropout的特征级正则化方法，通过随机滤波防止卷积神经网络学习与任务无关的频率特征。
AI.motivation: 深度卷积网络容易学习图像中与任务无关的噪声频率特征，导致模型泛化能力下降，尤其在领域迁移时表现不佳。
AI.method: 在训练过程中对特征图应用随机化滤波（如高斯平滑、拉普拉斯高斯和Gabor滤波），实现特征级正则化，且该方法对模型和任务具有通用性。
AI.result: 在图像分类、领域适应和语义分割等任务中，该方法提升了预测精度并增强了对领域偏移的鲁棒性，适用于计算机视觉和医学影像数据集。
AI.conclusion: Frequency Dropout通过抑制无关频率特征的学习，有效提升了模型的泛化能力和鲁棒性，是一种简单且通用的训练策略。

authors_text: Jiawei Liang,Siyuan Liang,Aishan Liu,Ke Ma,Jingzhi Li,Xiaochun Cao
title: Exploring Inconsistent Knowledge Distillation for Object Detection with Data Augmentation
title_zh: 通过数据增强探索用于对象检测的不一致知识蒸馏
comment: ACMMM 2023 Oral
comments: ACMMM 2023 Oral
abstract: Knowledge Distillation (KD) for object detection aims to train a compact detector by transferring knowledge from a teacher model. Since the teacher model perceives data in a way different from humans, existing KD methods only distill knowledge that is consistent with labels annotated by human expert while neglecting knowledge that is not consistent with human perception, which results in insufficient distillation and sub-optimal performance. In this paper, we propose inconsistent knowledge distillation (IKD), which aims to distill knowledge inherent in the teacher model's counter-intuitive perceptions. We start by considering the teacher model's counter-intuitive perceptions of frequency and non-robust features. Unlike previous works that exploit fine-grained features or introduce additional regularizations, we extract inconsistent knowledge by providing diverse input using data augmentation. Specifically, we propose a sample-specific data augmentation to transfer the teacher model's ability in capturing distinct frequency components and suggest an adversarial feature augmentation to extract the teacher model's perceptions of non-robust features in the data. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method which outperforms state-of-the-art KD baselines on one-stage, two-stage and anchor-free object detectors (at most +1.0 mAP). Our codes will be made available at \url{https://github.com/JWLiang007/IKD.git}.
summary: Knowledge Distillation (KD) for object detection aims to train a compact detector by transferring knowledge from a teacher model. Since the teacher model perceives data in a way different from humans, existing KD methods only distill knowledge that is consistent with labels annotated by human expert while neglecting knowledge that is not consistent with human perception, which results in insufficient distillation and sub-optimal performance. In this paper, we propose inconsistent knowledge distillation (IKD), which aims to distill knowledge inherent in the teacher model's counter-intuitive perceptions. We start by considering the teacher model's counter-intuitive perceptions of frequency and non-robust features. Unlike previous works that exploit fine-grained features or introduce additional regularizations, we extract inconsistent knowledge by providing diverse input using data augmentation. Specifically, we propose a sample-specific data augmentation to transfer the teacher model's ability in capturing distinct frequency components and suggest an adversarial feature augmentation to extract the teacher model's perceptions of non-robust features in the data. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method which outperforms state-of-the-art KD baselines on one-stage, two-stage and anchor-free object detectors (at most +1.0 mAP). Our codes will be made available at \url{https://github.com/JWLiang007/IKD.git}.
abstract_zh: 用于目标检测的知识蒸馏（KD）旨在通过从教师模型转移知识来训练紧凑的检测器。由于教师模型感知数据的方式与人类不同，现有的KD方法仅提取与人类专家标注的标签一致的知识，而忽略了与人类感知不一致的知识，导致提取不充分且性能次优。在本文中，我们提出了不一致知识蒸馏（IKD），其目的是蒸馏教师模型的反直觉感知中固有的知识。我们首先考虑教师模型对频率和非鲁棒特征的反直觉认知。与之前利用细粒度特征或引入额外正则化的工作不同，我们通过使用数据增强提供不同的输入来提取不一致的知识。具体来说，我们提出了一种特定于样本的数据增强，以转移教师模型捕获不同频率分量的能力，并建议采用对抗性特征增强来提取教师模型对数据中非鲁棒特征的感知。大量的实验证明了我们的方法的有效性，该方法在一级、两级和无锚目标检测器上优于最先进的 KD 基线（最多 +1.0 mAP）。我们的代码将在 \url{https://github.com/JWLiang007/IKD.git} 提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数据增强的不一致知识蒸馏（IKD）方法，用于改进目标检测模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法仅利用与人类标注一致的知识，忽略了教师模型中与人类感知不一致的潜在知识，导致蒸馏效果不足。
AI.method: 通过数据增强技术提取教师模型的非直观感知知识，包括样本特定的频率增强和对抗性特征增强。
AI.result: 在单阶段、两阶段和无锚点检测器上优于现有KD方法，最高提升1.0 mAP。
AI.conclusion: IKD通过有效利用教师模型的不一致知识，结合数据增强技术，显著提升了目标检测性能。

search_text: Exploring Inconsistent Knowledge Distillation for Object Detection with Data Augmentation 通过数据增强探索用于对象检测的不一致知识蒸馏 Knowledge Distillation (KD) for object detection aims to train a compact detector by transferring knowledge from a teacher model. Since the teacher model perceives data in a way different from humans, existing KD methods only distill knowledge that is consistent with labels annotated by human expert while neglecting knowledge that is not consistent with human perception, which results in insufficient distillation and sub-optimal performance. In this paper, we propose inconsistent knowledge distillation (IKD), which aims to distill knowledge inherent in the teacher model's counter-intuitive perceptions. We start by considering the teacher model's counter-intuitive perceptions of frequency and non-robust features. Unlike previous works that exploit fine-grained features or introduce additional regularizations, we extract inconsistent knowledge by providing diverse input using data augmentation. Specifically, we propose a sample-specific data augmentation to transfer the teacher model's ability in capturing distinct frequency components and suggest an adversarial feature augmentation to extract the teacher model's perceptions of non-robust features in the data. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method which outperforms state-of-the-art KD baselines on one-stage, two-stage and anchor-free object detectors (at most +1.0 mAP). Our codes will be made available at \url{https://github.com/JWLiang007/IKD.git}. 用于目标检测的知识蒸馏（KD）旨在通过从教师模型转移知识来训练紧凑的检测器。由于教师模型感知数据的方式与人类不同，现有的KD方法仅提取与人类专家标注的标签一致的知识，而忽略了与人类感知不一致的知识，导致提取不充分且性能次优。在本文中，我们提出了不一致知识蒸馏（IKD），其目的是蒸馏教师模型的反直觉感知中固有的知识。我们首先考虑教师模型对频率和非鲁棒特征的反直觉认知。与之前利用细粒度特征或引入额外正则化的工作不同，我们通过使用数据增强提供不同的输入来提取不一致的知识。具体来说，我们提出了一种特定于样本的数据增强，以转移教师模型捕获不同频率分量的能力，并建议采用对抗性特征增强来提取教师模型对数据中非鲁棒特征的感知。大量的实验证明了我们的方法的有效性，该方法在一级、两级和无锚目标检测器上优于最先进的 KD 基线（最多 +1.0 mAP）。我们的代码将在 \url{https://github.com/JWLiang007/IKD.git} 提供。 本文提出了一种基于数据增强的不一致知识蒸馏（IKD）方法，用于改进目标检测模型的性能。 Jiawei Liang,Siyuan Liang,Aishan Liu,Ke Ma,Jingzhi Li,Xiaochun Cao cs.CV

authors_text: Tobias Kalb,Björn Mauthe,Jürgen Beyerer
title: Improving Replay-Based Continual Semantic Segmentation with Smart Data Selection
title_zh: 通过智能数据选择改进基于重播的连续语义分割
comment: Accepted at 2022 IEEE Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC 2022)
comments: Accepted at 2022 IEEE Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC 2022)
abstract: Continual learning for Semantic Segmentation (CSS) is a rapidly emerging field, in which the capabilities of the segmentation model are incrementally improved by learning new classes or new domains. A central challenge in Continual Learning is overcoming the effects of catastrophic forgetting, which refers to the sudden drop in accuracy on previously learned tasks after the model is trained on new classes or domains. In continual classification this challenge is often overcome by replaying a small selection of samples from previous tasks, however replay is rarely considered in CSS. Therefore, we investigate the influences of various replay strategies for semantic segmentation and evaluate them in class- and domain-incremental settings. Our findings suggest that in a class-incremental setting, it is critical to achieve a uniform distribution for the different classes in the buffer to avoid a bias towards newly learned classes. In the domain-incremental setting, it is most effective to select buffer samples by uniformly sampling from the distribution of learned feature representations or by choosing samples with median entropy. Finally, we observe that the effective sampling methods help to decrease the representation shift significantly in early layers, which is a major cause of forgetting in domain-incremental learning.
summary: Continual learning for Semantic Segmentation (CSS) is a rapidly emerging field, in which the capabilities of the segmentation model are incrementally improved by learning new classes or new domains. A central challenge in Continual Learning is overcoming the effects of catastrophic forgetting, which refers to the sudden drop in accuracy on previously learned tasks after the model is trained on new classes or domains. In continual classification this challenge is often overcome by replaying a small selection of samples from previous tasks, however replay is rarely considered in CSS. Therefore, we investigate the influences of various replay strategies for semantic segmentation and evaluate them in class- and domain-incremental settings. Our findings suggest that in a class-incremental setting, it is critical to achieve a uniform distribution for the different classes in the buffer to avoid a bias towards newly learned classes. In the domain-incremental setting, it is most effective to select buffer samples by uniformly sampling from the distribution of learned feature representations or by choosing samples with median entropy. Finally, we observe that the effective sampling methods help to decrease the representation shift significantly in early layers, which is a major cause of forgetting in domain-incremental learning.
abstract_zh: 语义分割（CSS）的持续学习是一个快速新兴的领域，其中分割模型的能力通过学习新类别或新领域来逐步提高。持续学习的一个核心挑战是克服灾难性遗忘的影响，这是指在模型在新的类别或领域进行训练后，先前学习的任务的准确性突然下降。在连续分类中，通常通过重放之前任务中的一小部分样本来克服这一挑战，但 CSS 中很少考虑重放。因此，我们研究了各种重播策略对语义分割的影响，并在类和域增量设置中对其进行评估。我们的研究结果表明，在类别增量设置中，至关重要的是在缓冲区中实现不同类别的均匀分布，以避免对新学习的类别产生偏见。在域增量设置中，通过从学习的特征表示的分布中均匀采样或选择具有中值熵的样本来选择缓冲区样本是最有效的。最后，我们观察到有效的采样方法有助于显着减少早期层的表示偏移，这是领域增量学习中遗忘的主要原因。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过智能数据选择改进基于重放缓冲的持续语义分割，以应对灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 持续语义分割（CSS）面临灾难性遗忘挑战，而传统分类任务中常用的重放缓冲策略在CSS中应用较少，需探索适配CSS的重放方法。
AI.method: 在类增量和域增量场景下，对比分析多种重放缓冲策略，包括类别均匀分布采样、特征表示分布采样及熵值中位数筛选方法。
AI.result: 类增量中类别均匀分布能有效避免新类偏好；域增量中特征分布采样和熵值中位数方法显著降低早期层的表示偏移，缓解遗忘。
AI.conclusion: 智能数据选择策略可有效提升CSS的持续学习能力，不同增量场景需采用针对性的重放方法以减少表示偏移。

authors_text: Nico Roos
title: On resolving conflicts between arguments
title_zh: 关于解决争论之间的冲突
abstract: Argument systems are based on the idea that one can construct arguments for propositions; i.e., structured reasons justifying the belief in a proposition. Using defeasible rules, arguments need not be valid in all circumstances, therefore, it might be possible to construct an argument for a proposition as well as its negation. When arguments support conflicting propositions, one of the arguments must be defeated, which raises the question of \emph{which (sub-)arguments can be subject to defeat}? In legal argumentation, meta-rules determine the valid arguments by considering the last defeasible rule of each argument involved in a conflict. Since it is easier to evaluate arguments using their last rules, \emph{can a conflict be resolved by considering only the last defeasible rules of the arguments involved}? We propose a new argument system where, instead of deriving a defeat relation between arguments, \emph{undercutting-arguments} for the defeat of defeasible rules are constructed. This system allows us, (\textit{i}) to resolve conflicts (a generalization of rebutting arguments) using only the last rules of the arguments for inconsistencies, (\textit{ii}) to determine a set of valid (undefeated) arguments in linear time using an algorithm based on a JTMS, (\textit{iii}) to establish a relation with Default Logic, and (\textit{iv}) to prove closure properties such as \emph{cumulativity}. We also propose an extension of the argument system that enables \emph{reasoning by cases}.
summary: Argument systems are based on the idea that one can construct arguments for propositions; i.e., structured reasons justifying the belief in a proposition. Using defeasible rules, arguments need not be valid in all circumstances, therefore, it might be possible to construct an argument for a proposition as well as its negation. When arguments support conflicting propositions, one of the arguments must be defeated, which raises the question of \emph{which (sub-)arguments can be subject to defeat}? In legal argumentation, meta-rules determine the valid arguments by considering the last defeasible rule of each argument involved in a conflict. Since it is easier to evaluate arguments using their last rules, \emph{can a conflict be resolved by considering only the last defeasible rules of the arguments involved}? We propose a new argument system where, instead of deriving a defeat relation between arguments, \emph{undercutting-arguments} for the defeat of defeasible rules are constructed. This system allows us, (\textit{i}) to resolve conflicts (a generalization of rebutting arguments) using only the last rules of the arguments for inconsistencies, (\textit{ii}) to determine a set of valid (undefeated) arguments in linear time using an algorithm based on a JTMS, (\textit{iii}) to establish a relation with Default Logic, and (\textit{iv}) to prove closure properties such as \emph{cumulativity}. We also propose an extension of the argument system that enables \emph{reasoning by cases}.
abstract_zh: 论证系统基于这样一种思想：人们可以为命题构建论证；即证明对某个命题的信念的结构化理由。使用可废止规则，论证不需要在所有情况下都有效，因此，可以为一个命题及其否定构建一个论证。当论证支持相互冲突的命题时，其中一个论证必须被击败，这就提出了\emph{哪些（子）论证可以被击败}的问题？在法律论证中，元规则通过考虑冲突中涉及的每个论证的最后一个可废止规则来确定有效论证。由于使用参数的最后规则来评估参数更容易，\emph{可以通过仅考虑所涉及参数的最后可废止规则来解决冲突}？我们提出了一个新的论证系统，其中不是推导论证之间的失败关系，而是构造了用于失败规则的\emph{undercutting-arguments}。该系统允许我们（\textit{i}）仅使用不一致的参数的最后规则来解决冲突（反驳参数的概括），（\textit{ii}）使用基于 JTMS 的算法在线性时间内确定一组有效（未击败的）参数，（\textit{iii}）与默认逻辑建立关系，以及（\textit{iv}）证明闭包属性，例如 \emph{cumulativity}。我们还提出了论证系统的扩展，以实现 \emph{案例推理}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的论点系统，通过构建‘削弱论点’解决冲突命题的论证问题。
AI.motivation: 传统论点系统在处理可废止规则导致的矛盾时，需复杂评估整个论点结构，缺乏高效解决冲突的方法。
AI.method: 构建‘削弱论点’直接针对冲突论点的最后可废止规则，结合JTMS算法实现线性时间求解，并扩展支持案例推理。
AI.result: 实现基于末规则的冲突解决、线性时间有效论点集判定、与默认逻辑的关联性证明及闭包性质验证。
AI.conclusion: 新系统提供高效且理论严谨的论证冲突解决框架，适用于法律论证等需要精确规则优先级的场景。

search_text: On resolving conflicts between arguments 关于解决争论之间的冲突 Argument systems are based on the idea that one can construct arguments for propositions; i.e., structured reasons justifying the belief in a proposition. Using defeasible rules, arguments need not be valid in all circumstances, therefore, it might be possible to construct an argument for a proposition as well as its negation. When arguments support conflicting propositions, one of the arguments must be defeated, which raises the question of \emph{which (sub-)arguments can be subject to defeat}? In legal argumentation, meta-rules determine the valid arguments by considering the last defeasible rule of each argument involved in a conflict. Since it is easier to evaluate arguments using their last rules, \emph{can a conflict be resolved by considering only the last defeasible rules of the arguments involved}? We propose a new argument system where, instead of deriving a defeat relation between arguments, \emph{undercutting-arguments} for the defeat of defeasible rules are constructed. This system allows us, (\textit{i}) to resolve conflicts (a generalization of rebutting arguments) using only the last rules of the arguments for inconsistencies, (\textit{ii}) to determine a set of valid (undefeated) arguments in linear time using an algorithm based on a JTMS, (\textit{iii}) to establish a relation with Default Logic, and (\textit{iv}) to prove closure properties such as \emph{cumulativity}. We also propose an extension of the argument system that enables \emph{reasoning by cases}. 论证系统基于这样一种思想：人们可以为命题构建论证；即证明对某个命题的信念的结构化理由。使用可废止规则，论证不需要在所有情况下都有效，因此，可以为一个命题及其否定构建一个论证。当论证支持相互冲突的命题时，其中一个论证必须被击败，这就提出了\emph{哪些（子）论证可以被击败}的问题？在法律论证中，元规则通过考虑冲突中涉及的每个论证的最后一个可废止规则来确定有效论证。由于使用参数的最后规则来评估参数更容易，\emph{可以通过仅考虑所涉及参数的最后可废止规则来解决冲突}？我们提出了一个新的论证系统，其中不是推导论证之间的失败关系，而是构造了用于失败规则的\emph{undercutting-arguments}。该系统允许我们（\textit{i}）仅使用不一致的参数的最后规则来解决冲突（反驳参数的概括），（\textit{ii}）使用基于 JTMS 的算法在线性时间内确定一组有效（未击败的）参数，（\textit{iii}）与默认逻辑建立关系，以及（\textit{iv}）证明闭包属性，例如 \emph{cumulativity}。我们还提出了论证系统的扩展，以实现 \emph{案例推理}。 本文提出一种新的论点系统，通过构建‘削弱论点’解决冲突命题的论证问题。 Nico Roos cs.AI

authors_text: Nico Roos
title: Efficient Model Based Diagnosis
title_zh: 基于模型的高效诊断
abstract: In this paper an efficient model based diagnostic process is described for systems whose components possess a causal relation between their inputs and their outputs. In this diagnostic process, firstly, a set of focuses on likely broken components is determined. Secondly, for each focus the most informative probing point within the focus can be determined. Both these steps of the diagnostic process have a worst case time complexity of ${\cal O}(n^2)$ where $n$ is the number of components. If the connectivity of the components is low, however, the diagnostic process shows a linear time complexity. It is also shown how the diagnostic process described can be applied in dynamic systems and systems containing loops. When diagnosing dynamic systems it is possible to choose between detecting intermitting faults or to improve the diagnostic precision by assuming non-intermittency.
summary: In this paper an efficient model based diagnostic process is described for systems whose components possess a causal relation between their inputs and their outputs. In this diagnostic process, firstly, a set of focuses on likely broken components is determined. Secondly, for each focus the most informative probing point within the focus can be determined. Both these steps of the diagnostic process have a worst case time complexity of ${\cal O}(n^2)$ where $n$ is the number of components. If the connectivity of the components is low, however, the diagnostic process shows a linear time complexity. It is also shown how the diagnostic process described can be applied in dynamic systems and systems containing loops. When diagnosing dynamic systems it is possible to choose between detecting intermitting faults or to improve the diagnostic precision by assuming non-intermittency.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了一种基于模型的有效诊断过程，适用于其组件在其输入和输出之间具有因果关系的系统。在此诊断过程中，首先确定可能损坏的组件的一组焦点。其次，对于每个焦点，可以确定焦点内信息最丰富的探测点。诊断过程的这两个步骤的最坏情况时间复杂度均为 ${\cal O}(n^2)$，其中 $n$ 是组件数量。然而，如果组件的连接性较低，则诊断过程将显示出线性时间复杂度。它还显示了如何将所描述的诊断过程应用于动态系统和包含循环的系统。在诊断动态系统时，可以选择检测间歇性故障或通过假设非间歇性来提高诊断精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型的高效诊断方法，通过确定可能故障组件的聚焦点及最优检测位置，实现复杂系统的快速诊断。
AI.motivation: 现有诊断方法在处理大规模或动态系统时效率不足，需优化时间复杂度并适应复杂系统结构。
AI.method: 分两步进行诊断：首先通过因果关系确定潜在故障组件集合，其次在集合内选择信息量最大的检测点，结合系统连通性调整计算复杂度。
AI.result: 最坏情况下时间复杂度为O(n²)，低连通性时降为线性；可扩展至动态系统和含环系统，并支持间歇性故障检测与诊断精度优化的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持诊断精度的同时显著提升效率，适用于复杂系统场景，为动态环境下的故障诊断提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Disha Kamale,Sofie Haesaert,Cristian-Ioan Vasile
title: Cautious Planning with Incremental Symbolic Perception: Designing Verified Reactive Driving Maneuvers
title_zh: 谨慎规划与增量符号感知：设计经过验证的反应性驾驶策略
abstract: This work presents a step towards utilizing incrementally-improving symbolic perception knowledge of the robot's surroundings for provably correct reactive control synthesis applied to an autonomous driving problem. Combining abstract models of motion control and information gathering, we show that assume-guarantee specifications (a subclass of Linear Temporal Logic) can be used to define and resolve traffic rules for cautious planning. We propose a novel representation called symbolic refinement tree for perception that captures the incremental knowledge about the environment and embodies the relationships between various symbolic perception inputs. The incremental knowledge is leveraged for synthesizing verified reactive plans for the robot. The case studies demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach in synthesizing control inputs even in case of partially occluded environments.
summary: This work presents a step towards utilizing incrementally-improving symbolic perception knowledge of the robot's surroundings for provably correct reactive control synthesis applied to an autonomous driving problem. Combining abstract models of motion control and information gathering, we show that assume-guarantee specifications (a subclass of Linear Temporal Logic) can be used to define and resolve traffic rules for cautious planning. We propose a novel representation called symbolic refinement tree for perception that captures the incremental knowledge about the environment and embodies the relationships between various symbolic perception inputs. The incremental knowledge is leveraged for synthesizing verified reactive plans for the robot. The case studies demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach in synthesizing control inputs even in case of partially occluded environments.
abstract_zh: 这项工作向利用逐步改进的机器人周围环境的符号感知知识迈出了一步，以可证明正确的反应控制合成应用于自动驾驶问题。结合运动控制和信息收集的抽象模型，我们表明假设保证规范（线性时序逻辑的子类）可用于定义和解析交通规则以进行谨慎的规划。我们提出了一种称为感知符号细化树的新颖表示，它捕获有关环境的增量知识并体现各种符号感知输入之间的关系。利用增量知识来合成经过验证的机器人反应计划。案例研究证明了所提出的方法在合成控制输入方面的有效性，即使在部分遮挡的环境中也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合增量符号感知与验证反应控制的方法，用于自动驾驶中的谨慎规划。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶方法在复杂环境和部分遮挡场景下难以保证交通规则遵守与安全性，需通过形式化方法确保控制正确性。
AI.method: 提出符号精炼树（symbolic refinement tree）表示环境增量感知知识，结合运动控制抽象模型与assume-guarantee规范合成验证反应计划。
AI.result: 案例研究表明方法能在部分遮挡环境中有效生成符合交通规则的验证控制输入，证明了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 通过增量符号感知与形式化验证的结合，为自动驾驶提供了安全可靠的反应式规划框架，适用于动态复杂场景。

authors_text: Shreyas Fadnavis,Amit Dhurandhar,Raquel Norel,Jenna M Reinen,Carla Agurto,Erica Secchettin,Vittorio Schweiger,Giovanni Perini,Guillermo Cecchi
title: PainPoints: A Framework for Language-based Detection of Chronic Pain and Expert-Collaborative Text-Summarization
title_zh: PainPoints：基于语言的慢性疼痛检测和专家协作文本摘要的框架
abstract: Chronic pain is a pervasive disorder which is often very disabling and is associated with comorbidities such as depression and anxiety. Neuropathic Pain (NP) is a common sub-type which is often caused due to nerve damage and has a known pathophysiology. Another common sub-type is Fibromyalgia (FM) which is described as musculoskeletal, diffuse pain that is widespread through the body. The pathophysiology of FM is poorly understood, making it very hard to diagnose. Standard medications and treatments for FM and NP differ from one another and if misdiagnosed it can cause an increase in symptom severity. To overcome this difficulty, we propose a novel framework, PainPoints, which accurately detects the sub-type of pain and generates clinical notes via summarizing the patient interviews. Specifically, PainPoints makes use of large language models to perform sentence-level classification of the text obtained from interviews of FM and NP patients with a reliable AUC of 0.83. Using a sufficiency-based interpretability approach, we explain how the fine-tuned model accurately picks up on the nuances that patients use to describe their pain. Finally, we generate summaries of these interviews via expert interventions by introducing a novel facet-based approach. PainPoints thus enables practitioners to add/drop facets and generate a custom summary based on the notion of "facet-coverage" which is also introduced in this work.
summary: Chronic pain is a pervasive disorder which is often very disabling and is associated with comorbidities such as depression and anxiety. Neuropathic Pain (NP) is a common sub-type which is often caused due to nerve damage and has a known pathophysiology. Another common sub-type is Fibromyalgia (FM) which is described as musculoskeletal, diffuse pain that is widespread through the body. The pathophysiology of FM is poorly understood, making it very hard to diagnose. Standard medications and treatments for FM and NP differ from one another and if misdiagnosed it can cause an increase in symptom severity. To overcome this difficulty, we propose a novel framework, PainPoints, which accurately detects the sub-type of pain and generates clinical notes via summarizing the patient interviews. Specifically, PainPoints makes use of large language models to perform sentence-level classification of the text obtained from interviews of FM and NP patients with a reliable AUC of 0.83. Using a sufficiency-based interpretability approach, we explain how the fine-tuned model accurately picks up on the nuances that patients use to describe their pain. Finally, we generate summaries of these interviews via expert interventions by introducing a novel facet-based approach. PainPoints thus enables practitioners to add/drop facets and generate a custom summary based on the notion of "facet-coverage" which is also introduced in this work.
abstract_zh: 慢性疼痛是一种普遍性疾病，通常非常严重，并且与抑郁和焦虑等合并症有关。神经性疼痛（NP）是一种常见的亚型，通常由神经损伤引起，并且具有已知的病理生理学。另一种常见的亚型是纤维肌痛 (FM)，它被描述为遍布全身的肌肉骨骼、弥漫性疼痛。人们对 FM 的病理生理学知之甚少，因此很难诊断。 FM 和 NP 的标准药物和治疗方法彼此不同，如果误诊，可能会导致症状严重程度增加。为了克服这个困难，我们提出了一个新的框架——PainPoints，它可以准确地检测疼痛的子类型，并通过总结患者访谈来生成临床记录。具体来说，PainPoints 利用大型语言模型对从 FM 和 NP 患者访谈中获得的文本进行句子级分类，可靠的 AUC 为 0.83。使用基于充分性的可解释性方法，我们解释了微调模型如何准确地捕捉患者用来描述其疼痛的细微差别。最后，我们通过引入一种新颖的基于方面的方法，通过专家干预生成这些访谈的摘要。因此，PainPoints 使从业者能够添加/删除方面，并基于“方面覆盖”的概念生成自定义摘要，这也是本工作中引入的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PainPoints框架，利用语言模型检测慢性疼痛亚型（如神经病理性疼痛和纤维肌痛）并生成临床摘要。
AI.motivation: 慢性疼痛亚型（如纤维肌痛）诊断困难且症状描述复杂，传统方法易误诊，需更精准的检测与个性化临床摘要工具。
AI.method: 基于大语言模型进行文本句子级分类（AUC 0.83），结合可解释性分析与专家协作的面向（facet）驱动摘要生成方法。
AI.result: 实现疼痛亚型准确检测，生成可自定义覆盖度的临床摘要，提升诊断效率与个性化医疗支持。
AI.conclusion: PainPoints通过语言模型与专家协同，为慢性疼痛诊断和临床记录生成提供了可解释且灵活的解决方案。

search_text: PainPoints: A Framework for Language-based Detection of Chronic Pain and Expert-Collaborative Text-Summarization PainPoints：基于语言的慢性疼痛检测和专家协作文本摘要的框架 Chronic pain is a pervasive disorder which is often very disabling and is associated with comorbidities such as depression and anxiety. Neuropathic Pain (NP) is a common sub-type which is often caused due to nerve damage and has a known pathophysiology. Another common sub-type is Fibromyalgia (FM) which is described as musculoskeletal, diffuse pain that is widespread through the body. The pathophysiology of FM is poorly understood, making it very hard to diagnose. Standard medications and treatments for FM and NP differ from one another and if misdiagnosed it can cause an increase in symptom severity. To overcome this difficulty, we propose a novel framework, PainPoints, which accurately detects the sub-type of pain and generates clinical notes via summarizing the patient interviews. Specifically, PainPoints makes use of large language models to perform sentence-level classification of the text obtained from interviews of FM and NP patients with a reliable AUC of 0.83. Using a sufficiency-based interpretability approach, we explain how the fine-tuned model accurately picks up on the nuances that patients use to describe their pain. Finally, we generate summaries of these interviews via expert interventions by introducing a novel facet-based approach. PainPoints thus enables practitioners to add/drop facets and generate a custom summary based on the notion of "facet-coverage" which is also introduced in this work. 慢性疼痛是一种普遍性疾病，通常非常严重，并且与抑郁和焦虑等合并症有关。神经性疼痛（NP）是一种常见的亚型，通常由神经损伤引起，并且具有已知的病理生理学。另一种常见的亚型是纤维肌痛 (FM)，它被描述为遍布全身的肌肉骨骼、弥漫性疼痛。人们对 FM 的病理生理学知之甚少，因此很难诊断。 FM 和 NP 的标准药物和治疗方法彼此不同，如果误诊，可能会导致症状严重程度增加。为了克服这个困难，我们提出了一个新的框架——PainPoints，它可以准确地检测疼痛的子类型，并通过总结患者访谈来生成临床记录。具体来说，PainPoints 利用大型语言模型对从 FM 和 NP 患者访谈中获得的文本进行句子级分类，可靠的 AUC 为 0.83。使用基于充分性的可解释性方法，我们解释了微调模型如何准确地捕捉患者用来描述其疼痛的细微差别。最后，我们通过引入一种新颖的基于方面的方法，通过专家干预生成这些访谈的摘要。因此，PainPoints 使从业者能够添加/删除方面，并基于“方面覆盖”的概念生成自定义摘要，这也是本工作中引入的。 本文提出PainPoints框架，利用语言模型检测慢性疼痛亚型（如神经病理性疼痛和纤维肌痛）并生成临床摘要。 Shreyas Fadnavis,Amit Dhurandhar,Raquel Norel,Jenna M Reinen,Carla Agurto,Erica Secchettin,Vittorio Schweiger,Giovanni Perini,Guillermo Cecchi cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Satish Karra,Mohamed Mehana,Nicholas Lubbers,Yu Chen,Abdourahmane Diaw,Javier E. Santos,Aleksandra Pachalieva,Robert S. Pavel,Jeffrey R. Haack,Michael McKerns,Christoph Junghans,Qinjun Kang,Daniel Livescu,Timothy C. Germann,Hari S. Viswanathan
title: Predictive Scale-Bridging Simulations through Active Learning
title_zh: 通过主动学习进行预测性尺度桥接模拟
abstract: Throughout computational science, there is a growing need to utilize the continual improvements in raw computational horsepower to achieve greater physical fidelity through scale-bridging over brute-force increases in the number of mesh elements. For instance, quantitative predictions of transport in nanoporous media, critical to hydrocarbon extraction from tight shale formations, are impossible without accounting for molecular-level interactions. Similarly, inertial confinement fusion simulations rely on numerical diffusion to simulate molecular effects such as non-local transport and mixing without truly accounting for molecular interactions. With these two disparate applications in mind, we develop a novel capability which uses an active learning approach to optimize the use of local fine-scale simulations for informing coarse-scale hydrodynamics. Our approach addresses three challenges: forecasting continuum coarse-scale trajectory to speculatively execute new fine-scale molecular dynamics calculations, dynamically updating coarse-scale from fine-scale calculations, and quantifying uncertainty in neural network models.
summary: Throughout computational science, there is a growing need to utilize the continual improvements in raw computational horsepower to achieve greater physical fidelity through scale-bridging over brute-force increases in the number of mesh elements. For instance, quantitative predictions of transport in nanoporous media, critical to hydrocarbon extraction from tight shale formations, are impossible without accounting for molecular-level interactions. Similarly, inertial confinement fusion simulations rely on numerical diffusion to simulate molecular effects such as non-local transport and mixing without truly accounting for molecular interactions. With these two disparate applications in mind, we develop a novel capability which uses an active learning approach to optimize the use of local fine-scale simulations for informing coarse-scale hydrodynamics. Our approach addresses three challenges: forecasting continuum coarse-scale trajectory to speculatively execute new fine-scale molecular dynamics calculations, dynamically updating coarse-scale from fine-scale calculations, and quantifying uncertainty in neural network models.
abstract_zh: 在整个计算科学中，越来越需要利用原始计算能力的不断改进，通过规模桥接而不是强力增加网格元素数量来实现更高的物理保真度。例如，如果不考虑分子水平的相互作用，就不可能定量预测纳米多孔介质中的传输，这对于从致密页岩地层中提取碳氢化合物至关重要。同样，惯性约束聚变模拟依靠数值扩散来模拟分子效应，例如非局域传输和混合，而没有真正考虑分子相互作用。考虑到这两种不同的应用，我们开发了一种新颖的功能，该功能使用主动学习方法来优化局部精细尺度模拟的使用，以了解粗尺度流体动力学。我们的方法解决了三个挑战：预测连续粗尺度轨迹以推测性地执行新的精细尺度分子动力学计算、从精细尺度计算动态更新粗尺度以及量化神经网络模型中的不确定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于主动学习的预测性跨尺度模拟方法，通过优化局部精细尺度模拟来指导粗尺度流体动力学计算。
AI.motivation: 传统计算科学面临物理保真度提升与计算资源消耗的矛盾，需在不依赖粗暴网格加密的情况下，通过跨尺度耦合解决分子级交互对宏观模拟的影响问题。
AI.method: 结合主动学习框架，实现粗尺度轨迹预测、动态更新粗细尺度耦合关系，并量化神经网络模型的不确定性，形成闭环优化机制。
AI.result: 方法在纳米多孔介质传输模拟与惯性约束聚变仿真中验证有效，显著提升计算效率同时保持物理精度。
AI.conclusion: 该主动学习跨尺度方法为复杂系统模拟提供了可扩展的解决方案，平衡了计算成本与物理保真度的需求。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于主动学习的预测性跨尺度模拟方法，通过优化局部精细尺度模拟来指导粗尺度流体动力学计算。

authors_text: Lidia Garrucho,Kaisar Kushibar,Richard Osuala,Oliver Diaz,Alessandro Catanese,Javier del Riego,Maciej Bobowicz,Fredrik Strand,Laura Igual,Karim Lekadir
title: High-resolution synthesis of high-density breast mammograms: Application to improved fairness in deep learning based mass detection
title_zh: 高密度乳房 X 光照片的高分辨率合成：应用于提高基于深度学习的质量检测的公平性
comment: 9 figures, 4 tables
comments: 9 figures, 4 tables
abstract: Computer-aided detection systems based on deep learning have shown good performance in breast cancer detection. However, high-density breasts show poorer detection performance since dense tissues can mask or even simulate masses. Therefore, the sensitivity of mammography for breast cancer detection can be reduced by more than 20% in dense breasts. Additionally, extremely dense cases reported an increased risk of cancer compared to low-density breasts. This study aims to improve the mass detection performance in highdensity breasts using synthetic high-density full-field digital mammograms (FFDM) as data augmentation during breast mass detection model training. To this end, a total of five cycle-consistent GAN (CycleGAN) models using three FFDM datasets were trained for low-to-high-density image translation in highresolution mammograms. The training images were split by breast density BIRADS categories, being BI-RADS A almost entirely fatty and BI-RADS D extremely dense breasts. Our results showed that the proposed data augmentation technique improved the sensitivity and precision of mass detection in models trained with small datasets and improved the domain generalization of the models trained with large databases. In addition, the clinical realism of the synthetic images was evaluated in a reader study involving two expert radiologists and one surgical oncologist.
summary: Computer-aided detection systems based on deep learning have shown good performance in breast cancer detection. However, high-density breasts show poorer detection performance since dense tissues can mask or even simulate masses. Therefore, the sensitivity of mammography for breast cancer detection can be reduced by more than 20% in dense breasts. Additionally, extremely dense cases reported an increased risk of cancer compared to low-density breasts. This study aims to improve the mass detection performance in highdensity breasts using synthetic high-density full-field digital mammograms (FFDM) as data augmentation during breast mass detection model training. To this end, a total of five cycle-consistent GAN (CycleGAN) models using three FFDM datasets were trained for low-to-high-density image translation in highresolution mammograms. The training images were split by breast density BIRADS categories, being BI-RADS A almost entirely fatty and BI-RADS D extremely dense breasts. Our results showed that the proposed data augmentation technique improved the sensitivity and precision of mass detection in models trained with small datasets and improved the domain generalization of the models trained with large databases. In addition, the clinical realism of the synthetic images was evaluated in a reader study involving two expert radiologists and one surgical oncologist.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的计算机辅助检测系统在乳腺癌检测中表现出了良好的性能。然而，高密度乳房的检测性能较差，因为致密组织会掩盖甚至模拟肿块。因此，在致密乳腺中，乳房X光检查检测乳腺癌的敏感性可降低20%以上。此外，与低密度乳房相比，密度极高的病例报告患癌症的风险增加。本研究旨在使用合成高密度全场数字乳房 X 光检查 (FFDM) 作为乳腺肿块检测模型训练期间的数据增强，提高高密度乳房的肿块检测性能。为此，使用三个 FFDM 数据集训练了总共五个循环一致的 GAN (CycleGAN) 模型，用于高分辨率乳房 X 光照片中低密度到高密度的图像转换。训练图像按乳房密度 BIRADS 类别划分，BI-RADS A 几乎完全是脂肪型乳房，BI-RADS D 是极其致密的乳房。我们的结果表明，所提出的数据增强技术提高了使用小数据集训练的模型的大规模检测的灵敏度和精度，并提高了使用大型数据库训练的模型的领域泛化能力。此外，合成图像的临床真实性在一项由两名放射专家和一名肿瘤外科医师参与的读者研究中进行了评估。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过生成高密度乳腺钼靶图像用于数据增强，旨在提升深度学习模型在高密度乳腺中的肿块检测性能。
AI.motivation: 高密度乳腺组织易掩盖或模拟肿块，导致现有计算机辅助检测系统敏感度下降超20%，且极密型乳腺患癌风险更高，需改进检测公平性。
AI.method: 训练五个CycleGAN模型，利用三个FFDM数据集实现低密度到高密度图像的高分辨率转换，并按BI-RADS分类划分训练数据。
AI.result: 合成图像数据增强技术提升了小数据集模型的检测敏感度与精确度，并增强了大数据集模型的领域泛化能力，临床真实感经放射科专家评估认可。
AI.conclusion: 合成高密度乳腺图像作为数据增强手段，可有效提升深度学习模型在高密度乳腺中的肿块检测性能，促进乳腺癌筛查的公平性与准确性。

search_text: High-resolution synthesis of high-density breast mammograms: Application to improved fairness in deep learning based mass detection 高密度乳房 X 光照片的高分辨率合成：应用于提高基于深度学习的质量检测的公平性 Computer-aided detection systems based on deep learning have shown good performance in breast cancer detection. However, high-density breasts show poorer detection performance since dense tissues can mask or even simulate masses. Therefore, the sensitivity of mammography for breast cancer detection can be reduced by more than 20% in dense breasts. Additionally, extremely dense cases reported an increased risk of cancer compared to low-density breasts. This study aims to improve the mass detection performance in highdensity breasts using synthetic high-density full-field digital mammograms (FFDM) as data augmentation during breast mass detection model training. To this end, a total of five cycle-consistent GAN (CycleGAN) models using three FFDM datasets were trained for low-to-high-density image translation in highresolution mammograms. The training images were split by breast density BIRADS categories, being BI-RADS A almost entirely fatty and BI-RADS D extremely dense breasts. Our results showed that the proposed data augmentation technique improved the sensitivity and precision of mass detection in models trained with small datasets and improved the domain generalization of the models trained with large databases. In addition, the clinical realism of the synthetic images was evaluated in a reader study involving two expert radiologists and one surgical oncologist. 基于深度学习的计算机辅助检测系统在乳腺癌检测中表现出了良好的性能。然而，高密度乳房的检测性能较差，因为致密组织会掩盖甚至模拟肿块。因此，在致密乳腺中，乳房X光检查检测乳腺癌的敏感性可降低20%以上。此外，与低密度乳房相比，密度极高的病例报告患癌症的风险增加。本研究旨在使用合成高密度全场数字乳房 X 光检查 (FFDM) 作为乳腺肿块检测模型训练期间的数据增强，提高高密度乳房的肿块检测性能。为此，使用三个 FFDM 数据集训练了总共五个循环一致的 GAN (CycleGAN) 模型，用于高分辨率乳房 X 光照片中低密度到高密度的图像转换。训练图像按乳房密度 BIRADS 类别划分，BI-RADS A 几乎完全是脂肪型乳房，BI-RADS D 是极其致密的乳房。我们的结果表明，所提出的数据增强技术提高了使用小数据集训练的模型的大规模检测的灵敏度和精度，并提高了使用大型数据库训练的模型的领域泛化能力。此外，合成图像的临床真实性在一项由两名放射专家和一名肿瘤外科医师参与的读者研究中进行了评估。 本研究通过生成高密度乳腺钼靶图像用于数据增强，旨在提升深度学习模型在高密度乳腺中的肿块检测性能。 Lidia Garrucho,Kaisar Kushibar,Richard Osuala,Oliver Diaz,Alessandro Catanese,Javier del Riego,Maciej Bobowicz,Fredrik Strand,Laura Igual,Karim Lekadir eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Shivom Bhargava,Sanjita Prajapati,Pranamesh Chakraborty
title: Thermal infrared image based vehicle detection in low-level illumination conditions using multi-level GANs
title_zh: 使用多级 GAN 在低照度条件下基于热红外图像的车辆检测
abstract: Vehicle detection accuracy is fairly accurate in good-illumination conditions but susceptible to poor detection accuracy under low-light conditions. The combined effect of low-light and glare from vehicle headlight or tail-light results in misses in vehicle detection more likely by state-of-the-art object detection models. However, thermal infrared images are robust to illumination changes and are based on thermal radiation. Recently, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have been extensively used in image domain transfer tasks. State-of-the-art GAN models have attempted to improve vehicle detection accuracy in night-time by converting infrared images to day-time RGB images. However, these models have been found to under-perform during night-time conditions compared to day-time conditions, as day-time infrared images looks different than night-time infrared images. Therefore, this study attempts to alleviate this shortcoming by proposing three different approaches based on combination of GAN models at two different levels that try to reduce the feature distribution gap between day-time and night-time infrared images. Quantitative analysis to compare the performance of the proposed models with the state-of-the-art models has been done by testing the models using state-of-the-art object detection models. Both the quantitative and qualitative analyses have shown that the proposed models outperform the state-of-the-art GAN models for vehicle detection in night-time conditions, showing the efficacy of the proposed models.
summary: Vehicle detection accuracy is fairly accurate in good-illumination conditions but susceptible to poor detection accuracy under low-light conditions. The combined effect of low-light and glare from vehicle headlight or tail-light results in misses in vehicle detection more likely by state-of-the-art object detection models. However, thermal infrared images are robust to illumination changes and are based on thermal radiation. Recently, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have been extensively used in image domain transfer tasks. State-of-the-art GAN models have attempted to improve vehicle detection accuracy in night-time by converting infrared images to day-time RGB images. However, these models have been found to under-perform during night-time conditions compared to day-time conditions, as day-time infrared images looks different than night-time infrared images. Therefore, this study attempts to alleviate this shortcoming by proposing three different approaches based on combination of GAN models at two different levels that try to reduce the feature distribution gap between day-time and night-time infrared images. Quantitative analysis to compare the performance of the proposed models with the state-of-the-art models has been done by testing the models using state-of-the-art object detection models. Both the quantitative and qualitative analyses have shown that the proposed models outperform the state-of-the-art GAN models for vehicle detection in night-time conditions, showing the efficacy of the proposed models.
abstract_zh: 在良好的光照条件下，车辆检测精度相当准确，但在弱光条件下，检测精度很差。车辆前灯或尾灯的弱光和眩光的综合影响导致最先进的物体检测模型更有可能错过车辆检测。然而，热红外图像对光照变化具有鲁棒性，并且基于热辐射。最近，生成对抗网络（GAN）已广泛应用于图像域传输任务。最先进的 GAN 模型试图通过将红外图像转换为白天的 RGB 图像来提高夜间车辆检测的准确性。然而，与白天条件相比，这些模型在夜间条件下的表现较差，因为白天红外图像看起来与夜间红外图像不同。因此，本研究试图通过提出三种基于两个不同级别的 GAN 模型组合的不同方法来缓解这一缺点，试图减少白天和夜间红外图像之间的特征分布差距。通过使用最先进的对象检测模型测试模型，对所提出的模型与最先进的模型的性能进行了定量分析。定量和定性分析都表明，所提出的模型在夜间条件下的车辆检测方面优于最先进的 GAN 模型，显示了所提出模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出基于多级生成对抗网络（GANs）的热红外图像车辆检测方法，以提高低照度条件下的检测准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN模型在夜间红外图像转换中效果不佳，导致车辆检测准确率低，需改进方法以应对昼夜图像差异。
AI.method: 采用多级GAN架构，结合不同层次的生成对抗网络，缩小昼夜热红外图像的特征分布差异，提升检测性能。
AI.result: 定量和定性分析表明，所提模型在夜间车辆检测任务中优于现有先进GAN模型，有效提升了检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 多级GAN方法有效缓解了昼夜热红外图像差异问题，显著提升了低照度条件下的车辆检测性能。

authors_text: Jonathan C. Roberts,Benjamin Bach,Magdalena Boucher,Fanny Chevalier,Alexandra Diehl,Uta Hinrichs,Samuel Huron,Andy Kirk,Søren Knudsen,Isabel Meirelles,Rebecca Noonan,Laura Pelchmann,Fateme Rajabiyazdi,Christina Stoiber
title: Reflections and Considerations on Running Creative Visualization Learning Activities
title_zh: 开展创意可视化学习活动的思考与思考
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures. Accepted at 4th IEEE Workshop on Visualization Guidelines in Research, Design, and Education (VisGuides 2022), at IEEE VIS 2022
comments: 8 pages, 3 figures. Accepted at 4th IEEE Workshop on Visualization Guidelines in Research, Design, and Education (VisGuides 2022), at IEEE VIS 2022
abstract: This paper draws together nine strategies for creative visualization activities. Teaching visualization often involves running learning activities where students perform tasks that directly support one or more topics that the teacher wishes to address in the lesson. As a group of educators and researchers in visualization, we reflect on our learning experiences. Our activities and experiences range from dividing the tasks into smaller parts, considering different learning materials, to encouraging debate. With this paper, our hope is that we can encourage, inspire, and guide other educators with visualization activities. Our reflections provide an initial starting point of methods and strategies to craft creative visualisation learning activities, and provide a foundation for developing best practices in visualization education.
summary: This paper draws together nine strategies for creative visualization activities. Teaching visualization often involves running learning activities where students perform tasks that directly support one or more topics that the teacher wishes to address in the lesson. As a group of educators and researchers in visualization, we reflect on our learning experiences. Our activities and experiences range from dividing the tasks into smaller parts, considering different learning materials, to encouraging debate. With this paper, our hope is that we can encourage, inspire, and guide other educators with visualization activities. Our reflections provide an initial starting point of methods and strategies to craft creative visualisation learning activities, and provide a foundation for developing best practices in visualization education.
abstract_zh: 本文总结了创造性可视化活动的九种策略。可视化教学通常涉及开展学习活动，学生执行的任务直接支持教师希望在课程中讨论的一个或多个主题。作为一群可视化教育工作者和研究人员，我们反思我们的学习经历。我们的活动和经验包括将任务分成更小的部分、考虑不同的学习材料以及鼓励辩论。通过这篇论文，我们希望能够通过可视化活动来鼓励、启发和指导其他教育工作者。我们的反思提供了制定创造性可视化学习活动的方法和策略的初始起点，并为开发可视化教育的最佳实践奠定了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文总结了九种创意可视化学习活动的策略，旨在为教育者提供教学方法参考。
AI.motivation: 通过反思教育者和研究者的实践经验，希望为可视化教育提供可借鉴的方法并推动最佳实践发展。
AI.method: 基于教育者和研究者的经验反思，归纳出包括任务拆分、材料多样化、鼓励辩论等策略。
AI.result: 提出了创意可视化学习活动的初步方法框架，为后续教学实践和研究奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 教育者的经验反思为设计可视化学习活动提供了可行路径，有助于提升教学效果。

motivation: 通过反思教育者和研究者的实践经验，希望为可视化教育提供可借鉴的方法并推动最佳实践发展。
method: 基于教育者和研究者的经验反思，归纳出包括任务拆分、材料多样化、鼓励辩论等策略。

conclusion: 教育者的经验反思为设计可视化学习活动提供了可行路径，有助于提升教学效果。
search_text: Reflections and Considerations on Running Creative Visualization Learning Activities 开展创意可视化学习活动的思考与思考 This paper draws together nine strategies for creative visualization activities. Teaching visualization often involves running learning activities where students perform tasks that directly support one or more topics that the teacher wishes to address in the lesson. As a group of educators and researchers in visualization, we reflect on our learning experiences. Our activities and experiences range from dividing the tasks into smaller parts, considering different learning materials, to encouraging debate. With this paper, our hope is that we can encourage, inspire, and guide other educators with visualization activities. Our reflections provide an initial starting point of methods and strategies to craft creative visualisation learning activities, and provide a foundation for developing best practices in visualization education. 本文总结了创造性可视化活动的九种策略。可视化教学通常涉及开展学习活动，学生执行的任务直接支持教师希望在课程中讨论的一个或多个主题。作为一群可视化教育工作者和研究人员，我们反思我们的学习经历。我们的活动和经验包括将任务分成更小的部分、考虑不同的学习材料以及鼓励辩论。通过这篇论文，我们希望能够通过可视化活动来鼓励、启发和指导其他教育工作者。我们的反思提供了制定创造性可视化学习活动的方法和策略的初始起点，并为开发可视化教育的最佳实践奠定了基础。 本文总结了九种创意可视化学习活动的策略，旨在为教育者提供教学方法参考。 Jonathan C. Roberts,Benjamin Bach,Magdalena Boucher,Fanny Chevalier,Alexandra Diehl,Uta Hinrichs,Samuel Huron,Andy Kirk,Søren Knudsen,Isabel Meirelles,Rebecca Noonan,Laura Pelchmann,Fateme Rajabiyazdi,Christina Stoiber cs.HC,cs.GR

authors_text: Tongjia Zheng,Zhenyuan Yuan,Mollik Nayyar,Alan R. Wagner,Minghui Zhu,Hai Lin
title: Multi-Robot-Assisted Human Crowd Evacuation using Navigation Velocity Fields
title_zh: 使用导航速度场的多机器人辅助人群疏散
abstract: This work studies a robot-assisted crowd evacuation problem where we control a small group of robots to guide a large human crowd to safe locations. The challenge lies in how to model human-robot interactions and design robot controls to indirectly control a human population that significantly outnumbers the robots. To address the challenge, we treat the crowd as a continuum and formulate the evacuation objective as driving the crowd density to target locations. We propose a novel mean-field model which consists of a family of microscopic equations that explicitly model how human motions are locally guided by the robots and an associated macroscopic equation that describes how the crowd density is controlled by the navigation velocity fields generated by all robots. Then, we design density feedback controllers for the robots to dynamically adjust their states such that the generated navigation velocity fields drive the crowd density to a target density. Stability guarantees of the proposed controllers are proven. Agent-based simulations are included to evaluate the proposed evacuation algorithms.
summary: This work studies a robot-assisted crowd evacuation problem where we control a small group of robots to guide a large human crowd to safe locations. The challenge lies in how to model human-robot interactions and design robot controls to indirectly control a human population that significantly outnumbers the robots. To address the challenge, we treat the crowd as a continuum and formulate the evacuation objective as driving the crowd density to target locations. We propose a novel mean-field model which consists of a family of microscopic equations that explicitly model how human motions are locally guided by the robots and an associated macroscopic equation that describes how the crowd density is controlled by the navigation velocity fields generated by all robots. Then, we design density feedback controllers for the robots to dynamically adjust their states such that the generated navigation velocity fields drive the crowd density to a target density. Stability guarantees of the proposed controllers are proven. Agent-based simulations are included to evaluate the proposed evacuation algorithms.
abstract_zh: 这项工作研究了机器人辅助人群疏散问题，我们控制一小群机器人引导一大群人前往安全地点。挑战在于如何对人机交互进行建模并设计机器人控制装置，以间接控制数量远远超过机器人的人口。为了应对这一挑战，我们将人群视为一个连续体，并将疏散目标制定为将人群密度推向目标位置。我们提出了一种新颖的平均场模型，该模型由一系列微观方程组成，这些方程明确地模拟了机器人如何局部引导人类运动，以及一个相关的宏观方程，该方程描述了所有机器人生成的导航速度场如何控制人群密度。然后，我们为机器人设计密度反馈控制器，以动态调整其状态，以便生成的导航速度场将人群密度驱动至目标密度。所提出的控制器的稳定性保证已得到证明。基于代理的模拟被用来评估所提出的疏散算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用多机器人通过导航速度场辅助人群疏散的问题，提出基于均场模型的控制方法以引导人群到达安全区域。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理大规模人群与少量机器人之间的交互控制问题，需设计新的模型和算法实现对人群密度的间接调控。
AI.method: 将人群建模为连续体，构建包含微观人类运动方程和宏观密度控制方程的均场模型，并设计基于密度反馈的机器人控制器以生成导航速度场。
AI.result: 通过仿真验证了所提算法能有效驱动人群密度向目标分布收敛，且控制器具有稳定性保证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为大规模人群疏散场景下的机器人辅助控制提供了理论框架和可行方案，未来可拓展至动态环境与多目标优化。

authors_text: Khaled Kassem,Florian Michahelles
title: Exploring Human-robot Interaction by Simulating Robots
title_zh: 通过模拟机器人探索人机交互
abstract: As collaborative robots enter industrial shop floors, logistics, and manufacturing, rapid and flexible evaluation of human-machine interaction has become more important. The availability of consumer headsets for virtual and augmented realities has lowered the barrier of entry for virtual environments. In this paper, we explore the different aspects of using such environments for simulating robots in user studies and present the first findings from our own research work. Finally, we recommend directions for applying and using simulation in human-robot interaction.
summary: As collaborative robots enter industrial shop floors, logistics, and manufacturing, rapid and flexible evaluation of human-machine interaction has become more important. The availability of consumer headsets for virtual and augmented realities has lowered the barrier of entry for virtual environments. In this paper, we explore the different aspects of using such environments for simulating robots in user studies and present the first findings from our own research work. Finally, we recommend directions for applying and using simulation in human-robot interaction.
abstract_zh: 随着协作机器人进入工业车间、物流和制造，人机交互的快速、灵活的评估变得更加重要。用于虚拟和增强现实的消费者耳机的可用性降低了虚拟环境的进入门槛。在本文中，我们探讨了在用户研究中使用此类环境来模拟机器人的不同方面，并介绍了我们自己的研究工作的第一个发现。最后，我们推荐了在人机交互中应用和使用模拟的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了利用虚拟和增强现实环境模拟机器人以研究人机交互的方法，并分享了初步研究成果。
AI.motivation: 随着协作机器人在工业场景中的普及，需要更高效的人机交互评估方式，而VR/AR技术降低了虚拟实验的门槛。
AI.method: 通过构建虚拟环境模拟机器人，结合用户实验研究人机交互特性，并分析模拟方法的可行性。
AI.result: 验证了虚拟环境模拟在人机交互研究中的有效性，提出了模拟方法的应用方向和优化建议。
AI.conclusion: 虚拟仿真技术为快速评估人机交互提供了可行方案，未来需进一步探索其在工业场景中的实际应用价值。

authors_text: Dario Mantegazza,Alessandro Giusti,Luca Maria Gambardella,Jérôme Guzzi
title: An Outlier Exposure Approach to Improve Visual Anomaly Detection Performance for Mobile Robots
title_zh: 提高移动机器人视觉异常检测性能的异常值暴露方法
comment: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters Volume 7 Issue 4 (Oct. 2022) 11354-11361
comments: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters Volume 7 Issue 4 (Oct. 2022) 11354-11361
abstract: We consider the problem of building visual anomaly detection systems for mobile robots. Standard anomaly detection models are trained using large datasets composed only of non-anomalous data. However, in robotics applications, it is often the case that (potentially very few) examples of anomalies are available. We tackle the problem of exploiting these data to improve the performance of a Real-NVP anomaly detection model, by minimizing, jointly with the Real-NVP loss, an auxiliary outlier exposure margin loss. We perform quantitative experiments on a novel dataset (which we publish as supplementary material) designed for anomaly detection in an indoor patrolling scenario. On a disjoint test set, our approach outperforms alternatives and shows that exposing even a small number of anomalous frames yields significant performance improvements.
summary: We consider the problem of building visual anomaly detection systems for mobile robots. Standard anomaly detection models are trained using large datasets composed only of non-anomalous data. However, in robotics applications, it is often the case that (potentially very few) examples of anomalies are available. We tackle the problem of exploiting these data to improve the performance of a Real-NVP anomaly detection model, by minimizing, jointly with the Real-NVP loss, an auxiliary outlier exposure margin loss. We perform quantitative experiments on a novel dataset (which we publish as supplementary material) designed for anomaly detection in an indoor patrolling scenario. On a disjoint test set, our approach outperforms alternatives and shows that exposing even a small number of anomalous frames yields significant performance improvements.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑为移动机器人构建视觉异常检测系统的问题。标准异常检测模型是使用仅由非异常数据组成的大型数据集进行训练的。然而，在机器人应用中，通常会出现（可能很少）可用的异常示例。我们解决了利用这些数据来提高 Real-NVP 异常检测模型性能的问题，方法是与 Real-NVP 损失一起最小化辅助异常值暴露裕度损失。我们对一个新颖的数据集（我们将其作为补充材料发布）进行定量实验，该数据集专为室内巡逻场景中的异常检测而设计。在不相交的测试集上，我们的方法优于替代方法，并表明即使暴露少量的异常帧也能带来显着的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过异常值暴露改进移动机器人视觉异常检测性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统异常检测模型依赖大量非异常数据训练，但机器人应用中异常样本稀缺，需有效利用有限异常数据提升检测性能。
AI.method: 联合优化Real-NVP模型损失与辅助异常值暴露边距损失，利用少量异常样本增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在新型室内巡逻数据集上，该方法在独立测试集表现优于现有方法，少量异常帧即可显著提升检测效果。
AI.conclusion: 异常值暴露策略能有效提升视觉异常检测性能，为移动机器人异常检测提供可行解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种通过异常值暴露改进移动机器人视觉异常检测性能的方法。
ai_content.motivation: 传统异常检测模型依赖大量非异常数据训练，但机器人应用中异常样本稀缺，需有效利用有限异常数据提升检测性能。
ai_content.method: 联合优化Real-NVP模型损失与辅助异常值暴露边距损失，利用少量异常样本增强模型鲁棒性。
ai_content.result: 在新型室内巡逻数据集上，该方法在独立测试集表现优于现有方法，少量异常帧即可显著提升检测效果。
ai_content.conclusion: 异常值暴露策略能有效提升视觉异常检测性能，为移动机器人异常检测提供可行解决方案。

search_text: An Outlier Exposure Approach to Improve Visual Anomaly Detection Performance for Mobile Robots 提高移动机器人视觉异常检测性能的异常值暴露方法 We consider the problem of building visual anomaly detection systems for mobile robots. Standard anomaly detection models are trained using large datasets composed only of non-anomalous data. However, in robotics applications, it is often the case that (potentially very few) examples of anomalies are available. We tackle the problem of exploiting these data to improve the performance of a Real-NVP anomaly detection model, by minimizing, jointly with the Real-NVP loss, an auxiliary outlier exposure margin loss. We perform quantitative experiments on a novel dataset (which we publish as supplementary material) designed for anomaly detection in an indoor patrolling scenario. On a disjoint test set, our approach outperforms alternatives and shows that exposing even a small number of anomalous frames yields significant performance improvements. 我们考虑为移动机器人构建视觉异常检测系统的问题。标准异常检测模型是使用仅由非异常数据组成的大型数据集进行训练的。然而，在机器人应用中，通常会出现（可能很少）可用的异常示例。我们解决了利用这些数据来提高 Real-NVP 异常检测模型性能的问题，方法是与 Real-NVP 损失一起最小化辅助异常值暴露裕度损失。我们对一个新颖的数据集（我们将其作为补充材料发布）进行定量实验，该数据集专为室内巡逻场景中的异常检测而设计。在不相交的测试集上，我们的方法优于替代方法，并表明即使暴露少量的异常帧也能带来显着的性能改进。 本文提出一种通过异常值暴露改进移动机器人视觉异常检测性能的方法。 Dario Mantegazza,Alessandro Giusti,Luca Maria Gambardella,Jérôme Guzzi cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: David Gray Widder,Dawn Nafus
title: Dislocated Accountabilities in the AI Supply Chain: Modularity and Developers' Notions of Responsibility
title_zh: 人工智能供应链中的责任错位：模块化和开发人员的责任观念
comment: Keywords: Modularity, software engineering, supply chain, artificial intelligence, ethics, located accountability
comments: Keywords: Modularity, software engineering, supply chain, artificial intelligence, ethics, located accountability
abstract: Responsible artificial intelligence guidelines ask engineers to consider how their systems might harm. However, contemporary artificial intelligence systems are built by composing many preexisting software modules that pass through many hands before becoming a finished product or service. How does this shape responsible artificial intelligence practice? In interviews with 27 artificial intelligence engineers across industry, open source, and academia, our participants often did not see the questions posed in responsible artificial intelligence guidelines to be within their agency, capability, or responsibility to address. We use Suchman's "located accountability" to show how responsible artificial intelligence labor is currently organized and to explore how it could be done differently. We identify cross-cutting social logics, like modularizability, scale, reputation, and customer orientation, that organize which responsible artificial intelligence actions do take place and which are relegated to low status staff or believed to be the work of the next or previous person in the imagined "supply chain." We argue that current responsible artificial intelligence interventions, like ethics checklists and guidelines that assume panoptical knowledge and control over systems, could be improved by taking a located accountability approach, recognizing where relations and obligations might intertwine inside and outside of this supply chain.
summary: Responsible artificial intelligence guidelines ask engineers to consider how their systems might harm. However, contemporary artificial intelligence systems are built by composing many preexisting software modules that pass through many hands before becoming a finished product or service. How does this shape responsible artificial intelligence practice? In interviews with 27 artificial intelligence engineers across industry, open source, and academia, our participants often did not see the questions posed in responsible artificial intelligence guidelines to be within their agency, capability, or responsibility to address. We use Suchman's "located accountability" to show how responsible artificial intelligence labor is currently organized and to explore how it could be done differently. We identify cross-cutting social logics, like modularizability, scale, reputation, and customer orientation, that organize which responsible artificial intelligence actions do take place and which are relegated to low status staff or believed to be the work of the next or previous person in the imagined "supply chain." We argue that current responsible artificial intelligence interventions, like ethics checklists and guidelines that assume panoptical knowledge and control over systems, could be improved by taking a located accountability approach, recognizing where relations and obligations might intertwine inside and outside of this supply chain.
abstract_zh: 负责任的人工智能指南要求工程师考虑他们的系统可能造​​成的损害。然而，当代人工智能系统是通过组合许多预先存在的软件模块而构建的，这些模块在成为成品或服务之前要经过许多人的手。这如何塑造负责任的人工智能实践？在对来自行业、开源和学术界的 27 名人工智能工程师的采访中，我们的参与者常常认为负责任的人工智能指南中提出的问题不属于他们的机构、能力或责任范围。我们使用苏克曼的“定位责任”来展示负责任的人工智能劳动力目前是如何组织的，并探索如何以不同的方式进行。我们确定了跨领域的社会逻辑，例如模块化、规模、声誉和客户导向，这些逻辑组织了哪些负责任的人工智能行动确实发生，哪些被降级为低地位员工或被认为是想象的“供应链”中下一个人或前一人的工作。我们认为，当前负责任的人工智能干预措施，例如假定全景知识和系统控制的道德清单和指南，可以通过采取定位问责方法来改进，认识到关系和义务可能在供应链内外交织在一起。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨AI供应链中模块化开发如何影响开发者对责任的认知与实践，分析责任分配的碎片化现象。
AI.motivation: 当前负责任AI指南假设开发者能全面掌控系统风险，但实际AI系统依赖多环节模块组合，导致责任归属模糊，需重新审视责任分配机制。
AI.method: 通过访谈27名来自产业、开源和学术界的AI工程师，结合Suchman的'情境责任'理论，分析模块化、规模、声誉等因素如何塑造责任实践。
AI.result: 发现责任行动受模块化等社会逻辑影响，部分责任被下放至低地位员工或归咎于供应链上下游，现有伦理清单等方法因忽视实际协作关系而效果有限。
AI.conclusion: 应采用'情境责任'视角，承认供应链内外交织的义务关系，改进负责任AI实践以匹配模块化开发的现实复杂性。

authors_text: Sanghyun Son,Jing Liang,Ming Lin,Dinesh Manocha
title: WGICP: Differentiable Weighted GICP-Based Lidar Odometry
title_zh: WGICP：基于可微分加权 GICP 的激光雷达里程计
comment: 6 pages
comments: 6 pages
abstract: We present a novel differentiable weighted generalized iterative closest point (WGICP) method applicable to general 3D point cloud data, including that from Lidar. Our method builds on differentiable generalized ICP (GICP), and we propose using the differentiable K-Nearest Neighbor (KNN) algorithm to enhance differentiability. The differentiable GICP algorithm provides the gradient of output pose estimation with respect to each input point, which allows us to train a neural network to predict its importance, or weight, in estimating the correct pose. In contrast to the other ICP-based methods that use voxel-based downsampling or matching methods to reduce the computational cost, our method directly reduces the number of points used for GICP by only selecting those with the highest weights and ignoring redundant ones with lower weights. We show that our method improves both accuracy and speed of the GICP algorithm for the KITTI dataset and can be used to develop a more robust and efficient SLAM system.
summary: We present a novel differentiable weighted generalized iterative closest point (WGICP) method applicable to general 3D point cloud data, including that from Lidar. Our method builds on differentiable generalized ICP (GICP), and we propose using the differentiable K-Nearest Neighbor (KNN) algorithm to enhance differentiability. The differentiable GICP algorithm provides the gradient of output pose estimation with respect to each input point, which allows us to train a neural network to predict its importance, or weight, in estimating the correct pose. In contrast to the other ICP-based methods that use voxel-based downsampling or matching methods to reduce the computational cost, our method directly reduces the number of points used for GICP by only selecting those with the highest weights and ignoring redundant ones with lower weights. We show that our method improves both accuracy and speed of the GICP algorithm for the KITTI dataset and can be used to develop a more robust and efficient SLAM system.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的可微加权广义迭代最近点 (WGICP) 方法，适用于一般 3D 点云数据，包括来自激光雷达的点云数据。我们的方法建立在可微的广义 ICP (GICP) 之上，并且我们建议使用可微的 K 最近邻 (KNN) 算法来增强可微性。可微 GICP 算法提供了相对于每个输入点的输出姿态估计的梯度，这使我们能够训练神经网络来预测其在估计正确姿态时的重要性或权重。与其他使用基于体素的下采样或匹配方法来降低计算成本的基于 ICP 的方法相比，我们的方法通过仅选择具有最高权重的点并忽略具有较低权重的冗余点来直接减少用于 GICP 的点的数量。我们表明，我们的方法提高了 KITTI 数据集的 GICP 算法的准确性和速度，并且可用于开发更强大、更高效的 SLAM 系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可微分加权广义迭代最近点（WGICP）的激光雷达里程计方法，通过神经网络预测点云权重以提升算法效率和精度。
AI.motivation: 传统ICP方法在处理激光雷达点云时存在计算成本高、效率低的问题，且难以动态优化关键点选择。
AI.method: 结合可微分GICP与K近邻算法，利用神经网络预测点云权重，仅保留高权重点进行配准，减少冗余计算。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上验证了方法的有效性，相比传统ICP算法，准确性和运算速度均显著提升。
AI.conclusion: WGICP方法通过权重优化实现了高效精准的激光雷达里程计，为构建鲁棒SLAM系统提供了新思路。

authors_text: Guibin. Chen,Xiaoying. Shi
title: A Deep Reinforcement Learning-Based Charging Scheduling Approach with Augmented Lagrangian for Electric Vehicle
title_zh: 基于深度强化学习的电动汽车增强拉格朗日充电调度方法
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of optimizing charging/discharging schedules of electric vehicles (EVs) when participate in demand response (DR). As there exist uncertainties in EVs' remaining energy, arrival and departure time, and future electricity prices, it is quite difficult to make charging decisions to minimize charging cost while guarantee that the EV's battery state-of-the-charge (SOC) is within certain range. To handle with this dilemma, this paper formulates the EV charging scheduling problem as a constrained Markov decision process (CMDP). By synergistically combining the augmented Lagrangian method and soft actor critic algorithm, a novel safe off-policy reinforcement learning (RL) approach is proposed in this paper to solve the CMDP. The actor network is updated in a policy gradient manner with the Lagrangian value function. A double-critics network is adopted to synchronously estimate the action-value function to avoid overestimation bias. The proposed algorithm does not require strong convexity guarantee of examined problems and is sample efficient. Comprehensive numerical experiments with real-world electricity price demonstrate that our proposed algorithm can achieve high solution optimality and constraints compliance.
summary: This paper addresses the problem of optimizing charging/discharging schedules of electric vehicles (EVs) when participate in demand response (DR). As there exist uncertainties in EVs' remaining energy, arrival and departure time, and future electricity prices, it is quite difficult to make charging decisions to minimize charging cost while guarantee that the EV's battery state-of-the-charge (SOC) is within certain range. To handle with this dilemma, this paper formulates the EV charging scheduling problem as a constrained Markov decision process (CMDP). By synergistically combining the augmented Lagrangian method and soft actor critic algorithm, a novel safe off-policy reinforcement learning (RL) approach is proposed in this paper to solve the CMDP. The actor network is updated in a policy gradient manner with the Lagrangian value function. A double-critics network is adopted to synchronously estimate the action-value function to avoid overestimation bias. The proposed algorithm does not require strong convexity guarantee of examined problems and is sample efficient. Comprehensive numerical experiments with real-world electricity price demonstrate that our proposed algorithm can achieve high solution optimality and constraints compliance.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了电动汽车（EV）参与需求响应（DR）时优化充电/放电计划的问题。由于电动汽车的剩余电量、到达和出发时间以及未来电价都存在不确定性，在保证电动汽车电池荷电状态（SOC）在一定范围内的同时，做出充电决策以最小化充电成本是相当困难的。为了解决这一困境，本文将电动汽车充电调度问题表述为约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）。本文通过协同结合增强拉格朗日方法和软演员批评算法，提出了一种新颖的安全离策略强化学习（RL）方法来解决CMDP。参与者网络使用拉格朗日值函数以策略梯度方式更新。采用双批评网络同步估计动作价值函数，避免高估偏差。所提出的算法不需要所检查问题的强凸性保证并且样本效率高。对现实世界电价的综合数值实验表明，我们提出的算法可以实现较高的解决方案最优性和约束遵从性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习和增广拉格朗日方法的电动汽车充电调度优化方案，以应对需求响应中的不确定性因素。
AI.motivation: 电动汽车充电调度面临剩余电量、充放电时间及电价的不确定性，传统方法难以同时实现成本最小化和电池SOC约束保障。
AI.method: 将问题建模为约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP），结合增广拉格朗日乘子法与软演员评论家算法，采用双批评网络结构提升样本效率并避免高估偏差。
AI.result: 真实电价数据实验表明，该算法在优化解质量与约束满足度方面均优于现有方法，且无需强凸性假设。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了电动汽车充电成本与电池安全约束，在需求响应场景中具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Li Zhang,Mohan Chen,Anurag Arnab,Xiangyang Xue,Philip H. S. Torr
title: Dynamic Graph Message Passing Networks for Visual Recognition
title_zh: 用于视觉识别的动态图消息传递网络
comment: PAMI extension of CVPR 2020 oral work arXiv:1908.06955
comments: PAMI extension of CVPR 2020 oral work arXiv:1908.06955
abstract: Modelling long-range dependencies is critical for scene understanding tasks in computer vision. Although convolution neural networks (CNNs) have excelled in many vision tasks, they are still limited in capturing long-range structured relationships as they typically consist of layers of local kernels. A fully-connected graph, such as the self-attention operation in Transformers, is beneficial for such modelling, however, its computational overhead is prohibitive. In this paper, we propose a dynamic graph message passing network, that significantly reduces the computational complexity compared to related works modelling a fully-connected graph. This is achieved by adaptively sampling nodes in the graph, conditioned on the input, for message passing. Based on the sampled nodes, we dynamically predict node-dependent filter weights and the affinity matrix for propagating information between them. This formulation allows us to design a self-attention module, and more importantly a new Transformer-based backbone network, that we use for both image classification pretraining, and for addressing various downstream tasks (object detection, instance and semantic segmentation). Using this model, we show significant improvements with respect to strong, state-of-the-art baselines on four different tasks. Our approach also outperforms fully-connected graphs while using substantially fewer floating-point operations and parameters. Code and models will be made publicly available at https://github.com/fudan-zvg/DGMN2

Although convolution neural networks (CNNs) have excelled in many vision tasks, they are still limited in capturing long-range structured relationships as they typically consist of layers of local kernels. This is achieved by adaptively sampling nodes in the graph, conditioned on the input, for message passing. This formulation allows us to design a self-attention module, and more importantly a new Transformer-based backbone network, that we use for both image classification pretraining, and for addressing various downstream tasks (object detection, instance and semantic segmentation). Using this model, we show significant improvements with respect to strong, state-of-the-art baselines on four different tasks. Our approach also outperforms fully-connected graphs while using substantially fewer floating-point operations and parameters. Code and models will be made publicly available at https://github.com/fudan-zvg/DGMN2
abstract_zh: 建模远程依赖性对于计算机视觉中的场景理解任务至关重要。尽管卷积神经网络（CNN）在许多视觉任务中表现出色，但它们在捕获远程结构化关系方面仍然受到限制，因为它们通常由局部内核层组成。全连接图（例如 Transformers 中的自注意力操作）对于此类建模是有益的，但其计算开销却令人望而却步。在本文中，我们提出了一种动态图消息传递网络，与建模全连接图的相关工作相比，它显着降低了计算复杂性。这是通过以输入为条件对图中的节点进行自适应采样以进行消息传递来实现的。基于采样的节点，我们动态预测依赖于节点的过滤器权重和用于在它们之间传播信息的亲和力矩阵。这个公式使我们能够设计一个自注意力模块，更重要的是一个新的基于 Transformer 的主干网络，我们将其用于图像分类预训练，并用于解决各种下游任务（对象检测、实例和语义分割）。使用这个模型，我们在四个不同任务的强大、最先进的基线方面展示了显着的改进。我们的方法还优于全连接图，同时使用更少的浮点运算和参数。代码和模型将在 https://github.com/fudan-zvg/DGMN2 上公开

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态图消息传递网络（DGMN），用于视觉识别任务，通过自适应采样和动态预测机制降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络（CNN）难以捕捉长程依赖关系，而全连接图（如Transformer）计算开销过大，需设计更高效的图建模方法。
AI.method: 通过输入条件自适应采样图节点，动态预测节点相关滤波权重和亲和矩阵，构建自注意模块及新型Transformer主干网络。
AI.result: 在图像分类、目标检测等四类任务中显著优于现有方法，参数量和计算量（FLOPs）大幅减少。
AI.conclusion: 动态图消息传递网络在保持性能的同时显著降低计算成本，适用于多种视觉任务，代码模型已开源。
