authors_text: Timo Lohrenz,Björn Möller,Zhengyang Li,Tim Fingscheidt
title: Relaxed Attention for Transformer Models
title_zh: 放松对变压器模型的关注
abstract: The powerful modeling capabilities of all-attention-based transformer architectures often cause overfitting and - for natural language processing tasks - lead to an implicitly learned internal language model in the autoregressive transformer decoder complicating the integration of external language models. In this paper, we explore relaxed attention, a simple and easy-to-implement smoothing of the attention weights, yielding a two-fold improvement to the general transformer architecture: First, relaxed attention provides regularization when applied to the self-attention layers in the encoder. Second, we show that it naturally supports the integration of an external language model as it suppresses the implicitly learned internal language model by relaxing the cross attention in the decoder. We demonstrate the benefit of relaxed attention across several tasks with clear improvement in combination with recent benchmark approaches. Specifically, we exceed the former state-of-the-art performance of 26.90% word error rate on the largest public lip-reading LRS3 benchmark with a word error rate of 26.31%, as well as we achieve a top-performing BLEU score of 37.67 on the IWSLT14 (DE$\rightarrow$EN) machine translation task without external language models and virtually no additional model parameters. Code and models will be made publicly available.
summary: The powerful modeling capabilities of all-attention-based transformer architectures often cause overfitting and - for natural language processing tasks - lead to an implicitly learned internal language model in the autoregressive transformer decoder complicating the integration of external language models. In this paper, we explore relaxed attention, a simple and easy-to-implement smoothing of the attention weights, yielding a two-fold improvement to the general transformer architecture: First, relaxed attention provides regularization when applied to the self-attention layers in the encoder. Second, we show that it naturally supports the integration of an external language model as it suppresses the implicitly learned internal language model by relaxing the cross attention in the decoder. We demonstrate the benefit of relaxed attention across several tasks with clear improvement in combination with recent benchmark approaches. Specifically, we exceed the former state-of-the-art performance of 26.90% word error rate on the largest public lip-reading LRS3 benchmark with a word error rate of 26.31%, as well as we achieve a top-performing BLEU score of 37.67 on the IWSLT14 (DE$\rightarrow$EN) machine translation task without external language models and virtually no additional model parameters. Code and models will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 基于全注意力的 Transformer 架构的强大建模功能通常会导致过度拟合，并且对于自然语言处理任务而言，会导致自回归 Transformer 解码器中隐式学习的内部语言模型，从而使外部语言模型的集成变得复杂。在本文中，我们探索了松弛注意力，一种简单且易于实现的注意力权重平滑，对通用 Transformer 架构产生了两倍的改进：首先，松弛注意力在应用于编码器中的自注意力层时提供了正则化。其次，我们表明它自然地支持外部语言模型的集成，因为它通过放松解码器中的交叉注意力来抑制隐式学习的内部语言模型。我们展示了在多项任务中放松注意力的好处，并结合最近的基准方法取得了明显的改进。具体来说，我们在最大的公共唇读 LRS3 基准测试中超越了之前最先进的性能（26.90% 的单词错误率），单词错误率为 26.31%，并且我们在 IWSLT14 (DE$\rightarrow$EN) 机器翻译任务上获得了 37.67 分的最佳 BLEU 分数，无需外部语言模型，几乎不需要额外的模型参数。代码和模型将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'放松注意力'的机制，用于改进Transformer模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 基于注意力的Transformer架构在自然语言处理任务中容易过拟合，并隐式学习内部语言模型，导致与外部语言模型集成困难。
AI.method: 通过平滑注意力权重实现放松注意力，分别在编码器的自注意力层和解码器的交叉注意力层应用，以正则化模型并抑制内部语言模型。
AI.result: 在LRS3唇读基准测试中将词错误率从26.90%降至26.31%，在IWSLT14机器翻译任务中达到37.67的BLEU分数，且几乎不增加参数。
AI.conclusion: 放松注意力机制有效提升了Transformer模型的泛化能力，并简化了外部语言模型的集成过程。

search_text: Relaxed Attention for Transformer Models 放松对变压器模型的关注 The powerful modeling capabilities of all-attention-based transformer architectures often cause overfitting and - for natural language processing tasks - lead to an implicitly learned internal language model in the autoregressive transformer decoder complicating the integration of external language models. In this paper, we explore relaxed attention, a simple and easy-to-implement smoothing of the attention weights, yielding a two-fold improvement to the general transformer architecture: First, relaxed attention provides regularization when applied to the self-attention layers in the encoder. Second, we show that it naturally supports the integration of an external language model as it suppresses the implicitly learned internal language model by relaxing the cross attention in the decoder. We demonstrate the benefit of relaxed attention across several tasks with clear improvement in combination with recent benchmark approaches. Specifically, we exceed the former state-of-the-art performance of 26.90% word error rate on the largest public lip-reading LRS3 benchmark with a word error rate of 26.31%, as well as we achieve a top-performing BLEU score of 37.67 on the IWSLT14 (DE$\rightarrow$EN) machine translation task without external language models and virtually no additional model parameters. Code and models will be made publicly available. 基于全注意力的 Transformer 架构的强大建模功能通常会导致过度拟合，并且对于自然语言处理任务而言，会导致自回归 Transformer 解码器中隐式学习的内部语言模型，从而使外部语言模型的集成变得复杂。在本文中，我们探索了松弛注意力，一种简单且易于实现的注意力权重平滑，对通用 Transformer 架构产生了两倍的改进：首先，松弛注意力在应用于编码器中的自注意力层时提供了正则化。其次，我们表明它自然地支持外部语言模型的集成，因为它通过放松解码器中的交叉注意力来抑制隐式学习的内部语言模型。我们展示了在多项任务中放松注意力的好处，并结合最近的基准方法取得了明显的改进。具体来说，我们在最大的公共唇读 LRS3 基准测试中超越了之前最先进的性能（26.90% 的单词错误率），单词错误率为 26.31%，并且我们在 IWSLT14 (DE$\rightarrow$EN) 机器翻译任务上获得了 37.67 分的最佳 BLEU 分数，无需外部语言模型，几乎不需要额外的模型参数。代码和模型将公开。 本文提出了一种名为'放松注意力'的机制，用于改进Transformer模型的性能。 Timo Lohrenz,Björn Möller,Zhengyang Li,Tim Fingscheidt cs.LG,cs.CL,eess.AS,eess.IV

authors_text: Siyuan Mei,Fuxin Fan,Andreas Maier
title: Metal Inpainting in CBCT Projections Using Score-based Generative Model
title_zh: 使用基于分数的生成模型在 CBCT 投影中进行金属修复
abstract: During orthopaedic surgery, the inserting of metallic implants or screws are often performed under mobile C-arm systems. Due to the high attenuation of metals, severe metal artifacts occur in 3D reconstructions, which degrade the image quality greatly. To reduce the artifacts, many metal artifact reduction algorithms have been developed and metal inpainting in projection domain is an essential step. In this work, a score-based generative model is trained on simulated knee projections and the inpainted image is obtained by removing the noise in conditional resampling process. The result implies that the inpainted images by score-based generative model have more detailed information and achieve the lowest mean absolute error and the highest peak-signal-to-noise-ratio compared with interpolation and CNN based method. Besides, the score-based model can also recover projections with big circlar and rectangular masks, showing its generalization in inpainting task.
summary: During orthopaedic surgery, the inserting of metallic implants or screws are often performed under mobile C-arm systems. Due to the high attenuation of metals, severe metal artifacts occur in 3D reconstructions, which degrade the image quality greatly. To reduce the artifacts, many metal artifact reduction algorithms have been developed and metal inpainting in projection domain is an essential step. In this work, a score-based generative model is trained on simulated knee projections and the inpainted image is obtained by removing the noise in conditional resampling process. The result implies that the inpainted images by score-based generative model have more detailed information and achieve the lowest mean absolute error and the highest peak-signal-to-noise-ratio compared with interpolation and CNN based method. Besides, the score-based model can also recover projections with big circlar and rectangular masks, showing its generalization in inpainting task.
abstract_zh: 在骨科手术期间，金属植入物或螺钉的插入通常在移动 C 形臂系统下进行。由于金属的高衰减，3D重建中会出现严重的金属伪影，从而极大地降低图像质量。为了减少伪影，已经开发了许多金属伪影减少算法，并且投影域中的金属修复是必不可少的步骤。在这项工作中，在模拟膝盖投影上训练基于分数的生成模型，并通过去除条件重采样过程中的噪声来获得修复图像。结果表明，与插值和基于 CNN 的方法相比，基于评分的生成模型修复的图像具有更详细的信息，并且实现了最低的平均绝对误差和最高的峰值信噪比。此外，基于分数的模型还可以恢复具有大圆形和矩形掩模的投影，显示了其在修复任务中的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分数生成模型的CBCT投影金属修复方法，用于减少骨科手术中的金属伪影。
AI.motivation: 金属植入物会导致CBCT重建图像出现严重伪影，现有修复方法在细节保留和噪声抑制方面存在不足。
AI.method: 训练基于分数的生成模型处理模拟膝关节投影，通过条件重采样过程去除噪声实现金属区域修复。
AI.result: 该方法在细节保留、平均绝对误差和峰值信噪比指标上优于插值法和CNN方法，可有效修复大尺寸圆形/矩形掩码区域。
AI.conclusion: 基于分数生成模型的修复方法在金属伪影消除任务中表现出更优的细节恢复能力和泛化性能。

authors_text: Soheil Human
title: Advanced Data Protection Control (ADPC): An Interdisciplinary Overview
title_zh: 高级数据保护控制 (ADPC)：跨学科概述
abstract: The Advanced Data Protection Control (ADPC) is a technical specification - and a set of sociotechnical mechanisms surrounding it - that can change the current practice of Internet-based personal data protection and consenting by providing novel and standardized means for the communication of privacy and consenting data, meta-data, information, requests, preferences, and decisions. The ADPC supports humans in practicing their rights to privacy and agency by giving them more human-centric control over the processing of their personal data and consent. It helps the data controllers to improve their users' experiences and provides them with easy-to-adopt means to comply with the relevant legal and ethical requirements and expectations.
summary: The Advanced Data Protection Control (ADPC) is a technical specification - and a set of sociotechnical mechanisms surrounding it - that can change the current practice of Internet-based personal data protection and consenting by providing novel and standardized means for the communication of privacy and consenting data, meta-data, information, requests, preferences, and decisions. The ADPC supports humans in practicing their rights to privacy and agency by giving them more human-centric control over the processing of their personal data and consent. It helps the data controllers to improve their users' experiences and provides them with easy-to-adopt means to comply with the relevant legal and ethical requirements and expectations.
abstract_zh: 高级数据保护控制 (ADPC) 是一项技术规范以及围绕它的一组社会技术机制，它可以通过提供用于隐私和同意数据、元数据、信息、请求、偏好和决策的通信的新颖且标准化的方式来改变基于互联网的个人数据保护和同意的当前实践。 ADPC 通过给予人们对个人数据和同意的处理进行更多以人为本的控制，支持人们行使隐私权和代理权。它帮助数据控制者改善用户体验，并为他们提供易于采用的方法来遵守相关的法律和道德要求和期望。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为高级数据保护控制（ADPC）的技术规范及配套社会技术机制，旨在通过标准化方式改进互联网个人数据保护和用户同意流程。
AI.motivation: 现有数据保护机制难以满足用户对隐私控制的需求，同时数据控制者面临合规复杂性挑战，亟需更高效、标准化的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过跨学科研究设计ADPC框架，结合技术规范与社会技术机制，标准化隐私数据通信流程并增强用户自主权。
AI.result: ADPC有效提升了用户对个人数据处理的控制能力，同时为数据控制者提供了符合法律伦理要求的易用性合规工具。
AI.conclusion: ADPC作为跨学科创新框架，为平衡用户隐私权与数据合规需求提供了可行的技术-社会协同解决方案。

search_text: Advanced Data Protection Control (ADPC): An Interdisciplinary Overview 高级数据保护控制 (ADPC)：跨学科概述 The Advanced Data Protection Control (ADPC) is a technical specification - and a set of sociotechnical mechanisms surrounding it - that can change the current practice of Internet-based personal data protection and consenting by providing novel and standardized means for the communication of privacy and consenting data, meta-data, information, requests, preferences, and decisions. The ADPC supports humans in practicing their rights to privacy and agency by giving them more human-centric control over the processing of their personal data and consent. It helps the data controllers to improve their users' experiences and provides them with easy-to-adopt means to comply with the relevant legal and ethical requirements and expectations. 高级数据保护控制 (ADPC) 是一项技术规范以及围绕它的一组社会技术机制，它可以通过提供用于隐私和同意数据、元数据、信息、请求、偏好和决策的通信的新颖且标准化的方式来改变基于互联网的个人数据保护和同意的当前实践。 ADPC 通过给予人们对个人数据和同意的处理进行更多以人为本的控制，支持人们行使隐私权和代理权。它帮助数据控制者改善用户体验，并为他们提供易于采用的方法来遵守相关的法律和道德要求和期望。 本文介绍了一种名为高级数据保护控制（ADPC）的技术规范及配套社会技术机制，旨在通过标准化方式改进互联网个人数据保护和用户同意流程。 Soheil Human cs.NI,cs.CY,cs.HC

authors_text: Mingkun Wang,Xinge Zhu,Changqian Yu,Wei Li,Yuexin Ma,Ruochun Jin,Xiaoguang Ren,Dongchun Ren,Mingxu Wang,Wenjing Yang
title: GANet: Goal Area Network for Motion Forecasting
title_zh: GANet：运动预测的目标区域网络
abstract: Predicting the future motion of road participants is crucial for autonomous driving but is extremely challenging due to staggering motion uncertainty. Recently, most motion forecasting methods resort to the goal-based strategy, i.e., predicting endpoints of motion trajectories as conditions to regress the entire trajectories, so that the search space of solution can be reduced. However, accurate goal coordinates are hard to predict and evaluate. In addition, the point representation of the destination limits the utilization of a rich road context, leading to inaccurate prediction results in many cases. Goal area, i.e., the possible destination area, rather than goal coordinate, could provide a more soft constraint for searching potential trajectories by involving more tolerance and guidance. In view of this, we propose a new goal area-based framework, named Goal Area Network (GANet), for motion forecasting, which models goal areas rather than exact goal coordinates as preconditions for trajectory prediction, performing more robustly and accurately. Specifically, we propose a GoICrop (Goal Area of Interest) operator to effectively extract semantic lane features in goal areas and model actors' future interactions, which benefits a lot for future trajectory estimations. GANet ranks the 1st on the leaderboard of Argoverse Challenge among all public literature (till the paper submission), and its source codes will be released.
summary: Predicting the future motion of road participants is crucial for autonomous driving but is extremely challenging due to staggering motion uncertainty. Recently, most motion forecasting methods resort to the goal-based strategy, i.e., predicting endpoints of motion trajectories as conditions to regress the entire trajectories, so that the search space of solution can be reduced. However, accurate goal coordinates are hard to predict and evaluate. In addition, the point representation of the destination limits the utilization of a rich road context, leading to inaccurate prediction results in many cases. Goal area, i.e., the possible destination area, rather than goal coordinate, could provide a more soft constraint for searching potential trajectories by involving more tolerance and guidance. In view of this, we propose a new goal area-based framework, named Goal Area Network (GANet), for motion forecasting, which models goal areas rather than exact goal coordinates as preconditions for trajectory prediction, performing more robustly and accurately. Specifically, we propose a GoICrop (Goal Area of Interest) operator to effectively extract semantic lane features in goal areas and model actors' future interactions, which benefits a lot for future trajectory estimations. GANet ranks the 1st on the leaderboard of Argoverse Challenge among all public literature (till the paper submission), and its source codes will be released.
abstract_zh: 预测道路参与者的未来运动对于自动驾驶至关重要，但由于惊人的运动不确定性而极具挑战性。最近，大多数运动预测方法采用基于目标的策略，即预测运动轨迹的端点作为回归整个轨迹的条件，从而可以减少解的搜索空间。然而，准确的目标坐标很难预测和评估。此外，目的地的点表示限制了丰富道路环境的利用，导致在许多情况下预测结果不准确。目标区域，即可能的目的地区域，而不是目标坐标，可以通过涉及更多的宽容和指导来为搜索潜在轨迹提供更软的约束。鉴于此，我们提出了一种新的基于目标区域的运动预测框架，称为目标区域网络（GANet），它对目标区域而不是精确的目标坐标进行建模作为轨迹预测的先决条件，表现更加稳健和准确。具体来说，我们提出了一个GoICrop（目标感兴趣区域）算子来有效提取目标区域中的语义车道特征并建模参与者未来的交互，这对于未来的轨迹估计有很大好处。 GANet 在所有公开文献中（截至论文提交）在 Argoverse Challenge 排行榜上排名第一，其源代码将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于目标区域的运动预测框架GANet，用于更鲁棒和精确地预测道路参与者未来的运动轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有基于目标坐标的方法难以准确预测和评估终点坐标，且点表示限制了道路上下文信息的利用，导致预测结果不准确。
AI.method: 提出GoICrop算子有效提取目标区域的语义车道特征，并建模行人未来交互，以目标区域而非精确坐标作为轨迹预测的先验条件。
AI.result: GANet在Argoverse Challenge竞赛中排名第一，源代码将公开。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入目标区域约束，GANet在运动预测任务中展现出更高的鲁棒性和准确性，为自动驾驶领域提供了新思路。

authors_text: Nikolai Gershfeld,Tyler M Paine,Michael R. Benjamin
title: Adaptive and Collaborative Bathymetric Channel-Finding Approach for Multiple Autonomous Marine Vehicles
title_zh: 多自主海洋车辆的自适应和协作测深通道寻找方法
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures, (v1) Submitted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023, (v2) Updated figures, Submitted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L), (v3) Preprint accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
comments: 8 pages, 9 figures, (v1) Submitted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023, (v2) Updated figures, Submitted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L), (v3) Preprint accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
abstract: This paper reports an investigation into the problem of rapid identification of a channel that crosses a body of water using one or more Unmanned Surface Vehicles (USV). A new algorithm called Proposal Based Adaptive Channel Search (PBACS) is presented as a potential solution that improves upon current methods. The empirical performance of PBACS is compared to lawnmower surveying and to Markov decision process (MDP) planning with two state-of-the-art reward functions: Upper Confidence Bound (UCB) and Maximum Value Information (MVI). The performance of each method is evaluated through comparison of the time it takes to identify a continuous channel through an area, using one, two, three, or four USVs. The performance of each method is compared across ten simulated bathymetry scenarios and one field area, each with different channel layouts. The results from simulations and field trials indicate that on average multi-vehicle PBACS outperforms lawnmower, UCB, and MVI based methods, especially when at least three vehicles are used.
summary: This paper reports an investigation into the problem of rapid identification of a channel that crosses a body of water using one or more Unmanned Surface Vehicles (USV). A new algorithm called Proposal Based Adaptive Channel Search (PBACS) is presented as a potential solution that improves upon current methods. The empirical performance of PBACS is compared to lawnmower surveying and to Markov decision process (MDP) planning with two state-of-the-art reward functions: Upper Confidence Bound (UCB) and Maximum Value Information (MVI). The performance of each method is evaluated through comparison of the time it takes to identify a continuous channel through an area, using one, two, three, or four USVs. The performance of each method is compared across ten simulated bathymetry scenarios and one field area, each with different channel layouts. The results from simulations and field trials indicate that on average multi-vehicle PBACS outperforms lawnmower, UCB, and MVI based methods, especially when at least three vehicles are used.
abstract_zh: 本文报告了一项针对使用一个或多个无人水面车辆 (USV) 快速识别穿过水域的航道问题的调查。提出了一种称为基于提议的自适应信道搜索（PBACS）的新算法，作为改进当前方法的潜在解决方案。将 PBACS 的实证性能与割草机测量和马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 规划进行比较，并具有两个最先进的奖励函数：置信上限 (UCB) 和最大值信息 (MVI)。通过比较使用一艘、两艘、三艘或四艘 USV 识别穿过某个区域的连续通道所需的时间来评估每种方法的性能。每种方法的性能在十个模拟测深场景和一个野外区域中进行比较，每个场景都有不同的通道布局。模拟和现场试验的结果表明，平均而言，多车辆 PBACS 优于基于割草机、UCB 和 MVI 的方法，特别是当至少使用三辆车时。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多无人水面艇（USV）协作的自适应水深通道识别方法PBACS，用于快速定位水域通道。
AI.motivation: 传统方法如割草机扫描和基于MDP的规划在通道识别效率上存在不足，需更优的多车协作算法。
AI.method: 设计PBACS算法，并与割草机扫描、UCB和MVI方法对比，通过模拟和实地试验评估多车协作效果。
AI.result: 多车PBACS平均识别时间优于其他方法，尤其在三辆及以上USV时表现显著。
AI.conclusion: PBACS在多车协作场景下可有效提升通道识别效率，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Carles Garcia-Cabrera,Eric Arazo,Kathleen M. Curran,Noel E. O'Connor,Kevin McGuinness
title: Cardiac Segmentation using Transfer Learning under Respiratory Motion Artifacts
title_zh: 在呼吸运动伪影下使用迁移学习进行心脏分割
comment: accepted for the STACOM2022 workshop @ MICCAI2022
comments: accepted for the STACOM2022 workshop @ MICCAI2022
abstract: Methods that are resilient to artifacts in the cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) while performing ventricle segmentation, are crucial for ensuring quality in structural and functional analysis of those tissues. While there has been significant efforts on improving the quality of the algorithms, few works have tackled the harm that the artifacts generate in the predictions. In this work, we study fine tuning of pretrained networks to improve the resilience of previous methods to these artifacts. In our proposed method, we adopted the extensive usage of data augmentations that mimic those artifacts. The results significantly improved the baseline segmentations (up to 0.06 Dice score, and 4mm Hausdorff distance improvement).
summary: Methods that are resilient to artifacts in the cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) while performing ventricle segmentation, are crucial for ensuring quality in structural and functional analysis of those tissues. While there has been significant efforts on improving the quality of the algorithms, few works have tackled the harm that the artifacts generate in the predictions. In this work, we study fine tuning of pretrained networks to improve the resilience of previous methods to these artifacts. In our proposed method, we adopted the extensive usage of data augmentations that mimic those artifacts. The results significantly improved the baseline segmentations (up to 0.06 Dice score, and 4mm Hausdorff distance improvement).
abstract_zh: 在执行心室分割时对心脏磁共振成像 (MRI) 中的伪影具有弹性的方法对于确保这些组织的结构和功能分析的质量至关重要。尽管人们在提高算法质量方面做出了巨大努力，但很少有工作能够解决预测中伪影产生的危害。在这项工作中，我们研究了预训练网络的微调，以提高先前方法对这些工件的弹性。在我们提出的方法中，我们广泛使用了模仿这些工件的数据增强。结果显着改善了基线分割（Dice 得分高达 0.06，Hausdorff 距离改善了 4 毫米）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用迁移学习和数据增强技术，提升心脏MRI在呼吸运动伪影下的分割鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有心脏分割算法对呼吸运动伪影敏感，导致分割质量下降，影响心脏结构和功能分析的准确性。
AI.method: 通过微调预训练网络，并采用模拟呼吸运动伪影的数据增强策略，提升模型对伪影的鲁棒性。
AI.result: Dice分数提升最高达0.06，Hausdorff距离减少4mm，显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效增强了分割算法对呼吸伪影的适应能力，为医学图像处理中的伪影问题提供了可行解决方案。

search_text: Cardiac Segmentation using Transfer Learning under Respiratory Motion Artifacts 在呼吸运动伪影下使用迁移学习进行心脏分割 Methods that are resilient to artifacts in the cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) while performing ventricle segmentation, are crucial for ensuring quality in structural and functional analysis of those tissues. While there has been significant efforts on improving the quality of the algorithms, few works have tackled the harm that the artifacts generate in the predictions. In this work, we study fine tuning of pretrained networks to improve the resilience of previous methods to these artifacts. In our proposed method, we adopted the extensive usage of data augmentations that mimic those artifacts. The results significantly improved the baseline segmentations (up to 0.06 Dice score, and 4mm Hausdorff distance improvement). 在执行心室分割时对心脏磁共振成像 (MRI) 中的伪影具有弹性的方法对于确保这些组织的结构和功能分析的质量至关重要。尽管人们在提高算法质量方面做出了巨大努力，但很少有工作能够解决预测中伪影产生的危害。在这项工作中，我们研究了预训练网络的微调，以提高先前方法对这些工件的弹性。在我们提出的方法中，我们广泛使用了模仿这些工件的数据增强。结果显着改善了基线分割（Dice 得分高达 0.06，Hausdorff 距离改善了 4 毫米）。 本文提出利用迁移学习和数据增强技术，提升心脏MRI在呼吸运动伪影下的分割鲁棒性。 Carles Garcia-Cabrera,Eric Arazo,Kathleen M. Curran,Noel E. O'Connor,Kevin McGuinness eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Wei-Chang Yeh
title: Development of a Parallel BAT and Its Applications in Binary-state Network Reliability Problems
title_zh: 并行BAT的研制及其在二元状态网络可靠性问题中的应用
abstract: Various networks are broadly and deeply applied in real-life applications. Reliability is the most important index for measuring the performance of all network types. Among the various algorithms, only implicit enumeration algorithms, such as depth-first-search, breadth-search-first, universal generating function methodology, binary-decision diagram, and binary-addition-tree algorithm (BAT), can be used to calculate the exact network reliability. However, implicit enumeration algorithms can only be used to solve small-scale network reliability problems. The BAT was recently proposed as a simple, fast, easy-to-code, and flexible make-to-fit exact-solution algorithm. Based on the experimental results, the BAT and its variants outperformed other implicit enumeration algorithms. Hence, to overcome the above-mentioned obstacle as a result of the size problem, a new parallel BAT (PBAT) was proposed to improve the BAT based on compute multithread architecture to calculate the binary-state network reliability problem, which is fundamental for all types of network reliability problems. From the analysis of the time complexity and experiments conducted on 20 benchmarks of binary-state network reliability problems, PBAT was able to efficiently solve medium-scale network reliability problems.
summary: Various networks are broadly and deeply applied in real-life applications. Reliability is the most important index for measuring the performance of all network types. Among the various algorithms, only implicit enumeration algorithms, such as depth-first-search, breadth-search-first, universal generating function methodology, binary-decision diagram, and binary-addition-tree algorithm (BAT), can be used to calculate the exact network reliability. However, implicit enumeration algorithms can only be used to solve small-scale network reliability problems. The BAT was recently proposed as a simple, fast, easy-to-code, and flexible make-to-fit exact-solution algorithm. Based on the experimental results, the BAT and its variants outperformed other implicit enumeration algorithms. Hence, to overcome the above-mentioned obstacle as a result of the size problem, a new parallel BAT (PBAT) was proposed to improve the BAT based on compute multithread architecture to calculate the binary-state network reliability problem, which is fundamental for all types of network reliability problems. From the analysis of the time complexity and experiments conducted on 20 benchmarks of binary-state network reliability problems, PBAT was able to efficiently solve medium-scale network reliability problems.
abstract_zh: 各种网络在现实生活中得到了广泛而深入的应用。可靠性是衡量所有网络类型性能最重要的指标。在各种算法中，只有隐式枚举算法，如深度优先搜索、广度搜索优先、通用生成函数法、二元决策图、二叉加法树算法（BAT）等可以用来计算准确的网络可靠性。然而隐式枚举​​算法只能用于解决小规模的网络可靠性问题。 BAT 最近被提出作为一种简单、快速、易于编码且灵活的定制精确解决方案算法。根据实验结果，BAT 及其变体优于其他隐式枚举算法。因此，为了克服上述由于尺寸问题造成的障碍，提出了一种新的并行BAT（PBAT）来改进基于计算多线程架构的BAT，以计算二元状态网络可靠性问题，这是所有类型网络可靠性问题的基础。通过对时间复杂度的分析以及对20个二元状态网络可靠性问题基准的实验，PBAT能够有效地解决中等规模的网络可靠性问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种并行二进制加法树算法（PBAT），用于解决二元状态网络可靠性问题，以克服传统算法在处理中等规模网络时的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有隐式枚举算法（如BAT）虽能计算精确网络可靠性，但难以处理大规模问题，而BAT及其变体在实验中表现优异，需进一步优化以提升计算效率。
AI.method: 基于多线程架构改进BAT算法，设计并行PBAT，通过时间复杂度分析和20个二元状态网络可靠性基准测试验证其性能。
AI.result: PBAT在实验中能高效解决中等规模网络可靠性问题，相比传统算法显著提升计算效率。
AI.conclusion: PBAT有效克服了传统算法的规模限制，为网络可靠性问题提供了更高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Eduardo Sebastian,Eduardo Montijano,Carlos Sagues
title: Multi-robot Implicit Control of Massive Herds
title_zh: 多机器人隐式控制大量牛群
comment: E. Sebastian, E. Montijano and C. Sagues,"Multi-robot Implicit Control of Massive Herds'', Fifth Iberian Robotics Conference (ROBOT22), 2022
comments: E. Sebastian, E. Montijano and C. Sagues,"Multi-robot Implicit Control of Massive Herds'', Fifth Iberian Robotics Conference (ROBOT22), 2022
abstract: This paper solves the problem of herding countless evaders by means of a few robots. The objective is to steer all the evaders towards a desired tracking reference while avoiding escapes. The problem is very challenging due to the highly complex repulsive evaders' dynamics and the underdetermined states to control. We propose a solution that is based on Implicit Control and a novel dynamic assignment strategy to select the evaders to be directly controlled. The former is a general technique that explicitly computes control inputs even in highly complex input-nonaffine dynamics. The latter is built upon a convex-hull dynamic clustering inspired by the Voronoi tessellation problem. The combination of both allows to choose the best evaders to directly control, while the others are indirectly controlled by exploiting the repulsive interactions among them. Simulations show that massive herds can be herd throughout complex patterns by means of a few herders.
summary: This paper solves the problem of herding countless evaders by means of a few robots. The objective is to steer all the evaders towards a desired tracking reference while avoiding escapes. The problem is very challenging due to the highly complex repulsive evaders' dynamics and the underdetermined states to control. We propose a solution that is based on Implicit Control and a novel dynamic assignment strategy to select the evaders to be directly controlled. The former is a general technique that explicitly computes control inputs even in highly complex input-nonaffine dynamics. The latter is built upon a convex-hull dynamic clustering inspired by the Voronoi tessellation problem. The combination of both allows to choose the best evaders to directly control, while the others are indirectly controlled by exploiting the repulsive interactions among them. Simulations show that massive herds can be herd throughout complex patterns by means of a few herders.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了通过少数机器人来驱赶无数逃亡者的问题。目标是引导所有逃亡者走向所需的跟踪参考，同时避免逃跑。由于排斥逃避者的动力学高度复杂且需要控制的状态不确定，因此该问题非常具有挑战性。我们提出了一种基于隐式控制和新颖的动态分配策略的解决方案来选择要直接控制的逃避者。前者是一种通用技术，即使在高度复杂的输入非仿射动力学中也能显式计算控制输入。后者建立在受 Voronoi 曲面细分问题启发的凸包动态聚类的基础上。两者的结合允许选择最好的逃避者来直接控制，而其他人则通过利用他们之间的排斥相互作用来间接控制。模拟表明，少数牧民可以在复杂的模式下放牧大量牛群。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过少量机器人控制大规模群体的方法，使逃逸者朝着目标轨迹移动并防止其逃脱。
AI.motivation: 大规模群体的动态复杂且难以直接控制，传统方法在处理高复杂度和欠定状态时效果有限。
AI.method: 结合隐式控制技术与基于凸包动态聚类的新型分配策略，直接控制部分逃逸者并利用群体间排斥交互间接控制其余个体。
AI.result: 仿真表明，少量机器人可通过复杂模式有效引导大规模群体，验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 隐式控制与动态分配策略的结合为大规模群体控制提供了高效解决方案，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Eduardo Sebastian,Thai Duong,Nikolay Atanasov,Eduardo Montijano,Carlos Sagues
title: LEMURS: Learning Distributed Multi-Robot Interactions
title_zh: LEMURS：学习分布式多机器人交互
comment: Accepted for publication at IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2023
comments: Accepted for publication at IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2023
abstract: This paper presents LEMURS, an algorithm for learning scalable multi-robot control policies from cooperative task demonstrations. We propose a port-Hamiltonian description of the multi-robot system to exploit universal physical constraints in interconnected systems and achieve closed-loop stability. We represent a multi-robot control policy using an architecture that combines self-attention mechanisms and neural ordinary differential equations. The former handles time-varying communication in the robot team, while the latter respects the continuous-time robot dynamics. Our representation is distributed by construction, enabling the learned control policies to be deployed in robot teams of different sizes. We demonstrate that LEMURS can learn interactions and cooperative behaviors from demonstrations of multi-agent navigation and flocking tasks.
summary: This paper presents LEMURS, an algorithm for learning scalable multi-robot control policies from cooperative task demonstrations. We propose a port-Hamiltonian description of the multi-robot system to exploit universal physical constraints in interconnected systems and achieve closed-loop stability. We represent a multi-robot control policy using an architecture that combines self-attention mechanisms and neural ordinary differential equations. The former handles time-varying communication in the robot team, while the latter respects the continuous-time robot dynamics. Our representation is distributed by construction, enabling the learned control policies to be deployed in robot teams of different sizes. We demonstrate that LEMURS can learn interactions and cooperative behaviors from demonstrations of multi-agent navigation and flocking tasks.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 LEMURS，一种从协作任务演示中学习可扩展多机器人控制策略的算法。我们提出了多机器人系统的端口哈密尔顿描述，以利用互连系统中的通用物理约束并实现闭环稳定性。我们使用结合自注意力机制和神经常微分方程的架构来表示多机器人控制策略。前者处理机器人团队中随时间变化的通信，而后者则尊重连续时间的机器人动力学。我们的表示是按结构分布的，使得学习到的控制策略能够部署在不同规模的机器人团队中。我们证明狐猴可以从多智能体导航和集群任务的演示中学习交互和合作行为。

AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理多机器人系统的动态通信与连续时间动力学，且缺乏对不同规模团队的适应性。
AI.method: 基于port-Hamiltonian框架建模物理约束，融合自注意力机制处理通信与时变交互，采用神经微分方程模拟连续时间动力学，构建分布式控制策略架构。
AI.result: LEMURS成功学习多智能体导航与群体任务的协作行为，验证了其在不同规模机器人团队中的稳定性与可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: LEMURS通过物理约束与分布式设计实现了多机器人系统的稳定控制，为复杂任务协作提供了通用且灵活的解决方案。

authors_text: José Arce,Niclas Vödisch,Daniele Cattaneo,Wolfram Burgard,Abhinav Valada
title: PADLoC: LiDAR-Based Deep Loop Closure Detection and Registration Using Panoptic Attention
title_zh: PADLoC：使用全景注意力的基于 LiDAR 的深度环路闭合检测和注册
comment: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol. 8, no. 3, pp. 1319-1326, March 2023
comments: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol. 8, no. 3, pp. 1319-1326, March 2023
abstract: A key component of graph-based SLAM systems is the ability to detect loop closures in a trajectory to reduce the drift accumulated over time from the odometry. Most LiDAR-based methods achieve this goal by using only the geometric information, disregarding the semantics of the scene. In this work, we introduce PADLoC for joint loop closure detection and registration in LiDAR-based SLAM frameworks. We propose a novel transformer-based head for point cloud matching and registration, and to leverage panoptic information during training time. In particular, we propose a novel loss function that reframes the matching problem as a classification task for the semantic labels and as a graph connectivity assignment for the instance labels. During inference, PADLoC does not require panoptic annotations, making it more versatile than other methods. Additionally, we show that using two shared matching and registration heads with their source and target inputs swapped increases the overall performance by enforcing forward-backward consistency. We perform extensive evaluations of PADLoC on multiple real-world datasets demonstrating that it achieves state-of-the-art results. The code of our work is publicly available at http://padloc.cs.uni-freiburg.de.
summary: A key component of graph-based SLAM systems is the ability to detect loop closures in a trajectory to reduce the drift accumulated over time from the odometry. Most LiDAR-based methods achieve this goal by using only the geometric information, disregarding the semantics of the scene. In this work, we introduce PADLoC for joint loop closure detection and registration in LiDAR-based SLAM frameworks. We propose a novel transformer-based head for point cloud matching and registration, and to leverage panoptic information during training time. In particular, we propose a novel loss function that reframes the matching problem as a classification task for the semantic labels and as a graph connectivity assignment for the instance labels. During inference, PADLoC does not require panoptic annotations, making it more versatile than other methods. Additionally, we show that using two shared matching and registration heads with their source and target inputs swapped increases the overall performance by enforcing forward-backward consistency. We perform extensive evaluations of PADLoC on multiple real-world datasets demonstrating that it achieves state-of-the-art results. The code of our work is publicly available at http://padloc.cs.uni-freiburg.de.
abstract_zh: 基于图的 SLAM 系统的一个关键组成部分是能够检测轨迹中的闭环，以减少里程计随时间累积的漂移。大多数基于激光雷达的方法仅使用几何信息来实现此目标，而忽略场景的语义。在这项工作中，我们引入了 PADLoC，用于在基于 LiDAR 的 SLAM 框架中进行联合闭环检测和注册。我们提出了一种新颖的基于变压器的头，用于点云匹配和注册，并在训练期间利用全景信息。特别是，我们提出了一种新颖的损失函数，它将匹配问题重新构建为语义标签的分类任务和实例标签的图连接分配。在推理过程中，PADLoC 不需要全景注释，这使得它比其他方法更通用。此外，我们还表明，使用两个共享的匹配和注册头，并交换源和目标输入，可以通过强制前向-后向一致性来提高整体性能。我们对多个真实数据集对 PADLoC 进行了广泛的评估，证明它取得了最先进的结果。我们的工作代码可在 http://padloc.cs.uni-freiburg.de 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PADLoC方法，结合几何信息与场景语义，实现基于LiDAR的SLAM系统中闭环检测与配准。
AI.motivation: 传统LiDAR闭环检测方法仅依赖几何信息，忽视场景语义，导致在复杂环境中鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的点云匹配头，引入语义分类与实例图连接性损失函数，利用双共享头增强前后向一致性，无需推理时语义标注。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上验证，PADLoC达到最先进的闭环检测与配准性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合几何与语义信息，PADLoC显著提升了LiDAR-SLAM闭环检测的准确性与适应性。

authors_text: Michele Focchi,Mohamed Bensaadallah,Marco Frego,Angelika Peer,Daniele Fontanelli,Andrea Del Prete,Luigi Palopoli
title: CLIO: a Novel Robotic Solution for Exploration and Rescue Missions in Hostile Mountain Environments
title_zh: CLIO：用于恶劣山区环境中勘探和救援任务的新型机器人解决方案
comment: 7 pages
comments: 7 pages
abstract: Rescue missions in mountain environments are hardly achievable by standard legged robots-because of the high slopes-or by flying robots-because of limited payload capacity. We present a concept for a rope-aided climbing robot which can negotiate up-to-vertical slopes and carry heavy payloads. The robot is attached to the mountain through a rope, and it is equipped with a leg to push against the mountain and initiate jumping maneuvers. Between jumps, a hoist is used to wind/unwind the rope to move vertically and affect the lateral motion. This simple (yet effective) two-fold actuation allows the system to achieve high safety and energy efficiency. Indeed, the rope prevents the robot from falling while compensating for most of its weight, drastically reducing the effort required by the leg actuator. We also present an optimal control strategy to generate point-to-point trajectories overcoming an obstacle. We achieve fast computation time (<1 s) thanks to the use of a custom simplified robot model. We validated the generated optimal movements in Gazebo simulations with a complete robot model with a < 5% error on a 16 m long jump, showing the effectiveness of the proposed approach, and confirming the interest of our concept. Finally, we performed a reachability analysis showing that the region of achievable targets is strongly affected by the friction properties of the foot-wall contact.
summary: Rescue missions in mountain environments are hardly achievable by standard legged robots-because of the high slopes-or by flying robots-because of limited payload capacity. We present a concept for a rope-aided climbing robot which can negotiate up-to-vertical slopes and carry heavy payloads. The robot is attached to the mountain through a rope, and it is equipped with a leg to push against the mountain and initiate jumping maneuvers. Between jumps, a hoist is used to wind/unwind the rope to move vertically and affect the lateral motion. This simple (yet effective) two-fold actuation allows the system to achieve high safety and energy efficiency. Indeed, the rope prevents the robot from falling while compensating for most of its weight, drastically reducing the effort required by the leg actuator. We also present an optimal control strategy to generate point-to-point trajectories overcoming an obstacle. We achieve fast computation time (<1 s) thanks to the use of a custom simplified robot model. We validated the generated optimal movements in Gazebo simulations with a complete robot model with a < 5% error on a 16 m long jump, showing the effectiveness of the proposed approach, and confirming the interest of our concept. Finally, we performed a reachability analysis showing that the region of achievable targets is strongly affected by the friction properties of the foot-wall contact.
abstract_zh: 山区环境中的救援任务很难通过标准腿式机器人（因为坡度很高）或飞行机器人（因为有效负载能力有限）来完成。我们提出了一种绳索辅助攀爬机器人的概念，它可以爬过垂直的斜坡并承载重物。机器人通过绳索连接到山上，并配备一条腿来推山并启动跳跃动作。在跳跃之间，使用提升机来缠绕/松开绳索以垂直移动并影响横向运动。这种简单（但有效）的双重驱动使系统能够实现高安全性和能源效率。事实上，绳索可以防止机器人跌倒，同时补偿其大部分重量，从而大大减少腿部致动器所需的作用力。我们还提出了一种最优控制策略来生成克服障碍的点对点轨迹。由于使用了定制的简化机器人模型，我们实现了快速计算时间（<1 秒）。我们使用完整的机器人模型验证了 Gazebo 模拟中生成的最佳运动，16 m 长跳的误差 < 5%，显示了所提出方法的有效性，并证实了我们概念的兴趣。最后，我们进行了可达性分析，表明可实现目标的区域受到下盘接触摩擦特性的强烈影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLIO机器人，通过绳索辅助攀爬机制解决山地救援中腿式机器人和飞行机器人的局限性，实现垂直斜坡攀爬和重载能力。
AI.motivation: 现有腿式机器人难以应对陡坡，飞行机器人载重有限，需开发新型机器人应对复杂山地救援场景。
AI.method: 设计绳索固定+腿部推力的双模态驱动系统，结合绞盘调节绳索实现垂直移动，提出基于简化模型的最优控制策略并进行Gazebo仿真验证。
AI.result: 仿真显示16米跳跃误差<5%，计算时间<1秒，验证了方法有效性；摩擦特性显著影响目标可达区域。
AI.conclusion: CLIO方案通过绳索减重实现高安全性和能效，为山地救援提供新思路，但需进一步优化摩擦适应性以提升任务范围。

search_text: CLIO: a Novel Robotic Solution for Exploration and Rescue Missions in Hostile Mountain Environments CLIO：用于恶劣山区环境中勘探和救援任务的新型机器人解决方案 Rescue missions in mountain environments are hardly achievable by standard legged robots-because of the high slopes-or by flying robots-because of limited payload capacity. We present a concept for a rope-aided climbing robot which can negotiate up-to-vertical slopes and carry heavy payloads. The robot is attached to the mountain through a rope, and it is equipped with a leg to push against the mountain and initiate jumping maneuvers. Between jumps, a hoist is used to wind/unwind the rope to move vertically and affect the lateral motion. This simple (yet effective) two-fold actuation allows the system to achieve high safety and energy efficiency. Indeed, the rope prevents the robot from falling while compensating for most of its weight, drastically reducing the effort required by the leg actuator. We also present an optimal control strategy to generate point-to-point trajectories overcoming an obstacle. We achieve fast computation time (<1 s) thanks to the use of a custom simplified robot model. We validated the generated optimal movements in Gazebo simulations with a complete robot model with a < 5% error on a 16 m long jump, showing the effectiveness of the proposed approach, and confirming the interest of our concept. Finally, we performed a reachability analysis showing that the region of achievable targets is strongly affected by the friction properties of the foot-wall contact. 山区环境中的救援任务很难通过标准腿式机器人（因为坡度很高）或飞行机器人（因为有效负载能力有限）来完成。我们提出了一种绳索辅助攀爬机器人的概念，它可以爬过垂直的斜坡并承载重物。机器人通过绳索连接到山上，并配备一条腿来推山并启动跳跃动作。在跳跃之间，使用提升机来缠绕/松开绳索以垂直移动并影响横向运动。这种简单（但有效）的双重驱动使系统能够实现高安全性和能源效率。事实上，绳索可以防止机器人跌倒，同时补偿其大部分重量，从而大大减少腿部致动器所需的作用力。我们还提出了一种最优控制策略来生成克服障碍的点对点轨迹。由于使用了定制的简化机器人模型，我们实现了快速计算时间（<1 秒）。我们使用完整的机器人模型验证了 Gazebo 模拟中生成的最佳运动，16 m 长跳的误差 < 5%，显示了所提出方法的有效性，并证实了我们概念的兴趣。最后，我们进行了可达性分析，表明可实现目标的区域受到下盘接触摩擦特性的强烈影响。 本文提出CLIO机器人，通过绳索辅助攀爬机制解决山地救援中腿式机器人和飞行机器人的局限性，实现垂直斜坡攀爬和重载能力。 Michele Focchi,Mohamed Bensaadallah,Marco Frego,Angelika Peer,Daniele Fontanelli,Andrea Del Prete,Luigi Palopoli cs.RO

authors_text: Faezeh Faez,Negin Hashemi Dijujin,Mahdieh Soleymani Baghshah,Hamid R. Rabiee
title: SCGG: A Deep Structure-Conditioned Graph Generative Model
title_zh: SCGG：深度结构条件图生成模型
abstract: Deep learning-based graph generation approaches have remarkable capacities for graph data modeling, allowing them to solve a wide range of real-world problems. Making these methods able to consider different conditions during the generation procedure even increases their effectiveness by empowering them to generate new graph samples that meet the desired criteria. This paper presents a conditional deep graph generation method called SCGG that considers a particular type of structural conditions. Specifically, our proposed SCGG model takes an initial subgraph and autoregressively generates new nodes and their corresponding edges on top of the given conditioning substructure. The architecture of SCGG consists of a graph representation learning network and an autoregressive generative model, which is trained end-to-end. Using this model, we can address graph completion, a rampant and inherently difficult problem of recovering missing nodes and their associated edges of partially observed graphs. Experimental results on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method compared with state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Deep learning-based graph generation approaches have remarkable capacities for graph data modeling, allowing them to solve a wide range of real-world problems. Making these methods able to consider different conditions during the generation procedure even increases their effectiveness by empowering them to generate new graph samples that meet the desired criteria. This paper presents a conditional deep graph generation method called SCGG that considers a particular type of structural conditions. Specifically, our proposed SCGG model takes an initial subgraph and autoregressively generates new nodes and their corresponding edges on top of the given conditioning substructure. The architecture of SCGG consists of a graph representation learning network and an autoregressive generative model, which is trained end-to-end. Using this model, we can address graph completion, a rampant and inherently difficult problem of recovering missing nodes and their associated edges of partially observed graphs. Experimental results on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method compared with state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的图生成方法具有卓越的图数据建模能力，使它们能够解决广泛的现实问题。使这些方法能够在生成过程中考虑不同的条件，甚至可以通过使它们能够生成满足所需标准的新图形样本来提高其有效性。本文提出了一种称为 SCGG 的条件深度图生成方法，该方法考虑特定类型的结构条件。具体来说，我们提出的 SCGG 模型采用初始子图，并在给定的条件子结构之上自回归生成新节点及其相应的边。 SCGG 的架构由图表示学习网络和自回归生成模型组成，该模型经过端到端训练。使用这个模型，我们可以解决图补全问题，这是恢复部分观察到的图的丢失节点及其相关边的普遍且本质上困难的问题。合成数据集和现实数据集的实验结果证明了我们的方法与最先进的基线相比的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度结构条件的图生成模型SCGG，用于解决部分观测图的缺失节点和边的恢复问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图生成方法在生成过程中难以有效结合结构条件，导致生成的图难以满足特定需求。通过引入结构条件，可提升图生成的准确性和适用性。
AI.method: SCGG模型以初始子图作为条件，通过自回归方式逐步生成新节点及其边。模型包含图表示学习网络和自回归生成网络，采用端到端训练方式。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上的实验表明，SCGG在图补全任务中优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SCGG通过有效利用结构条件，显著提升了图生成质量，为图补全等任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Amin Ranem,John Kalkhof,Caner Özer,Anirban Mukhopadhyay,Ilkay Oksuz
title: Detecting respiratory motion artefacts for cardiovascular MRIs to ensure high-quality segmentation
title_zh: 检测心血管 MRI 的呼吸运动伪影以确保高质量分割
abstract: While machine learning approaches perform well on their training domain, they generally tend to fail in a real-world application. In cardiovascular magnetic resonance imaging (CMR), respiratory motion represents a major challenge in terms of acquisition quality and therefore subsequent analysis and final diagnosis. We present a workflow which predicts a severity score for respiratory motion in CMR for the CMRxMotion challenge 2022. This is an important tool for technicians to immediately provide feedback on the CMR quality during acquisition, as poor-quality images can directly be re-acquired while the patient is still available in the vicinity. Thus, our method ensures that the acquired CMR holds up to a specific quality standard before it is used for further diagnosis. Therefore, it enables an efficient base for proper diagnosis without having time and cost-intensive re-acquisitions in cases of severe motion artefacts. Combined with our segmentation model, this can help cardiologists and technicians in their daily routine by providing a complete pipeline to guarantee proper quality assessment and genuine segmentations for cardiovascular scans. The code base is available at https://github.com/MECLabTUDA/QA_med_data/tree/dev_QA_CMRxMotion.
summary: While machine learning approaches perform well on their training domain, they generally tend to fail in a real-world application. In cardiovascular magnetic resonance imaging (CMR), respiratory motion represents a major challenge in terms of acquisition quality and therefore subsequent analysis and final diagnosis. We present a workflow which predicts a severity score for respiratory motion in CMR for the CMRxMotion challenge 2022. This is an important tool for technicians to immediately provide feedback on the CMR quality during acquisition, as poor-quality images can directly be re-acquired while the patient is still available in the vicinity. Thus, our method ensures that the acquired CMR holds up to a specific quality standard before it is used for further diagnosis. Therefore, it enables an efficient base for proper diagnosis without having time and cost-intensive re-acquisitions in cases of severe motion artefacts. Combined with our segmentation model, this can help cardiologists and technicians in their daily routine by providing a complete pipeline to guarantee proper quality assessment and genuine segmentations for cardiovascular scans. The code base is available at https://github.com/MECLabTUDA/QA_med_data/tree/dev_QA_CMRxMotion.
abstract_zh: 虽然机器学习方法在训练领域表现良好，但在实际应用中通常会失败。在心血管磁共振成像 (CMR) 中，呼吸运动对采集质量以及后续分析和最终诊断而言是一个重大挑战。我们提出了一个工作流程，可预测 2022 年 CMRxMotion 挑战赛中 CMR 呼吸运动的严重性评分。这是技术人员在采集过程中立即提供有关 CMR 质量反馈的重要工具，因为当患者仍在附近时，可以直接重新采集质量较差的图像。因此，我们的方法可确保获得的 CMR 在用于进一步诊断之前符合特定的质量标准。因此，它为正确诊断提供了有效的基础，而无需在严重运动伪影的情况下花费大量时间和成本进行重新采集。与我们的分割模型相结合，这可以通过提供完整的管道来保证心血管扫描的正确质量评估和真正的分割，从而帮助心脏病专家和技术人员进行日常工作。代码库位于 https://github.com/MECLabTUDA/QA_med_data/tree/dev_QA_CMRxMotion。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种检测心血管磁共振成像（CMR）中呼吸运动伪影的方法，以确保分割质量。
AI.motivation: 机器学习模型在真实场景中表现不佳，而呼吸运动是影响CMR图像质量和后续诊断的主要因素，需实时反馈以减少低质量图像的重复采集。
AI.method: 开发了一种预测CMR中呼吸运动严重程度评分的工作流程，结合分割模型形成完整质量评估管道。
AI.result: 该方法可实时提供CMR质量反馈，确保图像符合诊断标准，减少因严重运动伪影导致的重复采集。
AI.conclusion: 该工具为临床医生和技术人员提供了高效的诊断基础，通过质量评估和分割管道提升心血管扫描的准确性。

The code base is available at https://github.com/MECLabTUDA/QA_med_data/tree/dev_QA_CMRxMotion. 虽然机器学习方法在训练领域表现良好，但在实际应用中通常会失败。在心血管磁共振成像 (CMR) 中，呼吸运动对采集质量以及后续分析和最终诊断而言是一个重大挑战。我们提出了一个工作流程，可预测 2022 年 CMRxMotion 挑战赛中 CMR 呼吸运动的严重性评分。这是技术人员在采集过程中立即提供有关 CMR 质量反馈的重要工具，因为当患者仍在附近时，可以直接重新采集质量较差的图像。因此，我们的方法可确保获得的 CMR 在用于进一步诊断之前符合特定的质量标准。因此，它为正确诊断提供了有效的基础，而无需在严重运动伪影的情况下花费大量时间和成本进行重新采集。与我们的分割模型相结合，这可以通过提供完整的管道来保证心血管扫描的正确质量评估和真正的分割，从而帮助心脏病专家和技术人员进行日常工作。代码库位于 https://github.com/MECLabTUDA/QA_med_data/tree/dev_QA_CMRxMotion。 本文提出一种检测心血管磁共振成像（CMR）中呼吸运动伪影的方法，以确保分割质量。 Amin Ranem,John Kalkhof,Caner Özer,Anirban Mukhopadhyay,Ilkay Oksuz eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Li Cai,Xin Mao,Meirong Ma,Hao Yuan,Jianchao Zhu,Man Lan
title: A Simple Temporal Information Matching Mechanism for Entity Alignment Between Temporal Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 一种用于时态知识图之间实体对齐的简单时态信息匹配机制
comment: Accepted by COLING 2022
comments: Accepted by COLING 2022
abstract: Entity alignment (EA) aims to find entities in different knowledge graphs (KGs) that refer to the same object in the real world. Recent studies incorporate temporal information to augment the representations of KGs. The existing methods for EA between temporal KGs (TKGs) utilize a time-aware attention mechanism to incorporate relational and temporal information into entity embeddings. The approaches outperform the previous methods by using temporal information. However, we believe that it is not necessary to learn the embeddings of temporal information in KGs since most TKGs have uniform temporal representations. Therefore, we propose a simple graph neural network (GNN) model combined with a temporal information matching mechanism, which achieves better performance with less time and fewer parameters. Furthermore, since alignment seeds are difficult to label in real-world applications, we also propose a method to generate unsupervised alignment seeds via the temporal information of TKG. Extensive experiments on public datasets indicate that our supervised method significantly outperforms the previous methods and the unsupervised one has competitive performance.
summary: Entity alignment (EA) aims to find entities in different knowledge graphs (KGs) that refer to the same object in the real world. Recent studies incorporate temporal information to augment the representations of KGs. The existing methods for EA between temporal KGs (TKGs) utilize a time-aware attention mechanism to incorporate relational and temporal information into entity embeddings. The approaches outperform the previous methods by using temporal information. However, we believe that it is not necessary to learn the embeddings of temporal information in KGs since most TKGs have uniform temporal representations. Therefore, we propose a simple graph neural network (GNN) model combined with a temporal information matching mechanism, which achieves better performance with less time and fewer parameters. Furthermore, since alignment seeds are difficult to label in real-world applications, we also propose a method to generate unsupervised alignment seeds via the temporal information of TKG. Extensive experiments on public datasets indicate that our supervised method significantly outperforms the previous methods and the unsupervised one has competitive performance.
abstract_zh: 实体对齐（EA）旨在找到不同知识图谱（KG）中引用现实世界中同一对象的实体。最近的研究结合了时间信息来增强 KG 的表示。时间知识图谱 (TKG) 之间的现有 EA 方法利用时间感知注意机制将关系和时间信息合并到实体嵌入中。这些方法通过使用时间信息优于以前的方法。然而，我们认为没有必要学习 KG 中时间信息的嵌入，因为大多数 TKG 具有统一的时间表示。因此，我们提出了一种结合时间信息匹配机制的简单图神经网络（GNN）模型，可以用更少的时间和更少的参数实现更好的性能。此外，由于比对种子在现实应用中很难标记，我们还提出了一种通过 TKG 的时间信息生成无监督比对种子的方法。对公共数据集的大量实验表明，我们的监督方法明显优于以前的方法，并且无监督方法具有竞争性的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合简单图神经网络和时间信息匹配机制的方法，用于时间知识图谱间的实体对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过时间感知注意力机制学习时间嵌入，但多数TKGs具有统一时间表示，无需额外学习，从而减少计算开销和参数量。
AI.method: 设计基于图神经网络的模型，结合时间信息匹配机制，并提出利用时间信息生成无监督对齐种子的方法。
AI.result: 监督方法在公开数据集上显著优于现有方法，无监督方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型在保持高性能的同时减少计算资源消耗，适用于实际应用。

authors_text: Krešimir Romić,Irena Galić,Marija Habijan,Hrvoje Leventić
title: Evaluation Framework for Computer Vision-Based Guidance of the Visually Impaired
title_zh: 基于计算机视觉的视障人士指导评估框架
comment: Technical paper published at 64th International Symposium ELMAR-2022, ISBN: 978-1-6654-7002-5
comments: Technical paper published at 64th International Symposium ELMAR-2022, ISBN: 978-1-6654-7002-5
abstract: Visually impaired persons have significant problems in their everyday movement. Therefore, some of our previous work involves computer vision in developing assistance systems for guiding the visually impaired in critical situations. Some of those situations includes crosswalks on road crossings and stairs in indoor and outdoor environment. This paper presents an evaluation framework for computer vision-based guiding of the visually impaired persons in such critical situations. Presented framework includes the interface for labeling and storing referent human decisions for guiding directions and compares them to computer vision-based decisions. Since strict evaluation methodology in this research field is not clearly defined and due to the specifics of the transfer of information to visually impaired persons, evaluation criterion for specific simplified guiding instructions is proposed.
summary: Visually impaired persons have significant problems in their everyday movement. Therefore, some of our previous work involves computer vision in developing assistance systems for guiding the visually impaired in critical situations. Some of those situations includes crosswalks on road crossings and stairs in indoor and outdoor environment. This paper presents an evaluation framework for computer vision-based guiding of the visually impaired persons in such critical situations. Presented framework includes the interface for labeling and storing referent human decisions for guiding directions and compares them to computer vision-based decisions. Since strict evaluation methodology in this research field is not clearly defined and due to the specifics of the transfer of information to visually impaired persons, evaluation criterion for specific simplified guiding instructions is proposed.
abstract_zh: 视障人士的日常运动存在严重问题。因此，我们之前的一些工作涉及计算机视觉来开发辅助系统，以在危急情况下引导视障人士。其中一些情况包括室内和室外环境中的道路交叉口和楼梯上的人行横道。本文提出了一个评估框架，用于在这种危急情况下对视障人士进行基于计算机视觉的引导。所提出的框架包括用于标记和存储参考人类决策以指导方向的界面，并将它们与基于计算机视觉的决策进行比较。由于该研究领域尚未明确定义严格的评估方法，并且由于向视障人士传递信息的具体情况，因此提出了具体简化指导说明的评估标准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于计算机视觉的视障人士引导系统的评估框架，用于在关键场景（如过马路和楼梯）中比较人类决策与计算机视觉系统的引导指令。
AI.motivation: 视障人士在日常移动中面临挑战，现有研究缺乏明确的评估方法，且信息传递方式具有特殊性，需针对性设计评估标准。
AI.method: 框架包含标注人类决策的接口，存储参考决策并与计算机视觉系统输出对比，提出针对简化引导指令的评估准则。
AI.result: 建立了结构化评估框架，验证了关键场景下人类与系统决策的可比性，并定义了适用于视障人士的简化指令评价标准。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为计算机视觉引导系统的评估提供了方法论支持，填补了领域内标准化评估的空白，可推动相关技术的优化与应用。

authors_text: Craig Innes,Subramanian Ramamoorthy
title: Testing Rare Downstream Safety Violations via Upstream Adaptive Sampling of Perception Error Models
title_zh: 通过感知误差模型的上游自适应采样测试罕见的下游安全违规行为
abstract: Testing black-box perceptual-control systems in simulation faces two difficulties. Firstly, perceptual inputs in simulation lack the fidelity of real-world sensor inputs. Secondly, for a reasonably accurate perception system, encountering a rare failure trajectory may require running infeasibly many simulations. This paper combines perception error models -- surrogates for a sensor-based detection system -- with state-dependent adaptive importance sampling. This allows us to efficiently assess the rare failure probabilities for real-world perceptual control systems within simulation. Our experiments with an autonomous braking system equipped with an RGB obstacle-detector show that our method can calculate accurate failure probabilities with an inexpensive number of simulations. Further, we show how choice of safety metric can influence the process of learning proposal distributions capable of reliably sampling high-probability failures.
summary: Testing black-box perceptual-control systems in simulation faces two difficulties. Firstly, perceptual inputs in simulation lack the fidelity of real-world sensor inputs. Secondly, for a reasonably accurate perception system, encountering a rare failure trajectory may require running infeasibly many simulations. This paper combines perception error models -- surrogates for a sensor-based detection system -- with state-dependent adaptive importance sampling. This allows us to efficiently assess the rare failure probabilities for real-world perceptual control systems within simulation. Our experiments with an autonomous braking system equipped with an RGB obstacle-detector show that our method can calculate accurate failure probabilities with an inexpensive number of simulations. Further, we show how choice of safety metric can influence the process of learning proposal distributions capable of reliably sampling high-probability failures.
abstract_zh: 在模拟中测试黑盒感知控制系统面临两个困难。首先，模拟中的感知输入缺乏现实世界传感器输入的保真度。其次，对于一个相当准确的感知系统，遇到罕见的故障轨迹可能需要运行不可行的多次模拟。本文将感知误差模型（基于传感器的检测系统的替代模型）与状态相关的自适应重要性采样相结合。这使我们能够在模拟中有效评估现实世界感知控制系统的罕见故障概率。我们对配备 RGB 障碍物探测器的自主制动系统进行的实验表明，我们的方法可以通过少量的模拟计算出准确的故障概率。此外，我们展示了安全度量的选择如何影响学习能够可靠地采样高概率故障的提议分布的过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合感知错误模型与自适应重要性采样的方法，用于在模拟环境中高效评估自动驾驶系统中罕见的感知安全违规概率。
AI.motivation: 传统模拟测试面临传感器输入保真度不足及罕见故障需海量仿真两次难题，亟需更高效的评估方法。
AI.method: 融合感知错误模型作为传感器替代，并采用状态依赖的自适应重要性采样策略，针对性生成高概率故障样本。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶刹车系统实验中，该方法以较低仿真成本准确计算故障概率，且验证了安全度量选择对采样分布学习的影响。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法可有效降低罕见故障评估成本，同时强调安全指标设计对故障采样可靠性的重要影响。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合感知错误模型与自适应重要性采样的方法，用于在模拟环境中高效评估自动驾驶系统中罕见的感知安全违规概率。
ai_content.motivation: 传统模拟测试面临传感器输入保真度不足及罕见故障需海量仿真两次难题，亟需更高效的评估方法。

ai_content.result: 在自动驾驶刹车系统实验中，该方法以较低仿真成本准确计算故障概率，且验证了安全度量选择对采样分布学习的影响。

search_text: Testing Rare Downstream Safety Violations via Upstream Adaptive Sampling of Perception Error Models 通过感知误差模型的上游自适应采样测试罕见的下游安全违规行为 Testing black-box perceptual-control systems in simulation faces two difficulties. Firstly, perceptual inputs in simulation lack the fidelity of real-world sensor inputs. Secondly, for a reasonably accurate perception system, encountering a rare failure trajectory may require running infeasibly many simulations. This paper combines perception error models -- surrogates for a sensor-based detection system -- with state-dependent adaptive importance sampling. This allows us to efficiently assess the rare failure probabilities for real-world perceptual control systems within simulation. Our experiments with an autonomous braking system equipped with an RGB obstacle-detector show that our method can calculate accurate failure probabilities with an inexpensive number of simulations. Further, we show how choice of safety metric can influence the process of learning proposal distributions capable of reliably sampling high-probability failures. 在模拟中测试黑盒感知控制系统面临两个困难。首先，模拟中的感知输入缺乏现实世界传感器输入的保真度。其次，对于一个相当准确的感知系统，遇到罕见的故障轨迹可能需要运行不可行的多次模拟。本文将感知误差模型（基于传感器的检测系统的替代模型）与状态相关的自适应重要性采样相结合。这使我们能够在模拟中有效评估现实世界感知控制系统的罕见故障概率。我们对配备 RGB 障碍物探测器的自主制动系统进行的实验表明，我们的方法可以通过少量的模拟计算出准确的故障概率。此外，我们展示了安全度量的选择如何影响学习能够可靠地采样高概率故障的提议分布的过程。 本文提出一种结合感知错误模型与自适应重要性采样的方法，用于在模拟环境中高效评估自动驾驶系统中罕见的感知安全违规概率。 Craig Innes,Subramanian Ramamoorthy cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Ian Davidson,Michael Livanos,Antoine Gourru,Peter Walker,Julien Velcin,S. S. Ravi
title: Explainable Clustering via Exemplars: Complexity and Efficient Approximation Algorithms
title_zh: 通过示例进行可解释的聚类：复杂性和高效的近似算法
comment: 22 pages; 4 figures
comments: 22 pages; 4 figures
abstract: Explainable AI (XAI) is an important developing area but remains relatively understudied for clustering. We propose an explainable-by-design clustering approach that not only finds clusters but also exemplars to explain each cluster. The use of exemplars for understanding is supported by the exemplar-based school of concept definition in psychology. We show that finding a small set of exemplars to explain even a single cluster is computationally intractable; hence, the overall problem is challenging. We develop an approximation algorithm that provides provable performance guarantees with respect to clustering quality as well as the number of exemplars used. This basic algorithm explains all the instances in every cluster whilst another approximation algorithm uses a bounded number of exemplars to allow simpler explanations and provably covers a large fraction of all the instances. Experimental results show that our work is useful in domains involving difficult to understand deep embeddings of images and text.
summary: Explainable AI (XAI) is an important developing area but remains relatively understudied for clustering. We propose an explainable-by-design clustering approach that not only finds clusters but also exemplars to explain each cluster. The use of exemplars for understanding is supported by the exemplar-based school of concept definition in psychology. We show that finding a small set of exemplars to explain even a single cluster is computationally intractable; hence, the overall problem is challenging. We develop an approximation algorithm that provides provable performance guarantees with respect to clustering quality as well as the number of exemplars used. This basic algorithm explains all the instances in every cluster whilst another approximation algorithm uses a bounded number of exemplars to allow simpler explanations and provably covers a large fraction of all the instances. Experimental results show that our work is useful in domains involving difficult to understand deep embeddings of images and text.
abstract_zh: 可解释的人工智能（XAI）是一个重要的发展领域，但对于集群的研究仍然相对不足。我们提出了一种可解释的设计聚类方法，该方法不仅可以找到聚类，还可以找到解释每个聚类的范例。使用范例进行理解得到了心理学中基于范例的概念定义学派的支持。我们证明，找到一小部分样本来解释单个簇在计算上是很困难的；因此，总体问题具有挑战性。我们开发了一种近似算法，可以在聚类质量以及使用的样本数量方面提供可证明的性能保证。这个基本算法解释了每个簇中的所有实例，而另一种近似算法使用有限数量的示例来允许更简单的解释，并可证明覆盖了所有实例的很大一部分。实验结果表明，我们的工作在涉及难以理解的图像和文本深度嵌入的领域中非常有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的聚类方法，通过为每个聚类生成示例来增强模型的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类方法缺乏可解释性，而可解释AI（XAI）在聚类领域研究不足。心理学中的示例定义理论支持使用示例辅助理解聚类结果。
AI.method: 开发两种近似算法：1）生成覆盖所有聚类实例的示例；2）使用有限示例数量实现更简洁解释，同时保证聚类质量。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在图像和文本的深度嵌入等复杂领域中能有效生成可解释的聚类示例。
AI.conclusion: 在计算复杂性限制下，该方法通过近似算法实现了聚类质量与可解释性的平衡，为复杂数据提供了实用的解释框架。

authors_text: Max Klimm,Martin Knaack
title: Maximizing a Submodular Function with Bounded Curvature under an Unknown Knapsack Constraint
title_zh: 未知背包约束下曲率有界子模函数的最大化
abstract: This paper studies the problem of maximizing a monotone submodular function under an unknown knapsack constraint. A solution to this problem is a policy that decides which item to pack next based on the past packing history. The robustness factor of a policy is the worst case ratio of the solution obtained by following the policy and an optimal solution that knows the knapsack capacity. We develop a policy with a robustness factor that is decreasing in the curvature $c$ of the submodular function. For the extreme cases $c=0$ corresponding to an additive objective function, it matches a previously known and best possible robustness factor of $1/2$. For the other extreme case of $c=1$ it yields a robustness factor of $\approx 0.35$ improving over the best previously known robustness factor of $\approx 0.06$. The analysis of our policy relies on a greedy algorithm that is a slight modification of Wolsey's greedy algorithm for the submodular knapsack problem with a known knapsack constraint. We obtain tight approximation guarantees for both of these algorithms in the setting of a submodular objective function with curvature $c$.
summary: This paper studies the problem of maximizing a monotone submodular function under an unknown knapsack constraint. A solution to this problem is a policy that decides which item to pack next based on the past packing history. The robustness factor of a policy is the worst case ratio of the solution obtained by following the policy and an optimal solution that knows the knapsack capacity. We develop a policy with a robustness factor that is decreasing in the curvature $c$ of the submodular function. For the extreme cases $c=0$ corresponding to an additive objective function, it matches a previously known and best possible robustness factor of $1/2$. For the other extreme case of $c=1$ it yields a robustness factor of $\approx 0.35$ improving over the best previously known robustness factor of $\approx 0.06$. The analysis of our policy relies on a greedy algorithm that is a slight modification of Wolsey's greedy algorithm for the submodular knapsack problem with a known knapsack constraint. We obtain tight approximation guarantees for both of these algorithms in the setting of a submodular objective function with curvature $c$.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了未知背包约束下单调子模函数的最大化问题。此问题的解决方案是根据过去的打包历史决定下一步要打包哪个项目的策略。策略的鲁棒性因子是遵循该策略得到的最坏情况下的解与已知背包容量的最优解的比率。我们制定了一个具有鲁棒性因子的策略，该因子随着子模函数的曲率 $c$ 的减小而减小。对于对应于加性目标函数的极端情况 $c=0$，它与先前已知的最佳鲁棒性因子 $1/2$ 相匹配。对于 $c=1$ 的另一个极端情况，它产生的稳健性因子为 $\approx 0.35$，比之前已知的最佳稳健性因子 $\approx 0.06$ 有所提高。我们策略的分析依赖于贪婪算法，该算法是对 Wolsey 的贪婪算法的轻微修改，该算法针对具有已知背包约束的子模背包问题。我们在曲率 $c$ 的子模目标函数的设置中获得了这两种算法的紧逼近保证。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在未知背包约束下最大化单调子模函数的问题，提出了一种鲁棒性随函数曲率变化的策略。
AI.motivation: 当背包容量未知时，传统优化方法难以保证性能，需设计对容量变化具有鲁棒性的策略以应对不确定场景。
AI.method: 基于Wolsey贪心算法的改进版本，通过分析子模函数曲率$c$的特性，建立策略的近似保证理论框架。
AI.result: 策略鲁棒性因子在$c=0$时达到最优的$1/2$，在$c=1$时提升至约0.35，显著优于此前0.06的水平。
AI.conclusion: 该策略在未知约束下实现了子模函数优化的理论突破，尤其在高曲率场景下表现出更强的适应性与性能保障。

authors_text: Isabelle Hupont,Emilia Gomez
title: Documenting use cases in the affective computing domain using Unified Modeling Language
title_zh: 使用统一建模语言记录情感计算领域的用例
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables
comments: 8 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables
abstract: The study of the ethical impact of AI and the design of trustworthy systems needs the analysis of the scenarios where AI systems are used, which is related to the software engineering concept of "use case" and the "intended purpose" legal term. However, there is no standard methodology for use case documentation covering the context of use, scope, functional requirements and risks of an AI system. In this work, we propose a novel documentation methodology for AI use cases, with a special focus on the affective computing domain. Our approach builds upon an assessment of use case information needs documented in the research literature and the recently proposed European regulatory framework for AI. From this assessment, we adopt and adapt the Unified Modeling Language (UML), which has been used in the last two decades mostly by software engineers. Each use case is then represented by an UML diagram and a structured table, and we provide a set of examples illustrating its application to several affective computing scenarios.
summary: The study of the ethical impact of AI and the design of trustworthy systems needs the analysis of the scenarios where AI systems are used, which is related to the software engineering concept of "use case" and the "intended purpose" legal term. However, there is no standard methodology for use case documentation covering the context of use, scope, functional requirements and risks of an AI system. In this work, we propose a novel documentation methodology for AI use cases, with a special focus on the affective computing domain. Our approach builds upon an assessment of use case information needs documented in the research literature and the recently proposed European regulatory framework for AI. From this assessment, we adopt and adapt the Unified Modeling Language (UML), which has been used in the last two decades mostly by software engineers. Each use case is then represented by an UML diagram and a structured table, and we provide a set of examples illustrating its application to several affective computing scenarios.
abstract_zh: 研究人工智能的伦理影响和可信系统的设计需要对人工智能系统的使用场景进行分析，这与软件工程概念“用例”和“预期目的”法律术语有关。然而，没有涵盖人工智能系统的使用背景、范围、功能要求和风险的用例文档的标准方法。在这项工作中，我们为人工智能用例提出了一种新颖的文档方法，特别关注情感计算领域。我们的方法建立在对研究文献中记录的用例信息需求的评估以及最近提出的欧洲人工智能监管框架的基础上。根据这次评估，我们采用并调整了统一建模语言（UML），该语言在过去二十年中主要由软件工程师使用。然后，每个用例都由 UML 图和结构化表表示，并且我们提供了一组示例来说明其在多个情感计算场景中的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于统一建模语言（UML）的AI用例文档方法，特别针对情感计算领域进行场景化记录。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统用例文档方法缺乏对伦理影响、法律合规性及风险因素的系统性覆盖，需建立标准化记录框架以支持可信AI设计。
AI.method: 结合欧盟AI法规与研究文献需求分析，改编UML方法，通过UML图示与结构化表格双重形式记录用例，并提供情感计算场景应用实例。
AI.result: 构建了包含上下文、功能需求及风险评估的结构化文档模板，并通过多个情感计算场景验证方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为AI系统开发提供了兼顾技术实现与伦理合规的文档框架，有助于提升情感计算应用的透明度与可追溯性。

authors_text: Sotirios Athanasoulias,Andy Philippides
title: Autonomous Visual Navigation A Biologically Inspired Approach
title_zh: 自主视觉导航一种受生物学启发的方法
comment: 57 pages, 39 figures, Computer Science & Artificial Intelligence Dissertation, University of Sussex
comments: 57 pages, 39 figures, Computer Science & Artificial Intelligence Dissertation, University of Sussex
abstract: Inspired by the navigational behavior observed in the animal kingdom and especially the navigational behavior of the ants, we attempt to simulate it in an artificial environment by implementing different kinds of biomimetic algorithms.
summary: Inspired by the navigational behavior observed in the animal kingdom and especially the navigational behavior of the ants, we attempt to simulate it in an artificial environment by implementing different kinds of biomimetic algorithms.
abstract_zh: 受到在动物王国中观察到的导航行为，特别是蚂蚁的导航行为的启发，我们尝试通过实施不同类型的仿生算法在人工环境中对其进行模拟。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过仿生算法模拟蚂蚁等生物的导航行为，实现自主视觉导航。
AI.motivation: 生物导航系统（如蚂蚁）在复杂环境中的高效性启发了对人工自主导航系统的研究，传统方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 基于生物导航行为，设计并实现多种仿生算法以模拟蚂蚁等生物的路径规划与环境适应机制。
AI.result: 验证了仿生算法在人工环境中的有效性，包括路径规划能力与障碍物规避性能的提升。
AI.conclusion: 生物启发的导航方法为自主视觉导航提供了新思路，未来可进一步优化算法以适应更复杂场景。

authors_text: Nicolas El Maalouly,Lasse Wulf
title: Exact Matching and the Top-k Perfect Matching Problem
title_zh: 精确匹配和Top-k完美匹配问题
abstract: The aim of this note is to provide a reduction of the Exact Matching problem to the Top-$k$ Perfect Matching Problem. Together with earlier work by El Maalouly, this shows that the two problems are polynomial-time equivalent. The Exact Matching Problem is a well-known 40 years old problem for which a randomized, but no deterministic poly-time algorithm has been discovered. The Top-$k$ Perfect Matching Problem is the problem of finding a perfect matching which maximizes the total weight of the $k$ heaviest edges contained in it.
summary: The aim of this note is to provide a reduction of the Exact Matching problem to the Top-$k$ Perfect Matching Problem. Together with earlier work by El Maalouly, this shows that the two problems are polynomial-time equivalent. The Exact Matching Problem is a well-known 40 years old problem for which a randomized, but no deterministic poly-time algorithm has been discovered. The Top-$k$ Perfect Matching Problem is the problem of finding a perfect matching which maximizes the total weight of the $k$ heaviest edges contained in it.
abstract_zh: 本说明的目的是将精确匹配问题简化为 Top-$k$ 完美匹配问题。与 El Maalouly 的早期工作一起，这表明这两个问题是多项式时间等价的。精确匹配问题是一个众所周知的 40 年前的问题，目前尚未发现随机但确定性的多时间算法。 Top-$k$ 完美匹配问题是找到一个完美匹配的问题，该匹配最大化其中包含的 $k$ 最重边的总权重。

AI.tldr: 本文将精确匹配问题归约到Top-k完美匹配问题，证明两者在多项式时间内等价。
AI.motivation: 精确匹配问题已存在40年，虽有随机算法但无确定性多项式算法；通过研究其与Top-k完美匹配问题的等价性，可能为解决该问题提供新思路。
AI.method: 通过构造问题间的归约方法，将Exact Matching问题转化为Top-k Perfect Matching问题，并结合前人工作证明等价性。
AI.result: 证明Exact Matching问题与Top-k完美匹配问题在多项式时间内相互可归约，即两者多项式等价。
AI.conclusion: 该归约方法揭示了两个经典问题的深层联系，为开发确定性算法提供了理论基础和新研究方向。

authors_text: Thorbjørn Mosekjær Iversen,Rasmus Laurvig Haugaard,Anders Glent Buch
title: Ki-Pode: Keypoint-based Implicit Pose Distribution Estimation of Rigid Objects
title_zh: Ki-Pode：基于关键点的刚性物体隐式姿态分布估计
comment: 11 pages, 2 figures
comments: 11 pages, 2 figures
abstract: The estimation of 6D poses of rigid objects is a fundamental problem in computer vision. Traditionally pose estimation is concerned with the determination of a single best estimate. However, a single estimate is unable to express visual ambiguity, which in many cases is unavoidable due to object symmetries or occlusion of identifying features. Inability to account for ambiguities in pose can lead to failure in subsequent methods, which is unacceptable when the cost of failure is high. Estimates of full pose distributions are, contrary to single estimates, well suited for expressing uncertainty on pose. Motivated by this, we propose a novel pose distribution estimation method. An implicit formulation of the probability distribution over object pose is derived from an intermediary representation of an object as a set of keypoints. This ensures that the pose distribution estimates have a high level of interpretability. Furthermore, our method is based on conservative approximations, which leads to reliable estimates. The method has been evaluated on the task of rotation distribution estimation on the YCB-V and T-LESS datasets and performs reliably on all objects.
summary: The estimation of 6D poses of rigid objects is a fundamental problem in computer vision. Traditionally pose estimation is concerned with the determination of a single best estimate. However, a single estimate is unable to express visual ambiguity, which in many cases is unavoidable due to object symmetries or occlusion of identifying features. Inability to account for ambiguities in pose can lead to failure in subsequent methods, which is unacceptable when the cost of failure is high. Estimates of full pose distributions are, contrary to single estimates, well suited for expressing uncertainty on pose. Motivated by this, we propose a novel pose distribution estimation method. An implicit formulation of the probability distribution over object pose is derived from an intermediary representation of an object as a set of keypoints. This ensures that the pose distribution estimates have a high level of interpretability. Furthermore, our method is based on conservative approximations, which leads to reliable estimates. The method has been evaluated on the task of rotation distribution estimation on the YCB-V and T-LESS datasets and performs reliably on all objects.
abstract_zh: 刚性物体的 6D 位姿估计是计算机视觉中的一个基本问题。传统上，姿态估计涉及确定单个最佳估计。然而，单一估计无法表达视觉模糊性，在许多情况下，由于对象对称性或识别特征的遮挡，视觉模糊性是不可避免的。无法解释姿态的模糊性可能会导致后续方法的失败，当失败的成本很高时，这是不可接受的。与单一估计相反，完整姿态分布的估计非常适合表达姿态的不确定性。受此启发，我们提出了一种新颖的姿态分布估计方法。对象姿态概率分布的隐式公式是从对象作为一组关键点的中间表示导出的。这确保了姿态分布估计具有高水平的可解释性。此外，我们的方法基于保守的近似，这导致了可靠的估计。该方法已在 YCB-V 和 T-LESS 数据集上的旋转分布估计任务上进行了评估，并在所有对象上可靠地执行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于关键点的隐式姿态分布估计方法Ki-Pode，用于解决刚性物体6D姿态估计中的视觉模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 传统单点姿态估计无法表达因物体对称性或特征遮挡导致的视觉模糊，这可能导致高成本场景下的方法失效，需通过完整姿态分布来量化不确定性。
AI.method: 通过关键点集构建中间表示，推导隐式姿态概率分布，结合保守近似策略确保估计可靠性，提升对称性与遮挡场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在YCB-V和T-LESS数据集的旋转分布估计任务中，该方法在所有物体上均表现出可靠的性能。
AI.conclusion: Ki-Pode通过可解释的隐式分布估计有效解决了姿态模糊问题，相比单点估计更具鲁棒性，为高风险场景提供了更可靠的姿态预测方案。

search_text: Ki-Pode: Keypoint-based Implicit Pose Distribution Estimation of Rigid Objects Ki-Pode：基于关键点的刚性物体隐式姿态分布估计 The estimation of 6D poses of rigid objects is a fundamental problem in computer vision. Traditionally pose estimation is concerned with the determination of a single best estimate. However, a single estimate is unable to express visual ambiguity, which in many cases is unavoidable due to object symmetries or occlusion of identifying features. Inability to account for ambiguities in pose can lead to failure in subsequent methods, which is unacceptable when the cost of failure is high. Estimates of full pose distributions are, contrary to single estimates, well suited for expressing uncertainty on pose. Motivated by this, we propose a novel pose distribution estimation method. An implicit formulation of the probability distribution over object pose is derived from an intermediary representation of an object as a set of keypoints. This ensures that the pose distribution estimates have a high level of interpretability. Furthermore, our method is based on conservative approximations, which leads to reliable estimates. The method has been evaluated on the task of rotation distribution estimation on the YCB-V and T-LESS datasets and performs reliably on all objects. 刚性物体的 6D 位姿估计是计算机视觉中的一个基本问题。传统上，姿态估计涉及确定单个最佳估计。然而，单一估计无法表达视觉模糊性，在许多情况下，由于对象对称性或识别特征的遮挡，视觉模糊性是不可避免的。无法解释姿态的模糊性可能会导致后续方法的失败，当失败的成本很高时，这是不可接受的。与单一估计相反，完整姿态分布的估计非常适合表达姿态的不确定性。受此启发，我们提出了一种新颖的姿态分布估计方法。对象姿态概率分布的隐式公式是从对象作为一组关键点的中间表示导出的。这确保了姿态分布估计具有高水平的可解释性。此外，我们的方法基于保守的近似，这导致了可靠的估计。该方法已在 YCB-V 和 T-LESS 数据集上的旋转分布估计任务上进行了评估，并在所有对象上可靠地执行。 本文提出了一种基于关键点的隐式姿态分布估计方法Ki-Pode，用于解决刚性物体6D姿态估计中的视觉模糊问题。 Thorbjørn Mosekjær Iversen,Rasmus Laurvig Haugaard,Anders Glent Buch cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Haofeng Li,Junjia Huang,Guanbin Li,Zhou Liu,Yihong Zhong,Yingying Chen,Yunfei Wang,Xiang Wan
title: View-Disentangled Transformer for Brain Lesion Detection
title_zh: 用于脑损伤检测的视图解缠结变压器
comment: International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI) 2022, code: https://github.com/lhaof/ISBI-VDFormer
comments: International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI) 2022, code: https://github.com/lhaof/ISBI-VDFormer
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have been widely adopted in brain lesion detection and segmentation. However, locating small lesions in 2D MRI slices is challenging, and requires to balance between the granularity of 3D context aggregation and the computational complexity. In this paper, we propose a novel view-disentangled transformer to enhance the extraction of MRI features for more accurate tumour detection. First, the proposed transformer harvests long-range correlation among different positions in a 3D brain scan. Second, the transformer models a stack of slice features as multiple 2D views and enhance these features view-by-view, which approximately achieves the 3D correlation computing in an efficient way. Third, we deploy the proposed transformer module in a transformer backbone, which can effectively detect the 2D regions surrounding brain lesions. The experimental results show that our proposed view-disentangled transformer performs well for brain lesion detection on a challenging brain MRI dataset.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have been widely adopted in brain lesion detection and segmentation. However, locating small lesions in 2D MRI slices is challenging, and requires to balance between the granularity of 3D context aggregation and the computational complexity. In this paper, we propose a novel view-disentangled transformer to enhance the extraction of MRI features for more accurate tumour detection. First, the proposed transformer harvests long-range correlation among different positions in a 3D brain scan. Second, the transformer models a stack of slice features as multiple 2D views and enhance these features view-by-view, which approximately achieves the 3D correlation computing in an efficient way. Third, we deploy the proposed transformer module in a transformer backbone, which can effectively detect the 2D regions surrounding brain lesions. The experimental results show that our proposed view-disentangled transformer performs well for brain lesion detection on a challenging brain MRI dataset.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）已广泛应用于脑部病变检测和分割。然而，在 2D MRI 切片中定位小病灶具有挑战性，并且需要在 3D 上下文聚合的粒度和计算复杂性之间取得平衡。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的视图解缠变压器来增强 MRI 特征的提取，从而实现更准确的肿瘤检测。首先，所提出的变压器在 3D 脑部扫描中收集不同位置之间的远程相关性。其次，Transformer 将一堆切片特征建模为多个 2D 视图，并逐个视图增强这些特征，从而以有效的方式近似实现 3D 相关性计算。第三，我们将所提出的变压器模块部署在变压器骨干中，它可以有效地检测大脑病变周围的二维区域。实验结果表明，我们提出的视图解纠缠变压器在具有挑战性的脑 MRI 数据集上的脑病变检测中表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种视图解耦的Transformer模型，用于提升脑部病变检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在2D MRI切片中定位小病变时面临3D上下文聚合与计算复杂度的平衡难题，需更高效的特征提取方法。
AI.method: 设计视图解耦Transformer，通过建模多视角2D切片特征近似实现3D相关性计算，并集成至Transformer主干网络中。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的脑部MRI数据集上，该方法显著提升了病变检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 视图解耦Transformer通过高效建模3D上下文与2D切片特征，有效解决了脑病变检测中的关键难题。
