authors_text: Chengyin Hu,Weiwen Shi,Ling Tian
title: Adversarial Color Projection: A Projector-based Physical Attack to DNNs
title_zh: 对抗性颜色投影：对 DNN 的基于投影仪的物理攻击
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2209.02430
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2209.02430
abstract: Recent research has demonstrated that deep neural networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to adversarial perturbations. Therefore, it is imperative to evaluate the resilience of advanced DNNs to adversarial attacks. However, traditional methods that use stickers as physical perturbations to deceive classifiers face challenges in achieving stealthiness and are susceptible to printing loss. Recently, advancements in physical attacks have utilized light beams, such as lasers, to perform attacks, where the optical patterns generated are artificial rather than natural. In this work, we propose a black-box projector-based physical attack, referred to as adversarial color projection (AdvCP), which manipulates the physical parameters of color projection to perform an adversarial attack. We evaluate our approach on three crucial criteria: effectiveness, stealthiness, and robustness. In the digital environment, we achieve an attack success rate of 97.60% on a subset of ImageNet, while in the physical environment, we attain an attack success rate of 100% in the indoor test and 82.14% in the outdoor test. The adversarial samples generated by AdvCP are compared with baseline samples to demonstrate the stealthiness of our approach. When attacking advanced DNNs, experimental results show that our method can achieve more than 85% attack success rate in all cases, which verifies the robustness of AdvCP. Finally, we consider the potential threats posed by AdvCP to future vision-based systems and applications and suggest some ideas for light-based physical attacks.
summary: Recent research has demonstrated that deep neural networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to adversarial perturbations. Therefore, it is imperative to evaluate the resilience of advanced DNNs to adversarial attacks. However, traditional methods that use stickers as physical perturbations to deceive classifiers face challenges in achieving stealthiness and are susceptible to printing loss. Recently, advancements in physical attacks have utilized light beams, such as lasers, to perform attacks, where the optical patterns generated are artificial rather than natural. In this work, we propose a black-box projector-based physical attack, referred to as adversarial color projection (AdvCP), which manipulates the physical parameters of color projection to perform an adversarial attack. We evaluate our approach on three crucial criteria: effectiveness, stealthiness, and robustness. In the digital environment, we achieve an attack success rate of 97.60% on a subset of ImageNet, while in the physical environment, we attain an attack success rate of 100% in the indoor test and 82.14% in the outdoor test. The adversarial samples generated by AdvCP are compared with baseline samples to demonstrate the stealthiness of our approach. When attacking advanced DNNs, experimental results show that our method can achieve more than 85% attack success rate in all cases, which verifies the robustness of AdvCP. Finally, we consider the potential threats posed by AdvCP to future vision-based systems and applications and suggest some ideas for light-based physical attacks.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，深度神经网络（DNN）很容易受到对抗性扰动的影响。因此，评估先进 DNN 对对抗性攻击的恢复能力势在必行。然而，使用贴纸作为物理扰动来欺骗分类器的传统方法在实现隐秘性方面面临挑战，并且容易受到打印丢失的影响。最近，物理攻击的进步已经利用光束（例如激光）来执行攻击，其中生成的光学图案是人造的而不是自然的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于黑盒投影仪的物理攻击，称为对抗性颜色投影（AdvCP），它操纵颜色投影的物理参数来执行对抗性攻击。我们根据三个关键标准评估我们的方法：有效性、隐蔽性和稳健性。在数字环境中，我们对ImageNet子集的攻击成功率达到了97.60％，而在物理环境中，我们在室内测试中获得了100％的攻击成功率，在室外测试中获得了82.14％的攻击成功率。将 AdvCP 生成的对抗样本与基线样本进行比较，以证明我们方法的隐蔽性。在攻击先进的DNN时，实验结果表明，我们的方法在所有情况下都能获得超过85%的攻击成功率，这验证了AdvCP的鲁棒性。最后，我们考虑了 AdvCP 对未来基于视觉的系统和应用程序构成的潜在威胁，并提出了一些基于光的物理攻击的想法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于投影仪的物理攻击方法AdvCP，通过操控颜色投影参数对深度神经网络（DNN）进行对抗攻击。
AI.motivation: 传统物理攻击方法（如贴纸）存在隐蔽性差和印刷损耗问题，而基于激光的攻击生成的人工光模式不够自然，需探索更隐蔽且有效的物理攻击方案。
AI.method: 利用投影仪生成对抗性颜色投影，通过调整物理参数（如颜色、亮度）实现攻击，并从有效性、隐蔽性和鲁棒性三个维度进行评估。
AI.result: 在ImageNet子集上数字环境攻击成功率达97.60%，室内物理环境达100%，室外达82.14%；对抗样本比基线方法更隐蔽，对先进DNN的攻击成功率均超85%。
AI.conclusion: AdvCP验证了投影仪物理攻击的有效性和鲁棒性，揭示了其对视觉系统应用的潜在威胁，并为基于光的物理攻击提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于投影仪的物理攻击方法AdvCP，通过操控颜色投影参数对深度神经网络（DNN）进行对抗攻击。
motivation: 传统物理攻击方法（如贴纸）存在隐蔽性差和印刷损耗问题，而基于激光的攻击生成的人工光模式不够自然，需探索更隐蔽且有效的物理攻击方案。
method: 利用投影仪生成对抗性颜色投影，通过调整物理参数（如颜色、亮度）实现攻击，并从有效性、隐蔽性和鲁棒性三个维度进行评估。
result: 在ImageNet子集上数字环境攻击成功率达97.60%，室内物理环境达100%，室外达82.14%；对抗样本比基线方法更隐蔽，对先进DNN的攻击成功率均超85%。
conclusion: AdvCP验证了投影仪物理攻击的有效性和鲁棒性，揭示了其对视觉系统应用的潜在威胁，并为基于光的物理攻击提供了新思路。
search_text: Adversarial Color Projection: A Projector-based Physical Attack to DNNs 对抗性颜色投影：对 DNN 的基于投影仪的物理攻击 Recent research has demonstrated that deep neural networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to adversarial perturbations. Therefore, it is imperative to evaluate the resilience of advanced DNNs to adversarial attacks. However, traditional methods that use stickers as physical perturbations to deceive classifiers face challenges in achieving stealthiness and are susceptible to printing loss. Recently, advancements in physical attacks have utilized light beams, such as lasers, to perform attacks, where the optical patterns generated are artificial rather than natural. In this work, we propose a black-box projector-based physical attack, referred to as adversarial color projection (AdvCP), which manipulates the physical parameters of color projection to perform an adversarial attack. We evaluate our approach on three crucial criteria: effectiveness, stealthiness, and robustness. In the digital environment, we achieve an attack success rate of 97.60% on a subset of ImageNet, while in the physical environment, we attain an attack success rate of 100% in the indoor test and 82.14% in the outdoor test. The adversarial samples generated by AdvCP are compared with baseline samples to demonstrate the stealthiness of our approach. When attacking advanced DNNs, experimental results show that our method can achieve more than 85% attack success rate in all cases, which verifies the robustness of AdvCP. Finally, we consider the potential threats posed by AdvCP to future vision-based systems and applications and suggest some ideas for light-based physical attacks. 最近的研究表明，深度神经网络（DNN）很容易受到对抗性扰动的影响。因此，评估先进 DNN 对对抗性攻击的恢复能力势在必行。然而，使用贴纸作为物理扰动来欺骗分类器的传统方法在实现隐秘性方面面临挑战，并且容易受到打印丢失的影响。最近，物理攻击的进步已经利用光束（例如激光）来执行攻击，其中生成的光学图案是人造的而不是自然的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于黑盒投影仪的物理攻击，称为对抗性颜色投影（AdvCP），它操纵颜色投影的物理参数来执行对抗性攻击。我们根据三个关键标准评估我们的方法：有效性、隐蔽性和稳健性。在数字环境中，我们对ImageNet子集的攻击成功率达到了97.60％，而在物理环境中，我们在室内测试中获得了100％的攻击成功率，在室外测试中获得了82.14％的攻击成功率。将 AdvCP 生成的对抗样本与基线样本进行比较，以证明我们方法的隐蔽性。在攻击先进的DNN时，实验结果表明，我们的方法在所有情况下都能获得超过85%的攻击成功率，这验证了AdvCP的鲁棒性。最后，我们考虑了 AdvCP 对未来基于视觉的系统和应用程序构成的潜在威胁，并提出了一些基于光的物理攻击的想法。 本文提出一种基于投影仪的物理攻击方法AdvCP，通过操控颜色投影参数对深度神经网络（DNN）进行对抗攻击。 Chengyin Hu,Weiwen Shi,Ling Tian cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Hanping Zhang,Yuhong Guo
title: Safe Reinforcement Learning with Contrastive Risk Prediction
title_zh: 具有对比风险预测的安全强化学习
abstract: As safety violations can lead to severe consequences in real-world robotic applications, the increasing deployment of Reinforcement Learning (RL) in robotic domains has propelled the study of safe exploration for reinforcement learning (safe RL). In this work, we propose a risk preventive training method for safe RL, which learns a statistical contrastive classifier to predict the probability of a state-action pair leading to unsafe states. Based on the predicted risk probabilities, we can collect risk preventive trajectories and reshape the reward function with risk penalties to induce safe RL policies. We conduct experiments in robotic simulation environments. The results show the proposed approach has comparable performance with the state-of-the-art model-based methods and outperforms conventional model-free safe RL approaches.
summary: As safety violations can lead to severe consequences in real-world robotic applications, the increasing deployment of Reinforcement Learning (RL) in robotic domains has propelled the study of safe exploration for reinforcement learning (safe RL). In this work, we propose a risk preventive training method for safe RL, which learns a statistical contrastive classifier to predict the probability of a state-action pair leading to unsafe states. Based on the predicted risk probabilities, we can collect risk preventive trajectories and reshape the reward function with risk penalties to induce safe RL policies. We conduct experiments in robotic simulation environments. The results show the proposed approach has comparable performance with the state-of-the-art model-based methods and outperforms conventional model-free safe RL approaches.
abstract_zh: 由于安全违规可能会在现实世界的机器人应用中导致严重后果，因此强化学习（RL）在机器人领域的不断部署推动了强化学习安全探索（安全RL）的研究。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种安全强化学习的风险预防训练方法，该方法学习统计对比分类器来预测状态-动作对导致不安全状态的概率。基于预测的风险概率，我们可以收集风险预防轨迹，并通过风险惩罚重塑奖励函数，以诱导安全的强化学习策略。我们在机器人模拟环境中进行实验。结果表明，所提出的方法具有与最先进的基于模型的方法相当的性能，并且优于传统的无模型安全强化学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比风险预测的安全强化学习方法，通过预测状态-动作对的风险概率来引导安全策略学习。
AI.motivation: 现实世界机器人应用中安全违规可能引发严重后果，而传统安全强化学习方法在安全性和性能间难以平衡。
AI.method: 设计统计对比分类器预测风险概率，基于预测结果筛选安全轨迹并构建风险惩罚奖励函数，实现风险预防训练。
AI.result: 在机器人仿真环境中，该方法性能与先进模型方法相当，且优于传统无模型安全强化学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 对比风险预测框架有效平衡了安全约束与策略性能，为安全强化学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Daniel Honerkamp,Suresh Guttikonda,Abhinav Valada
title: Active Particle Filter Networks: Efficient Active Localization in Continuous Action Spaces and Large Maps
title_zh: 主动粒子过滤网络：连续动作空间和大地图中的高效主动定位
abstract: Accurate localization is a critical requirement for most robotic tasks. The main body of existing work is focused on passive localization in which the motions of the robot are assumed given, abstracting from their influence on sampling informative observations. While recent work has shown the benefits of learning motions to disambiguate the robot's poses, these methods are restricted to granular discrete actions and directly depend on the size of the global map. We propose Active Particle Filter Networks (APFN), an approach that only relies on local information for both the likelihood evaluation as well as the decision making. To do so, we couple differentiable particle filters with a reinforcement learning agent that attends to the most relevant parts of the map. The resulting approach inherits the computational benefits of particle filters and can directly act in continuous action spaces while remaining fully differentiable and thereby end-to-end optimizable as well as agnostic to the input modality. We demonstrate the benefits of our approach with extensive experiments in photorealistic indoor environments built from real-world 3D scanned apartments. Videos and code are available at http://apfn.cs.uni-freiburg.de.
summary: Accurate localization is a critical requirement for most robotic tasks. The main body of existing work is focused on passive localization in which the motions of the robot are assumed given, abstracting from their influence on sampling informative observations. While recent work has shown the benefits of learning motions to disambiguate the robot's poses, these methods are restricted to granular discrete actions and directly depend on the size of the global map. We propose Active Particle Filter Networks (APFN), an approach that only relies on local information for both the likelihood evaluation as well as the decision making. To do so, we couple differentiable particle filters with a reinforcement learning agent that attends to the most relevant parts of the map. The resulting approach inherits the computational benefits of particle filters and can directly act in continuous action spaces while remaining fully differentiable and thereby end-to-end optimizable as well as agnostic to the input modality. We demonstrate the benefits of our approach with extensive experiments in photorealistic indoor environments built from real-world 3D scanned apartments. Videos and code are available at http://apfn.cs.uni-freiburg.de.
abstract_zh: 准确定位是大多数机器人任务的关键要求。现有工作的主体集中于被动定位，其中假设机器人的运动是给定的，从而抽象出它们对采样信息观测的影响。虽然最近的工作已经显示了学习运动来消除机器人姿势歧义的好处，但这些方法仅限于粒度离散动作，并且直接取决于全局地图的大小。我们提出了主动粒子过滤网络（APFN），这是一种仅依赖局部信息进行似然评估和决策的方法。为此，我们将可微分粒子滤波器与强化学习代理结合起来，该代理负责处理地图中最相关的部分。由此产生的方法继承了粒子滤波器的计算优势，并且可以直接在连续动作空间中起作用，同时保持完全可微分，从而实现端到端优化以及与输入模态无关。我们通过在真实世界 3D 扫描公寓构建的逼真室内环境中进行大量实验，展示了我们方法的优势。视频和代码可在 http://apfn.cs.uni-freiburg.de 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出主动粒子滤波网络（APFN），用于解决机器人在连续动作空间和大地图中的高效主动定位问题。
AI.motivation: 现有被动定位方法忽略机器人运动对观测信息的影响，而主动定位方法受限于离散动作和地图规模，难以适应复杂场景。
AI.method: 结合微分粒子滤波器与强化学习代理，通过局部信息进行似然评估和决策，实现端到端优化且与输入模态无关的连续动作空间定位。
AI.result: 在基于真实3D扫描的室内环境中进行大量实验，验证了APFN在定位精度和计算效率上的优势。
AI.conclusion: APFN通过局部信息处理和端到端优化，在连续动作空间和大地图场景中展现出高效、灵活的主动定位能力。

authors_text: Shaojun Zhang,Chen Wang,Albert Zomaya
title: Multi-level Explanation of Deep Reinforcement Learning-based Scheduling
title_zh: 基于深度强化学习的调度的多层次解释
comment: Accepted in the MLSys'22 Workshop on Cloud Intelligence / AIOps
comments: Accepted in the MLSys'22 Workshop on Cloud Intelligence / AIOps
abstract: Dependency-aware job scheduling in the cluster is NP-hard. Recent work shows that Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is capable of solving it. It is difficult for the administrator to understand the DRL-based policy even though it achieves remarkable performance gain. Therefore the complex model-based scheduler is not easy to gain trust in the system where simplicity is favored. In this paper, we give the multi-level explanation framework to interpret the policy of DRL-based scheduling. We dissect its decision-making process to job level and task level and approximate each level with interpretable models and rules, which align with operational practices. We show that the framework gives the system administrator insights into the state-of-the-art scheduler and reveals the robustness issue in regards to its behavior pattern.
summary: Dependency-aware job scheduling in the cluster is NP-hard. Recent work shows that Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is capable of solving it. It is difficult for the administrator to understand the DRL-based policy even though it achieves remarkable performance gain. Therefore the complex model-based scheduler is not easy to gain trust in the system where simplicity is favored. In this paper, we give the multi-level explanation framework to interpret the policy of DRL-based scheduling. We dissect its decision-making process to job level and task level and approximate each level with interpretable models and rules, which align with operational practices. We show that the framework gives the system administrator insights into the state-of-the-art scheduler and reveals the robustness issue in regards to its behavior pattern.
abstract_zh: 集群中的依赖感知作业调度是 NP 困难的。最近的研究表明深度强化学习（DRL）能够解决这个问题。尽管基于 DRL 的策略取得了显着的性能提升，但管理员很难理解它。因此，基于复杂模型的调度器不容易在崇尚简单性的系统中获得信任。在本文中，我们给出了多层次的解释框架来解释基于 DRL 的调度策略。我们将其决策过程剖析到工作级别和任务级别，并使用与操作实践相一致的可解释模型和规则来近似每个级别。我们表明，该框架使系统管理员能够深入了解最先进的调度程序，并揭示其行为模式的稳健性问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个多级解释框架，用于解释基于深度强化学习（DRL）的调度策略，帮助系统管理员理解其决策过程。
AI.motivation: 尽管DRL在调度任务中表现出色，但其复杂性导致管理员难以信任和理解，需通过可解释性方法提升透明度。
AI.method: 将DRL的决策过程分解为作业级和任务级，用可解释的模型和规则近似每个层级，符合实际操作规范。
AI.result: 框架为管理员提供了对DRL调度器的洞察，并揭示了其行为模式中的鲁棒性问题。
AI.conclusion: 该框架增强了DRL调度器的可信度与实用性，同时突显了其在鲁棒性方面的潜在改进方向。

search_text: Multi-level Explanation of Deep Reinforcement Learning-based Scheduling 基于深度强化学习的调度的多层次解释 Dependency-aware job scheduling in the cluster is NP-hard. Recent work shows that Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is capable of solving it. It is difficult for the administrator to understand the DRL-based policy even though it achieves remarkable performance gain. Therefore the complex model-based scheduler is not easy to gain trust in the system where simplicity is favored. In this paper, we give the multi-level explanation framework to interpret the policy of DRL-based scheduling. We dissect its decision-making process to job level and task level and approximate each level with interpretable models and rules, which align with operational practices. We show that the framework gives the system administrator insights into the state-of-the-art scheduler and reveals the robustness issue in regards to its behavior pattern. 集群中的依赖感知作业调度是 NP 困难的。最近的研究表明深度强化学习（DRL）能够解决这个问题。尽管基于 DRL 的策略取得了显着的性能提升，但管理员很难理解它。因此，基于复杂模型的调度器不容易在崇尚简单性的系统中获得信任。在本文中，我们给出了多层次的解释框架来解释基于 DRL 的调度策略。我们将其决策过程剖析到工作级别和任务级别，并使用与操作实践相一致的可解释模型和规则来近似每个级别。我们表明，该框架使系统管理员能够深入了解最先进的调度程序，并揭示其行为模式的稳健性问题。 本文提出一个多级解释框架，用于解释基于深度强化学习（DRL）的调度策略，帮助系统管理员理解其决策过程。 Shaojun Zhang,Chen Wang,Albert Zomaya cs.DC,cs.AI,cs.OS

authors_text: Balamurali Murugesan,Bingyuan Liu,Adrian Galdran,Ismail Ben Ayed,Jose Dolz
title: Calibrating Segmentation Networks with Margin-based Label Smoothing
title_zh: 使用基于边缘的标签平滑来校准分割网络
comment: MedIA 2023. The code is available at https://github.com/Bala93/MarginLoss. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.15430
comments: MedIA 2023. The code is available at https://github.com/Bala93/MarginLoss. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.15430
abstract: Despite the undeniable progress in visual recognition tasks fueled by deep neural networks, there exists recent evidence showing that these models are poorly calibrated, resulting in over-confident predictions. The standard practices of minimizing the cross entropy loss during training promote the predicted softmax probabilities to match the one-hot label assignments. Nevertheless, this yields a pre-softmax activation of the correct class that is significantly larger than the remaining activations, which exacerbates the miscalibration problem. Recent observations from the classification literature suggest that loss functions that embed implicit or explicit maximization of the entropy of predictions yield state-of-the-art calibration performances. Despite these findings, the impact of these losses in the relevant task of calibrating medical image segmentation networks remains unexplored. In this work, we provide a unifying constrained-optimization perspective of current state-of-the-art calibration losses. Specifically, these losses could be viewed as approximations of a linear penalty (or a Lagrangian term) imposing equality constraints on logit distances. This points to an important limitation of such underlying equality constraints, whose ensuing gradients constantly push towards a non-informative solution, which might prevent from reaching the best compromise between the discriminative performance and calibration of the model during gradient-based optimization. Following our observations, we propose a simple and flexible generalization based on inequality constraints, which imposes a controllable margin on logit distances. Comprehensive experiments on a variety of public medical image segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that our method sets novel state-of-the-art results on these tasks in terms of network calibration, whereas the discriminative performance is also improved.
summary: Despite the undeniable progress in visual recognition tasks fueled by deep neural networks, there exists recent evidence showing that these models are poorly calibrated, resulting in over-confident predictions. The standard practices of minimizing the cross entropy loss during training promote the predicted softmax probabilities to match the one-hot label assignments. Nevertheless, this yields a pre-softmax activation of the correct class that is significantly larger than the remaining activations, which exacerbates the miscalibration problem. Recent observations from the classification literature suggest that loss functions that embed implicit or explicit maximization of the entropy of predictions yield state-of-the-art calibration performances. Despite these findings, the impact of these losses in the relevant task of calibrating medical image segmentation networks remains unexplored. In this work, we provide a unifying constrained-optimization perspective of current state-of-the-art calibration losses. Specifically, these losses could be viewed as approximations of a linear penalty (or a Lagrangian term) imposing equality constraints on logit distances. This points to an important limitation of such underlying equality constraints, whose ensuing gradients constantly push towards a non-informative solution, which might prevent from reaching the best compromise between the discriminative performance and calibration of the model during gradient-based optimization. Following our observations, we propose a simple and flexible generalization based on inequality constraints, which imposes a controllable margin on logit distances. Comprehensive experiments on a variety of public medical image segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that our method sets novel state-of-the-art results on these tasks in terms of network calibration, whereas the discriminative performance is also improved.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络推动的视觉识别任务取得了不可否认的进展，但最近的证据表明这些模型校准不佳，导致预测过于自信。在训练过程中最小化交叉熵损失的标准做法可以促进预测的 softmax 概率与 one-hot 标签分配相匹配。然而，这会产生正确类别的 pre-softmax 激活，该激活明显大于其余激活，从而加剧了错误校准问题。分类文献的最新观察结果表明，嵌入预测熵的隐式或显式最大化的损失函数可以产生最先进的校准性能。尽管有这些发现，这些损失对校准医学图像分割网络的相关任务的影响仍有待探索。在这项工作中，我们提供了当前最先进的校准损失的统一约束优化视角。具体来说，这些损失可以被视为对 logit 距离施加等式约束的线性惩罚（或拉格朗日项）的近似值。这指出了这种潜在等式约束的一个重要限制，其随之而来的梯度不断推向非信息性解决方案，这可能会阻止在基于梯度的优化期间模型的判别性能和校准之间达到最佳折衷。根据我们的观察，我们提出了一种基于不等式约束的简单而灵活的概括，它对 logit 距离施加了可控的裕度。对各种公共医学图像分割基准的综合实验表明，我们的方法在网络校准方面为这些任务设置了新颖的最先进的结果，同时判别性能也得到了提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于边距的标签平滑方法，用于校准医学图像分割网络的预测置信度。
AI.motivation: 现有分类任务中的校准损失函数在医学图像分割任务中效果未被验证，且传统交叉熵损失会导致模型过度自信，加剧校准问题。
AI.method: 通过约束优化视角，将校准损失视为等式约束的近似，并提出基于不等式约束的可控制边距方法，调整logit距离分布。
AI.result: 在多个医学图像分割基准测试中，该方法在模型校准指标和分割性能上均达到新状态-of-the-art水平。
AI.conclusion: 边距约束方法有效平衡了分割网络的判别能力与校准性能，为医学图像分割的不确定性建模提供了新思路。

authors_text: Rufael Fekadu,Anteneh Getachew,Yishak Tadele,Nuredin Ali,Israel Goytom
title: Machine Learning Models Evaluation and Feature Importance Analysis on NPL Dataset
title_zh: NPL数据集的机器学习模型评估和特征重要性分析
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, Machine Learning for Development (ML4D) workshop at NeurIPS 2021
comments: 7 pages, 2 figures, Machine Learning for Development (ML4D) workshop at NeurIPS 2021
abstract: Predicting the probability of non-performing loans for individuals has a vital and beneficial role for banks to decrease credit risk and make the right decisions before giving the loan. The trend to make these decisions are based on credit study and in accordance with generally accepted standards, loan payment history, and demographic data of the clients. In this work, we evaluate how different Machine learning models such as Random Forest, Decision tree, KNN, SVM, and XGBoost perform on the dataset provided by a private bank in Ethiopia. Further, motivated by this evaluation we explore different feature selection methods to state the important features for the bank. Our findings show that XGBoost achieves the highest F1 score on the KMeans SMOTE over-sampled data. We also found that the most important features are the age of the applicant, years of employment, and total income of the applicant rather than collateral-related features in evaluating credit risk.
summary: Predicting the probability of non-performing loans for individuals has a vital and beneficial role for banks to decrease credit risk and make the right decisions before giving the loan. The trend to make these decisions are based on credit study and in accordance with generally accepted standards, loan payment history, and demographic data of the clients. In this work, we evaluate how different Machine learning models such as Random Forest, Decision tree, KNN, SVM, and XGBoost perform on the dataset provided by a private bank in Ethiopia. Further, motivated by this evaluation we explore different feature selection methods to state the important features for the bank. Our findings show that XGBoost achieves the highest F1 score on the KMeans SMOTE over-sampled data. We also found that the most important features are the age of the applicant, years of employment, and total income of the applicant rather than collateral-related features in evaluating credit risk.
abstract_zh: 预测个人不良贷款的概率对于银行降低信贷风险并在发放贷款前做出正确的决策具有至关重要且有益的作用。做出这些决定的趋势是基于信用研究并根据普遍接受的标准、贷款支付历史和客户的人口统计数据。在这项工作中，我们评估了随机森林、决策树、KNN、SVM 和 XGBoost 等不同的机器学习模型在埃塞俄比亚一家私人银行提供的数据集上的表现。此外，受此评估的启发，我们探索了不同的特征选择方法来陈述银行的重要特征。我们的研究结果表明，XGBoost 在 KMeans SMOTE 过采样数据上获得了最高的 F1 分数。我们还发现，在评估信用风险时，最重要的特征是申请人的年龄、工作年限和申请人的总收入，而不是与抵押品相关的特征。

AI.tldr: 评估多种机器学习模型在非 performing 贷款（NPL）数据集上的表现，并分析影响信用风险评估的关键特征。
AI.motivation: 预测个人不良贷款概率对银行控制信用风险至关重要，传统方法依赖有限的评估标准，需通过机器学习模型优化决策并识别关键影响因素。
AI.method: 采用随机森林、决策树、KNN、SVM 和 XGBoost 等模型，在埃塞俄比亚某银行提供的数据集上进行性能比较；结合 KMeans SMOTE 过采样技术处理数据不平衡问题，并通过特征选择方法确定关键变量。
AI.result: XGBoost 在 KMeans SMOTE 过采样数据上取得最高 F1 分数；年龄、工作年限和总收入是影响信用风险的核心特征，抵押相关特征重要性较低。
AI.conclusion: XGBoost 在处理不平衡 NPL 数据时表现最优，银行应优先关注申请人的年龄、收入及就业稳定性等可量化指标，而非抵押品因素，以提升信用风险评估效率。

ai_content.result: XGBoost 在 KMeans SMOTE 过采样数据上取得最高 F1 分数；年龄、工作年限和总收入是影响信用风险的核心特征，抵押相关特征重要性较低。
ai_content.conclusion: XGBoost 在处理不平衡 NPL 数据时表现最优，银行应优先关注申请人的年龄、收入及就业稳定性等可量化指标，而非抵押品因素，以提升信用风险评估效率。

search_text: Machine Learning Models Evaluation and Feature Importance Analysis on NPL Dataset NPL数据集的机器学习模型评估和特征重要性分析 Predicting the probability of non-performing loans for individuals has a vital and beneficial role for banks to decrease credit risk and make the right decisions before giving the loan. The trend to make these decisions are based on credit study and in accordance with generally accepted standards, loan payment history, and demographic data of the clients. In this work, we evaluate how different Machine learning models such as Random Forest, Decision tree, KNN, SVM, and XGBoost perform on the dataset provided by a private bank in Ethiopia. Further, motivated by this evaluation we explore different feature selection methods to state the important features for the bank. Our findings show that XGBoost achieves the highest F1 score on the KMeans SMOTE over-sampled data. We also found that the most important features are the age of the applicant, years of employment, and total income of the applicant rather than collateral-related features in evaluating credit risk. 预测个人不良贷款的概率对于银行降低信贷风险并在发放贷款前做出正确的决策具有至关重要且有益的作用。做出这些决定的趋势是基于信用研究并根据普遍接受的标准、贷款支付历史和客户的人口统计数据。在这项工作中，我们评估了随机森林、决策树、KNN、SVM 和 XGBoost 等不同的机器学习模型在埃塞俄比亚一家私人银行提供的数据集上的表现。此外，受此评估的启发，我们探索了不同的特征选择方法来陈述银行的重要特征。我们的研究结果表明，XGBoost 在 KMeans SMOTE 过采样数据上获得了最高的 F1 分数。我们还发现，在评估信用风险时，最重要的特征是申请人的年龄、工作年限和申请人的总收入，而不是与抵押品相关的特征。 评估多种机器学习模型在非 performing 贷款（NPL）数据集上的表现，并分析影响信用风险评估的关键特征。 Rufael Fekadu,Anteneh Getachew,Yishak Tadele,Nuredin Ali,Israel Goytom cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhanzhao Li,Aleksandra Radlińska
title: Artificial Intelligence in Concrete Materials: A Scientometric View
title_zh: 混凝土材料中的人工智能：科学计量学观点
comment: Book chapter in M. Z. Naser (Ed.), Leveraging Artificial Intelligence in Engineering, Management, and Safety of Infrastructure. CRC Press
comments: Book chapter in M. Z. Naser (Ed.), Leveraging Artificial Intelligence in Engineering, Management, and Safety of Infrastructure. CRC Press
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) has emerged as a transformative and versatile tool, breaking new frontiers across scientific domains. Among its most promising applications, AI research is blossoming in concrete science and engineering, where it has offered new insights towards mixture design optimization and service life prediction of cementitious systems. This chapter aims to uncover the main research interests and knowledge structure of the existing literature on AI for concrete materials. To begin with, a total of 389 journal articles published from 1990 to 2020 were retrieved from the Web of Science. Scientometric tools such as keyword co-occurrence analysis and documentation co-citation analysis were adopted to quantify features and characteristics of the research field. The findings bring to light pressing questions in data-driven concrete research and suggest future opportunities for the concrete community to fully utilize the capabilities of AI techniques.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) has emerged as a transformative and versatile tool, breaking new frontiers across scientific domains. Among its most promising applications, AI research is blossoming in concrete science and engineering, where it has offered new insights towards mixture design optimization and service life prediction of cementitious systems. This chapter aims to uncover the main research interests and knowledge structure of the existing literature on AI for concrete materials. To begin with, a total of 389 journal articles published from 1990 to 2020 were retrieved from the Web of Science. Scientometric tools such as keyword co-occurrence analysis and documentation co-citation analysis were adopted to quantify features and characteristics of the research field. The findings bring to light pressing questions in data-driven concrete research and suggest future opportunities for the concrete community to fully utilize the capabilities of AI techniques.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 已成为一种变革性的多功能工具，突破了科学领域的新领域。在其最有前途的应用中，人工智能研究在混凝土科学和工程领域蓬勃发展，为混凝土系统的混合物设计优化和使用寿命预测提供了新的见解。本章旨在揭示混凝土材料人工智能现有文献的主要研究兴趣和知识结构。首先，从 Web of Science 中检索到 1990 年至 2020 年发表的总共 389 篇期刊文章。采用关键词共现分析、文献共引分析等科学计量工具量化研究领域的特征和特点。这些发现揭示了数据驱动的混凝土研究中紧迫的问题，并为混凝土社区充分利用人工智能技术的能力提出了未来的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文通过科学计量学方法分析人工智能在混凝土材料领域的研究现状与知识结构。
AI.motivation: 人工智能在混凝土科学与工程中展现出巨大潜力，但现有研究存在数据驱动方向的关键问题亟待梳理。
AI.method: 基于Web of Science检索1990-2020年389篇文献，采用关键词共现分析和文献共被引分析等科学计量工具进行量化研究。
AI.result: 揭示了数据驱动混凝土研究的核心挑战，并提出未来利用AI技术优化混凝土材料设计与性能预测的潜在方向。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统分析现有文献，明确了AI在混凝土领域应用的研究重点，为后续技术深化与跨学科融合提供指导。

authors_text: Ruohua Zhou,Yuxuan Du,Chenlei Hu
title: The BUCEA Speaker Diarization System for the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2022
title_zh: 用于 2022 年 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛的 BUCEA 说话人分类系统
abstract: This paper describes the BUCEA speaker diarization system for the 2022 VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge. Voxsrc-22 provides the development set and test set of VoxConverse, and we mainly use the test set of VoxConverse for parameter adjustment. Our system consists of several modules, including speech activity detection (VAD), speaker embedding extractor, clustering methods, overlapping speech detection (OSD), and result fusion. Without considering overlap, the Dover-LAP (short for Diarization Output Voting Error Reduction) method was applied to system fusion, and overlapping speech detection and processing were finally carried out. Our best system achieves a diarization error rate (DER) of 5.48% and a Jaccard error rate (JER) of 32.1% on the VoxSRC 2022 evaluation set respectively.
summary: This paper describes the BUCEA speaker diarization system for the 2022 VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge. Voxsrc-22 provides the development set and test set of VoxConverse, and we mainly use the test set of VoxConverse for parameter adjustment. Our system consists of several modules, including speech activity detection (VAD), speaker embedding extractor, clustering methods, overlapping speech detection (OSD), and result fusion. Without considering overlap, the Dover-LAP (short for Diarization Output Voting Error Reduction) method was applied to system fusion, and overlapping speech detection and processing were finally carried out. Our best system achieves a diarization error rate (DER) of 5.48% and a Jaccard error rate (JER) of 32.1% on the VoxSRC 2022 evaluation set respectively.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了用于 2022 年 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛的 BUCEA 说话人分类系统。 Voxsrc-22提供了VoxConverse的开发集和测试集，我们主要使用VoxConverse的测试集进行参数调整。我们的系统由多个模块组成，包括语音活动检测（VAD）、说话人嵌入提取器、聚类方法、重叠语音检测（OSD）和结果融合。在不考虑重叠的情况下，采用Dover-LAP（Diarization Output Voting Error Reduction的缩写）方法进行系统融合，最终进行重叠语音检测和处理。我们最好的系统在 VoxSRC 2022 评估集上分别实现了 5.48% 的二值化错误率 (DER) 和 32.1% 的 Jaccard 错误率 (JER)。

AI.tldr: 介绍BUCEA团队在VoxSRC 2022挑战赛中开发的说话人日记系统
AI.motivation: 旨在通过优化参数和处理重叠语音来提升说话人日记系统的准确性
AI.method: 采用VAD、说话人嵌入提取、聚类算法、重叠语音检测及Dover-LAP融合方法，结合重叠处理提升效果
AI.result: 在VoxSRC 2022测试集上达到5.48%的DER和32.1%的JER
AI.conclusion: 系统通过模块优化和重叠处理有效降低了错误率，验证了方法的有效性

authors_text: Shentong Mo,Pedro Morgado
title: A Closer Look at Weakly-Supervised Audio-Visual Source Localization
title_zh: 仔细研究弱监督的视听源定位
abstract: Audio-visual source localization is a challenging task that aims to predict the location of visual sound sources in a video. Since collecting ground-truth annotations of sounding objects can be costly, a plethora of weakly-supervised localization methods that can learn from datasets with no bounding-box annotations have been proposed in recent years, by leveraging the natural co-occurrence of audio and visual signals. Despite significant interest, popular evaluation protocols have two major flaws. First, they allow for the use of a fully annotated dataset to perform early stopping, thus significantly increasing the annotation effort required for training. Second, current evaluation metrics assume the presence of sound sources at all times. This is of course an unrealistic assumption, and thus better metrics are necessary to capture the model's performance on (negative) samples with no visible sound sources. To accomplish this, we extend the test set of popular benchmarks, Flickr SoundNet and VGG-Sound Sources, in order to include negative samples, and measure performance using metrics that balance localization accuracy and recall. Using the new protocol, we conducted an extensive evaluation of prior methods, and found that most prior works are not capable of identifying negatives and suffer from significant overfitting problems (rely heavily on early stopping for best results). We also propose a new approach for visual sound source localization that addresses both these problems. In particular, we found that, through extreme visual dropout and the use of momentum encoders, the proposed approach combats overfitting effectively, and establishes a new state-of-the-art performance on both Flickr SoundNet and VGG-Sound Source. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/stoneMo/SLAVC.
summary: Audio-visual source localization is a challenging task that aims to predict the location of visual sound sources in a video. Since collecting ground-truth annotations of sounding objects can be costly, a plethora of weakly-supervised localization methods that can learn from datasets with no bounding-box annotations have been proposed in recent years, by leveraging the natural co-occurrence of audio and visual signals. Despite significant interest, popular evaluation protocols have two major flaws. First, they allow for the use of a fully annotated dataset to perform early stopping, thus significantly increasing the annotation effort required for training. Second, current evaluation metrics assume the presence of sound sources at all times. This is of course an unrealistic assumption, and thus better metrics are necessary to capture the model's performance on (negative) samples with no visible sound sources. To accomplish this, we extend the test set of popular benchmarks, Flickr SoundNet and VGG-Sound Sources, in order to include negative samples, and measure performance using metrics that balance localization accuracy and recall. Using the new protocol, we conducted an extensive evaluation of prior methods, and found that most prior works are not capable of identifying negatives and suffer from significant overfitting problems (rely heavily on early stopping for best results). We also propose a new approach for visual sound source localization that addresses both these problems. In particular, we found that, through extreme visual dropout and the use of momentum encoders, the proposed approach combats overfitting effectively, and establishes a new state-of-the-art performance on both Flickr SoundNet and VGG-Sound Source. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/stoneMo/SLAVC.
abstract_zh: 视听源定位是一项具有挑战性的任务，旨在预测视频中视觉声源的位置。由于收集探测对象的真实注释可能成本高昂，近年来，通过利用音频和视觉信号的自然共现，提出了大量可以从没有边界框注释的数据集中学习的弱监督定位方法。尽管人们对此很感兴趣，但流行的评估协议有两个主要缺陷。首先，它们允许使用完全注释的数据集来执行早期停止，从而显着增加训练所需的注释工作。其次，当前的评估指标假设始终存在声源。这当然是一个不切实际的假设，因此需要更好的指标来捕获模型在没有可见声源的（负）样本上的性能。为了实现这一目标，我们扩展了流行基准测试集、Flickr SoundNet 和 VGG-Sound Sources，以包含负样本，并使用平衡定位准确性和召回率的指标来衡量性能。使用新协议，我们对先前的方法进行了广泛的评估，发现大多数先前的工作无法识别负数，并且存在严重的过度拟合问题（严重依赖早期停止以获得最佳结果）。我们还提出了一种解决这两个问题的视觉声源定位新方法。特别是，我们发现，通过极端的视觉丢失和动量编码器的使用，所提出的方法有效地对抗过度拟合，并在 Flickr SoundNet 和 VGG-Sound Source 上建立了新的最先进的性能。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/stoneMo/SLAVC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在改进弱监督音频-视觉声源定位方法，通过解决现有评估协议的缺陷并提出新方法以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有评估协议存在两大数据缺陷：允许使用全标注数据进行早停导致标注成本增加，且假设所有样本均有声源存在，无法真实反映模型在无声源样本上的表现。
AI.method: 扩展基准数据集（Flickr SoundNet和VGG-Sound Sources）以包含负样本，并设计平衡定位准确率与召回率的评估指标；提出结合极端视觉丢弃和动量编码器的新方法，有效缓解过拟合问题。
AI.result: 实验表明多数先前方法无法识别负样本且存在严重过拟合问题，新方法在两个基准数据集上均达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入负样本评估协议和新型网络架构，本文有效解决了弱监督声源定位中的过拟合与负样本识别难题，为领域发展提供了新方向。

search_text: A Closer Look at Weakly-Supervised Audio-Visual Source Localization 仔细研究弱监督的视听源定位 Audio-visual source localization is a challenging task that aims to predict the location of visual sound sources in a video. Since collecting ground-truth annotations of sounding objects can be costly, a plethora of weakly-supervised localization methods that can learn from datasets with no bounding-box annotations have been proposed in recent years, by leveraging the natural co-occurrence of audio and visual signals. Despite significant interest, popular evaluation protocols have two major flaws. First, they allow for the use of a fully annotated dataset to perform early stopping, thus significantly increasing the annotation effort required for training. Second, current evaluation metrics assume the presence of sound sources at all times. This is of course an unrealistic assumption, and thus better metrics are necessary to capture the model's performance on (negative) samples with no visible sound sources. To accomplish this, we extend the test set of popular benchmarks, Flickr SoundNet and VGG-Sound Sources, in order to include negative samples, and measure performance using metrics that balance localization accuracy and recall. Using the new protocol, we conducted an extensive evaluation of prior methods, and found that most prior works are not capable of identifying negatives and suffer from significant overfitting problems (rely heavily on early stopping for best results). We also propose a new approach for visual sound source localization that addresses both these problems. In particular, we found that, through extreme visual dropout and the use of momentum encoders, the proposed approach combats overfitting effectively, and establishes a new state-of-the-art performance on both Flickr SoundNet and VGG-Sound Source. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/stoneMo/SLAVC. 视听源定位是一项具有挑战性的任务，旨在预测视频中视觉声源的位置。由于收集探测对象的真实注释可能成本高昂，近年来，通过利用音频和视觉信号的自然共现，提出了大量可以从没有边界框注释的数据集中学习的弱监督定位方法。尽管人们对此很感兴趣，但流行的评估协议有两个主要缺陷。首先，它们允许使用完全注释的数据集来执行早期停止，从而显着增加训练所需的注释工作。其次，当前的评估指标假设始终存在声源。这当然是一个不切实际的假设，因此需要更好的指标来捕获模型在没有可见声源的（负）样本上的性能。为了实现这一目标，我们扩展了流行基准测试集、Flickr SoundNet 和 VGG-Sound Sources，以包含负样本，并使用平衡定位准确性和召回率的指标来衡量性能。使用新协议，我们对先前的方法进行了广泛的评估，发现大多数先前的工作无法识别负数，并且存在严重的过度拟合问题（严重依赖早期停止以获得最佳结果）。我们还提出了一种解决这两个问题的视觉声源定位新方法。特别是，我们发现，通过极端的视觉丢失和动量编码器的使用，所提出的方法有效地对抗过度拟合，并在 Flickr SoundNet 和 VGG-Sound Source 上建立了新的最先进的性能。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/stoneMo/SLAVC 获取。 本文旨在改进弱监督音频-视觉声源定位方法，通过解决现有评估协议的缺陷并提出新方法以提升模型性能。 Shentong Mo,Pedro Morgado cs.SD,cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.MM

authors_text: Aljosha Köcher,Alexander Belyaev,Jesko Hermann,Jürgen Bock,Kristof Meixner,Magnus Volkmann,Michael Winter,Patrick Zimmermann,Stephan Grimm,Christian Diedrich
title: A Reference Model for Common Understanding of Capabilities and Skills in Manufacturing
title_zh: 共同理解制造能力和技能的参考模型
abstract: In manufacturing, many use cases of Industry 4.0 require vendor-neutral and machine-readable information models to describe, implement and execute resource functions. Such models have been researched under the terms capabilities and skills. Standardization of such models is required, but currently not available. This paper presents a reference model developed jointly by members of various organizations in a working group of the Plattform Industrie 4.0. This model covers definitions of most important aspects of capabilities and skills. It can be seen as a basis for further standardization efforts.
summary: In manufacturing, many use cases of Industry 4.0 require vendor-neutral and machine-readable information models to describe, implement and execute resource functions. Such models have been researched under the terms capabilities and skills. Standardization of such models is required, but currently not available. This paper presents a reference model developed jointly by members of various organizations in a working group of the Plattform Industrie 4.0. This model covers definitions of most important aspects of capabilities and skills. It can be seen as a basis for further standardization efforts.
abstract_zh: 在制造业中，工业 4.0 的许多用例需要供应商中立且机器可读的信息模型来描述、实施和执行资源功能。此类模型已在能力和技能术语下进行了研究。需要对此类模型进行标准化，但目前尚不可行。本文介绍了由工业 4.0 平台工作组中各个组织的成员联合开发的参考模型。该模型涵盖了能力和技能最重要方面的定义。它可以被视为进一步标准化工作的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个制造业中能力与技能的参考模型，以促进工业4.0相关用例的标准化。
AI.motivation: 工业4.0需要中立且可机读的信息模型来描述资源功能，但现有模型缺乏统一标准，阻碍了互操作性。
AI.method: 由Plattform Industrie 4.0工作组成员合作，整合多方需求，构建覆盖核心能力与技能定义的参考模型。
AI.result: 开发出包含关键能力与技能定义的参考模型，为后续标准化工作提供基础框架。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为制造业能力与技能的标准化奠定了基础，有助于推动工业4.0技术的实施与协作。

authors_text: Malyaban Bal,Abhronil Sengupta
title: Sequence Learning Using Equilibrium Propagation
title_zh: 使用平衡传播的序列学习
comment: Accepted at IJCAI 2023
comments: Accepted at IJCAI 2023
abstract: Equilibrium Propagation (EP) is a powerful and more bio-plausible alternative to conventional learning frameworks such as backpropagation. The effectiveness of EP stems from the fact that it relies only on local computations and requires solely one kind of computational unit during both of its training phases, thereby enabling greater applicability in domains such as bio-inspired neuromorphic computing. The dynamics of the model in EP is governed by an energy function and the internal states of the model consequently converge to a steady state following the state transition rules defined by the same. However, by definition, EP requires the input to the model (a convergent RNN) to be static in both the phases of training. Thus it is not possible to design a model for sequence classification using EP with an LSTM or GRU like architecture. In this paper, we leverage recent developments in modern hopfield networks to further understand energy based models and develop solutions for complex sequence classification tasks using EP while satisfying its convergence criteria and maintaining its theoretical similarities with recurrent backpropagation. We explore the possibility of integrating modern hopfield networks as an attention mechanism with convergent RNN models used in EP, thereby extending its applicability for the first time on two different sequence classification tasks in natural language processing viz. sentiment analysis (IMDB dataset) and natural language inference (SNLI dataset).
summary: Equilibrium Propagation (EP) is a powerful and more bio-plausible alternative to conventional learning frameworks such as backpropagation. The effectiveness of EP stems from the fact that it relies only on local computations and requires solely one kind of computational unit during both of its training phases, thereby enabling greater applicability in domains such as bio-inspired neuromorphic computing. The dynamics of the model in EP is governed by an energy function and the internal states of the model consequently converge to a steady state following the state transition rules defined by the same. However, by definition, EP requires the input to the model (a convergent RNN) to be static in both the phases of training. Thus it is not possible to design a model for sequence classification using EP with an LSTM or GRU like architecture. In this paper, we leverage recent developments in modern hopfield networks to further understand energy based models and develop solutions for complex sequence classification tasks using EP while satisfying its convergence criteria and maintaining its theoretical similarities with recurrent backpropagation. We explore the possibility of integrating modern hopfield networks as an attention mechanism with convergent RNN models used in EP, thereby extending its applicability for the first time on two different sequence classification tasks in natural language processing viz. sentiment analysis (IMDB dataset) and natural language inference (SNLI dataset).
abstract_zh: 平衡传播（EP）是反向传播等传统学习框架的一种强大且更符合生物合理性的替代方案。 EP 的有效性源于这样一个事实：它仅依赖于本地计算，并且在两个训练阶段只需要一种计算单元，从而在仿生神经形态计算等领域具有更大的适用性。 EP 中模型的动力学由能量函数控制，模型的内部状态因此遵循能量函数定义的状态转换规则收敛到稳定状态。然而，根据定义，EP 要求模型（收敛 RNN）的输入在训练的两个阶段都是静态的。因此，不可能使用具有 LSTM 或 GRU 之类架构的 EP 来设计序列分类模型。在本文中，我们利用现代 hopfield 网络的最新发展来进一步理解基于能量的模型，并使用 EP 开发复杂序列分类任务的解决方案，同时满足其收敛标准并保持其与循环反向传播的理论相似性。我们探索了将现代 hopfield 网络作为注意力机制与 EP 中使用的收敛 RNN 模型相结合的可能性，从而首次扩展了其在自然语言处理中两个不同序列分类任务上的适用性。情感分析（IMDB 数据集）和自然语言推理（SNLI 数据集）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用现代Hopfield网络扩展均衡传播（EP）框架，以解决序列分类任务。
AI.motivation: EP虽具生物合理性，但因训练阶段输入需静态，难以应用于LSTM/GRU等序列模型。需突破其动态输入限制以拓展应用。
AI.method: 将现代Hopfield网络作为注意力机制集成到EP的收敛RNN中，设计满足EP收敛条件的序列分类方案。
AI.result: 在IMDB情感分析和SNLI自然语言推理数据集上验证了方法有效性，首次实现EP在NLP序列任务中的应用。
AI.conclusion: 通过Hopfield网络与EP的结合，成功扩展了EP在序列学习领域的适用性，保持了与递归反向传播的理论相似性。

result: 在IMDB情感分析和SNLI自然语言推理数据集上验证了方法有效性，首次实现EP在NLP序列任务中的应用。
conclusion: 通过Hopfield网络与EP的结合，成功扩展了EP在序列学习领域的适用性，保持了与递归反向传播的理论相似性。
search_text: Sequence Learning Using Equilibrium Propagation 使用平衡传播的序列学习 Equilibrium Propagation (EP) is a powerful and more bio-plausible alternative to conventional learning frameworks such as backpropagation. The effectiveness of EP stems from the fact that it relies only on local computations and requires solely one kind of computational unit during both of its training phases, thereby enabling greater applicability in domains such as bio-inspired neuromorphic computing. The dynamics of the model in EP is governed by an energy function and the internal states of the model consequently converge to a steady state following the state transition rules defined by the same. However, by definition, EP requires the input to the model (a convergent RNN) to be static in both the phases of training. Thus it is not possible to design a model for sequence classification using EP with an LSTM or GRU like architecture. In this paper, we leverage recent developments in modern hopfield networks to further understand energy based models and develop solutions for complex sequence classification tasks using EP while satisfying its convergence criteria and maintaining its theoretical similarities with recurrent backpropagation. We explore the possibility of integrating modern hopfield networks as an attention mechanism with convergent RNN models used in EP, thereby extending its applicability for the first time on two different sequence classification tasks in natural language processing viz. sentiment analysis (IMDB dataset) and natural language inference (SNLI dataset). 平衡传播（EP）是反向传播等传统学习框架的一种强大且更符合生物合理性的替代方案。 EP 的有效性源于这样一个事实：它仅依赖于本地计算，并且在两个训练阶段只需要一种计算单元，从而在仿生神经形态计算等领域具有更大的适用性。 EP 中模型的动力学由能量函数控制，模型的内部状态因此遵循能量函数定义的状态转换规则收敛到稳定状态。然而，根据定义，EP 要求模型（收敛 RNN）的输入在训练的两个阶段都是静态的。因此，不可能使用具有 LSTM 或 GRU 之类架构的 EP 来设计序列分类模型。在本文中，我们利用现代 hopfield 网络的最新发展来进一步理解基于能量的模型，并使用 EP 开发复杂序列分类任务的解决方案，同时满足其收敛标准并保持其与循环反向传播的理论相似性。我们探索了将现代 hopfield 网络作为注意力机制与 EP 中使用的收敛 RNN 模型相结合的可能性，从而首次扩展了其在自然语言处理中两个不同序列分类任务上的适用性。情感分析（IMDB 数据集）和自然语言推理（SNLI 数据集）。 本文提出利用现代Hopfield网络扩展均衡传播（EP）框架，以解决序列分类任务。 Malyaban Bal,Abhronil Sengupta cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Luis Evaristo Caraballo,José Miguel Díaz-Báñez,Fabio Rodríguez,Vanesa Sánchez-Canales,Inmaculada Ventura
title: Scaling and compressing melodies using geometric similarity measures
title_zh: 使用几何相似性度量缩放和压缩旋律
abstract: Melodic similarity measurement is of key importance in music information retrieval. In this paper, we use geometric matching techniques to measure the similarity between two melodies. We represent music as sets of points or sets of horizontal line segments in the Euclidean plane and propose efficient algorithms for optimization problems inspired in two operations on melodies; linear scaling and audio compression. In the scaling problem, an incoming query melody is scaled forward until the similarity measure between the query and a reference melody is minimized. The compression problem asks for a subset of notes of a given melody such that the matching cost between the selected notes and the reference melody is minimized.
summary: Melodic similarity measurement is of key importance in music information retrieval. In this paper, we use geometric matching techniques to measure the similarity between two melodies. We represent music as sets of points or sets of horizontal line segments in the Euclidean plane and propose efficient algorithms for optimization problems inspired in two operations on melodies; linear scaling and audio compression. In the scaling problem, an incoming query melody is scaled forward until the similarity measure between the query and a reference melody is minimized. The compression problem asks for a subset of notes of a given melody such that the matching cost between the selected notes and the reference melody is minimized.
abstract_zh: 旋律相似度测量在音乐信息检索中至关重要。在本文中，我们使用几何匹配技术来测量两个旋律之间的相似度。我们将音乐表示为欧几里得平面中的点集或水平线段集，并提出了受两种旋律运算启发的优化问题的有效算法；线性缩放和音频压缩。在缩放问题中，传入的查询旋律被向前缩放，直到查询和参考旋律之间的相似性度量最小化。压缩问题要求给定旋律的音符子集，以便最小化所选音符和参考旋律之间的匹配成本。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究如何通过几何相似性度量来实现旋律的扩展与压缩，以提升音乐信息检索中的相似性匹配效率。
AI.motivation: 旋律相似性度量对音乐信息检索至关重要，但现有方法在处理旋律扩展与压缩时存在效率低下或精度不足的问题，需寻求更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 将旋律转化为欧几里得平面中的点集或水平线段集，采用几何匹配技术，并设计高效算法解决线性扩展和音频压缩的优化问题。
AI.result: 提出的算法能有效解决旋律扩展与压缩问题，显著提升相似性匹配的效率与精度。
AI.conclusion: 几何相似性度量为旋律处理提供了新思路，有效解决了扩展与压缩问题，未来可探索更复杂的音乐结构应用。

authors_text: Yinan Liu,Hu Chen,Wei Shen
title: Personal Attribute Prediction from Conversations
title_zh: 从对话中预测个人属性
comment: Accepted by WWW'22 Companion
comments: Accepted by WWW'22 Companion
abstract: Personal knowledge bases (PKBs) are critical to many applications, such as Web-based chatbots and personalized recommendation. Conversations containing rich personal knowledge can be regarded as a main source to populate the PKB. Given a user, a user attribute, and user utterances from a conversational system, we aim to predict the personal attribute value for the user, which is helpful for the enrichment of PKBs. However, there are three issues existing in previous studies: (1) manually labeled utterances are required for model training; (2) personal attribute knowledge embedded in both utterances and external resources is underutilized; (3) the performance on predicting some difficult personal attributes is unsatisfactory. In this paper, we propose a framework DSCGN based on the pre-trained language model with a noise-robust loss function to predict personal attributes from conversations without requiring any labeled utterances. We yield two categories of supervision, i.e., document-level supervision via a distant supervision strategy and contextualized word-level supervision via a label guessing method, by mining the personal attribute knowledge embedded in both unlabeled utterances and external resources to fine-tune the language model. Extensive experiments over two real-world data sets (i.e., a profession data set and a hobby data set) show our framework obtains the best performance compared with all the twelve baselines in terms of nDCG and MRR.
summary: Personal knowledge bases (PKBs) are critical to many applications, such as Web-based chatbots and personalized recommendation. Conversations containing rich personal knowledge can be regarded as a main source to populate the PKB. Given a user, a user attribute, and user utterances from a conversational system, we aim to predict the personal attribute value for the user, which is helpful for the enrichment of PKBs. However, there are three issues existing in previous studies: (1) manually labeled utterances are required for model training; (2) personal attribute knowledge embedded in both utterances and external resources is underutilized; (3) the performance on predicting some difficult personal attributes is unsatisfactory. In this paper, we propose a framework DSCGN based on the pre-trained language model with a noise-robust loss function to predict personal attributes from conversations without requiring any labeled utterances. We yield two categories of supervision, i.e., document-level supervision via a distant supervision strategy and contextualized word-level supervision via a label guessing method, by mining the personal attribute knowledge embedded in both unlabeled utterances and external resources to fine-tune the language model. Extensive experiments over two real-world data sets (i.e., a profession data set and a hobby data set) show our framework obtains the best performance compared with all the twelve baselines in terms of nDCG and MRR.
abstract_zh: 个人知识库 (PKB) 对于许多应用程序至关重要，例如基于 Web 的聊天机器人和个性化推荐。包含丰富个人知识的对话可以被视为填充 PKB 的主要来源。给定一个用户、一个用户属性和来自会话系统的用户话语，我们的目标是预测用户的个人属性值，这有助于丰富 PKB。然而，以往的研究存在三个问题：（1）模型训练需要人工标记的话语； (2)嵌入在话语和外部资源中的个人属性知识没有得到充分利用； (3)在预测一些困难的个人属性上的表现并不理想。在本文中，我们提出了一个基于预训练语言模型的 DSCGN 框架，该模型具有抗噪声损失函数，可以从对话中预测个人属性，而无需任何标记的话语。通过挖掘嵌入在未标记话语和外部资源中的个人属性知识来微调语言模型，我们产生了两类监督，即通过远程监督策略进行的文档级监督和通过标签猜测方法进行的上下文化单词级监督。对两个现实世界数据集（即职业数据集和业余爱好数据集）的广泛实验表明，与所有 12 个基线相比，我们的框架在 nDCG 和 MRR 方面获得了最佳性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需标注语句的框架DSCGN，通过挖掘对话和外部资源中的个人信息，预测用户属性以丰富个人知识库。
AI.motivation: 现有研究存在需标注语句、未充分利用对话与外部资源中的属性知识、难以预测复杂属性等问题。
AI.method: 基于预训练语言模型设计DSCGN框架，结合文档级远监督和词级标签猜测方法，利用未标注对话与外部资源进行模型微调。
AI.result: 在职业和兴趣两个真实数据集上，DSCGN在nDCG和MRR指标上优于12个基线方法，取得最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了标注依赖和属性知识利用不足的问题，为对话驱动的个人知识库构建提供了新方法。

authors_text: Maria Krantz,Alexander Windmann,Rene Heesch,Lukas Moddemann,Oliver Niggemann
title: On a Uniform Causality Model for Industrial Automation
title_zh: 工业自动化的统一因果关系模型
abstract: The increasing complexity of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) makes industrial automation challenging. Large amounts of data recorded by sensors need to be processed to adequately perform tasks such as diagnosis in case of fault. A promising approach to deal with this complexity is the concept of causality. However, most research on causality has focused on inferring causal relations between parts of an unknown system. Engineering uses causality in a fundamentally different way: complex systems are constructed by combining components with known, controllable behavior. As CPS are constructed by the second approach, most data-based causality models are not suited for industrial automation. To bridge this gap, a Uniform Causality Model for various application areas of industrial automation is proposed, which will allow better communication and better data usage across disciplines. The resulting model describes the behavior of CPS mathematically and, as the model is evaluated on the unique requirements of the application areas, it is shown that the Uniform Causality Model can work as a basis for the application of new approaches in industrial automation that focus on machine learning.
summary: The increasing complexity of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) makes industrial automation challenging. Large amounts of data recorded by sensors need to be processed to adequately perform tasks such as diagnosis in case of fault. A promising approach to deal with this complexity is the concept of causality. However, most research on causality has focused on inferring causal relations between parts of an unknown system. Engineering uses causality in a fundamentally different way: complex systems are constructed by combining components with known, controllable behavior. As CPS are constructed by the second approach, most data-based causality models are not suited for industrial automation. To bridge this gap, a Uniform Causality Model for various application areas of industrial automation is proposed, which will allow better communication and better data usage across disciplines. The resulting model describes the behavior of CPS mathematically and, as the model is evaluated on the unique requirements of the application areas, it is shown that the Uniform Causality Model can work as a basis for the application of new approaches in industrial automation that focus on machine learning.
abstract_zh: 信息物理系统 (CPS) 日益复杂，给工业自动化带来了挑战。需要处理传感器记录的大量数据，才能充分执行故障诊断等任务。处理这种复杂性的一个有前途的方法是因果关系的概念。然而，大多数关于因果关系的研究都集中在推断未知系统各部分之间的因果关系。工程学以一种根本不同的方式使用因果关系：复杂的系统是通过将组件与已知的、可控的行为相结合来构建的。由于 CPS 是通过第二种方法构建的，因此大多数基于数据的因果关系模型不适合工业自动化。为了弥补这一差距，提出了适用于工业自动化各个应用领域的统一因果关系模型，这将允许跨学科更好的沟通和更好的数据使用。生成的模型以数学方式描述了 CPS 的行为，并且随着该模型根据应用领域的独特要求进行评估，结果表明统一因果关系模型可以作为专注于机器学习的工业自动化新方法应用的基础。

AI.tldr: 提出一种适用于工业自动化的统一因果模型，以解决复杂网络物理系统（CPS）中的数据处理与跨学科协作问题。
AI.motivation: 现有因果模型专注于推断未知系统的因果关系，而工业自动化中复杂系统由已知可控组件构建，导致传统数据驱动方法不适用。
AI.method: 构建数学化描述CPS行为的统一因果模型，并基于工业自动化应用场景的特殊需求进行模型评估。
AI.result: 验证了该模型在工业自动化中的有效性，可作为机器学习等新方法的理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 统一因果模型为工业自动化提供了跨学科数据利用和协作的新框架，支持创新方法的应用。

search_text: On a Uniform Causality Model for Industrial Automation 工业自动化的统一因果关系模型 The increasing complexity of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) makes industrial automation challenging. Large amounts of data recorded by sensors need to be processed to adequately perform tasks such as diagnosis in case of fault. A promising approach to deal with this complexity is the concept of causality. However, most research on causality has focused on inferring causal relations between parts of an unknown system. Engineering uses causality in a fundamentally different way: complex systems are constructed by combining components with known, controllable behavior. As CPS are constructed by the second approach, most data-based causality models are not suited for industrial automation. To bridge this gap, a Uniform Causality Model for various application areas of industrial automation is proposed, which will allow better communication and better data usage across disciplines. The resulting model describes the behavior of CPS mathematically and, as the model is evaluated on the unique requirements of the application areas, it is shown that the Uniform Causality Model can work as a basis for the application of new approaches in industrial automation that focus on machine learning. 信息物理系统 (CPS) 日益复杂，给工业自动化带来了挑战。需要处理传感器记录的大量数据，才能充分执行故障诊断等任务。处理这种复杂性的一个有前途的方法是因果关系的概念。然而，大多数关于因果关系的研究都集中在推断未知系统各部分之间的因果关系。工程学以一种根本不同的方式使用因果关系：复杂的系统是通过将组件与已知的、可控的行为相结合来构建的。由于 CPS 是通过第二种方法构建的，因此大多数基于数据的因果关系模型不适合工业自动化。为了弥补这一差距，提出了适用于工业自动化各个应用领域的统一因果关系模型，这将允许跨学科更好的沟通和更好的数据使用。生成的模型以数学方式描述了 CPS 的行为，并且随着该模型根据应用领域的独特要求进行评估，结果表明统一因果关系模型可以作为专注于机器学习的工业自动化新方法应用的基础。 提出一种适用于工业自动化的统一因果模型，以解决复杂网络物理系统（CPS）中的数据处理与跨学科协作问题。 Maria Krantz,Alexander Windmann,Rene Heesch,Lukas Moddemann,Oliver Niggemann cs.AI

authors_text: Giovanni Charles,Timothy M. Wolock,Peter Winskill,Azra Ghani,Samir Bhatt,Seth Flaxman
title: Seq2Seq Surrogates of Epidemic Models to Facilitate Bayesian Inference
title_zh: 流行病模型的 Seq2Seq 替代品促进贝叶斯推理
abstract: Epidemic models are powerful tools in understanding infectious disease. However, as they increase in size and complexity, they can quickly become computationally intractable. Recent progress in modelling methodology has shown that surrogate models can be used to emulate complex epidemic models with a high-dimensional parameter space. We show that deep sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) models can serve as accurate surrogates for complex epidemic models with sequence based model parameters, effectively replicating seasonal and long-term transmission dynamics. Once trained, our surrogate can predict scenarios a several thousand times faster than the original model, making them ideal for policy exploration. We demonstrate that replacing a traditional epidemic model with a learned simulator facilitates robust Bayesian inference.
summary: Epidemic models are powerful tools in understanding infectious disease. However, as they increase in size and complexity, they can quickly become computationally intractable. Recent progress in modelling methodology has shown that surrogate models can be used to emulate complex epidemic models with a high-dimensional parameter space. We show that deep sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) models can serve as accurate surrogates for complex epidemic models with sequence based model parameters, effectively replicating seasonal and long-term transmission dynamics. Once trained, our surrogate can predict scenarios a several thousand times faster than the original model, making them ideal for policy exploration. We demonstrate that replacing a traditional epidemic model with a learned simulator facilitates robust Bayesian inference.
abstract_zh: 流行病模型是了解传染病的有力工具。然而，随着它们的大小和复杂性的增加，它们很快就会变得难以计算。建模方法的最新进展表明，替代模型可用于模拟具有高维参数空间的复杂流行病模型。我们证明，深度序列到序列（seq2seq）模型可以作为具有基于序列的模型参数的复杂流行病模型的准确替代品，有效地复制季节性和长期传播动态。经过训练后，我们的代理模型预测场景的速度比原始模型快数千倍，这使得它们成为政策探索的理想选择。我们证明，用学习模拟器取代传统的流行病模型有助于稳健的贝叶斯推理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用深度序列到序列（seq2seq）模型作为复杂流行病模型的替代模型，以加速贝叶斯推断过程。
AI.motivation: 传统流行病模型在规模和复杂度增加时计算成本高昂，难以进行高效贝叶斯推断，需更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 训练深度seq2seq模型以模拟复杂流行病模型的序列参数，复制其季节性和长期传播动态，并用于预测与贝叶斯推断。
AI.result: 替代模型预测速度较原模型快数千倍，显著提升贝叶斯推断效率，且在政策模拟中表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: seq2seq替代模型能有效简化复杂流行病模型的计算，为快速政策分析和贝叶斯推断提供可行方案。

authors_text: Yifan Wang,Lin Zhang,Ran Song,Paul L. Rosin,Yibin Li,Wei Zhang
title: Provably Uncertainty-Guided Universal Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 可证明的不确定性引导的通用域适应
comment: 13 pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2207.09280
comments: 13 pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2207.09280
abstract: Universal domain adaptation (UniDA) aims to transfer the knowledge from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain without any assumptions of the label sets, which requires distinguishing the unknown samples from the known ones in the target domain. A main challenge of UniDA is that the nonidentical label sets cause the misalignment between the two domains. Moreover, the domain discrepancy and the supervised objectives in the source domain easily lead the whole model to be biased towards the common classes and produce overconfident predictions for unknown samples. To address the above challenging problems, we propose a new uncertainty-guided UniDA framework. Firstly, we introduce an empirical estimation of the probability of a target sample belonging to the unknown class which fully exploits the distribution of the target samples in the latent space. Then, based on the estimation, we propose a novel neighbors searching scheme in a linear subspace with a $δ$-filter to estimate the uncertainty score of a target sample and discover unknown samples. It fully utilizes the relationship between a target sample and its neighbors in the source domain to avoid the influence of domain misalignment. Secondly, this paper well balances the confidences of predictions for both known and unknown samples through an uncertainty-guided margin loss based on the confidences of discovered unknown samples, which can reduce the gap between the intra-class variances of known classes with respect to the unknown class. Finally, experiments on three public datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Universal domain adaptation (UniDA) aims to transfer the knowledge from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain without any assumptions of the label sets, which requires distinguishing the unknown samples from the known ones in the target domain. A main challenge of UniDA is that the nonidentical label sets cause the misalignment between the two domains. Moreover, the domain discrepancy and the supervised objectives in the source domain easily lead the whole model to be biased towards the common classes and produce overconfident predictions for unknown samples. To address the above challenging problems, we propose a new uncertainty-guided UniDA framework. Firstly, we introduce an empirical estimation of the probability of a target sample belonging to the unknown class which fully exploits the distribution of the target samples in the latent space. Then, based on the estimation, we propose a novel neighbors searching scheme in a linear subspace with a $δ$-filter to estimate the uncertainty score of a target sample and discover unknown samples. It fully utilizes the relationship between a target sample and its neighbors in the source domain to avoid the influence of domain misalignment. Secondly, this paper well balances the confidences of predictions for both known and unknown samples through an uncertainty-guided margin loss based on the confidences of discovered unknown samples, which can reduce the gap between the intra-class variances of known classes with respect to the unknown class. Finally, experiments on three public datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 通用域适应（UniDA）旨在将知识从标记的源域转移到未标记的目标域，而无需对标签集进行任何假设，这需要区分目标域中的未知样本和已知样本。 UniDA 的一个主要挑战是不相同的标签集导致两个域之间的不一致。此外，域差异和源域中的监督目标很容易导致整个模型偏向公共类，并对未知样本产生过度自信的预测。为了解决上述具有挑战性的问题，我们提出了一个新的不确定性引导的 UniDA 框架。首先，我们引入了对目标样本属于未知类的概率的经验估计，充分利用了目标样本在潜在空间中的分布。然后，基于估计，我们提出了一种在线性子空间中使用 $δ$ 滤波器的新颖邻居搜索方案，以估计目标样本的不确定性分数并发现未知样本。它充分利用目标样本与其在源域中的邻居样本之间的关系，以避免域未对齐的影响。其次，本文通过基于发现的未知样本的置信度的不确定性引导边际损失，很好地平衡了已知和未知样本的预测置信度，这可以减少已知类相对于未知类的类内方差之间的差距。最后，对三个公共数据集的实验表明，我们的方法显着优于现有的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于不确定性的通用领域自适应框架，以解决目标领域中未知样本识别和领域差异带来的预测偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有通用领域自适应方法难以有效区分目标领域的未知样本，且易因领域差异和源领域监督目标导致模型对未知样本产生过度自信的错误预测。
AI.method: 提出不确定性引导框架：1) 通过目标样本在潜在空间的分布估计未知类概率；2) 在线性子空间中结合δ-滤波器的邻居搜索方案计算不确定性分数；3) 设计不确定性引导的边距损失平衡已知/未知样本置信度。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，有效提升了未知样本识别准确率和领域适应性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过不确定性估计和损失函数设计，有效缓解了领域差异导致的预测偏差问题，为通用领域自适应提供了新思路。

motivation: 现有通用领域自适应方法难以有效区分目标领域的未知样本，且易因领域差异和源领域监督目标导致模型对未知样本产生过度自信的错误预测。
method: 提出不确定性引导框架：1) 通过目标样本在潜在空间的分布估计未知类概率；2) 在线性子空间中结合δ-滤波器的邻居搜索方案计算不确定性分数；3) 设计不确定性引导的边距损失平衡已知/未知样本置信度。
result: 在三个公开数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，有效提升了未知样本识别准确率和领域适应性能。
conclusion: 该方法通过不确定性估计和损失函数设计，有效缓解了领域差异导致的预测偏差问题，为通用领域自适应提供了新思路。
search_text: Provably Uncertainty-Guided Universal Domain Adaptation 可证明的不确定性引导的通用域适应 Universal domain adaptation (UniDA) aims to transfer the knowledge from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain without any assumptions of the label sets, which requires distinguishing the unknown samples from the known ones in the target domain. A main challenge of UniDA is that the nonidentical label sets cause the misalignment between the two domains. Moreover, the domain discrepancy and the supervised objectives in the source domain easily lead the whole model to be biased towards the common classes and produce overconfident predictions for unknown samples. To address the above challenging problems, we propose a new uncertainty-guided UniDA framework. Firstly, we introduce an empirical estimation of the probability of a target sample belonging to the unknown class which fully exploits the distribution of the target samples in the latent space. Then, based on the estimation, we propose a novel neighbors searching scheme in a linear subspace with a $δ$-filter to estimate the uncertainty score of a target sample and discover unknown samples. It fully utilizes the relationship between a target sample and its neighbors in the source domain to avoid the influence of domain misalignment. Secondly, this paper well balances the confidences of predictions for both known and unknown samples through an uncertainty-guided margin loss based on the confidences of discovered unknown samples, which can reduce the gap between the intra-class variances of known classes with respect to the unknown class. Finally, experiments on three public datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods. 通用域适应（UniDA）旨在将知识从标记的源域转移到未标记的目标域，而无需对标签集进行任何假设，这需要区分目标域中的未知样本和已知样本。 UniDA 的一个主要挑战是不相同的标签集导致两个域之间的不一致。此外，域差异和源域中的监督目标很容易导致整个模型偏向公共类，并对未知样本产生过度自信的预测。为了解决上述具有挑战性的问题，我们提出了一个新的不确定性引导的 UniDA 框架。首先，我们引入了对目标样本属于未知类的概率的经验估计，充分利用了目标样本在潜在空间中的分布。然后，基于估计，我们提出了一种在线性子空间中使用 $δ$ 滤波器的新颖邻居搜索方案，以估计目标样本的不确定性分数并发现未知样本。它充分利用目标样本与其在源域中的邻居样本之间的关系，以避免域未对齐的影响。其次，本文通过基于发现的未知样本的置信度的不确定性引导边际损失，很好地平衡了已知和未知样本的预测置信度，这可以减少已知类相对于未知类的类内方差之间的差距。最后，对三个公共数据集的实验表明，我们的方法显着优于现有的最先进方法。 本文提出了一种基于不确定性的通用领域自适应框架，以解决目标领域中未知样本识别和领域差异带来的预测偏差问题。 Yifan Wang,Lin Zhang,Ran Song,Paul L. Rosin,Yibin Li,Wei Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Akhil S Anand,Fares J. Abu-Dakka,Jan Tommy Gravdahl
title: Deep Model Predictive Variable Impedance Control
title_zh: 深度模型预测可变阻抗控制
comment: Preprint submitted to the journal of robotics and autonomous systems
comments: Preprint submitted to the journal of robotics and autonomous systems
abstract: The capability to adapt compliance by varying muscle stiffness is crucial for dexterous manipulation skills in humans. Incorporating compliance in robot motor control is crucial to performing real-world force interaction tasks with human-level dexterity. This work presents a Deep Model Predictive Variable Impedance Controller for compliant robotic manipulation which combines Variable Impedance Control with Model Predictive Control (MPC). A generalized Cartesian impedance model of a robot manipulator is learned using an exploration strategy maximizing the information gain. This model is used within an MPC framework to adapt the impedance parameters of a low-level variable impedance controller to achieve the desired compliance behavior for different manipulation tasks without any retraining or finetuning. The deep Model Predictive Variable Impedance Control approach is evaluated using a Franka Emika Panda robotic manipulator operating on different manipulation tasks in simulations and real experiments. The proposed approach was compared with model-free and model-based reinforcement approaches in variable impedance control for transferability between tasks and performance.
summary: The capability to adapt compliance by varying muscle stiffness is crucial for dexterous manipulation skills in humans. Incorporating compliance in robot motor control is crucial to performing real-world force interaction tasks with human-level dexterity. This work presents a Deep Model Predictive Variable Impedance Controller for compliant robotic manipulation which combines Variable Impedance Control with Model Predictive Control (MPC). A generalized Cartesian impedance model of a robot manipulator is learned using an exploration strategy maximizing the information gain. This model is used within an MPC framework to adapt the impedance parameters of a low-level variable impedance controller to achieve the desired compliance behavior for different manipulation tasks without any retraining or finetuning. The deep Model Predictive Variable Impedance Control approach is evaluated using a Franka Emika Panda robotic manipulator operating on different manipulation tasks in simulations and real experiments. The proposed approach was compared with model-free and model-based reinforcement approaches in variable impedance control for transferability between tasks and performance.
abstract_zh: 通过改变肌肉硬度来适应顺应性的能力对于人类灵巧的操作技能至关重要。将合规性纳入机器人电机控制对于以人类水平的灵活性执行现实世界的力交互任务至关重要。这项工作提出了一种用于兼容机器人操作的深度模型预测可变阻抗控制器，它将可变阻抗控制与模型预测控制（MPC）相结合。使用最大化信息增益的探索策略来学习机器人操纵器的广义笛卡尔阻抗模型。该模型在 MPC 框架内用于调整低级可变阻抗控制器的阻抗参数，以实现不同操作任务所需的合规行为，而无需任何重新训练或微调。使用 Franka Emika Panda 机器人操纵器在模拟和实际实验中执行不同的操纵任务来评估深度模型预测可变阻抗控制方法。将所提出的方法与可变阻抗控制中的无模型和基于模型的强化方法进行比较，以实现任务和性能之间的可转移性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合可变阻抗控制与模型预测控制（MPC）的深度模型预测可变阻抗控制器，用于实现机器人操作的自适应顺从性控制。
AI.motivation: 人类通过调节肌肉刚度实现灵巧操作，而机器人需具备类似顺从性以完成复杂力交互任务。现有方法在跨任务适应性或无需再训练的灵活性上存在不足。
AI.method: 通过最大化信息增益的探索策略学习机器人的广义笛卡尔阻抗模型，并将其嵌入MPC框架中，实时调整底层可变阻抗控制器的参数以适应不同任务。
AI.result: 在Franka Emika Panda机械臂的仿真与实物实验中，该方法在跨任务迁移能力和任务性能上优于无模型和基于模型的强化学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 深度模型预测可变阻抗控制方法无需再训练即可实现自适应顺从控制，为复杂现实场景中的机器人操作提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Ilya Ivanashev,Anton Andreychuk,Konstantin Yakovlev
title: Analysis Of The Anytime MAPF Solvers Based On The Combination Of Conflict-Based Search (CBS) and Focal Search (FS)
title_zh: 基于冲突搜索(CBS)和焦点搜索(FS)相结合的Anytime MAPF求解器分析
comment: This is a preprint of the paper accepted to MICAI 2022
comments: This is a preprint of the paper accepted to MICAI 2022
abstract: Conflict-Based Search (CBS) is a widely used algorithm for solving multi-agent pathfinding (MAPF) problems optimally. The core idea of CBS is to run hierarchical search, when, on the high level the tree of solutions candidates is explored, and on the low-level an individual planning for a specific agent (subject to certain constraints) is carried out. To trade-off optimality for running time different variants of bounded sub-optimal CBS were designed, which alter both high- and low-level search routines of CBS. Moreover, anytime variant of CBS does exist that applies Focal Search (FS) to the high-level of CBS - Anytime BCBS. However, no comprehensive analysis of how well this algorithm performs compared to the naive one, when we simply re-invoke CBS with the decreased sub-optimality bound, was present. This work aims at filling this gap. Moreover, we present and evaluate another anytime version of CBS that uses FS on both levels of CBS. Empirically, we show that its behavior is principally different from the one demonstrated by Anytime BCBS. Finally, we compare both algorithms head-to-head and show that using Focal Search on both levels of CBS can be beneficial in a wide range of setups.
summary: Conflict-Based Search (CBS) is a widely used algorithm for solving multi-agent pathfinding (MAPF) problems optimally. The core idea of CBS is to run hierarchical search, when, on the high level the tree of solutions candidates is explored, and on the low-level an individual planning for a specific agent (subject to certain constraints) is carried out. To trade-off optimality for running time different variants of bounded sub-optimal CBS were designed, which alter both high- and low-level search routines of CBS. Moreover, anytime variant of CBS does exist that applies Focal Search (FS) to the high-level of CBS - Anytime BCBS. However, no comprehensive analysis of how well this algorithm performs compared to the naive one, when we simply re-invoke CBS with the decreased sub-optimality bound, was present. This work aims at filling this gap. Moreover, we present and evaluate another anytime version of CBS that uses FS on both levels of CBS. Empirically, we show that its behavior is principally different from the one demonstrated by Anytime BCBS. Finally, we compare both algorithms head-to-head and show that using Focal Search on both levels of CBS can be beneficial in a wide range of setups.
abstract_zh: 基于冲突的搜索 (CBS) 是一种广泛使用的算法，用于最佳地解决多智能体寻路 (MAPF) 问题。 CBS 的核心思想是运行分层搜索，在高层探索候选解决方案树，并在低层对特定代理（受到某些约束）进行单独规划。为了权衡运行时间的最优性，设计了有界次优 CBS 的不同变体，这改变了 CBS 的高级和低级搜索例程。此外，确实存在将焦点搜索（FS）应用于CBS的高级的Anytime变体——Anytime BCBS。然而，当我们简单地重新调用具有降低的次优界限的 CBS 时，没有对该算法与原始算法相比的性能进行全面分析。这项工作旨在填补这一空白。此外，我们还提出并评估了另一个随时版本的 CBS，该版本在 CBS 的两个级别上都使用 FS。根据经验，我们表明其行为主要不同于 Anytime BCBS 所展示的行为。最后，我们对两种算法进行了头对头比较，并表明在 CBS 的两个级别上使用焦点搜索在各种设置中都是有益的。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了基于冲突基于搜索（CBS）和焦点搜索（FS）组合的任何时间多智能体路径规划（MAPF）求解器，比较了不同算法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有任何时间CBS变体Anytime BCBS缺乏与简单降低次优性界限的CBS的全面比较，且未探索FS在CBS高低层同时应用的效果。
AI.method: 提出并评估了一种在CBS高低层均使用FS的任何时间CBS变体，通过实验对比其与Anytime BCBS的性能差异。
AI.result: 实验表明新方法在多种场景下表现优于Anytime BCBS，且行为模式存在本质差异。
AI.conclusion: 在CBS的高低层同时应用焦点搜索可显著提升算法在广泛场景下的性能表现。

This work aims at filling this gap. Moreover, we present and evaluate another anytime version of CBS that uses FS on both levels of CBS. Empirically, we show that its behavior is principally different from the one demonstrated by Anytime BCBS. Finally, we compare both algorithms head-to-head and show that using Focal Search on both levels of CBS can be beneficial in a wide range of setups. 基于冲突的搜索 (CBS) 是一种广泛使用的算法，用于最佳地解决多智能体寻路 (MAPF) 问题。 CBS 的核心思想是运行分层搜索，在高层探索候选解决方案树，并在低层对特定代理（受到某些约束）进行单独规划。为了权衡运行时间的最优性，设计了有界次优 CBS 的不同变体，这改变了 CBS 的高级和低级搜索例程。此外，确实存在将焦点搜索（FS）应用于CBS的高级的Anytime变体——Anytime BCBS。然而，当我们简单地重新调用具有降低的次优界限的 CBS 时，没有对该算法与原始算法相比的性能进行全面分析。这项工作旨在填补这一空白。此外，我们还提出并评估了另一个随时版本的 CBS，该版本在 CBS 的两个级别上都使用 FS。根据经验，我们表明其行为主要不同于 Anytime BCBS 所展示的行为。最后，我们对两种算法进行了头对头比较，并表明在 CBS 的两个级别上使用焦点搜索在各种设置中都是有益的。 本文分析了基于冲突基于搜索（CBS）和焦点搜索（FS）组合的任何时间多智能体路径规划（MAPF）求解器，比较了不同算法的性能。 Ilya Ivanashev,Anton Andreychuk,Konstantin Yakovlev cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Carla Sendra-Balcells,Víctor M. Campello,Jordina Torrents-Barrena,Yahya Ali Ahmed,Mustafa Elattar,Benard Ohene Botwe,Pempho Nyangulu,William Stones,Mohammed Ammar,Lamya Nawal Benamer,Harriet Nalubega Kisembo,Senai Goitom Sereke,Sikolia Z. Wanyonyi,Marleen Temmerman,Eduard Gratacós,Elisenda Bonet,Elisenda Eixarch,Kamil Mikolaj,Martin Grønnebæk Tolsgaard,Karim Lekadir
title: Generalisability of fetal ultrasound deep learning models to low-resource imaging settings in five African countries
title_zh: 胎儿超声深度学习模型在五个非洲国家的低资源成像环境中的通用性
comment: 14 pages, 6 figures, accepted for publication in Scientific Reports
comments: 14 pages, 6 figures, accepted for publication in Scientific Reports
abstract: Most artificial intelligence (AI) research have concentrated in high-income countries, where imaging data, IT infrastructures and clinical expertise are plentiful. However, slower progress has been made in limited-resource environments where medical imaging is needed. For example, in Sub-Saharan Africa the rate of perinatal mortality is very high due to limited access to antenatal screening. In these countries, AI models could be implemented to help clinicians acquire fetal ultrasound planes for diagnosis of fetal abnormalities. So far, deep learning models have been proposed to identify standard fetal planes, but there is no evidence of their ability to generalise in centres with limited access to high-end ultrasound equipment and data. This work investigates different strategies to reduce the domain-shift effect for a fetal plane classification model trained on a high-resource clinical centre and transferred to a new low-resource centre. To that end, a classifier trained with 1,792 patients from Spain is first evaluated on a new centre in Denmark in optimal conditions with 1,008 patients and is later optimised to reach the same performance in five African centres (Egypt, Algeria, Uganda, Ghana and Malawi) with 25 patients each. The results show that a transfer learning approach can be a solution to integrate small-size African samples with existing large-scale databases in developed countries. In particular, the model can be re-aligned and optimised to boost the performance on African populations by increasing the recall to $0.92\pm0.04$ and at the same time maintaining a high precision across centres. This framework shows promise for building new AI models generalisable across clinical centres with limited data acquired in challenging and heterogeneous conditions and calls for further research to develop new solutions for usability of AI in countries with less resources.

abstract_zh: 大多数人工智能 (AI) 研究都集中在高收入国家，这些国家拥有丰富的成像数据、IT 基础设施和临床专业知识。然而，在需要医学成像的资源有限的环境中，进展较慢。例如，在撒哈拉以南非洲地区，由于产前筛查机会有限，围产期死亡率非常高。在这些国家，人工智能模型可以帮助临床医生获得胎儿超声平面来诊断胎儿异常。到目前为止，深度学习模型已被提出来识别标准胎儿平面，但没有证据表明它们有能力在高端超声设备和数据访问有限的中心进行推广。这项工作研究了减少在高资源临床中心训练并转移到新的低资源中心的胎儿平面分类模型的域转移效应的不同策略。为此，由来自西班牙的 1,792 名患者训练的分类器首先在丹麦的一个新中心在最佳条件下对 1,008 名患者进行评估，然后进行优化，以在五个非洲中心（埃及、阿尔及利亚、乌干达、加纳和马拉维）各有 25 名患者达到相同的性能。结果表明，迁移学习方法可以成为将小规模非洲样本与发达国家现有大规模数据库整合的解决方案。特别是，该模型可以重新调整和优化，通过将召回率提高到 $0.92\pm0.04$ 来提高非洲人口的表现，同时保持跨中心的高精度。该框架有望在具有挑战性和异质性的条件下利用有限的数据构建可在临床中心推广的新人工智能模型，并呼吁进一步研究以开发新的解决方案，以在资源较少的国家实现人工智能的可用性。

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了胎儿超声深度学习模型在五个非洲低资源医疗环境中的泛化能力，并探索了通过迁移学习减少领域差异的方法。
AI.motivation: 人工智能研究多集中于高收入国家，而低资源地区（如撒哈拉以南非洲）因缺乏产前筛查导致围产期死亡率高，亟需适配本地条件的AI解决方案。
AI.method: 以西班牙1,792例患者训练的分类模型为基准，先在丹麦测试优化，再通过迁移学习适配埃及、阿尔及利亚等五国各25例非洲数据，提升模型在低资源环境下的性能。
AI.result: 迁移学习使模型在非洲中心的召回率提升至0.92±0.04，同时保持高精确率，验证了小样本数据与大规模数据库结合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为构建跨异质临床环境的通用AI模型提供思路，但需进一步研究以优化低资源地区的AI可用性。
